Name: Lulu and Georgia
Description: We’re Lulu and Georgia. Based in Los Angeles, we design and curate the best in interiors to inspire your home. Find exclusive designer collaborations, uniquely curated collections, and one-of-a-kind vintage pieces to bring your space to life.

Name: BOLIA
Description:
Our collection is inspired by the vivid Scandinavian nature that surrounds us with the changing seasons, comforting earth-toned colours, crafted details and natural materials. All designed to create calm, luxurious and beautiful spaces.

Every product is designed to last for generations and is made by hand by some of Europe’s finest manufacturers. Crafted from nature’s best and most durable materials with the beautiful changing seasons as captivating backdrops.

Welcome to BOLIA.

Name: CasaOne
Description: CasaOne is a furniture, decor, and home goods eCommerce company. For more, please visit casaone.com.

Name: 2XL Home
Description:
UAE based 2XL Furniture & Home Décor is a retail company for luxury home furnishings since 2000. 2XL Furniture & Home Decor is modern and contemporary with a twist of French Design Flare. The selection of Home Decor accessories enhances its beauty and creates an ambience that complements the home solution offering. 2XL Home currently owns showrooms across Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, Al Ain, Fujairah and Oman.

Bring your experience and passion to a Retail Home Furnishing company delivering exceptional service, quality and sustainability. If you are ready for a challenge, join our team & grow with us! 

You can reach us by sending your CV to – hr@2xlme.com

Name: Parachute Home
Description: Parachute makes premium quality home essentials to enhance your life. We believe that high quality, smart design and personal comfort shouldn’t cost a fortune – and that above all – you should start and end your day feeling your very best.

Name: Designitch
Description:
Designitch is a new take on a concept store that retails furniture, lighting, accessories, and art, with a focus on modern and contemporary design.  

With a passion for design, we work relentlessly to continually grow the largest portfolio of brands at the most competitive prices in order to provide a turnkey solution for interiors.  

We have both an 8000 sq ft showroom in Al Quoz and the first e-commerce of its kind for the region.

Name: STARK
Description:
Innovative design. Cutting-edge construction. A forward-thinking, entrepreneurial ethos. 

For more than 80 years, STARK has been the leader in the luxury carpet industry, specializing in custom-designed carpets and rugs of unmatched excellence for both to-the-trade designers and the larger consumer market.

STARK is a family company founded in 1938 by Arthur and Nadia Stark, who were early importers of handmade patterned carpets to America. Today, the company continues to prosper under third-generation family members: CEO Chad Stark and Creative Director Ashley Stark.

Throughout decades in business, STARK has become synonymous with luxury interiors and is one of the most beloved brands in the design industry. Our offerings are available on our e-commerce site and in showrooms across the globe, where our experts help designers and consumers bring their rug or carpet vision to life.

STARK is home to a passionate and diverse collective of corporate team members, account managers, showroom experts, craftspeople, and fulfillment specialists who have a shared mission of creating best-in-class products and experiences for clients all over the world. We believe that the heart of a company lies in its people, and are dedicated to fostering a workplace culture that promotes both career and personal growth.

Name: Room & Board
Description:
As a 100% employee-owned company, people inspire everything we do. From our foundation of trust, we’ve built a culture rooted in meaningful work, respect and holistic well-being. Our difference is designed for your success.

Room & Board is a privately held, national retailer of modern home furnishings based in Minneapolis, Minnesota with locations across the country. Since 1980, we’ve been providing extraordinary experiences for our customers as we help them create homes they love. We create exclusive contemporary designs and believe expertly crafted American-made furniture offers the best value in terms of quality, design longevity and environmental sustainability.

We seamlessly serve our customers through 19 stores, a robust e-commerce site, Business Interiors channel and Customer Care support.

Name: Selency
Description: Selency is the leading marketplace in Europe dedicated to preloved furniture and home decor. We curate each item posted by our antique dealers, and each inspiration to provide a very new experience.

Name: Focus Global Inc
Description:
In October 1991, Focus Global started with just one brand and 20 employees in the Philippines. Today, our team of 500 manages 30 global brands, representing the world’s most trusted home products across the Philippines, Singapore, and Malaysia.

We are a lifestyle retail company that reimagines the retail experience by seamlessly blending online and in-store shopping through our omnichannel strategy. Leveraging the latest technologies, we make the world’s most premium home products accessible at your fingertips with a customer experience that's second to none.

Our team champions one growth philosophy: to “focus, fail, and feedback forward”. We create unique and meaningful spaces to collaborate, grow, and #FindYourFocus. At FGI, asking “what’s next?” is a habit, thinking outside of the box is the norm, and every project is a team sport.

With a vision to touch 100 million homes as #OneFocus, we create results with heart and passion to create elevated and inspired living spaces across Southeast Asia.
Location: Bonifacio Global City, Taguig, Metro Manila

Name: Atrangi Studio
Description: Atrangi Studio is a home decor and lifestyle brand specialising in local handicrafts.

Name: BEHOME
Description:
Lasciati ispirare dalle tante offerte e diverse possibilità di arredo disponibili per tutti gli ambienti della tua casa. Negli showroom, distribuiti sul territorio italiano, troverai un vasto assortimento rigorosamente MADE IN ITALY, personalizzabile a 360 gradi e caratterizzato da vari stili e soluzioni.

BEHOME è contraddistinta da un ambiente familiare e accogliente che saprà farti sentire a tuo agio: avrai a tua disposizione un team di esperti pronti a sviluppare le tue idee ed i tuoi desideri, scegliendo tra una vasta gamma di arredi in linea con le tue esigenze tecniche ed estetiche.

Rappresentiamo da anni un punto di riferimento del nostro settore grazie alle idee innovative di stile e funzionalità. Selezioniamo le migliori materie prime e sottoponiamo i nostri prodotti a controlli rigorosi e costanti per garantirti una qualità certificata che duri nel tempo.

L’obiettivo è quello di proporre, oltre alla qualità dei nostri prodotti, anche la nostra affidabilità e serietà, concetti che, negli anni, ci hanno portato ad un numero sempre maggiore di clienti: la tua soddisfazione è una prova tangibile del valore del nostro lavoro.

Name: The Red Carpet
Description:
The Red Carpet is the UAE’s Largest Premium Retail Carpet Store. Founded in 2005 in Dubai and with over 5 branches worldwide, our aim is to have our timeless collections available to meet all homes.

Our products are made out of the world's finest wool, silk, and viscose and our endless selections are handmade, hand-tufted and machine-made. Our Brand New Projects Department offers a Full Interiors Solution with Customized Rugs, Flooring, Textiles, Interior Design Services and more.

With over 10,000 clients and 20,000 deliveries, it's safe to say we're the regions favorite retail and premium carpet store, with much more to offer.

Name: OC Home Furniture
Description:
At OC Home we strive to deliver the finest experience for everyone who aspires to be a part of the smart-urban lifestyle within a blink of an eye. With the passion to create high-end quality furniture and homeware, our team is determined in designing the ideal mid-century modern home that is economical and favours all taste buds!

Bring your experience and passion to a Retail Home Furnishing company delivering exceptional service, quality and sustainability. If you are ready for a challenge, join our team & grow with us!

You can reach us by sending your CV to – careers@ochome.ae

Name: Artek
Description:
Artek – Art & Technology since 1935

Artek was founded in 1935 in Helsinki by the young idealists Alvar and Aino Aalto, Maire Gullichsen and Nils-Gustav Hahl “to sell furniture and promote a modern culture of living by exhibitions and other educational means”.

Today, the Artek collection of furniture, lighting, and accessories designed by Finnish masters and leading international designers comprises objects that are extraordinary in their clarity, functionality, and poetic simplicity. 

In the radical spirit of its founders, Artek remains one of the most innovative contributors to modern design, breaking new ground at the intersection of design, architecture and art.

Name: vente-unique.com
Description:
L’ameublement au meilleur rapport qualité prix. C’est le credo de https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom, pure-player du e-commerce depuis 2006. Expert de la vente en ligne de mobilier et de décoration, https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom est né en France mais n’a pas tardé à étendre son savoir-faire en Europe : Espagne en 2008, Allemagne en 2010, Belgique en 2012,  puis Suisse, Autriche, Luxembourg en 2013 et Pays-Bas en 2016. Dernier en date : l’Italie lancé en 2017.
Cette année, https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom a atteint les 850 000 clients livrés dans ses pays d’activité. 

https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom appartient au groupe CAFOM qui possède aussi la marque Habitat depuis 2011. CAFOM est cotée en bourse depuis 2005 et est le leader de l’équipement de la maison en Outre-Mer depuis plus de 25 ans. https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom bénéficie donc de toute l’expertise du groupe qui se traduit par des relations pérennes avec les fournisseurs, une forte puissance d’achat et un contrôle qualité irréprochable.

Nous proposons des prix ultra compétitifs car nous traitons en direct avec nos fournisseurs et distribuons uniquement via Internet. Pas d’intermédiaires, une relation immédiate de vendeur à client. Tous les styles sont proposés sur https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom pour correspondre à tous les goûts et tous les intérieurs !

Riche d’une équipe jeune, dynamique et surtout internationale, https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=Vente-unique%2ecom a l’esprit d’une start-up mais une vraie expertise dans plusieurs domaines essentiels à l’activité e-commerce. Développeurs, graphistes, chefs de produit, traffic managers, chefs de projets, logistique, CRM, comptabilité, SAV, approvisionnement : tout est internalisé pour plus de réactivité, de flexibilité et de performance ! Le tout dans une ambiance conviviale propre à celle du web.

Name: XXXLutz Deutschland
Description:
Mit über 400 Einrichtungshäusern in 14 Ländern und einem Jahresumsatz von 6,4 Milliarden Euro zählt die XXXLutz Unternehmensgruppe zu den drei größten Möbelhändlern weltweit. Unser Erfolgsfaktor: unser Team. In Deutschland sorgen über 12.000 Mitarbeitende in 57 XXXLutz Einrichtungshäusern und 50 mömax Trendmöbelhäusern dafür, dass jeder Besuch zu einem besonderen Erlebnis wird.

Was uns besonders macht?
Gemeinsames Engagement und der Wille, uns stetig weiterzuentwickeln. Wir wachsen zusammen, lernen voneinander und geben jeden Tag unser Bestes. Deshalb investieren wir jährlich 11 Millionen Euro in Schulungen und Coachings. Unsere Mitarbeitenden absolvieren rund zehn Trainingstage pro Jahr, um sich fachlich und persönlich weiterzubilden.

Faire Vergütung ist für uns selbstverständlich. Unsere Gehälter liegen über dem Branchendurchschnitt – in vielen Bereichen sogar deutlich darüber, etwa in der Montage und im Verkauf.

Unsere Benefits
Mit unserem Benefit-Programm „XXXL Plus“ setzen wir neue Maßstäbe: ein freier Tag zum Geburtstag, Bike-Leasing oder die Übernahme von Beiträgen für Krankenzusatz-, Unfallversicherung oder zusätzliche Altersvorsorge. In schwierigen Zeiten unterstützt unser Hilfsfonds schnell und unbürokratisch. Zudem begleiten wir Familien bei wichtigen Lebensereignissen wie Geburt, Schul- oder Berufsstart.

Was uns antreibt?
Wir bei XXXLutz glauben an die Stärken jedes Einzelnen. Unsere Werte – Teamwork, Entwicklung, Zielorientierung und Verantwortung – treiben uns täglich an. Allein in den letzten Jahren haben wir über 4.000 neue Arbeitsplätze geschaffen – und wachsen weiter. Ob Verkauf, Logistik oder Montage: Bei XXXLutz findest du einen Job mit Perspektive.

#WirSindXXXLutz – werde auch du Teil unserer Erfolgsgeschichte!


Netiquette: www.xxxlutz.de/c/social-media-netiquette

Datenschutzerklärung: www.xxxlutz.de/c/social-media-privacy-linkedin

Impressum: www.xxxlutz.de/c/impressum

Name: Resident
Description:
Where Innovation Meets Comfort!

Resident is home to a family of award-winning direct-to-consumer brands revolutionizing the home goods space. We started in 2016 with the best-selling Nectar mattress and haven’t slowed down since—expanding our portfolio to include DreamCloud, Awara, Siena, and CloverLane. Our mission? To make shopping for home essentials effortless, enjoyable, and risk-free—because everyone deserves a beautiful home and a great night's sleep!

At Resident, we’re obsessed with giving our customers better choices, unbeatable value, and industry-leading trial periods and warranties. But what truly sets us apart? Our people.

We’re a remote-first company with team members across 33 U.S. states (and counting!), plus teams in the UK and a cutting-edge tech hub in Tel Aviv, Israel. Our culture is built on collaboration, innovation, and the freedom to do your best work—wherever you are.

As we continue our explosive growth, we want Resident to be more than just a company you work for—we want it to feel like home. If you’re passionate about making an impact, love fast-paced environments, and want to grow with a company that’s redefining an industry, we’d love to meet you!

Join us and help shape the future of home.

Name: Kaiyo
Description:
Kaiyo is an online marketplace committed to great design, exceptional customer care, and a more sustainable planet.

We believe that buying well-made, pre-owned furniture is a better choice than buying new—because good design is sustainable design—meaning it’s timeless, accessible, and built to last for a lifetime of good vibes.

Buying and selling furniture on Kaiyo is simple. Forget about dealing with strangers, renting cars, 5 flights of stairs, impossible doorways, and putting
the pieces back together again. We do everything for you, from pickup to delivery, and everything in between.

Make yourself at home and furnish forward with Kaiyo.

Name: Blu Dot
Description: Modern furniture and accessories designed and developed by us in Minneapolis, Minnesota.

Name: Sirohi

Name: DECOWOOD
Description:
Decowood, la marca Home & Living en tendencia, creemos que cada pieza tiene el poder de transformar un espacio. Por eso, diseñamos y fabricamos todos nuestros productos con un enfoque único, desde la inspiración hasta la creación final.

Decowood es una marca en constante crecimiento y expansión, siendo reconocida como un referente en el diseño de interiores. Cada día, más personas confían en nosotros para transformar sus espacios, porque somos la marca de referencia para quienes buscan destacar con un estilo natural único y auténtico.

Pero en Decowood no nos detenemos. La tendencia nunca para, y lo mismo ocurre con nuestra marca. Prepárate para más!

Name: Cuisines AvivA
Description:
C’est en 2000, à Annecy, que naît la première enseigne de cuisines « high value, low cost ». Après avoir testé avec succès ce concept novateur, Cuisines AvivA lance son développement en franchise dès 2007. Aujourd’hui, avec plus de 100 magasins, le réseau est présent en zone commerciale et en centre-ville. L’enseigne poursuit son maillage en France et propose des villes à fort potentiel : 150 villes sont ciblées pour ouvrir un magasin.

Distributeur indépendant, Cuisines AvivA négocie auprès des fabricants et sélectionne pour ses clients une offre de produits unique proposée à des prix toujours compétitifs. Pour conforter sa croissance sur son marché, l’enseigne se concentre sur son coeur de métier, le commerce, et se réinvente en bousculant les codes du secteur. Cuisines AvivA place la satisfaction au cœur de sa promesse et de son engagement, avec pour genèse trois fondamentaux : une enseigne commerçante et humaine, une expérience client unique – grâce à une méthode de vente basée sur la transparence et la construction commune du projet – et une cuisine tout compris.

Name: Elevenz
Description: شركة سعودية رائدة في مجال الديكور والأثاث. بفضل شبكتنا المميزة مع موردي الديكور ومصانع الأثاث المحلية والدولية، نقدم تشكيلة واسعة ومتنوعة تناسب الجميع.

Name: Dormify
Description: Dormify is THE destination for designing and outfitting a college dorm room, teen bedroom, or small apartment. The Company designs, manufactures, and curates a broad selection of high quality, unique and affordable on-trend décor to personalize small living spaces. The brand’s integration of styling assistance with its omnichannel marketplace has made Dormify a cult-favorite brand for a powerful, loyal Gen Z audience.

Name: RIS Group
Description:
RIS Group is a premium furnishing solution group that has been setting new benchmarks in the furniture industry since its inception in 2002. Founded in Saudi Arabia with a vision to deliver superior projects, RIS has established itself as a quality-led furnishing and turn-key solution group with an unrelenting focus on excellence.

RIS SUB-BRANDS
o	RIS Living: is a premium retail Furniture & Home brand that offers an unparalleled range of furnishing products crafted to perfection, selling to GCC through Retail stores & e-commerce platform.

o	RIS Hospitality: offers full furnishing and custom solutions for hospitality & commercial projects of all sizes.

o	RIS Office: specializes in offering quality office furniture for corporates, banks, & schools projects.

o	RIS Interiors: is an award-winning interior design consultancy that has been setting new standards in the industry for more than two decades.

Name: Wazo Furniture
Description:
About Wazo Furniture

WAZO FURNITURE was founded in 2016 and is a leading furniture brand featuring Canada’s largest selection of solid wood tables; partnered with mid-century modern, bohemian, rustic and designer furniture. Having a sense for trends and an eye for beauty and art, we know that it is all about the product that we sell, and the service standard that we believe in, that has positioned so well with our customers.

Wazo has seen explosive growth since opening and continues to deliver an exceptional e-commerce and online focus allowing us to compete at the highest level. Customers that choose to have a more direct “one-on-one” relationship will enjoy a low-stress and pleasant in-store experience at one of our 2 designer showrooms. 

With a head office in North York and an office on Nuns’ Island (Montréal), we are planning aggressive growth in both store count and organizational focus. The next 24-months will see our business double in size each year!

Name: Furnishka
Description:
We are Furnishka, an Indian establishment in the furniture industry. We are a chain of stores (offline and online) that stock furnishing products including sofa, coffee tables, dining tables, chairs, beds, wardrobes, home decor items and associated upholstery - available at a competitive price that our customers want. Our core objective is to service the customer with long lasting furnishing products at great value in a transparent, compassionate and honest manner. 

Our Customer Mission
At Furnishka, we bring together the best designs in home furnishing from across India that suit the requirements of an Indian house. Our mission is to provide the best value possible for our customers, both in every rupee they spend and time they take to buy furniture. We deliver this mission by being frugal, transparent and honest in our relationships with our vendors and customers alike.

Pledge of Furnishka team
We will
- listen to our customers.
- act in the long term interest of our customers.
- act with transparency, honesty and integrity in all our dealings with customers and vendors alike.
- treat our customers, vendors and employees with fairness, empathy and dignity. 

Our Presence
As of FY 2023-24, we are present in Bangalore. For any queries, please feel free to contact us at info@furnishka.com. Please share feedback if any to FEEDBACK (google.com)

Furnishka brand is owned by Furnishka tech pvt limited, incorporated in Bengaluru

Name: Kathy Kuo Home
Description:
Kathy Kuo Home is a design-first home furnishings brand founded by RISD-trained designer and entrepreneur Kathy Kuo. Guided by a belief that everyone should love where they live, we combine timeless aesthetics, thoughtful curation, and a deep commitment to service to help our clients create spaces of grace, comfort, and beauty.

Our assortment is built around a classically inspired design point of view, with influences drawn from town, country, and coastal living. Each piece is hand-selected by Kathy and our team for quality, craftsmanship, and enduring style, sourced from a trusted network of artisans and makers around the world.

Kathy Kuo Home is also a full-service interior design studio and a valued resource for the professional design community. 

We offer:

- An e-commerce platform focused on mid- to high-end furniture and decor 

- Personalized interior design services for residential and commercial projects

- A robust Trade Program serving over 25,000 industry professionals

-A Tribeca showroom that offers in-person interior design consultations and space for community based events

- Our logistics infrastructure, including a fully owned 3PL in High Point, NC, allows us to support complex project needs with care and precision, ensuring a streamlined experience from sourcing to installation.

At our core, we champion client-first design and layered, livable interiors that reflect real life. We’re proud to be a trusted destination for those who value design as a way of living well.

Learn more: www.kathykuohome.com
Follow us: @kathykuohome

Brother, and Celebrity IOU. Name: altairo
Description:
Altairo partners with renowned brands like Aran Cucine, Giorgio Collection, Cantori, Ghidini 1961, and Rosini Divani to offer exclusive designs for any space. Whether for a home or office, we meet your aesthetic and functional needs with precision and creativity.

Quality and Craftsmanship
We offer materials from luxurious leather to solid wood, suiting every taste and budget. Our meticulously crafted products meet high standards, with pricing from ₹5 lakhs to ₹5 crores. Our collaborations with top brands ensure stylish and timeless offerings. Based in Hyderabad, Altairo is carving a niche in luxury furnishings.

Comprehensive Design Solutions
At Altairo, creating thriving spaces is a collaborative journey. Our experts not only recommend the best furnishings but also optimize your space for maximum functionality. We provide care and guidance to curate spaces that stand the test of time, embodying timelessness, classical elegance, and aspirational relevance.

Diverse Possibilities and Pricing
From leather to solid wood, Altairo offers numerous samples, ranging from basic to premium quality, with 30 to 800 possibilities. We welcome clients from all budget backgrounds with a diverse range of affordable products, ensuring there's something for everyone.

Exceptional Service
Our commitment to quality, affordability, and customer satisfaction sets us apart. We ensure timely delivery of our products, with options ranging from ex-stock to 3-4 months. By choosing Altairo, you invest in quality, craftsmanship, and a timeless aesthetic. Our dedicated team ensures seamless assistance throughout your journey with us.

Name: Grupo WK
Description:
A WK Hold é a base estratégica e administrativa que sustenta três marcas com atuação nacional no setor de decoração e financeiro: Wiler, Edan e WK Capital. Nosso papel é garantir uma gestão moderna, eficiente e alinhada às melhores práticas, impulsionando o crescimento sustentável das empresas do grupo. Com mais de 35 anos de mercado, o grupo atua desde a importação até o consumidor final, oferecendo um mix exclusivo de produtos de decoração e soluções financeiras que fortalecem nossos parceiros. Seja em uma grande loja, no ambiente de um cliente ou nos bastidores de uma operação de antecipação de recebíveis, o que nos move é a mesma essência: fazer bem feito, com ética, propósito e resultados. Aqui, acreditamos que relações sólidas constroem negócios sustentáveis. Promovemos um ambiente onde as pessoas são ouvidas, respeitadas e valorizadas, porque sabemos que os melhores resultados nascem de equipes diversas, engajadas e bem cuidadas. Valorizamos a simplicidade no jeito de ser, a integridade em cada decisão e o compromisso com a excelência. Se você busca um lugar onde o seu trabalho tem impacto real, onde crescimento profissional é levado a sério e onde é possível fazer parte de uma empresa que está construindo o futuro com estratégia e responsabilidade, a WK Hold pode ser o seu próximo passo.

Nossa missão 
Garantir a gestão efetiva das empresas do nosso grupo, através das melhores práticas estratégicas, impulsionando o crescimento sustentável e organizado das nossas empresas.
 
Nossa visão 
Ser reconhecida em até 3 anos como referência em práticas de gestão, com um time especialista e focado nas melhores soluções de mercado.

Junte-se a nós

După părerea noastră, orice afacere este o promisiune. Ca un contract nescris, pe care ne străduim să îl onorăm în fiecare zi și pe care reușim să îl respectăm integral, în cele mai bune zile ale noastre.

Este o promisiune dificilă, dar în care am ajuns să credem cu tărie. Iar atunci când crezi cu tărie în ceva, rezultatele nu întârzie să apară.

Name: STACKABL Objects
Description:
The furniture industry has a sustainability problem – it produces nine million tons of refuse every year. STACKLAB’s Felt Collection is a proof of concept on how to divert material from landfills and to “turn waste into wonders.” From it, STACKABL was born.

STACKABL is a joint venture between STACKLAB and Maison Gerard, one of the world’s leading design galleries. This new company has set out to create an environmentally friendly platform that changes the way interior designers and consumers think about collectible and custom design by removing the friction from the traditional design, build, and order process.

Forrest explains: “This is an experiment in which we start with the bigger issues and material constraints, and reverse engineer until we arrive back at the product. STACKABL allows us to re-shore jobs and support local economies in a scalable way. The possibilities for what can be designed are endless.”

STACKABL is a tech system; it is a proprietary, patent-pending digital configurator platform which allows designers and consumers alike to choose from a live inventory of remnant material from regional manufacturers to create unique furnishings and lighting in real time, with cost and lead time calculations built in. These furnishings are then produced by the regional experts and drop shipped into homes. Every step is optimized to ensure the maximum is done with the minimum. STACKABL empowers local economies while curbing the carbon footprint.

Name: Agnikone the home maker
Description:
Welcome to Agnikone THM - Redefining Interior Design for Your Dream Spaces! 

At Agnikone THM, we are passionate about creating exceptional interior designs that redefine the way you experience your home and space. With an unwavering commitment to excellence and a focus on the latest technologies, we embark on a transformative journey from design to execution.

 Elevating Interior Design:
Our vision is to elevate interior design beyond aesthetics, making it an art of enhancing your lifestyle. We believe that every space should reflect your unique personality and aspirations. Our team of experts collaborates to craft inspiring and functional interior solutions that ensure an unparalleled living experience.

 Embracing Cutting-Edge Technologies:
Innovation is at the heart of what we do. Embracing the latest technologies, we redefine the design process. From 3D modeling and virtual reality (VR) simulations to AI-driven tools, we bring your ideas to life before execution begins. This empowers you to visualize and fine-tune every detail, ensuring your dream space becomes a reality.

 Seamless Integration of Execution:
Setting ourselves apart, Agnikone THM ensures seamless execution with meticulous planning. Our dedicated team ensures coordination from concept to completion. We work diligently to deliver projects on time and to the highest quality standards, ensuring your satisfaction throughout the journey.

 Join Us in Redefining Interior Design:
If you share our passion for innovative interior design, cutting-edge technology, and creating living spaces that transcend expectations, we invite you to connect with us. Join Agnikone THM on our journey of transforming homes, redefining spaces, and embracing the endless possibilities of interior design.

#InteriorDesignExcellence #InnovativeSpaces #CuttingEdgeTechnology #DreamInteriors #SustainableLiving

Description: SLEEP365 is a sleep lifestyle brand that champions a life lived to its fullest potential through the power of healthy sleep. With a commitment to sustainability, we craft organic, non-toxic bedroom products, ensuring our customers' comfort is in harmony with the planet. Name: Lucce Paraguay
Description:
Lucce es una marca que ofrece soluciones de iluminación tanto para interiores como para exteriores. Nuestras piezas no solo son funcionales sino que también agregan un toque de elegancia y sofisticación a cualquier espacio. Ofrecemos una amplia gama de diseños que se adaptan a diferentes estilos y preferencias. Nuestros productos no solo son eficientes en energía sino que también están hechos con materiales de alta calidad que garantizan durabilidad y longevidad.
Lo que distingue a Lucce de otras marcas de iluminación es nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la innovación. Somos apasionados del diseño y tenemos una verdadera dedicación a la creación de productos que no solo sean hermosos sino también funcionales. Nuestras piezas no se producen en masa sino que son hechas por artesanos y ingenieros expertos que prestan atención a cada detalle.
Si está buscando una marca que sea profesional, innovadora y apasionada por el diseño y la artesanía, entonces Lucce es la elección perfecta para usted.

Somos representantes exclusivos de la marca de muebles Saloni y de iluminación de larga duración FSL.

Name: Gruppo Cucine
Description:
Η Gruppo Cucine γεννήθηκε με μια απλή ιδέα:
να μεταφέρει την ιταλική αισθητική και την υψηλή ποιότητα στην καρδιά του ελληνικού σπιτιού.

Ξεκινήσαμε ως μια boutique εταιρεία κουζινών και εξελιχθήκαμε σε ένα από τα πιο δυναμικά premium brands στο χώρο του design.
Με συνεργασίες με κορυφαίους ιταλικούς οίκους και μια ομάδα που ζει για τη λεπτομέρεια, δημιουργούμε χώρους που δεν είναι απλώς λειτουργικοί — είναι εμπειρίες.

Σήμερα, επεκτεινόμαστε σε νέες αγορές, ανοίγουμε νέα concept stores και συνεχίζουμε να επαναπροσδιορίζουμε τι σημαίνει “κουζίνα υψηλού επιπέδου”.

Gruppo Cucine — Design that feels like home.

Name: micasa AG
Description:
Micasa ist das führende Schweizer Einrichtungshaus, das sich durchdachtem und langlebigem Design verschrieben hat, mit dem Ziel, das Leben der Menschen zu bereichern, indem wir inspirierende und bleibende Wohn- und Wohlfühlwelten schaffen.

Wir von micasa sind überzeugt, dass inspirierende, und bleibende Wohn- und Wohlfühlwelten dein Leben bereichern. Deshalb schaffen wir Produkte, die du jeden Tag gerne um dich hast und die sich deinem Leben perfekt anpassen. Unsere Designs sind zeitgemäss, optimistisch und langlebig. Sie geben dir ein gutes Gefühl, so dass du dich gerne lange mit ihnen umgibst. Gemeinsam machen wir die Welt zu einem schöneren Platz.

Micasa wurde im Jahr 1981 von der Migros gegründet und ist seit September 2025 als eigenständige Aktiengesellschaft tätig. Micasa betreibt heute über 30 Filialen und einen Onlineshop. Mehr Informationen unter www.micasa.ch.

Name: JoyJolt
Description:
Welcome to the world of JoyJolt, where every sip is a celebration, and every glass is a vessel of joy. At JoyJolt, we believe that moments of happiness can be found in the simplest of pleasures, and we're here to make those moments even more accessible and delightful.

Our story is one of passion and dedication to the art of celebration. JoyJolt was born from the idea that life's best moments are often shared over a drink. Whether it's a morning coffee, a festive cocktail, or a quiet evening with a glass of wine, these experiences are the building blocks of joy.

JoyJolt is committed to elevating these everyday moments into extraordinary experiences. We understand that the vessels we use play a crucial role in enhancing our connection with the world around us. That's why we've made it our mission to create glassware that is not just exquisite but also within reach for more people.

At JoyJolt, innovation is at the heart of everything we do. We combine the latest design trends with cutting-edge craftsmanship to bring you glassware that embodies both style and substance. Our glassware is designed to celebrate your unique taste and elevate your everyday.

Quality is the foundation of JoyJolt. Every glass, every piece, is a testament to our unwavering commitment to excellence. We believe in creating products that are not only beautiful but also built to last. Each piece is meticulously crafted to meet our rigorous standards.

JoyJolt is more than a brand; it's a community of individuals who cherish life's moments and believe in the power of shared experiences. We celebrate the art of toasting, the joy of sharing, and the happiness that comes from connections made over a drink.

Elevate Every Sip, Elevate Your Life. JoyJolt – Where Happiness Meets Glass.

Website: JoyJolt.com | Contact Us: info@joyjolt.com | Join our team: careers@joyjolt.com 

Follow us for a daily dose of joy on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and Pinterest! Cheers to a joyful life!

Description:
Coleccion ALEXANDRA uk is the corporate sales office for the luxury global furniture and furnishings house ALEXANDRA. 

Bringing exclusivity to the UK, our aim is to work with leading designers and property experts to create some of the most beautiful interiors in the world whilst catering for the needs of our International client base with their London & UK property requirements. 

Coleccion Alexandra has rapidly come to the forefront of the global luxury market and now has showrooms and dealers in over 65 countries - Russia l Ukraine l Khazakstan l Azerbaijan l Estonia l China l India l UAE l Saudi Arabia l Nigeria - to name just a few.

Our stunning collections have graced some of the world’s most prestigious interiors - From country estates, corporate headquarters and leading restaurants to palaces, super yachts and Royal Suites.

Our Evolution Collection masters the beauty of understated elegance and is at the pinnacle of contemporary design, whilst our Heritage Collection personifies opulence and satisfies the traditional palate.

Our ranges are bespoke in every manner and consist of over 2000 pieces, comprising of Furniture l Bath Collections l Lighting l Textiles l Rugs  & Accessories - all designed and manufactured at our state of the art ateliers outside Valencia.

We have embraced an innovative ‘look’ that evokes passion, excitement, elegance and comfort. We are a Total Design Concept and pride ourselves on being "Refreshingly Unique!"

Name: My Home Møbler
Description:
My Home Møbler tilbyder kvalitetsmøbler og en høj grad af service til overraskende lave priser.

My Home lagersalgskonceptet startede med lagersalg af møbler og brugskunst fra en privat adresse i Randers. Det viste sig hurtigt, at lagersalgskonceptet var interessant for kunder i området. Derfor blev der i 2006 åbnet en My Home Lagersalg butik i bydelen Kristrup i Randers. Der viste sig hurtigt at blive behov for mere lagerplads, og med mange kunder kom også behovet for mere butiksareal, så forretningen i Randers blev flyttet til en kombineret lager og butik på adressen Nikkelvej 4 i Randers.


Herefter åbnede flere My Home Lagersalg butikker rundt i landet. Der kom igen behov for mere lagerplads, og i efteråret 2009 blev lageret flyttet til Sdr. Borup ved Randers, og siden er der udvidet flere gange, med endnu større lager. Hovedkontoret samt lager har nu adresse i Fårup ved Randers. I dag er My Home landsdækkende med butikker i hele landet.

Vi har lave priser pga. lav husleje, billig indretning, lav bemanding og fordi vi køber hovedparten af vores møbler direkte, uden mellemled, ved leverandører i asien og hele europa.

Hos My Home Møbler kan du trygt handle såvel online samt i vores fysiske butikker. Vi er en landsdækkende kæde med 22 butikker fordelt over hele landet. Vi har Faguddannet personale, som ved hvad de handler med, mange års erfaring i salg og rådgivning, og på vores hjemmeside får du en hurtig og effektiv ekspedition

Description:

Vi hjælper dig med at designe og bygge din drøm af en vinkælder eller vinrum og samarbejder med Vinorage samt Wineandbarrels A/S med luksuriøse produkter og møbler til din indretning.

Montering foregår med assistance fra vores medarbejdere ved SKADEteknik samt deres samarbejdspartnere, der har stor ekspertise i renovering. Særligt har SKADEteknik stor erfaring med ældre, fugtige kældre, så vi sikrer dig at din nye vinkælder eller vinrum, kommer til at fungere optimalt i den henseende.

Name: Mocka - Australia and New Zealand
Description:
At Mocka, we’re passionate about inspiring your everyday living.

Our mission is to help you bring design into your home and transform each room into a space you’ll love. We’re dedicated to creating quality, on-trend and design-led pieces that elevate a space while remaining accessible, understandable and brilliantly functional; all at a price that doesn't cost the earth.

Whether you’re starting out as a new family, or finally getting that home office set up, the versatility of our products ensures we can cater to all styles and life stages. We're designers at heart - but we're also homemakers and people with families and homes of our own. We know how hard it is to get everything right – and how great it is when you do. Our products are designed locally in Australia by our team of experienced designers, and as for the finished products – well, we just can't wait to show them to you.

We’re so excited to help you create incredible spaces that we know you’ll love.

Name: Recess Furniture
Description:
Recess is a sustainable Australian furniture brand on a mission to make work feel more like play.

Designed and operated locally in Sydney, we help people do their best work by creating clean and comfortable spaces with affordable ergonomic furniture inspired by the Australian landscape. 

Our focus on sustainability is at the forefront of what we do. From eco-friendly sourcing and packaging to long-lasting durability, Recess furniture is created to outlast trends with materials that don't cost the earth.

We follow four sustainability practices:

1. FSC Certified Timber suppliers: All of our wooden furniture is built from FSC Certified Timber.

2. Recycled materials: We use recycled materials in our products where possible, including for all our packaging.

3. Sustainable soundproof technology: Our award-winning Nook work booths save 1000+ plastic bottles from landfill and oceans by repurposing these materials into soundproof acoustic panels.

4. Product longevity: Our designs are built to support your work (and play) for years to come.

Recess furniture is made for the modern office. Work in style, from anywhere.

Find us at @recess.au or recess.com.au.

Name: Schneiderman's Furniture
Description:
Schneiderman’s Furniture has been a trusted name in home furnishings for over 75 years, bringing quality, style, and exceptional service to homes across Minnesota. As a family-owned business, we take pride in offering a curated selection of beautiful, high-quality furniture while maintaining a welcoming, customer-first experience.

Our success is built on strong values, a passion for design, and a commitment to excellence in everything we do. Whether helping customers find the perfect piece or creating a seamless shopping experience, our team is at the heart of it all.

Why Join Schneiderman’s?
If you're seeking a career in retail that goes beyond selling and focuses on meaningful customer relationships, Schneiderman’s is the place for you. Here’s why:

A Reputation for Excellence: Join a well-established, respected brand with a loyal customer base.

Growth Opportunities: We invest in our team’s success, offering training and career advancement.

Supportive Culture: Work in an environment where collaboration, integrity, and teamwork thrive.

Passion for Design: Be part of a company that values creativity and helps customers bring their vision to life.

Rewarding Work: Competitive compensation, strong benefits, and the satisfaction of helping customers create beautiful spaces.

At Schneiderman’s, we don’t just sell furniture—we help people make their homes feel like home. If you’re passionate about great service, quality design, and a team-driven workplace, we’d love to have you on board!

Name: Mondo Camerette
Description:
L’idea di una rete di negozi specializzati nell’arredamento dei ragazzi nasce nel 2006, frutto dell’esperienza e del grande intuito di un giovane imprenditore: Giuseppe Caruso. 
Dopo anni di indagini di mercato, studio della concorrenza e perfezionamento del progetto, nel 2012 viene inaugurato il primo punto vendita Mondo Camerette.
Oggi Mondo Camerette è leader indiscusso nel settore dei retail specializzati nell’arredamento della camera per ragazzi.

Tratti distintivi dell’azienda sono: progettazione su misura, qualità e convenienza.
La produzione - esclusivamente Made in Italy - garantisce un punto di forza per un’azienda giovane e dinamica che vanta nelle sue figure cardine un’esperienza pluriennale nel settore dell’arredamento d’interni. 
Il progetto si sviluppa e viene costantemente aggiornato e potenziato da un gruppo di professionisti con competenze diversificate e consolidate, in grado di supportare il cliente dalla scelta della soluzione alla prenotazione dell’acquisto, fino alla consegna e montaggio della soluzione.

Entrando in un negozio Mondo Camerette, il cliente può vivere un'esperienza unica, dove trova soluzioni specifiche e personalizzate, grazie alla professionalità del personale altamente qualificato presente nei punti vendita, con in più il supporto del nostro esclusivo servizio di Realtà Immersiva.

Nel 2018, infatti, l'azienda ha ricevuto il primo premio SMAU per l'innovazione tecnologica (Realtà Virtuale applicata al settore), riconfermato nel 2019 con il progetto “Phygital Customer Journey in store”, che nel frattempo si evolve per rendere la customer experience ancora più fluida e connessa: diventando multidevice e multiplayer.

Name: Rematime
Description:
En Rematime creemos que todos pueden tener acceso a productos de diseño y calidad para dar vida a los espacios de acuerdo a sus gustos y necesidades.
Traemos muebles y decoración de diferentes partes del mundo y variados estilos, como nórdico, moderno, clásico e íconos del diseño, ofreciendo un sistema de PREVENTA para que puedas acceder al precio más conveniente del mercado.
Es por esto que estamos en constante búsqueda de nuevas tendencias en distintos lugares del mundo para traer muebles que se ajusten a las necesidades y gustos de cada persona.
En Rematime, mientras antes compres menos pagas.

PROYECTOS
¿Tienes un proyecto/inversión en mente?
Descubre cómo podemos hacer que tu negocio destaque a través del diseño y mobiliario personalizado!
En Rematime, nos destacamos por nuestra habilidad para transformar tus proyectos de habilitación en experiencias extraordinarias a través de una planificación inteligente, con principal énfasis en optimizar tus presupuestos, logrando ahorros significativos en las compras.
Nuestra red de proveedores nos otorga la capacidad de satisfacer las necesidades de Inmobiliarias, Restaurantes, Hoteles, Oficinas, Espacios Comunes y más. Convirtiéndonos en especialistas en la habilitación de proyectos inmobiliarios para renta residencial a corto y largo plazo, cómo Airbnb y Multifamily, aprendiendo cómo el diseño, la calidad y el mix correcto de productos marca una gran diferencia en los resultados de un negocio.
Escríbenos a proyectos@rematime.cl

We aim to create timeless designs by combining the sculptural forms with the perfect imperfections of the natural materials we choose, and blending them both together with traditional craftsmanship. Our goal is to design products and spaces that not only look good but also make people feel good.xx

Name: Cerberus Store Decoração & Cia
Description:
Temos orgulho em ser uma loja especializada na produção e venda focada em pôsteres temáticos para geeks, gamers, otakus, cinéfilos e fãs de cultura pop. 

Com essa proposta viemos provar que, usando a criatividade, todos podemos transformar nosso espaço em um decorado sob medida!.

De forma prática, nossas coleções de imagens são pôsteres cheios de personalidade, para você colar e enfeitar onde e como quiser. É por isso que os pôsteres são uma opção ideal para sua decoração.

Nosso produto foi estrategicamente pensado para ser uma solução prática e econômica de decoração. Os pôsteres kits te dão liberdade para criar diferentes composições, transformando seus ambientes!

Apoiamos negócios locais!

Todos os nossos fornecedores são pequenos negócios locais.  Assim, formamos uma rede que cresce e se auto sustenta economicamente.

Prezamos pela sustentabilidade!

Apesar de não ser reciclável, o papel couché tem uma longa vida útil. 100% das nossas embalagens são recicláveis e os processos de produção emitem números reduzidos de poluentes.

Mathieu & Thomas associés gérant.

La flexibilité, et l'agilité de sa structure permet de créer et concevoir avec une grande compétitivité, et une extrême réactivité.

Name: Thompson Ferrier
Description:
Thompson Ferrier designs candles where fragrance and fashion meet to create a lifestyle of sumptuous comfort and style. 

The fragrance is singular and personal – we fall in love with a fragrance as we do with a moment in time in our lives. We reminisce through fragrance; its power to recall memory is unmatched: the comfort of a childhood home, the brush of a lover, the sophistication of a Parisian street. When you choose a Thompson Ferrier candle and fragrance, you choose the key in which to live the music of your life. 

Fashion is the outward expression of inner style and verve.  Like our creative energies, fashion is always moving, evolving, perfecting. Our handmade candles change with the sway of seasons and the mélange of trends all around us. Our candles may be playful one moment, chic the next, then boldly luxurious. When you choose a Thompson Ferrier candle, you choose the style to express the essence of yourself moving in time.

Thompson Ferrier. New York global fashion candles – “Love our fragrance. Live in style.”

Name: Premium Living
Description:
Wnętrze w najlepszym stylu …
W Premium Living dbamy o jakość i wygodę w każdym aspekcie codziennego funkcjonowania, a także zwracamy uwagę na szczegóły i unikalne elementy, które podkreślają indywidualny styl i gust odbiorcy.
Oferujemy luksusowe meble i akcesoria do aranżacji wnętrz, w tym sypialni, salonów czy jadalni. Są to produkty starannie wyselekcjonowane pod kątem jakości wykonania, funkcjonalności i estetyki. Znajdziesz u nas szeroki wybór łóżek, sof, foteli, stołów, krzeseł i akcesoriów.
Twój dom będzie wyjątkowy, jeśli odzwierciedli Twoją osobowość i styl życia. Wybierz unikalne meble, dodatki i dekoracje, które będą przyciągać uwagę gości i nadawać charakteru Twojemu wnętrzu.
Jeśli potrzebujesz pomocy w aranżacji przestrzeni, doradcy Premium Living z chęcią pomogą Ci w wyborze odpowiedniego wyposażenia.
Jesteśmy przekonani, że nasza oferta spełni oczekiwania nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów. Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z naszym asortymentem oraz do skorzystania z usług naszej firmy.
Pamiętaj, że to Ty jesteś kreatorem swojego otoczenia, więc pozwól sobie na luksus na który zasługujesz !

Premium Living Sp. z o.o. jest wyłącznym dystrybutorem na rynku polskim marki DUXIANA.

A Todeschini é, hoje, uma das maiores fabricantes de móveis planejados da América Latina. Sediada em Bento Gonçalves, no Rio Grande do Sul, e com mais de 80 anos de experiência e solidez, a empresa é reconhecida por seu pioneirismo e sua capacidade de constante renovação, materializada nas novidades lançadas a cada ano.
O reconhecimento pela dedicação e pelos resultados alcançados aparece por meio das importantes premiações que a empresa vem acumulando em seu currículo, incluindo: há 11 anos consecutivos sendo destaque entre as "500 Maiores do Sul", conquistando a 136ª colocação no ranking das 500 maiores empresas do Sul e a 56ª posição entre as 100 maiores do Rio Grande do Sul; por 5 anos campeã do prêmio Top of Mind, estando em 1º lugar na categoria Móveis; conquista do 1º lugar na categoria Móveis Planejados no prêmio Top Móbile.

Name: Furnitly.
Description:
Welcome to Furnitly!  

 We are an innovative Startup based in Maastricht, Netherlands.

Furniture companies often struggle with surplus stock, leading to overcrowded warehouses filled with unsold, unused items. These excess products not only take up space but also tie up resources and contribute to waste in the industry. The lack of accessible channels to efficiently sell or repurpose these pieces forces businesses to dispose of them at a loss, which negatively impacts both profitability and the environment.

Furnitly is an innovative platform where furniture manufacturing companies can easily upload and sell their excess products, unsold or sample items, including those with minor defects, at discounted prices. Customers have the chance to buy high-quality furniture for lower prices. 

Our goal is to promote a circular economy  giving a new life to unused products and combining sustainability with accessible pricing for homes and spaces.

Follow us to stay tuned!

Name: Dimason Limited
Description:
Dimason is founded by two associates originally from France and Switzerland. Both worked as buyers for big names in the worldwide trade for years before creating Dimason. The initial idea was to offer the type of service we would have liked to find if we were buyers ourselves.

Our philosophy is that our customers would feel as though Dimason is their own sourcing department in Asia. The quality level of our service is very high, starting from understanding customers’ needs, to selecting factories that customers can be proud of, to monitoring the production so that issues can be spotted immediately and corrected swiftly. Your Dimason team will accompany you during your trips to Asia and send you pictures of your order in production, allowing you to check that all is in line. You can reach us with instant messaging and we will do the same to keep you informed on everything you wanted to know. You can count on us! If you haven’t source from Asia yet, you can start with Dimason because we will steer you away from issues as much as we can. If you have already source from Asia before, you will find other variety of products in Dimason. We are striving to a new level of service!

Indeed, we put lots of energy to make sourcing the best experience for our customers. We constantly work with factories to control the quality of production, articles compliance along with packing resistance to shock, and environmental hassle.

Dimason always visits factories in Southeast Asian countries. Why? To find new products, respond to the evolving needs our client, and consolidate relationships with our current manufacturing partners.

We define ourselves as service providers or enablers, not intermediates

We also work directly with the factories to create bespoke tiles to fit our customers’ unique needs, including non-slip tiles that comply with Australian standards, which many suppliers in the industry ignore.

We are delighted to be one of the major suppliers to the architectural and design community. Our tiles are used in landmark projects such as the Sydney Opera House, Parliament House, National Museum and Queen Victoria Building.

At 2nd home, our mission is to revolutionize the home and living market by fostering a sustainable future. Ovaj proces može biti veoma stresan za kompanije jer:

 Bore se sa rokovima i bave se logističkim pitanjima i organizacijom, što može uzrokovati nepoštovanje rokova i gubitak novca zbog kasnog otvaranja. Rješenje: "potpuno praćenje projekta od ideje do realizacije"

 Teško je predvidjeti kako se predložene ideje mogu izvesti. Rješenje: planiranje, 3D modeliranje, uređenje interijera

 Željeli bi saznati najnovije trendove u opremanju maloprodajnih i skladišnih prostora koji mogu biti lokalno primjenjivi i poboljšati korisničko iskustvo. Rješenje: kontinuirano istraživanje ponašanja kupaca, saradnja sa najistaknutijim vodećim kompanijama u ovoj oblasti i edukacija zaposlenih 

Podrška našim klijentima u različitim fazama - 360° program:

 Početni razvoj ideje, razvoj projekta, dizajn, oprema, proizvodnja, logistika, instalacija, održavanje i garancija
 Maloprodajnih i skladišnih poličnih sistema
 Kasa pultova

 Digitalnih rješenja (npr. elektronske cijene)
 Opreme za unapređenje prodaje
 Potrošačkih korpi i kolica
 Sistemi rasvjete

Sve sjajne stvari počinju prvim razgovorom; trebali bismo razgovarati ako Vam intuicija kaže da je ovo potencijalno zanimljivo.

Name: Showroom-Cuisines
Description:
Showroom-cuisines est une marque indépendante fondée par Nicolas Lardeux et Fabienne Guibert en 2015, spécialisée dans la conception et l'installation de cuisines haut de gamme et de dressings sur mesure. Fort d'une vaste expérience dans le domaine de l'aménagement, l'équipe de Showroom-cuisines s'engage à créer des projets personnalisés en accord avec vos besoins et exigences spécifiques.

Chez Showroom-cuisines, nous mettons un point d'honneur à offrir un service de haute qualité, en portant une attention particulière aux détails. Notre approche expérimentée vise à maximiser l'espace de votre cuisine tout en améliorant son ergonomie, grâce à des solutions  fonctionnelles.

Nous comprenons l'importance d'un service après-vente irréprochable. Notre engagement envers la satisfaction de nos clients ne s'arrête pas à la finalisation du projet, et nous nous assurons que la qualité de nos réalisations perdure dans le temps.

Depuis septembre 2023, nous sommes fiers d'être une entreprise à mission. Cet engagement envers la planète et le bien-être du client se traduit par des actions concrètes pour minimiser notre impact environnemental. Par exemple, nous  mettons en place des pratiques durables tout au long de notre processus de travail.

Chez Showroom-cuisines, nous sommes animés par la passion de créer des espaces de vie exceptionnels, tout en étant résolument engagés envers la satisfaction de nos clients et le respect de notre planète.

Name: Qoozy Decoration
Description:
Qoozy is er voor je met persoonlijke verlichting en duurzame Taqleedy woonaccessoires.

Elke ruimte verdient zijn eigen, passende verlichting. Qoozy Decoration helpt door het ontwerpen en realiseren van unieke ceilers, complete tablelights en persoonlijke lampenkappen.

Alle Qoozy lampen en asseccoires zijn 100% handgemaakt met een grote diversiteit in hoogwaardige stoffen en materialen. Aparte dessins met op verzoek eigen (logo)prints voor een persoonlijke uitstraling. Hoe apart wil je het hebben?
Jouw dromen, jouw ideeën en jouw wensen. Ik begrijp ze en zet ze om in prachtige accessoires. 

Kwaliteit is een investering.
Qoozy levert maatwerk in een kwaliteit die je ziet en voelt. Het design klopt, de gebruikte stoffen zijn voelbaar hoogwaardig en de lampvoeten ingetogen, modern of juist kleurrijk en vintage.
Tenslotte ben je op zoek naar unieke producten die specifiek passen bij de smaak en de ideeën van jezelf of van je klant. Kwaliteit die je voelt, die je ziet en een hoge meerwaarde geeft in de ruimte.

Hoe ga ik te werk?
Met de mooiste exclusieve materialen creëer ik unieke, handgemaakte verlichting in tablelights en ceilers. Elk interieur verdient tenslotte zijn eigen Qoozy pronkstuk. 

Let's get creative.
Qoozy is Mariëlle Berden. Ik doe niets liever dan losgaan met jouw ideeën in het bedenken en maken van unieke en aparte accessoires. 
Ben je benieuwd wat ik voor je kan doen?
Neem dan contact op voor een mooie samenwerking. 
Samen creëren we iets unieks.

Voor elke opdracht, luister ik nauwkeurig en graag naar je ideeën en wensen.
Qoozy levert B2B en B2C via de studio bij Tica Projects in Venlo.

Name: Sigma 3 Contract Kitchens

We are passionate manufacturers and retailers of beautiful, amazing quality kitchens supplied to the Boutique and Contract Builder market, priding ourselves on our product quality, service, and implementation. We offer amazing choice which suits all build specifications and budgets with collections of over 400 kitchen styles, 80+ colours and finishes, and 15+ cabinet colours. Name: MELTEM
Description:
MELTEM vous accompagne dans toutes les étapes de votre projet d'aménagement d'espaces de travail. De la sélection des produits bureautique au SAV en passant par une installation minutieuse et réfléchie, vos espaces seront ainsi optimisés selon les usages de chaque entreprise, en fonction de l'expérience du collaborateur et des intentions stratégiques de l'employeur.

Une attention particulière est portée sur les différents leviers améliorant la qualité de vie au travail : 
- Espaces de travail flexibles et innovants / Flex office 
- Lieux de convivialité particulièrement soignés 
- Solutions acoustiques inventives et esthétiques 
- Luminaires créatifs, générateurs d'ambiance 
- Végétation des espaces 
- Des accessoires qui n'ont rien d'accessoire : porte-manteaux, poubelles de tri sélectif, etc.

Tous nos aménagements mettent l'accent sur l'ergonomie de l'espace de travail. Nous travaillons en collaboration avec les médecins du travail et les ergonomes pour apporter à chacun une solution personnalisée.

Vous avez un projet d'aménagement d'un espace de coworking, open-space ou de redéfinir l'intégralité de vos espaces de travail : nouveaux lieux collaboratifs, bureaux flexibles espaces modulables, cabines pour s'isoler ou encore nouvel espace sieste ?

Rencontrons-nous :
meltem@meltemoffice.com

Name: Marandmore
Description:
Marandmore Hakkında

Marandmore, 2020 yılında kurulmuş ve kısa sürede Türkiye’nin önde gelen ev aksesuarları ve tamamlayıcı mobilya markalarından biri haline gelmiştir. “Hayalinizin Tasarımla Buluştuğu Yer” mottosu ile yola çıkan Marandmore, estetik ve işlevselliği ön planda tutan benzersiz tasarımlar sunmaktadır.

Ürün yelpazemizde mermer, traverten, ahşap, cam, seramik ve poliresin gibi kaliteli malzemeleri kullanarak, hem yerel hem de uluslararası pazarlarda 30’dan fazla ülkeye ihracat yapmaktayız. Türkiye’nin en kaliteli hammaddelerini %100 yerli işçilikle birleştirerek, sadece estetik değil, aynı zamanda dayanıklılık ve kalite standartlarında da üstün ürünler üretiyoruz.

Marandmore, perakende satışların yanı sıra toptan üretim ve özel proje tasarımlarıyla da tanınmıştır. Mimarlar, iç dekoratörler ve tasarım profesyonelleri ile işbirliği içinde çalışarak, her müşterinin ihtiyaç ve beklentilerine uygun özelleştirilmiş çözümler sunuyoruz.

Sürdürülebilir büyüme ve yenilikçilik vizyonuyla hareket eden Marandmore, sektördeki yerini sağlamlaştırmak ve global pazarda daha da genişlemek için çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.

Name: BJMAIS
Description:
Bem-vindo à BJMAIS, onde transformamos fotografias em memórias palpáveis e emocionais. Nossa missão é resgatar a essência das memórias, reinventando a maneira como compartilhamos momentos especiais. Acreditamos que cada fotografia contém histórias únicas, e é por isso que nos dedicamos a transformá-las em peças de decoração que ressoam com emoção e significado.

No coração da BJMAIS, encontram-se nossos valores fundamentais: respeito, trabalho em equipe, inovação e um profundo foco no cliente. Estes pilares não apenas moldam nossa cultura, mas também impulsionam nossa busca por criar produtos excepcionais que evocam sentimentos e revivem momentos únicos.

Junte-se a nós nesta jornada de redescobrir a beleza das memórias impressas. Na BJMAIS, estamos aqui para transformar suas fotos em algo mais do que simples imagens - estamos aqui para transformá-las em tesouros emocionais.

Description:

Check out ikea.ca to browse our selections or to learn more about our dedication to people and planet.

Name: Daunenspiel
Description:
Unser Herz schlägt für Design

Als Inneneinrichter und Fachhandel für ausgewählte europäische Qualitätsmarken ist es unser Anspruch, unverwechselbare Lebens-Räume zu gestalten, die mit Inspiration und Freude erfüllen.

Mit der Eröffnung des Showrooms im dritten Bezirk und der Erweiterung 2019 auf 160m2 Ausstellungsfläche gelingt es der Gründerin und Einrichterin Sofia Vrecar einen Einrichtungs-Hotspot zu schaffen, wo entspannte Beratung oberste Priorität genießen. 

Hier entstehen Einrichtungskonzepte für private Räume, Büros bis hin zu Projekten in der Hotellerie und Gastronomie. 

Als Interior Design Studio aus Wien und erfahrene Innenarchitekten begleiten wir vom ersten Planungsschritt bis zur Umsetzung der Möblierung und nötigen Bauvorhabens. Dabei übernehmen wir die Koordination aller erforderlichen Planungs- und Umbauschritte sowie die stilvolle Gestaltung des Projekts. 

Weil unsere Einrichtungskonzepte nur mit Qualität auch in der Ausführung glänzen können, setzen wir für jeden Bereich auf langjährige Partner. Ob Tischler, Elektriker, Bodenleger, Tapezierer, Maler oder Installateure – alle unsere Handwerker zeichnen sich durch ihr einzigartiges Know-how aus.

Showroom 1030 Wien / daunenspiel.at

Name: KIKI'S Home Box
Description:
We are a home essentials retailer that provides customers with pre-made kits of all the essential items needed to start life in a new home. From kitchenware to bed and bathroom linens, the company bundles all these items into a single box that customers can conveniently order online through our website. In addition to the pre-made kits, we also offer a wide range of extras like decorations, carpets, and home appliances that customers can choose from to make their new space feel like home.

With a focus on providing AN EASIER START to life in a new home, we aim to simplify the process of acquiring home essentials by eliminating the hassle of purchasing items individually from different retailers. We believe in sustainability and have incorporated it into our business model. We reduce packaging waste and delivery costs by bundling all the essentials into a single box. The company's delivery service ensures that customers receive their orders in a timely and convenient manner, making the transition to a new living space much smoother.

We pride ourselves on the quality of our Europe-sourced products and the convenience of our service, making us an ideal solution for anyone looking to start life in a new home or to streamline the process of acquiring home essentials. With a commitment to customer satisfaction, we aim to provide an exceptional service that makes the process of settling in a new home as stress-free as possible.

Hertex is a leading supplier of high-quality interior fabric, wallpaper, rugs, furniture and homeware for both local and international markets. What started in 1987 as a humble Cape Town showroom has since grown to several showrooms countrywide, with more on the way.

We offer interior and design professionals expertly sourced fabric and wallcoverings that cater to diverse needs. In addition to our own collections, Hertex is also the exclusive distributor of several brands from the UK, EU and US.
Founded by Hertex, HAUS was created to provide customers with instant access to an expertly curated collection of homeware to complete their interior schemes. 
As a team, we encourage and support one another, and are committed to the success of our customers and the business. We communicate with honesty and respect, and work with passion and energy.

Description:
WE ARE YOUR BRAND'S ONE-STOP SOLUTION FOR OFFLINE RETAIL!

Vista Retail is an award-winning, vertically-integrated and leading designer and manufacturer of retail furniture in India. Our service of retail solutions include Complete Permanent Display fixtures, EBOs, Shop-In-Shop fitouts, Mall kiosks, Luxury salons, POP/POS/CDUs, Travel retail, Mall promotions and much more. 

Since 1999, our team brings in 20+ years of expertise and currently utilizes a 1,25,000 square feet modern-day production facility in order to deliver the pinnacle of quality design manufacturing and client satisfaction. 

Producing beyond 10000+ display fixtures each year for over 120+ brands including the likes of industry leaders like L'Oréal, Nykaa, Charlotte Tilbury, Shiseido, HUDA Beauty, LVMH, L'Occitane, Bath&Body Works, Victoria’s Secret, COTY and many more, the Vista team continues to deliver above expectation standards and grows together with our clients through the establishing of long-lasting B2B relationships.

Name: Ware Innovations
Description:
Reimagining Everyday Living. Thoughtfully. Beautifully.

At Ware Innovations, we believe even the simplest objects deserve a second look. We design and craft functional art for modern living — blending thoughtful design, utility, and timeless aesthetics to create products that elevate the everyday.

From dinnerware that redefines the way you eat, to marble vases that feel like sculptures — our creations are a celebration of craftsmanship, storytelling, and intentional design.

But beyond what we make, it’s how we work that defines us.

We’re a small team with big ideas. Designers, thinkers, strategists, makers — all bound by a shared obsession to create products that spark joy, start conversations, and make life a little more beautiful.

 What we value:
Creative freedom to explore, fail, and build boldly.

A culture of ownership, curiosity, and honest feedback.

Collaboration over hierarchy — great ideas can come from anywhere.

Design that’s not just beautiful, but purposeful and enduring.

 Who we’re looking for:
If you’re someone who loves solving problems creatively, thrives in a fast-paced but kind work environment, and wants to work on products that matter — we’d love to meet you.

This isn’t just a workplace. It’s a place to grow, craft your best work, and be part of something meaningful.

 Based in Mumbai |  Designing for the world
 Say hello: careers@wareinnovations.com

Name: TheHues

TheHues embodies the spirit of "Defined by You", designed to reflect the personal style and inner hues of our customers. Our curtains and home textiles are all designed to offer both aesthetics and quality. Empowering home décor lovers and tastemakers to define their living spaces.

At TheHues, we are driven by a singular passion: to meet and surpass the aesthetic and customization desires of each and every customer.

Committed to enhancing customer satisfaction and experience, from the quality of our customizable home décor products to our exceptional customer care. We value everyone's insights to refine and improve our offering continuously.

We look forward to transforming your spaces!

Name: Kaleidoscope
Description:
Kaleidoscope at Atoz: Where Design Transcends Boundaries

Step into Kaleidoscope, Atoz's exclusive platform where the artistry of furniture and lighting design converges with cutting-edge innovation. This is where industry leaders, retailers, and visionary designers unite to redefine the standards of beauty and functionality.

Experience the Kaleidoscope Advantage:
Global Design Collective: Immerse yourself in a world-class ensemble of designers presenting groundbreaking ideas that inspire.

Synergistic Partnerships: Co-create with renowned designers to bring your unique vision to market, distinguishing your brand in the competitive landscape.
Creative Acceleration: Participate in workshops that fast-track your design process, from ideation to prototyping, with state-of-the-art technology.

Market Foresight: Gain early access to emerging trends and in-depth insights, empowering your decisions and ensuring your offerings resonate with your audience.

Sustainable Innovation: Champion environmental responsibility through guidance on sustainable practices, aligning your brand with the values of today's conscious consumers.

Join the Kaleidoscope community at Atoz and be part of a movement that’s crafting the future of design. Elevate your brand, connect with trailblazers, and shape the next wave of industry innovation.

SHANG XIA embodies a style, a culture, and a way of being made of contrasts, true to our rich Chinese heritage and the nature of the world we live in today.

Join us as we carry this legacy into the future through modern and innovative design and fine living—a world where every piece tells a story of heritage, innovation, and excellent craftsmanship.

Name: Linen Obsession Textile Trading LLC

Name: Sofia Design District

In Sofia Design District Store you will find furniture, decorative items, lighting and accessories from internationally well-known designers.

Our mission is to create a collection in which everyone, regardless of age will find our shop interesting. 

We want to inspire and pleasantly surprised our costumers.

Name: Interiors UAE
Description:
Interiors, a member of Easa Saleh Al Gurg Group LLC has a long-standing history of creating beautiful homes. Over five decades of design and inspiration come together to create a stunning range of furniture. With a focus on innovation, quality materials and skilled craftsmanship, our furniture collections showcase unique designs to suit every style and taste.

From the very first showroom in 1968, we have been furnishing UAE residences with exclusive collections from some of the finest brands in the world. Even as home interiors have changed over the years, Interiors has evolved too, keeping up to date with the fashion trends of the day. This dynamic and flexible attitude, which underlines everything we do, has allowed us to continue growing our business and maintaining our position as an industry leader.

We are passionate about flawlessly designed furniture. This passion is evident in the quality of our products. We only work with brands who understand what defines a well-crafted piece of furniture. We import furniture from over 100 well-known manufacturers located in the USA, Spain, Italy and Canada. As a result, our customers have an extensive choice when designing their homes.

Established CSR contributions:
• Certified contribution to the “Dubai the City that Cares” initiative by Dubai Chamber of Commerce in 2004 and 2005
• Certified contribution to the “Clean up the world” initiative by Dubai Municipality in 2004
• Certified contribution to the “Dubai Autism Centre” in 2010

Name: 7th Avenue
Description:
7th Avenue (https://7thavenue.co) is a digitally-native furniture brand offering products that marry beautiful designs with functional, day-to-day features. 

Our main product is a modular sofa collection we call “The World’s Greatest Modular Sofa” that includes features such as endless modularity, water-repellent & stain-resistant fabrics, removable and machine-washable covers, adjustable back cushion firmness, and many more. All products are sustainably-built using FSC-certified solid wood, and free from harmful chemicals through our OEKO-TEX certification.

Name: Comfort Works
Description:
Comfort Works aims to breathe new life into all of the world’s living space. We do it by creating beautiful, handmade slipcovers that rejuvenate old and tired sofas. 

Tens of thousands of customers around the globe use our slipcovers to amplify their delight towards their homes. It’s our mission not to just refresh their living space, but to make them fall back in love with it.

Be part of a purpose-led business. Work with a brand that is well-loved around the world, improving the lives of consumers and communities. Our goal is to support you to be the best ‘you’ that you can be through our human-centric approach and culture of flexibility and learning. Unleash your curiosity, challenge ideas, and question the status quo. With your energy and our agile environment, we can make this happen.

Every individual here can bring their purpose to life through their work. Join us and you’ll team up with a diverse group of talented and respectful peers and leaders. Among them, you’ll enjoy intense learning experiences, bring fresh ideas to the table, and simply be you. Ultimately, our workplace is designed for you to grow along with the company.

To learn more about Comfort Works, visit https://comfort-works.com/

To join our team, visit https://comfort-works.com/pages/careers

Name: Mobilmarket
Description:
Mobilmarket è la prima catena indipendente nell’arredamento e la più longeva, con oltre 60 anni di storia, in Toscana, con un progetto di espansione su tutto il territorio nazionale. 

mobilmarket.it è lo shop-online, sul mercato italiano, più nuovo e credibile nell’offerta di “lusso democratico italiano”

Mobilmarket è un marchio di EmmeEmme S.p.A. E’ stata la prima catena a lanciare, nell’arredamento, l’idea di lusso democratico italiano, portando nelle case dei propri clienti tutta la bellezza e la qualità di prodotti 100% made in Italy resi accessibili. In oltre 60 anni di storia ha progettato e arredato le abitazioni di oltre 160.000 famiglie.

Mobilmarket è stata la prima a creare il format di negozi di “boutique”, collocati nei centri città ed allestiti come una vera e propria casa. 

Con una età media di 35 e per oltre il 70% composta da donne, è una realtà giovane ed inclusiva.

In costante sviluppo offre importanti possibilità di carriera a tutti i livelli. E’ sempre alla ricerca dei migliori talenti da inserire nella propria squadra. Attenta alla formazione, è riconosciuta come una delle migliori “scuole” nel settore dell’interior design per chi vuole intraprendere la carriera di arredatore.

I negozi e le boutique Mobilmarket non si limitano a vendere arredamento ma forniscono, ai propri clienti, il servizio esclusivo di progettazione e interior design, propri di un grande studio di architettura reso disponibile a tutti, con in più gli strumenti più avanzati ed immersivi di renderizzazione e realtà virtuale.

EmmeEmme S.p.A., proprietaria di Mobilmarket, è classificata tra le prime 50 società italiane del settore arredamento. È attenta al sociale del proprio territorio ed all’ambiente. Sostiene Progetto Itaca Firenze Onlus e collabora con Network di zona.

Name: Home Centre
Description:
Founded in 1995, Home Centre is the largest omnichannel retailer for home furnishings in the Middle East, North Africa & the Indian sub-continent, offering a wide range of stylish, affordable furniture and home accessories.

As a proud part of the Landmark Group, one of the largest retail and hospitality conglomerates in the region, we are committed to making every house feel like a home. With a presence across 7 countries and a strong online and in-store footprint, we strive to deliver an exceptional shopping experience centered on quality, design, and value.

Our curated collections reflect global trends while staying rooted in local preferences, offering everything from contemporary furniture and décor to kitchenware and bed & bath essentials. 

Driven by innovation, sustainability, and a deep understanding of our customers, Home Centre continues to be a destination for people who seek to create warm, inviting, and functional living spaces.

For us people always come first, and success follows. We are proud to be recognized as one of the Best Workplaces in the UAE in 2024-25 by Great Place to Work Middle East. This award is a testament to our incredible team, and the collaborative culture we have built together.

Name: Chair King Backyard Store
Description:
Chair King Backyard Store is a furniture company based at 5405 West Sam Houston Parkway North, Houston, Texas, United States.

Chair King Backyard Store was founded in Houston in 1950, and has grown to be the largest outdoor furniture retailer in Texas. Chair King Backyard Store is family owned and operated, and maintains 21 conveniently located outdoor furniture showrooms located in the major metropolitan areas of Houston, Dallas, San Antonio and Austin.

We are a customer service driven company that strives for quality in every aspect of our business.  Our mission is to make it easy for everyone to spend more quality time in their backyard and we do this by providing a broad selection of the finest outdoor & patio furniture and accessories at the best possible value, while providing an unparalleled customer experience.

Name: Swyft
Description:
Swyft is what happens when you put a team of designers, craftsmen and a few fluffy marketing creatives together in a room on a Friday afternoon.

We knew customers just wanted great quality furniture that doesn't require a reenactment of that one sketch from Friends to get it through their front door. This got us thinking...what if furniture could arrive in compact, easy-to-handle boxes?

What happened next was a flurry of excitement. The designers started scribbling away, our craftspeople started to get technical and the marketing team made (and sipped) plenty of cups of tea until the Sofa In A Box concept was born; a sofa which could be delivered to your door in just 24 hours through the tightest of entranceways and assembled in minutes.

Fast-forward a few years down the line and we've been working hard to bring our customers even more pieces for their homes. June 2022 saw the first Swyft bed collection which followed the same core principles as our sofas did. With 9 models and counting, we're not stopping any time soon.

Name: Let's Eat It

Description: Our mission is to inspire and enrich the lives of our customers by infusing the essence of refined living into everyday experiences, ensuring that excellence in design is at the heart of everything we offer.
