Description: Seit 1950 weckt teo jakob Räume mit Atmosphäre und Charakter. Unsere Ausstellungen machen das Einrichten zum inspirierenden Erlebnis – in unseren Ateliers entwerfen wir Innenarchitektur für Menschen mit Freude an Design: zeitgemäss, funktional und stilsicher.

Name: Atec Original Design
Description:
A Atec Original Design representa grandes marcas mundiais de equipamentos de escritórios e residências. É o maior dealer da lendária empresa Herman Miller em toda a América Latina. Revende com exclusividade os carpetes em placa da companhia norte-americana Lees, tornou-se, recentemente, a única representante da dinamarquesa Fritz Hansen a oferecer a linha completa de seus móveis no Brasil e representa também a clássica, mas contemporânea, linha de armários modulares da USM.

O crescimento da Atec – que mantém showrooms e escritórios nos três principais centros econômicos do país, São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro e Brasília – é resultado da excelência em qualidade e atendimento ao cliente.
Presente no mercado brasileiro desde 1987, a Atec Original Design construiu sua história como uma das mais respeitadas empresas de mudanças de layout de escritórios e foi reconhecida pela excelência e solidez de seu trabalho junto aos clientes. Em seguida, passou a atuar com a montagem de cadeiras da marca americana Herman Miller no Brasil.

A qualidade e a confiança estabelecidas entre as duas empresas consolidou a parceria, e a Atec Original Design passou à posição de Distribuidora Certificada dos produtos Herman Miller. Rapidamente, tornou-se a maior representante da marca norte-americana em toda a América Latina.

A Atec Original Design acredita e investe na construção de conceitos sólidos
A criteriosa seleção de marcas e produtos, a valorização do design eficiente e original, o compromisso com o meio ambiente e o respeito pelo ser humano no ambiente de trabalho são algumas das bases em que fundamentamos nosso desenvolvimento e as marcas que representamos.

Nosso showroom e vendas São Paulo tem mais de 500 metros quadrados e demonstra as inúmeras possibilidades dos produtos e suas aplicações nos mais diversos ambientes.

Name: FF Design - Fendi Casa

Name: LoftByEtab
Description:
Loft is a leading modern home furnishing & accessories concept store that focuses on delivering beauty, luxury, and comfort to your home, offices, bathrooms, and residence. 
Driven by excellence and urban lifestyle, we are committed to providing you with quality, refined and elegant spaces that amplify your serenity and comfort. At Loft, we simply help you create your dream home.

Under ETAB international, an investment arm of the Saudi-based Zahran Holding Company, established in 2015, we source and deliver high-quality products from around the world, to meet your lifestyle and interior needs at the most affordable rates.

Name: ikonhouse
Description:
Welcome to ikonhouse, where we redefine the way you experience your home. As pioneers in the realms of home automation and home cinema, we seamlessly blend cutting-edge electronic technology with exceptional design.

Our globally unique lifestyle retail concept showcases meticulously curated arrangements of branded original designs, complemented by integrated automation systems. By merging the finest furniture, lighting, and flooring elements with state-of-the-art automation, we create unparalleled environments that elevate your everyday living.

At ikonhouse, we embrace the value of craftsmanship and inspire our local community to appreciate things made properly.

Imagine owning a classic lounge chair that has witnessed the tales of your grandparents and is now ready to hold your own stories for generations to come. We invite you to explore our 750 m2 showroom, conveniently located at unit 85 in Alserkal Avenue, Al Quoz 1, just behind Times Square Mall.

Experience ikonhouse and discover the future of home living. 

Our showroom is open from Monday to Friday, between 10:00 and 19:00.

Contact us at +971 43881848 or email us at dubai@ikonhouse.com. 

Visit our website at www.ikonhouse.com to embark on your journey towards a truly extraordinary home!

Name: Huxberry
Description: Premium Sleep. Luxury Furniture.

Name: Boobam
Description:
A Boobam nasce para transformar o mercado de design e arte através da tecnologia. 

Somos um espaço reconhecido pela sua curadoria de qualidade e pela capacidade de conectar de forma simples e direta designers, artistas, arquitetos e admiradores.

Name: Floor & Furnishings
Description:
F&F - Floor and Furnishings is a premier textile editor with COCO Stores & Franchise showrooms around India and a growing national distribution network offering the F&F fabric collections with inspirational designs, innovative textures, and refreshing colors in home fashion. Consistently going from strength to strength, F&F epitomizes quality and style with its wide range of collections.

We deal in an exclusive range of Fabrics for Curtains & Upholstery, Wallpaper, Wall Coverings, Rugs & Carpets, Wall to Wall Coverings, Linen for Bed & Bath, and Other Home Accessories.

Today’s well known home furnishing brand F&F was was founded by Subhash Khandelwal in 1984, wanting to upgrade the quality of home decor in India. F&F  was started as a company specializing in rugs, wall to wall carpets and flooring products and has come a long way since then.

F&F established an in-house design studio with a team of qualified young designers. The design studio aims to provide the customer interior fabrics which meet international quality with unique designs, newest material developments and a fully coordinated interior scheme and ideas for every environment. Inspiration comes from fashion and modern city life as well as from the wonderful Indian heritage with a vast treasure of designs and colors.

F&F is also distributing leading international editor brands in India such as Designers Guild, Harlequin, Casamance, Zimmer + Rhode,Elitis, Cole & Son, Wall Quest, Osborne & Little, Omexco and Many more Internal Designer collections.

Name: Connox GmbH
Description: Connox GmbH is an Internet company located in Wohlenbergstrasse 6, Hannover, Lower Saxony, Germany.

Name: Maker&Son
Description:
When we started Maker&Son, we decided to do what we loved doing, in the way we felt it should be done, with no compromise on the quality of any part of the product. For us, making things entirely from natural materials seemed an obvious choice. So too did the idea of making the process of buying a piece of luxury furniture be as enjoyable and effortless as possible.

Our products are both physically and ethically comfortable: you can sit on one of our sofas knowing that your physical comfort hasn’t caused problems for people or the planet.

We continue to believe that there are people like us in the world, looking for truly comfortable furniture made from only natural materials. We design and make each of our pieces by hand, using traditional methods by the finest local craftspeople.

Name: ZBOM
Description:
Welcome to ZBOM - Saudi Arabia, the epitome of innovation and elegance in home customization. As proud franchisees of the prestigious global brand ZBOM, we bring world-class quality and aesthetic to every corner of your home. Specializing in kitchen cabinets, wardrobes, TV consoles, furniture, and comprehensive interior home customization, we transform your living spaces into bespoke havens of luxury and functionality.

Our Services:
At ZBOM-Saudi Arabia, we understand that every home is a reflection of its inhabitants. That's why we offer tailored solutions that blend seamlessly with your lifestyle and preferences. Our range of services includes:

Kitchen Customization:
From contemporary kitchen cabinets to classic designs, our solutions are designed to enhance your cooking and dining experience.

Wardrobe Solutions:
Maximize your storage with our stylish and practical wardrobe designs.

TV Consoles & Furniture:
Elevate your living room with our custom-made TV consoles and furniture, combining beauty with utility.

Smart Home Customization:
Step into the future with our smart home solutions, integrating technology seamlessly into your living spaces for enhanced comfort and security.

Our Commitment:
As a franchisee of ZBOM, a brand renowned for its quality and innovation, we are committed to upholding the highest standards of craftsmanship and customer service. Our team of experts is dedicated to working closely with you to bring your vision to life, ensuring each project is executed with precision and care.

Name: Atacadão dos Eletros
Description:
O Atacadão dos Eletros é uma empresa paraibana que teve sua primeira loja inaugurada em João Pessoa - PB em 1994. Hoje com 30 anos de existência no mercado, possui 16 lojas distribuídas nos estados da Paraíba e Rio Grande do Norte.

Em constante evolução, o Atacadão dos Eletros tem conquistado respeito e credibilidade no mercado, ampliando seu mix de produtos para móveis, eletros, telefonia e tecnologia, sempre com produtos de qualidade e com os menores preços do mercado.

Name: FDE LLC, d/b/a Ashley Northeast
Description:
At Factory Direct Enterprises, LLC d/b/a Ashley Northeast, we are committed to Amazing our team members, guests, and the communities we serve through every personal interaction and by doing so we honor God. 

At Ashley, we’re committed to making beautiful home furnishings affordable. We became the top furniture brand in the world based on one simple, but powerful idea: to give you more value for your money. Our staff is committed to excellence in all we do. We provide the best value in home furnishings backed by superior service before, during, and after the sale. By maintaining our core values of honesty and integrity, we've made Ashley a great place to work and shop.

We are currently hiring motivated, engaging and driven professionals to join our sales team. Our fully paid training program relies heavily on mentorship and practical learning, so you’ll spend less time in a classroom and more time on the floor learning the steps by watching seasoned pros. 

Ashley is the #1 selling furniture brand in North America! We spend millions of dollars on local, regional and national advertising that drives traffic and generates opportunities for our associates to meet their income and professional development goals. We are an equal opportunity employer and offer competitive bonus, benefit and commission packages for qualified applicants.

Mission 
We are committed to amazing our team members, guests and communities we serve through every personal interaction and by doing so we honor God. 

Vision
To be the employer and retailer of choice in every community we serve.

Core Values:
Humble at Heart
Radical About our Team Members
Relentless About Amazing our Guests
Passionate About our Communities 

All employees may further our Mission and Vision by demonstrating these Core Values, regardless of their religious beliefs. Factory Direct Enterprises, LLC. d/b/a Ashley Northeast does not discriminate based on an individual’s religious faith or lack thereof.

Name: Chamikara Furniture (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW

Chamikara Furniture (Pvt) Ltd is a furniture manufacturing company, principally involved in design, manufacture, and sale of furniture products. Since commencement, Chamikara Furniture (Pvt) Ltd has shown ability deliver value to our growing list of clients. Our factory is well equipped with modern machines and equipment. Our members of staff are well trained professional who have been in the business of high powered furniture manufacturing.

At Chamikara Furniture (Pvt) Ltd, we are very proud of our strong client focus and long-term relationships we have built over time. This has impacted positively on the way we work compelling us to accept nothing less for the client but the best.

Compared to other cheaper/imported products, our prices are very competitive and the standard of work much higher. We only use high-grade raw materials and by paying attention to all our customers’ specific needs, we strive to make every piece a masterpiece. It’s one thing to manufacture quality furniture and another to manufacture furniture cheaply and make it look expensive.

OUR VISION

“Our vision is to be a leading international furniture manufacturer offering innovative and superior quality products”

MISSION STATEMENT

“Our mission is to create value for our customers by constantly providing reliable and flexible products meeting and exceeding their expectations”



WHAT WE DO

We are the go-to company with expertise in the following :

• Manufacturing all kind of furniture with the best quality.
• Interior designing to customer preferences.
• Creating furniture custom orientated.

Name: Newton Baby, Inc.
Description:
About Newton
We’re on a mission to provide the whole family with safer, healthier, better products for rest and play. Our trusted, top-rated mattresses, sleep accessories and more make us a favorite for babies, kids, parents and pups alike.

Awards & Mentions
Newton crib mattresses have been featured as top products in The New York Times, Good Housekeeping, Babylist, The Bump and Parents Magazine.

Product Certifications
Our mattresses, bassinet, and travel crib are GREENGUARD Gold certified, meaning that they are independently tested and certified for low chemical emissions, exceeding the highest industry emissions safety standards to help improve indoor air quality.

Company Culture
Our company's culture is always evolving to fit the needs of both our customers and employees. At Newton, out of the box ideas are encouraged, a healthy work-life balance is prioritized and vacation is unlimited!

Name: Mor Furniture for Less
Description: Mor Furniture for Less, Inc. was founded over 40 years ago with an industry-leading reputation and was ranked 33 among the top 100 furniture retailers in the US in Furniture Today for 2020.

Name: Sleepyhead
Description: Launched in 2016 by Steven Van Alen, a trailblazer in student comfort, Sleepyhead introduced the first mattress toppers designed exclusively for college dorms, setting an industry standard. We take pride in pioneering a product that combines quality, comfort, and craftsmanship, now emulated across campuses nationwide. With the backing of notable investors like LoveSac's Founder, we lead the market. Sleepyhead's promise is simple: unmatched service and a transformative sleep experience for every college student.

Name: COCOLI
Description:
Welcome to the Community of Conscious Living: COCOLI is the final online destination for preloved design furniture & decor. 

Speed-sell your furniture or hunt for quality-checked design treasures from our curated collections with hassle-free transport services and quick payments.
 
ABOUT US 
We are a Berlin-based start up with a grand ambition to make sustainable living easy. We are a multi-brand platform for preloved premium furniture and design objects, curated by style experts. Active sustainable living means creating synergies between old and new and reviving instead of discarding. We connect the dots between private sellers, iconic brands, b-ware, second-hand retailers and e-commerce – and our team is growing quickly. 

COCOLI joins forces with furniture brand icons and an ever-growing base of unique pre-loved pieces. By giving furniture a second life or a new home, our collective works together towards a better future.

Name: reiter design gmbh
Description: Wir lieben und leben Design. Deshalb beraten wir unsere Kunden bei ihren Projekten von der ersten Idee bis zur fertigen Umsetzung und liefern Premium-Marken sowie besten Service.

Name: KARDUUS
Description:
Luminaires conçus et fabriqués dans la métropole lilloise avec une démarche locale et durable. 
Inspiration végétales & éclosion lumineuse pour sublimer vos intérieurs. 
Services sur mesure pour les PRO (architectes, décorateurs...) selon vos envies, besoins, budget.

Name: Handicrafts Home
Description:
An Artisan Brand Without a Middleman
At Handicrafts Home, we lean on over four decades of expertise in manufacturing to provide distinctive and socially aware home decor and home furnishing products to help people make their homes sophisticated and unique.

We have been delighting our customers with quality products and exceptional service for over a decade online. 

We source the materials we use with the environment in mind. 

Our core values are to provide beautiful homewares without sacrificing the planet. After all, it is our planet, its people and its art that inspires our designs.

Name: Yumeko
Description:
We believe that dreams can change the world. Because essentially, everything starts with a dream. We dream of a world where everyone can sleep better.

For the world has to change and become more sustainable. We are doing our bit by improving the world of sleep and the world of sleepers. Change the world sleeping, as we call it. 

Better sleep also means beautiful dreams – and having the energy you need to make them come true. At Yumeko, we do everything we can to help people get a great night’s sleep and wake up feeling wonderful. With the softest bed linen and bath textiles made from the finest materials and with the greatest focus possible on people, animals and the environment.

Name: Skeidar
Description:
Skeidar har siden 1912 hjulpet nordmenn med å få det fint hjemme. Vi tilbyr et bredt sortiment av moderne kvalitetsmøbler og stilsikre interiørløsninger, og er en kompetansebedrift som daglig bistår tusenvis av kunder gjennom å være Hjelpsom, Proff og På.

I dag er vi Norges største familieeide selskap innen møbel og interiør, med 51 varehus fra Tromsø i nord til Kristiansand i sør.

Name: Nolte Kitchens UK
Description:
Nolte Küchen is a family owned business, one of Europe’s largest Kitchen manufacturing businesses and Germany’s Favourite Kitchen Brand, having been voted for the third time in a row.  Product quality and innovation are at the heart of our success, creating market leading ranges which our dealers and customers alike love in equal measure. A truly global player we export to over 70 countries around the world.

With 15 showrooms around the UK and further expansion planned, you can experience the exceptional quality of our award-winning German kitchens — and the equally impressive service we provide. Inspirational design and planning to create the perfect space. 

We make kitchens that aren’t kitchens. They’re places to talk about the day ahead — or the day that’s just been. They’re places of music, arguments, romance, laughter. They’re places that transform a house into your home. Yes, a Nolte kitchen is made with meticulous German engineering and is tailored to your precise requirements. But they’re not just kitchens. They’re where life happens

Name: Olive Ateliers
Description: We are a home decor importer, experiential retailer and lifestyle brand based in Los Angeles.

Name: reckertwerkstattmöbel
Description:
Our sleep systems are technically sophisticated and high-quality products.
Since 1987, reckert werkstatt möbel realizes individual and tailor-made interior concepts for the hotel, catering and specialist trade.
On request, we work together with our interior designers to develop an individual concept that meets your requirements and wishes. Receive with us your unique selling point that will delight your discerning guests.
With our help you get added value in functionality, sleeping comfort and design. Individual design, high-quality interior and conceptually sophisticated furniture are produced specifically for each of our clients.
Every furniture system is produced especially for you “Made in Germany” in Borken, Westphalia – from carpentry to upholstery.
Get to know us – we are looking forward to it.

Name: Hudson's Furniture
Description:
At Hudson’s Furniture, we believe retail can be done differently, and done with excellence.

For over four decades, we’ve helped customers turn houses into homes by delivering a thoughtful design experience, high-quality furnishings, and service rooted in care and integrity. Just as important, we’re committed to building winning teams where people are supported, challenged, and encouraged to grow.

Our culture is guided by faith and grounded in strong values. We believe leadership matters, accountability is an expression of care, and excellence should never come at the expense of people. We set clear expectations, listen to feedback, and work intentionally to ensure our values are lived out in how we lead, serve, and execute every day.

At Hudson’s, success isn’t just measured by results, but by how those results are achieved. We invest in developing leaders, fostering trust, and creating an environment where people take ownership, bring good energy, and strive to exceed expectations for our customers and each other.

Name: Index Living Mall
Description:
Index Living Mall was developed in 2002 by Mr.Pisit Patamasatayasonthi, The CEO of Index Interfurn Group with the Specialty Mall for Home Furnishing Concept that is the largest center of Furniture and Home Decorative items. Index Living Mall is the first Specialty Mall for Home Furnishing in Thailand, which offers the best design, and the best selection of materials. We have never stopped the development of our best quality products and services for home owners.

อินเด็กซ์ ลิฟวิ่งมอลล์ได้รับการพัฒนาธุรกิจขึ้นในปี 2546 โดยนายพิศิษฐ์ ปัทมสัตยาสนธิ ประธานกรรมการบริหาร กลุ่มบริษัทอินเด็กซ์ อินเตอร์เฟิร์น ด้วยแนวคิดที่มุ่งเน้นให้เป็น "สเปเชียลมอลล์" ที่รวม เฟอร์นิเจอร์ ของแต่งบ้าน และของใช้ภายในบ้านที่ ที่ใหญ่ที่สุดในประเทศ ซึ่งนับได้ว่าอินเด็กซ์ ลิฟวิ่งมอลล์เป็นสเปเชียลมอลล์แห่งแรกในประเทศไทย ด้วยความมุ่งมั่นในการนำเสนอสินค้า เฟอร์นิเจอร์ ของแต่งบ้าน และของใช้ภายในบ้าน ที่ได้รับการคัดสรรให้ครอบคลุมทุกความต้องการของลูกค้า พร้อมเสนอบริการที่เป็นเลิศเพื่อสร้างความพึงพอใจสูงสุดให้กับลูกค้าทุกระดับ
อินเด็กซ์ ลิฟวิ่งมอลล์เปิดให้บริการสาขาแรกที่สาขาฟิวเจอร์ พาร์ครังสิต ในเดือนธันวาคม 2545และได้ทำการขยายสาขาอย่างต่อเนื่องจนถึงปัจจุบัน มีสาขาที่เปิดดำเนินการแล้วทั้งสิ้น 28 สาขา ทั่วประเทศ โดยมุ่งเน้น ทำเลที่ตั้งในบริเวณชานเมืองที่มีกลุ่มที่พักอาศัยหนาแน่น การเดินทางสะดวก พร้อมบริการที่จอดรถ และมีแผนงานที่จะขยายต่อไปยังต่างจังหวัด และกรุงเทพฯ อีกหลายสาขา

Name: Gärtner Internationale Möbel
Description:
Ob Wohnen, Büros oder öffentliche Räume – wir sind überall zu Hause

Wir sind ein Hamburger Einrichtungshaus für Privatkunden und Unternehmen und gehören in Deutschland zu den führenden Häusern für Wohn- und Büroeinrichtung.

Name: Khenshu
Description:
Khenshu is a brand that believes in unique heirloom pieces that can be used as conversation starters. We make luxury handcrafted furniture, inspired by the cool sea breeze, the wafting smell of vast lavender fields or wet mud after a drizzle. Each of our pieces are carefully crafted to tell a story or create a forgotten experience. Celebrating the nuanced workmanship of skilled Indian artisans who have worked in Royal palaces, the brand aspires to bring back the meticulous architecture and decorative arts of bygone eras with a fresh approach. Designed and crafted to fit into modern minimalistic spaces or grand contemporary settings . Each piece celebrates a unique personality that we find lost in our busy way of life. Our monotonous lives in concrete jungles has us influenced and surrounded by quick temporary fixes that follow the masses. We strive to bring back to you a sustainable way of life where uniqueness is celebrated and we stop to admire what the earth has to offer. We believe that everything surrounding us has an aura or energy of it’s own that can have influence on us. Hence, we create spaces that have a life of their own and create a revitalized feeling of home that is personal to you when you walk in.
All our products are handcrafted by local artisans to help preserve art, create employment and vastly support the idea of Make In India.

Name: Strategic Spaces
Description:
Strategic Spaces is a full service Contract Furniture Dealership with locations in Boston, MA and Hartford, CT.  We offer a full range of furniture solutions for Corporate, Life Science, Healthcare, Higher Education, Hospitality and Multi-Family clients. 

In 2021, we expanded our services to include Lab and Fitness Equipment.

Masters in the art of change, we create environments that are functional, flexible and adaptable to the evolving demands of our customers. Our systematic process connects the physical work environment with business objectives in order to create high performance spaces for today. Our interior design and project management teams, combining decades of experience, will help create, implement and deliver our robust solutions to make your vision a reality. We collaborate with you to ensure your decisions seamlessly integrate with your culture, technology, brand and budget requirements.

The potential of your Space is limitless, be Strategic about it!

Website: http://www.strategicspaces.com

Name: Grupo TOKY
Description:
O Grupo Toky nasce da união de marcas icônicas no setor de Casa e Decoração: Tok&Stok, Mobly e Guldi, presentes nos lares de milhões de brasileiros.

A partir dessa fusão, consolidamos uma das maiores potências do segmento na América Latina, aliando tradição, inovação e design acessível.

Cada marca do grupo mantém sua identidade e proposta de valor, atendendo diferentes públicos com total sinergia:

Tok&Stok: Desde 1978, referência em design e funcionalidade, trazendo móveis e acessórios para transformar ambientes com praticidade e estilo.
Mobly: Fundada em 2011, nasceu do digital e cresceu com inovação, oferecendo uma experiência de compra moderna e diversificada, com produtos para todos os gostos e bolsos.
Guldi: Especialista em colchões e conforto, foca na qualidade e praticidade para garantir um sono reparador e uma experiência de compra simplificada.

Nosso propósito vai além de vender móveis e decoração: queremos inspirar histórias e dar vida a lugares. Combinando o melhor do varejo físico e digital, promovemos uma jornada de compra fluida, intuitiva e cada vez mais conectada às necessidades dos consumidores.

Este é um novo capítulo para o varejo de Casa e Decoração no Brasil, e estamos prontos para seguir inovando, sempre com um olhar atento ao design, à funcionalidade e à experiência do cliente.

Acompanhe a nossa página para ficar por dentro das novidades e fazer parte dessa transformação. Somos o Grupo TOKY!

Name: LINEA & CASA +39
Description:
CASA+39… For everything that is HOME.
We have the widest selection of Home furnishings.
From the sleeping area to the living area, Living and Office.

Name: cunacci
Description: Oda Furniture is a frist european-touch furniture brand in Egypt.

Name: KERIA LIVING
Description:
Chez Keria Living, nous sommes des fabricants et créateurs d'univers intérieurs où la lumière est notre guide. 

Disponible en ligne 24h/24 et 7j/7 ainsi que dans toute la France avec un réseau de 60 magasins, nous accompagnons nos clients pour imaginer des espaces de vie inspirants et personnalisés.
Une expérience immersive dans des ambiances décoratives variées, permettant à nos clients de trouver l'inspiration, de visualiser leur quotidien et de personnaliser leur intérieur selon leurs envies, car pour nous, le style ne connaît aucune limite.

Nous proposons une offre complète de luminaires mais aussi du mobilier et de la décoration, de qualité et manufacture supérieure, sélectionnée et confectionnée avec soin.

Name: St. James
Description:
Fundada em São Paulo em 1976, a St. James nasceu com a missão de levar beleza, luxo e inovação para a casa de nossos clientes. Rompendo com os padrões estéticos do Brasil na época, a St. James foi a pioneira na fabricação de peças com estilo moderno e desenhos lisos. Em menos de 2 anos já vendíamos nossos produtos também mundo a fora, com clientes nos Estados Unidos, Europa, Oriente Médio e América Latina.

Sempre presente em nosso DNA, a combinação entre artesania, qualidade e design, fez com que a St. James se tornasse referência em produtos de luxo para a casa. Privilegiamos o talento e a maestria das pessoas que estão por trás de cada produto, através do equilíbrio entre o material, o desenho e a técnica dos artesãos que trabalham o metal.

Nosso veículo, a prata, tem grande poder simbólico. É um material com ciclo vital maior que muitos outros e faz ponte entre o passado – a tradição, a história – e o futuro, pela durabilidade do material e do desenho atemporal dos produtos.

Nos dias de hoje a maior parte dos produtos são criados para durarem pouco. Nosso produto, bem ao contrário, dá a quem o usa o direito de pensar que ele durará para sempre.

Name: Mobilificio Marchese
Description:
Since 1930, we support architects, interior designers and developers with authentic Made in Italy FF&E solutions for high-end residential, hospitality and commercial projects worldwide.

As official dealer of Baxter, Flexform, Lema, Porada, Cattelan Italia, Living Divani, Meridiani and more, we deliver curated selections, custom solutions and full turnkey support – from space planning and CAD/3D renders to white-glove international shipping in 40+ countries.

Our Expertise for Trade Pros: 

Featured projects: Bulgari/Marriott hotels in Saudi Arabia, Melbourne penthouses, Dubai residences. Let's collaborate on your next vision. DM for CAD files or consultations.

Name: AL MOUSA Co. Ltd.
Description:
Since its founding in 1984, Al-Mousa Co. Ltd. has concentrated on satisfying both its clients' needs and those of the market.
A thriving and well-known corporation in the market, it soon broadened its horizons in many other industries as a consequence of the acquisition of creative and original solutions. Additionally, Al-Mousa Co. Ltd. has developed into one of the most significant distributors discerning in providing upscale Modern Furniture, Supplying Office Furniture, Projects to all Government, Private Sector, Hospitality & Real Estate Sectors it is regarded as one of the top businesses in this field by submitting the best brands and understanding market requirements.

Name: Oficial Webshop
Description:
Bem-vindo à nossa empresa especializada em cadeiras, fornecendo produtos de alta qualidade para clientes em todo o Brasil. 

Realizamos um profundo estudo de mercado para selecionar cadeiras com alta qualidade, ergonomia, design inovador, acompanhando as tendências do mercado, garantindo a durabilidade e conforto que nossos clientes precisam.

Temos uma ampla gama de cadeiras, incluindo cadeiras de escritório, sala e cozinha, decoração, presidente e gamer, todas projetadas para atender às necessidades específicas dos nossos clientes.

Name: EZ Living Interiors
Description:
Now operating for over 35 years, at EZ Living Interiors we are proud to call ourselves front runners in the furniture market. Offering 5 star customer service, superb quality and masterfully designed showrooms across Ireland and Northern Ireland.

Our experience and expertise mean that today we're proud to bring you the largest range of furniture in the country, along with unbeatable quality, and service that's second to none.

We look forward to welcoming you!

Name: The Colosseum
Description: A curation that brings a synergy to your space that is dynamic, yet peaceful. Colosseum aesthetically layers your house with an attitude that reflects the person you are.

Name: Life Interiors
Description:
At Life Interiors, we believe great design should feel personal and accessible. That’s why we curate timeless furniture and homewares from trusted global brands and local designers, making it easy to create a space that reflects your lifestyle. Whether you're visiting our showrooms or shopping online, we're here to inspire and support you in designing a home that feels warm, considered, and uniquely yours.

Are you in the interior industry? Whether you're an interior designer, architect, property manager, developer, or a hospitality and accommodation expert, our dedicated Trade Team is equipped to support your projects with expert guidance, custom capabilities, and premium trade benefits.

Name: noo.ma
Description:
noo.ma is a new-generation design brand with a versatile lineup of all-star sideboards, poufs, beds, tables, already delivered to over 20 000 customers across 40 countries. The home of bold ideas and timeless designs with lots of room for your personality.

By working with the most experienced local manufacturers and new-generation curious designers, noo.ma comes up with extraordinary products of tomorrow, loved for their playful shapes, desirable colors and enjoyable materials.

noo.ma's breakthrough approach lies in a super-easy assembly systems, bold, future-oriented sustainability & transparent, reasonable price points. Let’s dive into the world of inspiring products for both residential and commercial interiors.

As noo.ma is constantly expanding & looking to grow, we're steadily improving our solutions, introducing new products to customers all over Europe. 

We believe that our success is possible due to the contribution made by our dedicated team. We create open, supportive, curious, yet demanding working environment with an individual approach to each member.

At noo.ma we are seeking for ambitious & committed individuals, out of the box thinkers, ready to brighten us up with fresh, unconventional ideas.

Name: Dtale
Description:
It's home culture created by Dtale.

You can edit, you can pick it up. Different kinds of materials, different kids of textures and the warmth used by creativity, this is really a creative space to find amazing objects, for your home.

Name: pro office Büro + Wohnkultur
Description:
Das pro office Netzwerk bildet mit seinen bundesweit elf Standorten seit mehr als 30 Jahren das funktionale Dach für neu definierte Dienstleistungen rund um die Büro + Wohnkultur und die Arbeit der Zukunft. Dauerhafte Kundenzufriedenheit und qualitative Maßstäbe setzen – das ist der Mittelpunkt des täglichen Handelns der pro office Unternehmensgruppe! Ganz gleich, wie die Kundenbedürfnisse aussehen: Ob intelligente Einzelplatzlösungen oder komplex vernetzte Betriebseinrichtungen. Die langjährige Erfahrung des pro office Teams garantiert unter Einbezug eines professionellen Netzwerks eine umfassende und individuelle Beratung.

Die pro office Ausstellungsräume sorgen für Erlebnisse und Eindrücke des modernen und sinngetriebenen Arbeitens. Die Einrichtungsprofis heißen jeden herzlich willkommen und beraten gern und unverbindlich über die vielfältigen Möglichkeiten der Büro-, Wohn- und Objektausstattung – live am Objekt, und mit Herz und Leidenschaft!

Name: Tresi
Description:
Based in NYC, Tresi offers luxury, eclectic pre-treasured furniture and decor without the retail markup. Our goal is to redefine the interior design market by increasing inclusivity. We believe you deserve to discover and embrace your unique identity within your own space without breaking your wallet, or breaking the next year. 
With transparent pricing, door-to-door convenience, and dedicated customer service, we aim to make the hectic process of furnishing your home as enjoyable and hassle-free as possible. Currently serving neighborhoods in Manhattan, Brooklyn, and parts of Queens.

Name: The Expert
Description:
Design you can trust.
Video consultations with the world’s top designers
& Expert-curated home shopping marketplace.

Backed by First Round Capital, Forerunner Ventures, Gwyneth Paltrow, and more

Name: Damsun Group
Description:
Damsun Group
We are Manufacture of Doors & Windows in Premium Quality Aluminium & UPVC .
We are also Manufacturers Of Out Door Furniture in Premium Quality .

Name: Rug & Kilim
Description:
Celebrating our 45th anniversary, Rug & Kilim’s award-winning team has been a staple for designers with our vast archive of modern and custom in-house designs, complemented by a rich selection of antique, vintage, and Kilim rugs.

Under industry leader Jahanshah Josh Nazmiyal, our New York showroom continues to flourish with an ever-growing collection—including the largest international assortment of Kilims. With an eye for beautiful things and a wealth of experience, Josh personally selects every rug and oversees all developments for  our collections. He and his designers work with a comprehensive variety of exotic yarns and weaving techniques to refine our craft and pioneer new collections suitable for our discerning clientele. With these goals in mind, Josh strives to surround himself with like minds and energized, talented individuals to exact his vision.

More than storytellers or historians, we are artists, dedicated to providing the very best—from antique to modern and everything in between.

Name: Rekomo
Description:
We at Rekomo are driven by the idea of manufacturing as little as possible. Therefore, we sell, buy and rent used office furniture for offices throughout the country.
Rekomo has offered recycled and affordable office furniture since 1992. This means that we’ve had 26 years to refine our offer and services. Of course, being satisfied with your office is at least as important to us as saving the environment. That is why the foundation of our business concept is high customer satisfaction and low environmental impact.

Our vision is that companies should put second hand first when it’s time to decorate the office. To help you, we offer help every step of the way. This means that you can hand over everything from drawing the office landscape to the choice of color for the chair pad to us. We’ll be there from start to finish. 

By putting second hand first you’re not only lower your costs, you’re also involved in helping us reduce our climate footprint. We promise you that it’ll feel as good in your stomach and it does in your wallet.

Name: Circle Furniture
Description:
Circle Furniture is a family-owned retailer recognized for their beautifully-crafted home furnishings, vibrant color choices, and diverse offerings. Founded over 70 years ago, the company has grown into six design centers across Massachusetts and one in Portsmouth, NH.

With quality and sustainability at the heart of their mission, Circle Furniture is dedicated to offering long-lasting pieces that are made in an eco-friendly manner. They have long-standing relationships with local furniture manufacturers while ensuring any vendor they partner with - whether domestic or overseas - shares similar values around quality and sustainability.

No matter the size of your project, Circle Furniture’s talented team of Design Consultants will collaborate with you on any ideas you have for your dream home. The company has countless customizable fabric and finish options for you to choose from.

Circle Furniture has been awarded Best of Boston by Boston Magazine in 2009, 2011, 2012, and 2018 for American Made!

Name: YOURSE.CO
Description:
Revolutionizing the Furniture Industry: Unleashing Seamless Design Experiences and Sustainable Solutions.

At Yourse.co, we are on a mission to transform the furniture industry and reshape the way businesses approach furnishing needs. 

Our company pioneers a dynamic digital subscription experience that takes residential, workspace, and hospitality spaces to new heights. Breaking free from traditional ownership models, we disrupt the status quo by offering an unparalleled interior design adventure rooted in the circular and subscription economy. 

Say goodbye to the limitations of possession and embrace a world where iconic furniture by visionary designers and architects of the 20th and 21st century becomes accessible like never before. 

We curate a prestigious collection of authentic, contemporary home, hospitality and office furniture from 100% European renowned and premium brands. Our all-inclusive multi-service solution covers every aspect, from curation, logistics to maintenance, insurance, after-sales support, recycling, and beyond. 

By streamlining the entire process, we ensure a frictionless journey from contact to closure, empowering our private and corporate customers to effortlessly bring their spaces to life. 

Join us in revolutionizing the industry and making a significant impact on our planet by drastically reducing the environmental footprint of furniture production. Step into the future of furniture with Yourse.co - where captivating design, sustainability, and exceptional experiences converge. yourse.co
http://yourse.co

Name: Muebles Pergo
Description: Trabajamos todos los días para ser la empresa de muebles e interiorismo más confiable y de mejor calidad en México.  Nos llena de orgullo decir que tenemos 25 años transformando vidas, 15 tiendas y un equipo de más de 200 personas que todos los días hace lo que más ama: crear hogares bellos.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: Rimadesio Roma by Formanova Studio
Description:
UNA IDEA DI CASA CON UNO STILE UNICO

Formanova nasce da un’idea di selezione del design del mobile contemporaneo made in Italy unito ad uno stile unico e raffinato.

Le soluzioni di arredo che vengono proposte si ispirano a forme eleganti e armoniose, minimaliste e sensuali, a materiali prestigiosi e a colori di infinite gradazioni, in una prospettiva evolutiva e estremamente personalizzata.

Il risultato è l’espressione massima delle emozioni e della personalità di chi la vive.

La creatività e l’intuitività di Formanova e del suo team di architetti motivano e rendono l’esperienza dell’arredo della casa un momento di autentica ispirazione e di significativa identità del proprio vivere.

Arredare, per Formanova, non è solo comporre lo spazio in cui si vive ma significa rappresentare a pieno titolo un ambiente originale e prestigioso che rispecchi pienamente la personalità di chi la abita.

Name: Rum21
Description:
Rum21 är en av nordens ledande nätbutiker för möbler, belysning och heminredning. Vi har de flesta av Skandinaviens och Europas största och mest efterfrågade varumärken i vårt sortiment. Eller vad sägs om String, HAY, Muuto, DUX, Kartell, Tom Dixon, Skultuna, House Doctor, Iittala, Ferm Living, Lovisa Burfitt, Gubi och många, många fler. Så bland drygt 10 000 produkter från fler än 200 varumärken hittar du säkert något för dig. 

Rum21:s specialitet är grymt snabba leveranser, brett sortiment av designvarumärken och ständigt inkommande nyheter samt en riktigt trevlig, kunnig och hjälpsam kundtjänst. Rum21 grundades 2006 och finns idag i fyra länder – Sverige, Norge, Danmark och Finland. Vi sitter i Göteborg och har kontor på Kungsgatan och butik på Kyrkogatan. Rum21 är en del av Royal Design Group AB.

Name: GRAM - Groupement pour l'Aménagement de la Maison
Description:
Depuis 1982, le GRAM - Groupement pour l'Aménagement de la Maison, est spécialisé dans la concession d'enseignes dans l'ameublement et la décoration.

Le GRAM, c'est : 
 Plus de 40 années d'expérience et de proximité.
 Plus de 250 magasins adhérents.

Nos enseignes : L'Ameublier Home Design, Hémisphère Sud, Gallery Tendances, Mobilier Séduction, Arrivages, Décorateurs et Ébénistes de France, Maîtres Tradition.

Name: muun home
Description:
Our family has spent the last 15 years working with artisans around the country to develop products for brands all over the world. However whenever our friends asked us to help decorate their houses we always felt limited by the products available in the market here. It pained us to see that while India produces some of the best product in the world, almost none of it was curated for our home country. 


We decided to plug that gap. We collaborated with our network- artisans in Agra keeping age old techniques alive, Design studios in Delhi and Moradabad to use cutting edge technology to achieve a unique palette of textures and finishes. We have developed a range of playful products - merging old techniques with new ideas. 


We hope our collections excite and inspire you to make your house your own

Name: stilwerk
Description:
The stilwerk universe presents more than 800 premium brands in its design
destinations, its stilwerk hotels and workspaces, in its online shop and via
virtual tour. From the classical to the avant-garde, from the kitchen to the
study, from planning to furnishing, from the showroom to digital shopping,
stilwerk offers everything when it comes to premium design and relies on
cooperation instead of competition. The stilwerk magazine, a design kiosk,
cultural events and a network for architects round off the globally unique
concept. At its locations in Hamburg, Düsseldorf and - in the future -
Rotterdam, brands, retailers and customers benefit in no small way from the
prime location of the houses and hotels, the high-quality offerings in inspiring
surroundings, the excellent service and the charisma of the stilwerk brand with its wide-ranging, cross-media communication channels. In 2021, stilwerk is celebrating its 25th anniversary.

Name: Meerkat Home Pte Ltd
Description: At Meerkat, we're revolutionizing the home renovation industry as a one-stop platform that connects manufacturers directly with consumers. Our vision is to empower homeowners to renovate their homes transparently and smartly.

Name: City Desk
Description:
City Desk est une entreprise tunisienne spécialisée dans la vente de mobilier de bureau. Forte d’une expertise de plus de 30 ans, héritée de sa société mère City Meuble, reconnue pour son innovation dans la création de meubles domestiques, City Desk perpétue cette tradition en mettant l’accent sur le confort, le design et la qualité.

Dans cette même logique d’excellence, City Desk propose une sélection de marques européennes de renommées, respectant des processus de fabrication certifiés et utilisant des matériaux haut de gamme. Chaque produit est conçu pour répondre aux normes internationales les plus exigeantes, garantissant ainsi un niveau de qualité à la hauteur de vos attentes.

Pour vos espaces professionnels, notre bureau d’études, en collaboration avec une équipe d’architectes qualifiés, vous accompagne dans l’aménagement sur-mesure de vos bureaux. Nous sélectionnons les solutions les plus adaptées à votre activité et à vos contraintes d’espace. Avec City Desk, vous bénéficiez à la fois d’un mobilier de qualité et d’un accompagnement personnalisé.

Name: Progressive Lighting
Description:
With state-of-the-art lighting stores in Atlanta, Roswell, Duluth, Kennesaw and Cumming, Progressive Lighting has been brightening the homes of discerning customers for over 60 years. 

To us, lighting is much more than just fixtures. The right lighting brings your personal treasures to life, illuminates your everyday tasks, and creates an appealing environment for you to live, work, and play.

Name: Küchenheld
Description:
As a smart kitchen studio company, Küchenheld combines the latest technology with outstanding service and digitalization – from planning to assembly.

We made it our mission to revolutionize the classic way of buying kitchens. Opting for transparency, efficiency, and fairness. For every customer and each employee the same.
Connecting the intelligent use of innovative technologies, such as virtual reality, with comprehensive personal advice, we create a unique buying experience - and make it easy to buy a kitchen comfortably from home!
Our approach is as dynamic as it is agile, our team as diverse as passionate about its work.

Founded in 2018, we work from offices all around Germany. Currently, you can convince yourself of our Smartrooms in eight German cities - Berlin, Hamburg, Cologne, Frankfurt, Munich, Leipzig, Freiburg and Düsseldorf. More locations will open in the coming months.

Imprint: www.kuechenheld.de/impressum
Privacy statement: /www.kuechenheld.de/datenschutzerklaerung

Name: Mozaik
Description: Since in 1992, Mozaik has successfully continued to maintain its pioneering mission by gathering the most important brands of the design world. Mozaik more than just a design store, it has become a unique reference point that offers the intersection of the notion of design with lifestyle, from home and office furniture to bathroom and kitchenware, from lighting to accessories.

Name: Les Boutiques Tréca
Description: Treca is a French brand offering high quality beds with handcrafted know-how for several generations. We cultivate "L'Art de la Chambre" in our two French workshops and in our Boutiques (London, Paris & Lyon).

Name: Swaap
Description:
Société basée à Nyon (VD), SWAAP offre une solution clé en main, rapide et flexible donnant la possibilité de louer puis d’échanger - à tout moment et en quelques clics seulement -, une sélection éthique de mobilier haut de gamme. En toute circonstance, l’adaptabilité fait partie de notre ADN. 

Sans cesse à la recherche de nouvelles marques susceptibles d’enrichir notre catalogue, représenter au mieux notre vision du design d’intérieur et de répondre à vos nécessités, nous sommes Carolann, Deborah et Stanislas : trois passionnés, pour qui les relations humaines sont primordiales.

Tout comme il est impensable que la qualité soit uniquement réservée à une élite, il l’est encore moins de considérer la consommation de masse – et donc jetable – comme une possibilité viable pour votre futur. Au cœur de notre idée et de notre fonctionnement, la durabilité est alors centrale. 

Circulaire, locale et économique, la location et l’échange de mobilier qualitatif permettent de dynamiser votre intérieur et de donner libre cours à toutes vos envies, sans ruiner la planète ou vos finances.

Solution online et fonctionnelle, SWAAP c’est aussi des lieux de rencontre et de découverte. 

Envie de toucher vos futurs meubles ou de vous assoir sur votre canapé à venir ? Venez nous rencontrer à nos showrooms ! Vous y découvrirez aussi les talents du design suisse de demain.

Let’s SWAAP!

Name: Homix
Description: Homix is an ecommerce platform that sells home furniture, home décor, lighting and home supplies through a visualized community.

Name: Lops Arredamenti Milano
Description:
Lops Arredi offre soluzioni d’arredo su misura di design made in Italy, con oltre 12 anni di esperienza al fianco dei migliori produttori italiani per un servizio rivolto a privati, architetti, home stager, immobiliaristi, imprese edili, agenzie immobiliari, General contractor e aziende.

 La storia di Lops Arredi: 
Nata con l'obiettivo di creare un luogo immersivo per l'esperienza abitativa, dove poter scoprire tutte le novità nel campo dell'arredamento e trovare progettisti competenti per arredare qualsiasi ambiente.

 La nostra offerta e brand: 
La nostra gamma include cucine del brand Stosa e Snaidero, camere da letto, letti, armadi, camerette  Novamobili-Nidi-Battistella, divani  Dtre, complementi d'arredo come madie , comò e consolle, tavoli e sedie dei brand Riflessi e Calligaris, arredo bagno, soluzioni trasformabili e salvaspazio,  complementi di arredo e oggettistica.

Negli anni, la nostra realtà si è sviluppata costantemente, mantenendo come guida gli ideali di qualità e l’attenzione al cliente.  
I nostri 4 store su Milano sono un luogo dove la qualità e lo stile incontrano l’eccellenza del momento.

Se desideri collaborare con noi come libero professionista nella vendita di arredi al pubblico, scrivici a direzione@lops.it

Name: MUEBLES PONIENTE
Description:
MUEBLES PONIENTE es una empresa de venta de mobiliario del hogar fundada en Almería en 1990 con una exposición de más de 5.000 productos distribuidos en más de 6.000 m2. 

Somos especialistas en muebles, sofás y colchones de calidad a precios competitivos. Ofrecemos un servicio de transporte y montaje gratis.

Nacimos dispuestos a aportar el máximo valor a nuestros clientes transformando su estilo de vida y preservando el sentimiento familiar con mobiliario del hogar accesible a todos, de calidad y sofisticado que no solo decora, sino que también abraza a la familia en cada rincón.

Nos avalan más de 35 años y un equipo de colaboradores que con esfuerzo hemos creado una comunidad de pensamientos innovadores y un humanismo creativo.

Name: BUXUS Design / Mobilier Outdoor
Description:
BUXUS, c’est une équipe de passionnés qui met tout en oeuvre pour concrétiser vos rêves d’extérieurs.

A chaque projet, nous vous proposons une solution sur mesure et vous accompagnons dans la conception de vos espaces de vie extérieurs.

Nous travaillons avec une sélection parmi les plus grandes marques de mobilier Outdoor, pour vous présenter des designs d’exception et des savoir-faire uniques.

Venez découvrir notre showroom 21 Cours du Chapeau Rouge à Bordeaux.

Name: M&M Bathroom & Kitchen World
Description: Bathroom and kitchen retailer in Dundee, UK. Creating the home of your dreams, from design to completion.

Name: Dovetails
Description:
Function | Customisable

At Dovetails Woodshop, we passionately blend traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design, creating bespoke furniture pieces that embody elegance and endurance. With an unwavering commitment to quality, our studio specializes in the intricate art of dovetail joinery, infusing each creation with the strength and beauty that only this time-honored technique can provide.

Handcrafted furniture, where each dovetail joint signifies not just a connection, but a seamless union of artistry and functionality.

Name: Eastman Heritage
Description:
Each Mattress in the collection bares the spirit of Ernest Hemingway's wanderlust, inviting dreamers to embark on their own nocturnal expeditions to these captivating destinations.
And so, Sleep by Ernest Hemingway’s curated collection honoring Ernest Hemingway's favorite hotels and places he stayed is a haven for those seeking both the indulgence of luxurious sleep and the thrill of global exploration

Name: Musée LTD.
Description:
Based in vibrant Houston, we specialize in the sale, meticulous cleaning, and skilled repair of authentic Oriental hand-made rugs. Our commitment lies in preserving the rich heritage and intricate craftsmanship woven into each rug, ensuring they adorn homes and businesses with timeless elegance. With a dedication to excellence and personalized service, we enrich spaces while honoring the cultural significance of these exquisite works of art.

You can find us at 1937 West Gray St. Houston, Texas 77019 in the River Oaks Shopping Center, call us at 713-521-1111, or follow us on our social media!

Name: KAHL Rhein-Main
Description: Als Anbieter von Einrichtungen, Objektausstattungen und Planungsdienstleistungen haben wir uns der Entwicklung gesunder, intelligenter, inspirierender und langlebiger Lösungen für das Büro, das Zuhause und für öffentliche Räume verschrieben. Unsere Konzepte werden inmitten der Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar in einem sorgfältigen Planungsprozess entwickelt, der das umfassende Leistungsspektrum führenden Hersteller mit den Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden vereint.

Name: Lumo Loft
Description: Lumo Loft is a design-led interior studio and online furniture retailer focused on creating beautifully curated spaces. We offer full-room design services and help clients furnish their homes through a carefully selected range of products that combine style, comfort, and functionality. Our mission is to make high-quality interior design accessible, personal, and effortless — giving people the confidence to invest in pieces they’ll love for years. We work with individuals, brands, and suppliers across the U.S. and Europe, with a strong focus on thoughtful curation and design integrity. At Lumo Loft, we believe a well-designed space has the power to improve how you live, feel, and connect with your environment — and we’re here to make that possible for everyone.

Name: Loop Home
Description:
Loop Home is the modern marketplace for secondhand furniture. We make it effortless to buy and sell beautiful pre-loved pieces, with verified listings, smart discovery, and delivery built in.
We’re here to end the era of fast furniture. Furniture forever.

Name: Möbelcenter biller
Description: Möbelcenter Biller ist nicht nur ein Möbelgeschäft, sondern ein Ort, an dem Träume wahr werden und Momente des Glücks geschaffen werden. Name: CLEAN DESIGN HOME
Description:
A division of A Blue Egg Corporation (a holding company) and focused on B2B and B2C as a global licensed brand. Founded by Robin Wilson.

Wilson is an author who has written two bestselling books which emphasize an allergen-aware lifestyle and an integration of eco-friendly and sustainable design. Her design and partnership clients have included Panasonic USA, the White House Fellows office, and the Lake Nona Laureate Park development. In addition, she has worked on showhouses for both residential, developer and commercial clients. 

She is author of 'Clean Design: Wellness for Your Lifestyle' (Greenleaf, 2015). Her first book was 'Kennedy Green House: Designing an Eco-Friendly Home from the Foundation to the Furniture' (Greenleaf, 2010), with the foreword written by Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. She is an ambassador to the Asthma and Allergy Foundation of America and she has served on the Board of the Sustainable Furnishings Council. The CLEAN DESIGN HOME licensed brand has products sold at retailer in addition to hotel partners.

Name: Arc One
Description:
ARC One, one-stop shop for all your essential decor needs is here. No need to travel the world. We bring the world to you.

Doing up your space, be it home or office, is not only about interiors. It is about a feeling that you carry back with you after buying an item. Be it furnishing, fabrics, tiles, wooden flooring, rugs, windows or wallpaper.

Name: DAZE - Retail Solutions & Custom Furniture
Description:
DAZE delivers complete retail solutions - from idea to installation.

We design and build custom furniture, shop outfitting, window props, eye-catching displays, and branded retail environments for the cruise, travel, and luxury retail sectors. 

Whether it’s a single window or an entire store refit, our team manages every detail: concept design, prototyping, production, printing, wrapping, logistics, and installation - even at sea.

Based in Białystok, Poland, we operate a 3,000 m² in-house production facility and provide full technical documentation to ensure precision and consistency across every project.

We work with global retail brands, travel retailers, and retail architects to turn creative ideas into high-impact in-store experiences - no matter how complex the location.

What we deliver:
• Custom furniture & instore fixtures
• POS materials & window display props
• Branded signage & wayfinding solutions
• 3D logos, foam decorations & store decor
• Digital printing, vinyl wrapping & visual identity elements
• Global retail roll-outs, pop-ups & shop refits
• End-to-end project management - from design to installation

Whether you’re outfitting a cruise ship boutique, launching a luxury pop-up, or rolling out a retail concept across multiple locations, DAZE helps you build unforgettable brand experiences — on land or at sea.

We also provide a fast and efficient trade service, we know how important it is to be able to source good quality, good value furniture within short time frame -Try Us First!

Name: Dellavedova Arredamenti S.p.A.
Description:
Tradizione, passione e design sono gli elementi chiave dell’approccio che Dellavedova Arredamenti S.p.A. offre ai suoi utenti.

Fondata ufficialmente nel lontano 1958 da Luigi Dellavedova, l’azienda affonda le sue radici nel 1954, quando l’abitazione di Luigi e della moglie Enrica Alberti fu trasformata in un punto di riferimento per il design e la lavorazione del legno. Il piano superiore ospitava la residenza, mentre al piano terra si ergeva una vetrina con un negozio e al piano inferiore un laboratorio di falegnameria.

Nel corso degli anni, l’azienda ha subito grandi cambiamenti, trasformandosi da una piccola attività artigianale ad un’impresa di notevole entità.

Name: Mömax Schweiz
Description: mömax ist als TOP - Arbeitgeber ein dynamisches und stark wachsendes Unternehmen in der Möbelbranche. Kaum ein Einzelhandelsunternehmen gewinnt so rasant an Wachstum. Eine unserer Kernaufgaben ist es, unseren Mitarbeitenden eine persönliche und fachliche Weiterentwicklung zu ermöglichen. Durch unser professionelles, internes Schulungsprogramm sorgen wir dafür, dass sich unsere Mitarbeitenden stetig weiterbilden und die Chance zu ihrer beruflichen Entwicklung bekommen. Auch Quereinsteiger sind bei uns jederzeit herzlich willkommen!  Neben der klassischen Laufbahn gibt es bei mömax als internationalen Player, auch die Chance im Ausland zu arbeiten. Wir sind derzeit mit über 80 Filialen bereits in Österreich, Deutschland, Ungarn, Rumänien, Slowenien und Kroatien vertreten.  Eine Lehre bei mömax stellt die Grundlage für eine Karriere im Möbelhandel dar. Besonders stolz sind wir auf all jene Lehrlinge, die schon früh Verantwortung übernehmen konnten und heute in zahlreichen Führungspositionen arbeiten.  Auf die fundierte Lehre junger Menschen und ein Wachstum aus den eigenen Reihen legen wir besonderen Wert.

Name: Greb Wohnwork
Description:
„Arbeit ist das halbe Leben“! Aber wir machen keine halben Sachen – das wussten wir von Anfang an. Seit der Gründung unseres Familienunternehmens vor 20 Jahren versuchen wir, als Büroeinrichter anders zu denken – größer, weiter, ganzheitlicher, über die eigenen vier Bürowände hinaus. Mit unserem neuen Auftritt, mit greb wohnwork geben wir dieser Idee von innovativen, professionellen Raumkonzepten einen neuen Namen und ein neues Gesicht.
wohnwork überwindet die Trennung von „Arbeit und Leben“, von „Workingplace und Wohlfühlort“, von „Pflicht und Kür. wohnwork entwickelt Lebensräume. wohnwork verbindet Business und Home und führt das Beste aus beiden Welten in neuen zukunftsfähigen Lösungen zusammen: Büroeinrichtungen und Wohnwelten, die sich perfekt ergänzen und die in innovativen Office/Homeoffice-Konzepten miteinander verschmelzen. Denn fluide Prozesse brauchen neue flexible Strukturen. Die Zeit für greb wohnwork ist gekommen.

Name: Fantesstic Flowers
Description:
Hey, 

Wat leuk dat je op deze pagina bent gekomen! Mijn naam is Tessa, vandaar de naam Fantesstic Flowers. In 2020 ben ik afgestudeerd aan de opleiding vakexpert en ondernemer bloem en styling. Momenteel volg ik de opleiding tot beeldend vaktherapeut maar is het toch altijd mijn droom geweest om een eigen bedrijf op te richten in zijden arrangementen. Dus hier ben ik! Fantesstic Flowers run ik samen met Thomas, mijn vriend. Allebei zijn wij enorm enthousiast over het bedrijf en vinden het belangrijk om de zijden arrangementen op maat en naar ieders wens te creëren.   

Wat doen we? 
Wij verkopen en verhuren zijden arrangementen aan bedrijven en particulieren. 
Wij komen graag persoonlijk bij u langs waarbij we in samenwerking met u, en behulp van een illustratieboek, de perfecte keuzes ontdekken die perfect bij uw wensen en behoeften aansluiten! 

Wat levert Fantesstic Flowers? 
- Verkoop op maat 
- Seizoensgebonden arrangementen 
     - Kerst 
     - Pasen 
-Seizoensgebonden abonnementen 
     - Twee seizoenen arrangement 
     - Vier seizoenen arrangement 
 

Wat is er mogelijk? 
Kleuren aangepast aan de omgeving en aan uw bedrijf, u kunt hierin zelf beslissen. 
Het zijden arrangement wordt persoonlijk samengesteld en past daarom precies bij uw bedrijf/woning. 
Heeft u een vaas staan? Dan kunnen wij hem ook voor u opmaken met nieuwe zijden bloemen. 
Bedragen zijn een indicatie, u kunt ook zelf een bedrag noemen. 
Persoonlijke aandacht en kwaliteit staan bij ons voorop! 
 

Contact:

Telefoonnummer: 06-14105874

Email: fantessticflowers@outlook.com 

Instagram: Fantesstic_flowers 

 

Mocht je verder nog vragen hebben stel ze gerust!

Name: Vakr Studio
Description:
Vakr is an award-winning, Delhi-based design studio that strives to bring unique furniture design ideas to life through the poetics of combining modern computer-aided technology with traditional craftsmanship, giving birth to an inimitable range of bespoke luxury handcrafted furniture. The ethos of Vakr is based on an immersive approach to elevate high-end furniture through an exploration of sensual, organic and sophisticated forms fueled by a commitment to explore Indian craft as a global language. 

Vakr started with a single mindset of contextual, high-end furniture by exploring India's rich arts and crafts when evolving and expanding the 'sculptural furniture' vocabulary became necessary. The studio was born out of the need to address contextual furniture design that complies with the modern, minimalist look and evokes a feeling of luxury. With numerous design innovations, the studio has formalised combining vernacular and contemporary materials by involving local artisans.

GreenSpaces – Design is WELCOMING

Name: Gartega - Baños & Cocinas
Description:
Representamos las principales marcas del sector baño, cocina y calefacción para la Comunidad Valenciana.

Con más de 25 años de experiencia en el mercado, en Gartega somos referentes en la Comunidad Valenciana para aquellos que buscan la excelencia en productos y soluciones para baño, cocina y calefacción. Nuestra misión es transformar espacios en verdaderas obras maestras, y lo hacemos a través de la representación de marcas de renombre que comparten nuestra pasión por la calidad y la innovación.

En Gartega, creemos en la calidad por encima de todo. Trabajamos con un portafolio de marcas cuidadosamente seleccionadas que son sinónimo de diseño vanguardista, durabilidad y funcionalidad. Desde accesorios de baño y grifería de cocina hasta sistemas de calefacción de última generación, nuestros productos cumplen con los estándares más exigentes del sector. Cada producto que ofrecemos es una inversión en comodidad, elegancia y eficiencia.

Nuestro compromiso no termina en la venta. En Gartega, creemos en la importancia de ofrecer un servicio al cliente que supere todas las expectativas. Estamos dedicados a comprender las necesidades de nuestros clientes, proporcionar asesoramiento experto y garantizar una experiencia sin igual en cada paso del proceso. Tu satisfacción es nuestra prioridad, y estamos aquí para apoyarte en cada proyecto, desde el concepto inicial hasta la finalización.

Cada proyecto es único, algo que tenemos muy presente. Trabajamos en colaboración con interioristas, arquitectos y promotores para materializar su visión y crear espacios que inspiran. Nuestro compromiso es convertir tus ideas en una realidad impresionante y funcional, que refleje tu estilo y proporcione comodidad a lo largo del tiempo.

Name: Coremu, S.A.
Description:
La GRAN FAMILIA COREMUSA fue fundada en junio de 1968; en la ciudad de Panamá, República de Panamá bajo el nombre de COMISIONES Y REPRESENTACIONES MUNDIALES, S.A. (COREMUSA); cuyos objetivos son: ventas de mercancía seca en general; servicios de cobranzas, representación de casas nacionales y extranjeras, agentes comisionistas.

Participamos constantemente en licitaciones gubernamentales para el suministro de productos para el gobierno como productos de papelería y derivados, útiles de oficina y mobiliario. En las mismas hemos obtenido importantes renglones como archivadores, mesas para computadoras, sillas tipo secretaria, visita y presidente, cajas de cartapacios, sacapuntas eléctricos, entre otros, los cuales se tienen que repartir a todas las instituciones gubernamentales por una período de un año, sin excepción.

Nuestro departamento de ventas se compone de vendedores ruteros o de calle, telemarketing, venta a través de internet www.coremusa.com y vendedores de planta, todo esto en busca de satisfacer cada vez más nuestros clientes. De igual manera el departamento de compra ha aumentado sus horizontes obteniendo productos de calidad de otros países como México, Taiwán, Italia, USA, España, Colombia, entre otros.

El GRUPO COREMUSA ofrece de todo para hogar y de todo para la oficina, con amplias facilidades para comprar, tales como: Ventas al contado, por abonos, clubes de mercancía, pagos voluntarios, pagos por descuento directo del salario, consolidamos cuentas, financiamientos con garantía prendarías, aceptamos todas las tarjetas de créditos y tenemos nuestra propia tarjeta de crédito, fabricamos muebles al gusto del cliente, todos nuestros productos son garantizados y entregamos en todo el territorio nacional.

Es importante anotar, que el mayor activo que constituye la GRAN FAMILIA COREMUSA es su personal que hoy y siempre dan lo mejor de sí, por el prestigio y engrandecimiento de la organización. Nuestros clientes son lo primero!

Name: GRUPO CONCETTUALE
Description:
Desde 2014 atuamos e fazemos história no setor moveleiro no estado de São Paulo, com unidades da marca NEW nas cidades de Piracicaba, Limeira, Santa Bárbara d’Oeste, Campinas e Jundiaí. Recentemente chegamos em Americana com mais um grande empreendimento que traz sofisticação e tradição para o mercado moveleiro de alto padrão, a Dell Anno.
Nosso mundo está sendo cada vez mais impactado pelas novas tecnologias, que transformam nossas casas em espaços inteligentes e conectados. Reconhecendo as oportunidades e os benefícios que essa evolução traz, por este motivo a Lumets vem para o Grupo trazendo soluções completas e integradas.
Sempre inovando e pensando no desenvolvimento humano, contamos com mais de 100 colaboradores. O investimento em capacitação e qualidade no ambiente de trabalho é um de nossos grandes pilares, e isso é refletido diretamente no atendimento a todos os nossos clientes.
Confiança, transparência e compromisso regem a conduta e história do Grupo Concettuale em seu legado no cenário nacional dos móveis planejados.
Nosso propósito e missão é proporcionar às pessoas a oportunidade de serem maiores e melhores.
Nossa visão é a de sermos o maior e melhor grupo de móveis planejados do Estado de São Paulo, mantendo um conceito moderno e de alta qualidade, tornando-se referência no setor.
Almejamos isso tudo devido ao trabalho realizado com competência e excelência. Entendemos que o reconhecimento é a consequência de nosso comprometimento e transparência com cada cliente, parceiro e colaborador.

omforto - Wyjątkowe Meble, Które Podkreślają Twoją Wizję

Witaj na oficjalnym profilu marki omforto! Jesteśmy przekonani, że jakość jest w naszym DNA i to, co wyróżnia nasze meble, to ich naturalna zdolność do wzbogacania przestrzeni i doskonale harmonizowania z Twoimi projektami.

Zajmujemy się dystrybucją unikatowych kolekcji mebli GoEs, które mają za zadanie dopełnić każdą komercyjną i indywidualną przestrzeń, dodając jej uroku i stylu. Nasze produkty łączą w sobie organiczny design, subtelną estetykę oraz minimalistyczną prostotę, aby dostarczyć Ci mebli, które zachwycą Twoich klientów.

omforto to marka dedykowana dla kreatywnych umysłów - projektantów, architektów i pasjonatów designu. Nasza misja to inspirować i współtworzyć niesamowite projekty na całym świecie.

Oferujemy 20 lat międzynarodowego doświadczenia już od pierwszego dnia współpracy. Stoimy na ramionach giganta, dzięki czemu możesz osiągać́ z nami jeszcze więcej.

Dołącz do nas w tej pasjonującej podróży przez świat meblarstwa. Odkryj kolekcje, które emanują naturą i zachwycają jakością wykonania. Razem stworzymy wnętrza, które będą spełniać oczekiwania nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów.

Name: House of Manus
Description:
The work of highly skilled hands is of inestimable worth, and it’s what drives everything we do. House of Manus aims to ensure a brighter future for high-end craft, combining consulting expertise with an ecosystem of premium artisan manufacturers and an elite academy for aspiring craftspeople. It’s an ambitious project for exceptionally ambitious people. We view skilled crafts as truly innovative technologies and seek to support manufacturers who nurture these rare cultural practices.

INVESTMENT – House of Manus Equity:  At House of Manus, we strongly believe that will continue to have relevance. That’s why we’re investing our own capital in its growth and sustainable development.

CONSULTING – House of Manus Studio: Drawing on our deep, culturally rooted understanding of the unique characteristics of craft manufacturing, we work with our partners and clients to develop new perspectives and support their onward journey.

TRAINING – House of Manus Academy: Via global events, online platforms and a planned Engadine Valley campus, we’re developing a new academy that will support the future of craft and open up new career paths for young people.

Name: Rooh for Spaces
Description:
Rooh for Spaces means 'soul' of a space. 
We believe that a space that has its own personality has a soul. Our homes narrate a story about us, and as we evolve, our homes should too with a collection of what we love. A room should feel collected, not decorated. 
At Rooh for Spaces, each design has a story that takes you on a journey. We have travelled across Asia to bring back the tales and myths of rich cultures that once lay along the Silk Route. 
Our endeavour is to provide customers with handcrafted products which help support and encourage good craftsmanship. 
Rooh for Spaces works closely with artisans all over Asia on product design, quality control and production coordination. The vision is to maximize the handmade element in our products.
From artisanal furniture & crockery to aesthetic home products, we have a lot to offer for various corners of your life!

Name: Loom & Co
Description:
We believe that rugs are, quite literally, the foundation of our lives: The first thing you notice when you walk into a room, not to mention the one piece in your home that’s with you every *step* of the way, from first footsteps to movie marathons to late night dance parties.

Name: Cane Cult
Description:
Cane Cult is a slow furniture brand and was founded and is curated by Zully and Jalal- A Brother and Sister duo who were born and raised in London.
Originally inspired with a traveling around the island of Sri Lanka they came across talented craftsman and artisan working with locally sourced rattan - once engaging with them, they found a lack of support and exposure of the dying art form of traditional Sri Lankan weaving.
Historically rattan workers were underpaid as talented artisans they wanted to design and create pieces that celebrated their craftsmanship with woven in stories of traditions that date back over four generations. It is ingrained in Cane Cults values they fairpay is essential to support these communities to thrive.
The story of Cane Cult is intertwining the artisan craftsmanship and immersing in a intersection of cultural designs that have been influential in their style of the brands signature.
'Japandi' design culture is the intersection of Scandinavian and modern Japanese interior design styles. Both, rooted in minimalist design principles, with a focus on warmth, natural elements, and muted color palettes. To make things interesting they intertwined this with an Industrial London touch.The London element is translated with iron work and with use of industrial, raw exposed elements.
In a world where process is often overlooked, we believe the journey is what defines it all. At every step of our operation, we highly value exclusivity in terms of valued materials and craftsmanship.

Name: Maison Rigonnot
Description:
Née de la passion pour l'artisanat et le design, Maison Rigonnot est le fruit d'un rêve familial où chaque création porte une part de notre histoire. Nous nous distinguons par l'équilibre entre tradition et innovation, valorisant l'art du détail et le minimalisme. Chaque pièce signée Maison Rigonnot raconte une histoire de savoir-faire et de créativité, transmise de génération en génération, nourrie par un amour profond pour le beau et l'authentique.

Chez Maison Rigonnot, l'excellence, l'authenticité et le souci du détail sont au cœur de notre métier. Nos artisans, véritables artistes du bois, travaillent avec une précision méticuleuse, transformant chaque pièce en une création unique et fonctionnelle. C'est par cette maîtrise artisanale que nous apportons une véritable harmonie aux intérieurs, chaque projet devenant une œuvre où des matériaux nobles rencontrent un design soigné. De la conception de meubles sur mesure à l'agencement complet de résidences, chaque réalisation est pensée pour enrichir les espaces et offrir un cadre de vie d'exception.

En regardant vers l'avenir, Maison Rigonnot souhaite continuer à innover et à exceller dans la decoration de luxe. Nous aspirons à devenir votre partenaire de confiance, celui qui concrétise vos rêves et exprime votre style de vie à travers chaque détail. En choisissant Maison Rigonnot, vous optez pour une expérience unique, où chaque aspect est soigneusement étudié pour créer des espaces qui résonnent avec vos aspirations et vos émotions. Ensemble, façonnons des intérieurs qui incarnent le luxe et le raffinement, et créons des lieux où chaque instant devient un souvenir précieux. Maison Rigonnot, par son expertise en menuiserie, dépasse le simple agencement : c'est une véritable valeur ajoutée qui sublime votre intérieur, le transformant en une œuvre d'art vivante et intemporell

Name: 123projecttotaal
Description:
123 Projecttotaal is ontstaan uit een geschiedenis van meer dan 35 jaar ervaring op het gebied van wonen en slapen. Als oprichters van een veelzijdige woonwinkel Jeha en slaapwinkel Matrasconcurrent, lag er een mooie stap te zetten naar de zakelijke markt. Zo werd 123Projecttotaal geboren, een bedrijf dat comfortabele interieurconcepten kan bieden, waarbij jij volledig ontzorgd word.

Ons familiebedrijf heeft door de jaren heen veel kennis en expertise opgebouwd in het werkveld, waardoor we de unieke behoeften van verschillende sectoren begrijpen. Door de toenemende vraag van zakelijke klanten besloten wij ons assortiment uit te breiden en te specialiseren op de zakelijke markt. Of het nu gaat om het inrichten van van b&b's, campings, zorginstelling, hotel of om een horecagelegenheid, 123Projecttotaal heeft ervaring in iedere branche. In iedere branche kunnen wij de totaal oplossing leveren en u volledig ontzorgen. Van het plaasten van meubels tot het uitvoeren van een complete stoffering en comfortabel slapen. We bieden niet alleen kwaliteit en ervaring, maar ook een concurrende prijs dankzij onze grootschalige inkoop en onze eigen voorraad. We vinden het belangrijk om korte lijnen te hebben met onze leveranciers, wat resulteert in snelle oplossingen.

Name: Nordic Elements
Description:
Helle Moyna founded Nordic Elements in London in 2008. On re-locating to Dublin in 2013 she set up Nordic Elements in the basement of her own home in Booterstown. The success and expansion of the business has prompted the move to a new gallery and showroom at 38 Main St, Blackrock.

Inspired by her Danish upbringing, Helle’s aesthetic is a contemporary fusion of Mid-Century Modern with a Scandinavian appreciation of quality and design. Helle has a passion for mixing old and new pieces from her extensive network of brands, manufacturers and designers, some of which Nordic Elements represent exclusively in Ireland.

"Ecological thinking and sustainability is very important to us at Nordic Elements. We don’t believe in furniture that only suits a trend, or quality that doesn’t last. We like to view our pieces as modern heirlooms and feel it’s better to buy well and less. We choose designers that examine every step of their process from product development, procurement, production, logistics and transport. and endeavour to work with suppliers that embrace our approach."
