Name: Vastraz Home Decor
Description:
Vastraz Home Decor is a leading provider of premium home furnishing solutions specializing in custom curtains, blinds, wallpapers, wooden flooring, upholstery fabrics, mattresses, carpets, sofa refurbishment, and home-automation products. With over 18 years of expertise in the furnishing industry, we deliver high-quality, made-to-measure décor products designed to enhance residential, commercial, hospitality, and luxury living spaces.

We are not interior designers—instead, we proudly partner with interior designers, architects, contractors, and project consultants, supporting their creative vision with technical knowledge, material recommendations, product customization, and precision installation. Our role is to help design professionals offer their clients the best possible furnishing experience through reliable service and superior craftsmanship.

At Vastraz, we focus on delivering functional, aesthetic, and durable décor solutions tailored to each project’s unique requirements. Our extensive product range, strict quality control, and professional execution ensure smooth project delivery from concept to completion.

Over the years, we have successfully completed a diverse portfolio of projects, including eminent hotel properties, luxury villas, premium apartments, corporate houses, co-working spaces, commercial offices, boutique hotels, and personalized dream homes. Our experience across multiple segments allows us to meet the expectations of both design professionals and end clients with consistency, accuracy, and thoughtful detailing.

As a trusted furnishing partner in Jaipur and beyond, Vastraz Home Decor is committed to innovation, customization, client satisfaction, and timely delivery. Whether enhancing a single room or executing large-scale commercial projects, we bring expertise, product depth, and professional support that elevate every space we touch.

Name: KhojCrafts
Description:
The  starting point for Khoj is  always a single piece ~ Be it an intricately carved piece of wood, a marble jali, a painted fresco, a vintage trunk, an antique pillar, an embroidered fabric, it is the seed of inspiration for our creations.  This singular  piece is then  re-imagined and re-crafted to work for modern design solutions at our workshop in Gurgaon. 

Our furniture and curation is always about celebrating the beauty in the rough, the unfinished, the broken and working towards its sustainability . The underlying love for Indian craft and craftsmanship guides the design philosophy. 

We continue to operate in a niche segment but our growth and expansion shows that this discerning audience is growing and resonating with our designs.

Name: Dulic
Description:
We are a founder-led, bootstrapped house of brands creating profitable consumer products in home decor and fashion for the European market.

Built from the ground up less than a year ago, we reached profitability within our first week and have continued to grow sustainably ever since. 

Our team has previously scaled and exited a 7-figure D2C brand, and we’re now focused on building multiple category leaders across key European markets.

With strong early traction and a fast-growing customer base, we’re expanding our portfolio of high-margin, design-led products — with sights firmly set on scaling to an 8-figure annual business.

Follow us to see how we’re building enduring brands for the modern European consumer.

We have been curating handpicked furniture designs from around the world for over 15 years.

The intimate and timeless elegance, the personality of each individual piece, is the fruit of the craftsman’s skill and a design that enhances hand-crafted workmanship even in the most modern forms. An extraordinary convergence of design and industry, the expression of a contemporary approach. People, ideas, places, projects and products are what make Bontrue unique, now as ever. Our legacy and expertise of more than 15 years have been put together for our customers to extend a new age, contemporary and premium range of furniture.  With a perfect blend of hospitable service and customer-centric expertise; Bontrue has put together a new age, contemporary and premium range of furniture; through creativity, and commitment. Creativity and innovation are the unmistakable features of Bontrue's style. Refined contemporary design distinguishes domestic and office settings.
Bontrue takes the values of quality, know-how and design that make up the DNA of the brand. Design, innovation and creativity are an integral part of each Bontrue product, which gives it a soul of its own and a unique design identity. At Bontrue, the drive to create new things is constant, with a help of state of the are mechanisms, structures, and materials. Explore the collections, products and solutions designed to provide you with unique spaces. The manufacturing expertise has always been combined with research into materials, in order to obtain the best from leather and wood, modernising them while keeping their original, natural properties, warmth and tactile qualities.  As a brand, Bontrue believes in redefining spaces

Name: Namcoll
Description:
Namcoll.no er en norsk nettbutikk som har etablert seg som den ultimate destinasjonen for kjøpere som verdsetter håndverk, eleganse og kvalitet. Med vårt fokus på håndlaget kjøkkenutstyr i edle materialer som kobber, messing og treverk, samt dekorasjon og interiørprodukter, tilbyr vi en enestående opplevelse for de som søker noe ekstraordinært.

Hos Namcoll.no er vi forpliktet til å tilby deg kun det beste. Våre produkter er skapt med lidenskap og ekspertise i India, og hver gjenstand reflekterer den rike arven av indisk kunst og håndverk. Vårt sortiment inkluderer også unike dekorasjons- og gaveartikler som er perfekte for å gi din innredning en personlig touch, samt en strålende samling av julepynt som vil bringe glede til høytiden.

Bak vår nettbutikk står Ashok Kumar, vår eier og daglige leder, som er en hengiven forkjemper for å bringe indisk kunst og kultur til det norske markedet. Han deler sin kjærlighet til kvalitet og originalitet gjennom hvert produkt som er tilgjengelig på Namcoll.no.

Vår misjon er enkel: Å tilby deg eksklusive, håndlagde produkter som gir liv til hjemmet ditt, samtidig som de gir funksjonalitet og skjønnhet. Vårt engasjement for kvalitet er ditt sikkerhetsstempel for å motta varige skatter som vil være en kilde til glede og beundring i årene som kommer.

Velkommen til Namcoll.no, hvor vi inviterer deg til å utforske vår verden av elegante og unike produkter som vil fortrylle og forbedre din livsstil.

Name: Enikom M
Description:
Мебелна компания ЕНИКОМ-М е създадена през 2000 г.
Вече 22 години основен приоритет на фирмата е да създава уют, хармония и красота на разумни цени, предлагайки всичко необходимо, за да бъдете "Добре дошли у дома". Обзавеждане за всички помещения, осветление и аксесоари, с които се постига необходимата завършеност и уют на дома ще впечатлят и най-претенциозните сред вас. Еником-М предлага широка гама от продукти и асортимент, който непрекъснато се обновява. Всички артикули са с доказано качество и произход от водещи световни и български производители.
Компанията разполага с 2 магазина на територията на град София, а през Април 2022г. отваря врати на своя нов обект в гр.Пловдив.

Еником-М Люлин - открит през 2015 г. и с търговска площ 5 000 кв. м. Тук ще откриете невероятната колаборация между Еником-М и КАRЕ, благодарение на първия KARE OUTLET магазин в София, находящ се в търговския обект. 

Еником-М Дружба - открит през 2008 г.
До началото на 2022г. в него се помещава централното управление на компанията,  магазин Еником-М, шоурум KARE, офиси и ресторант.
През 2022г. управлението и администрацията на компанията се локализира в Младост, ММ Бизнес център.
През Април 2022г. Еником-М Дружба се мести в гр. Пловдив, на централен булевард и търговска площ от 5000кв.м. и това е първата стъпка на компанията да предложи на своите клиенти, извън гр.София възможността да се потопят в атмосферата на  дизайнерски, уютни и креативни предложения в сферата на обзавеждането и декорирането на дома, офиса, градината, хотела....

Еником-М Надежда. В Enikom Home Accessories ще намерите подходящите акценти, за да постигнете интериорен завършек у дома. Oчакват Ви аксесоари за кухнята и готварството, за сервиране и хранене, декорации за дома, качествен текстил и осветление.

Наша мисия е да предоставяме добри решения за организиране на един красив и приятен за живеене дом. За тази цел разполагаме със страхотен екип от професионалисти.
Стараем се да предоставяме на клиентите си лично отнош

Le Contract, Coeur de métier de MUR DESIGN BY AMBIANCE en France et à l’International pour l’entreprise et les collectivités.

The design of our collections is within everyone's reach, thanks to a fair pricing policy combined with uncompromising quality. Whether it's independent living, assisted living, or memory care, our furniture packages are designed to create inviting environments that seniors can call their own. Name: STACT Wine Displays Inc.
Description:
STACT is the only turn-key solution of its kind on the market, ready to install right out of the box at a price that is less than what competitors charge for simple ‘pegs’, and a fraction of the cost (without all of the hassle) of any comparable custom solution. 

STACT offers a number of advantages versus other wine storage solutions available on the market, here are just a few:

✓ Quality - ultra-premium commercial grade solution with unrivaled refinement when it comes to materials, aesthetic and craftsmanship. 

✓ Convenience -  unique to the industry STACT is the only system of its kind that's ready-to-install right out of the box.

✓ Value - by offering our STACT exclusively online we are able eliminate the need to inflate our pricing to support retail markup, which allows us to offer unbeatable value.

✓ Space-saving - fit more wine in less space! STACT C-type panels deliver the highest bottle capacity on the market.

✓ Professional grade - aircraft-grade anodized aluminum, resistant to corrosion/rust makes it the ideal solution within climate controlled cellars. 

✓ Design pedigree - designed in San Francisco by 2012 ICFF winning designer Eric Pfeiffer.

✓ Versatility - mount any way you wish, available in both cork-out, and label-out formats in your choice of 24 finishes.
  
✓ Security - with a lower center of gravity there is a more substantial portion of the bottle resting below the contact points delivering superior bottle stability.

✓ Bottle visibility - no more hidden labels! STACT L-type panels deliver superior label visibility, allowing users to easily find any bottle at a glance. 

✓ Magnum support - unlike conventional wine racks, STACT L-type Series 2 panels support both standard and magnum bottles in one compact design.

✓ Credibility -  STACT has received international acclaim, having been featured by countless leading networks and publications, including the Wall Street Journal, New York Times, Gizmodo, Globe & Mail, Design Milk.

Name: ALTROVE
Description:
ALTROVE makes styling your dream home effortless, through timeless and versatile decor that reinterprets Indian craft for contemporary living. Founded by Shreya Mantri and Yash Paranjape in 2021, ALTROVE started with a simple mission : to bring Indian craft back to Indian homes in a meaningful and modern way. 

Our entire product range is crafted predominantly from natural materials, by hand, through re-interpretations of traditional techniques to foster product innovation and sustainability. Through our E-commerce brand, we also champion some wonderful homegrown brands that share our values and aesthetics.

ALTROVE will eventually be a one-stop-shop for all things home, representing the boundless capabilities of Indian craftsmanship on not only the national but a global stage.

If Interior Design is the cake, styling is the luscious icing on top of it. At Altrove, styling begins with a vision and goes into the smallest detail. Our aim is to style your home to be timeless, elegant and eclectic.

Name: ClassyFurn
Description: Welcome to ClassyFurn, your expert in high-quality replica furniture and timeless design classics. Whether you're looking for elegant minimalism or bold statement pieces, you'll find the perfect item to transform your home into a modern oasis. Discover exclusive design for every budget – explore the world of ClassyFurn!

Name: Canvas + Loft
Description: Canvas + Loft helps families create beautiful, functional spaces that reflect their unique personalities and tastes. Our mission is to make home furnishing comfortable, confident, and convenient, allowing you to focus on what truly matters—making memories with your loved ones.

Name: The Empty Space
Description: Welcome to 'The Empty Space'—where style meets functionality in kitchen and dining. Founded by Preiksha and Navya, our curated collection transforms empty spaces into personalized expressions. Elevate everyday moments with minimalist designs and artisanal craftsmanship. Join us in creating a home that resonates with your unique style. Here's to transforming your spaces, one stylish piece at a time.

Name: Sofa Land
Description:
Sofa Land is your one stop shop for all of your seating and entertaining needs. Since 1992 we have worked very hard to earn the respect of consumers. Our showrooms are full of all the new trend setting designs and we never forget about the timeless, elegant sofas.


Our Mission

Our Mission is to provide the best value and service on quality home furnishings for the communities in which we serve. We are committed to creating an environment in which our customers feel comfortable and enjoy the shopping experience, and one in which our associates are proud to be a part of and take pride in what they do.


Our Story

One day, a long, long time ago a man traveled across the sea from Sweden. He was on an adventure exploring the countryside with one of his good friends. While in Canada he was captivated by a beautiful young lady and was unable to return to Sweden. He wanted to think of a way that he could help bring Sweden to Canada. With the help of his brother in law he started to import European furnishing into Canada. After many, many years of hard work and dedication this has developed into the Sofa Land we all know and love today.

We have been family owned and operated since 1992. Operation has now moved to the second generation and we are working harder than ever to bring you quality furniture at an affordable price.

We have been very fortunate over the years to be able to attract amazing employees into our business, and these employees are now part of our family too. With their help we strive to create an atmosphere where consumers will feel comfortable shopping. When they come in we want them to feel welcome and we want them to feel like they are at home.

Name: Organize-It
Description:
We are a retailer of storage & organization products for the home, office, garage and more.

Organize-It was founded in 1997 on the design and installation of custom closet systems in the Metro Detroit area. It wasn't long before customers began inquiring about other innovative storage and organization products they could utilize in their closet, garage, and other areas throughout the home or office. 

In 1999 we opened our first retail store location in Rochester Hills, Michigan, and shortly thereafter made our diverse line of products available on the internet with the launch of www.OrganizeIt.com. Since that time we have continued to value the requests of our earliest customers and expanded our offering of products to include industry leading closet accessories, heavy duty garage storage solutions, laundry room organizers, travel accessories, and so much more. 

Our retail store relocated to Shelby Township, Michigan, where our custom closet showroom continues to bring in an ever growing number of customers, keeping our closet designers and installation team busy with new and exciting projects. 

In 2007 we moved internet operations to a 25,600 square foot warehouse in Rochester Hills, MI which serves as company headquarters. In 2014 we made a strategic acquisition of certain assets of a competitor - StacksandStacks.com.

As we continue to grow, the Organize-It family is proud to offer innovative products and dedicated customer service that help our valued customers lead a more neat, organized and stress-free lifestyle.

Name: Milola
Description:
Milola offers high quality, contemporary furniture along with exceptional customer service.

Milola's style is predominantly, but not exclusively Scandinavian-industrial and we try and offer something a little different, which has that wow factor. 
Our website provides a small window into our range, but most of our products are made to order so have many options for customisation whether it be in size, colour or finish.

Customer service is really important to us from the initial contact to aftersales and beyond. We love to speak with our customers to fully understand their needs and find that perfect piece of furniture for their space. We are communicative throughout the process of order, delivery and assembly and are beyond if required. So if you like our style and would like to no more, please get in touch. We would love to hear from you.

Name: Maison Rigonnot
Description:
Née de la passion pour l'artisanat et le design, Maison Rigonnot est le fruit d'un rêve familial où chaque création porte une part de notre histoire. Nous nous distinguons par l'équilibre entre tradition et innovation, valorisant l'art du détail et le minimalisme. Chaque pièce signée Maison Rigonnot raconte une histoire de savoir-faire et de créativité, transmise de génération en génération, nourrie par un amour profond pour le beau et l'authentique.

Chez Maison Rigonnot, l'excellence, l'authenticité et le souci du détail sont au cœur de notre métier. Nos artisans, véritables artistes du bois, travaillent avec une précision méticuleuse, transformant chaque pièce en une création unique et fonctionnelle. C'est par cette maîtrise artisanale que nous apportons une véritable harmonie aux intérieurs, chaque projet devenant une œuvre où des matériaux nobles rencontrent un design soigné. De la conception de meubles sur mesure à l'agencement complet de résidences, chaque réalisation est pensée pour enrichir les espaces et offrir un cadre de vie d'exception.

En regardant vers l'avenir, Maison Rigonnot souhaite continuer à innover et à exceller dans la decoration de luxe. Nous aspirons à devenir votre partenaire de confiance, celui qui concrétise vos rêves et exprime votre style de vie à travers chaque détail. En choisissant Maison Rigonnot, vous optez pour une expérience unique, où chaque aspect est soigneusement étudié pour créer des espaces qui résonnent avec vos aspirations et vos émotions. Ensemble, façonnons des intérieurs qui incarnent le luxe et le raffinement, et créons des lieux où chaque instant devient un souvenir précieux. Maison Rigonnot, par son expertise en menuiserie, dépasse le simple agencement : c'est une véritable valeur ajoutée qui sublime votre intérieur, le transformant en une œuvre d'art vivante et intemporell

Nosso atendimento personalizado vai além do tradicional. Nossos consultores são verdadeiros parceiros dos clientes, compreendem suas necessidades, preferências e estilos de vida para lhes oferecer orientações especializadas.

Na 4.Elementos, acreditamos que o design vai além da estética - é uma expressão de identidade que alia forma e função na vida do ser humano.
Estamos aqui para tornar este posicionamento uma realidade para cada um de nossos clientes.

Description:
Three Bays Gallery is an online-first gallery that bridges art, vintage design and objects. 
On the border of Zoersel and Schilde nearby Antwerp, we also have a showroom/gallery open on exhibition days or by appointment.

With a sharp focus on 20th-century design, we curate an eclectic mix of handpicked pieces that enhance and elevate any space. 
Our collection ranges from iconic works by well-known designers to hidden gems from lesser-known artisans, offering a rich selection for those who appreciate both the famous and the undiscovered.

Guided by Jasmine De Brauwer, a Belgian selector and curator with a sharp eye for beauty and craftsmanship, our gallery spans three core areas—art, vintage furniture and objects. Each piece is thoughtfully chosen to reflect quality, sustainability, and timeless style, inspired by our experiences in Singapore, Amsterdam, and now Sint-Antonius Zoersel.

Aside from vintage furniture and objects, art is the 3rd bay in the gallery. Imbued with a passion for creativity and aesthetics, the 'Art' bay underscores our dedication to curating and promoting artistic expressions. 
Whether championing emerging artists or showcasing timeless masterpieces, "Three Bays" is committed to nurturing a vibrant artistic & design community.

Welcome to Three Bays Gallery, where each handpicked item tells a story, and every curated piece contributes to a home filled with character and beauty.

Name: MLfurnire
Description:
M&L Furnire
Descoperă eleganța și confortul la M&L Furnire – destinația ta de încredere pentru mobilier de calitate superioară. Adaugă un strop de rafinament în fiecare colț al casei tale cu colecția noastră variată de mobilier, de la piese moderne la designuri clasice. M&L Furnire oferă soluții personalizate, materiale de înaltă calitate și un echilibru perfect între funcționalitate și estetică. Transformă-ți locuința într-un spațiu plin de stil și bun gust cu ajutorul nostru. Descoperă arta mobilierului la M&L Furnire – unde confortul îmbrățișează eleganța!

La M&L Furnire, găsești o gamă variată de produse de mobilier, special create pentru a satisface diverse preferințe și nevoi de design. Printre acestea se numără:

Dormitoare Elegante: Paturi, noptiere și dulapuri cu designuri moderne sau clasice, pentru a transforma dormitorul într-un spațiu relaxant și rafinat.
Bucătării Funcționale: Mobilier de bucătărie, mese și scaune, cu accent pe funcționalitate și estetică, pentru a crea un mediu plăcut în jurul meselor tale.
Livinguri Confortabile: Canapele, fotolii, mese de cafea și sisteme de depozitare inteligente pentru a contura un living primitoare și funcțional.
Mobilier de Birou: Birouri, scaune ergonomice și rafturi, pentru a-ți personaliza spațiul de lucru într-un mod eficient și stilat.
Mobilier Modular: Soluții inovatoare pentru spații mici, cum ar fi mobilier modular și transformabil, pentru a maximiza utilitatea fiecărui centimetru din casa ta.
Accesorii Decorative: Elemente precum oglinzi, tablouri și corpuri de iluminat, pentru a completa și a aduce un plus de personalitate fiecărui spațiu.
Indiferent dacă îți dorești un decor modern sau clasic, la M&L Furnire vei găsi opțiuni diversificate, realizate cu atenție la detalii și din materiale de înaltă calitate.

Plăcerea de a sta acasă !

Name: Opti-Wohnwelt
Description: Als Spezialisten für Wohnen und Einrichten, kann die familiengeführte Opti-Wohnwelt-Gruppe auf ihre über 45-jährige Erfahrung zurückblicken. Über die Jahre hinweg zeichnete sich die Firma durch ihre Kundenfreundlichkeit, herausragenden Service und Top-Beratung aus. Qualitätsmöbel, sowie hochwertige Marken und Einrichtungsaccessoires werden heute in über 30 Filialen mit ca. 1.000 Mitarbeitern präsentiert. Unsere Unternehmenskultur ist natürlich stark durch unsere Kunden geprägt. In erster Linie geht es bei unserem täglichen Handeln also darum, ein bestmögliches Einkaufserlebnis für unsere Kunden zu gestalten. Das betrifft nicht nur die Abteilungen Verkauf, Montage und Lager, sondern auch die Verwaltungsmitarbeiter haben stets den Fokus auf unsere Kunden. Weiterbildungen, Schulungen und von Führungskräften vorgelebter eigener Antrieb sorgen für eine stetige Verbesserung und Weiterentwicklung unserer Arbeit!

I proprietari di questa azienda sono Di Sabatino Antonio e Di Sabatino Marco, due fratelli che hanno avuto già esperienza nel settore dell’arredo per ufficio.
L’azienda dispone di uno stabile di circa 1000 m², una parte destinata allo showroom, dove si andranno a presentare tutti i prodotti che l’azienda propone per i suoi clienti, e una parte destinata al laboratorio, dove l’azienda produrrà i suoi prodotti.
La società ha per oggetto la progettazione, il noleggio e il commercio, sia all’ingrosso che al minuti, anche on-line di: arredo urbano (panchine, tavoli, cestini, fontane…) , arredo per bar e hotel sia indoor che outdoor, arredo per giardino (fioriere, ombrelloni, gazebo, sedie, tavoli…), giochi per parchi con aree attrezzate per il tempo libero, stazioni ludiche, composizioni multi-gioco, complementi d’arredo, arredo per il settore mare.
L’obiettivo principale dell’azienda è la soddisfazione del cliente, che è al centro del nostro impegno, e la creazione, sin dall’inizio, di un rapporto chiaro e sereno con quest’ultimo.

Name: Feistock - Feira de Móveis e Decoração
Description:
Realizada em São Bento do Sul, a Feistock tem periodicidade semestral. Com a organização e realização da TBS - Feiras & Eventos, a Feistock surgiu no ano de 2004 com o intuito de ajudar os moveleiros de São Bento do Sul, Rio Negrinho e Campo Alegre a escoarem seus estoques de móveis de sobras de exportação, vendendo-as para o consumidor final. 

Com o passar dos anos e das crises que atingiram o setor, as empresas que sobreviveram tiveram que buscar entrar no mercado interno e a feira se moldou para atender esta nova demanda e hoje colabora em muito para que estas empresas exponham sua marca para lojistas e o consumidor final e se tornem conhecidas. A feira também é um evento que mantém a região como um polo de fabricação de móveis diferenciados e de alta qualidade, além de ter uma forte atuação no setor de turismo de São Bento do Sul e toda região norte catarinense.

As metas estabelecidas são de trazer ao pavilhão um público consumidor e formador de opinião para levar o nome de nossa cidade a todos os cantos do Brasil, através do marketing boca a boca, por isso a feira busca sempre apresentar um excelente ambiente e um atendimento primordial a toda e qualquer pessoa que venha visitar o evento. A feira favorece muito as cidades de entorno, pois gera ocupação máxima dos hotéis e restaurantes e gera também um grande acréscimo no turismo, favorecendo a economia da região como um todo. 

A Feistock já está na edição de número 42 e atraiu quase 1 milhão de visitantes desde a sua primeira edição.
Location: São Bento do Sul, Santa Catarina

Name: Cloud Scape Linen
Description:
Cloud Scape Linen | Affordable Luxury Home Linens, Sustainably Crafted

At Cloud Scape Linen, we believe luxury should be accessible, responsibly made, and feel extraordinary. We’re on a mission to deliver premium-quality home linens that transform your space—without compromising on price, ethics, or the environment.

Who We Are
Born in the UAE and made for the world, founded by Alfred David, Cloud Scape Linen was built to offer well-crafted, affordable luxury bedding for those who appreciate quality and value. 

In just a short time, we’ve become a top 100 seller in a category of over 600,000 on Amazon. This success is driven by our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

What We Do Differently
We bring thoughtfully designed products straight from our manufacturing partners to your home, cutting out traditional markups and keeping prices fair and complete traceability on supply chain, Each item—whether it’s our 1000 thread count Egyptian cotton sheets or 8-layer muslin blankets—is made with meticulous attention to detail and undergoes stringent quality checks.

Sustainability Matters
We are deeply committed to sustainable practices, using eco-friendly and ethically sourced materials and ensuring that our products are crafted in certified facilities. From using organic cotton to recyclable packaging, every step is a conscious choice to reduce our environmental footprint and create a positive impact.

Why Cloud Scape Linen?

Direct-to-Consumer Model: High-quality products without the retail markup.
Ethical Production: Sourced and made responsibly, respecting both people and the planet.
Timeless Design: Bedding that combines style, comfort, and durability.
Our Vision
We’re redefining what it means to experience luxury at home—making it accessible, sustainable, and truly exceptional. As we grow, we’re looking to connect with partners who share our vision for a better, more sustainable world.

Let’s redefine comfort together—one home at a time.

Name: Novapedra
Description:
Novapedra is a revolutionary material that re-interprets ceramics by harnessing the natural power of orange peels and other organic waste. It´s rooted in a circular-economy model that responds to the environmental challenges posed by the ceramic industry. Offering a deeply sustainable carbon-free alternative, while promoting the inherent beauty and durability of ceramic, but with nature in mind.

Its distinguished features lie in the rich tapestry of our organic process, creating a series of natural aromas and offering a totally personal sensory experience for each user.  This unique material can be applied in infinite facets of design, from decorative objects, wall and floor coverings, counter-tops, back-splashes, large-scale formats and furniture.

Novapedra is an investment in a greener future, a harmonious blend of sustainability, functionality, aesthetics, and a sensory journey.

Description: Somos a Supply Home, uma varejista online especializada em móveis, decoração e utensílios domésticos. Com sede em Florianópolis e centros de distribuição em São Paulo e Santa Catarina, estamos comprometidos em oferecer a melhor experiência de compra para nossos clientes.

Name: Shorebird
Description:
At Shorebird, we create premium outdoor essentials designed to elevate how you recharge. With roots in luxury Hospitality, we blend elegant aesthetics with thoughtful innovations—like our patent-pending Custom Recline System and patent-pending Removable Fabric—transforming ordinary moments into intentional escapes.

Our flagship Shorebird Chair is loved by Resorts, Corporate Gifting partners, and discerning individuals alike for its unmatched customizable fabric, comfort, and refined style. Every detail is thoughtfully designed to inspire calm, connection, and renewal—redefining the experience of outdoor living.

Discover more at www.shorebird.com

Name: Mavi Rappresentanze
Description:
L'agenzia prende forma a inizio gennaio 2020 con la prospettiva di andare a svolgere l'attività di rappresentanza e di promozione in maniera completamente diversa rispetto alle tradizionali agenzie presenti sul territorio: da qui l'esigenza di creare una sempre più stretta collaborazione tra architetto e rivenditore.

La promozione mirata e il supporto fornito allo studio di progettazione si va a intersecare perfettamente con l'azione svolta nei confronti del rivenditore che sempre più si qualifica e sempre più entra nella sintonia del progetto e non solo della pura vendita.

La collaborazione tra Mavi Rappresentanze e Metroquality favorisce proprio questo nuovo modo di interpretare le esigenze della committenza, del professionista di settore e del rivenditore che sono sempre più alla ricerca, oltre che di prodotti sempre più competitivi, di supporto alla vendita.

L'agenzia svolge la sua quotidiana attività di promozione e supporto alla vendita presso showroom di arredobagno, rivenditori di pavimenti e rivestimenti e visite a professionisti quali studi e architetti; l'agenzia è composta da 5 persone di cui 3 operative sul territorio con l'attività di vendita e 2 promoter dedicati alla promozione sugli studi di progettazione.

Le province coperte dall'agenzia sono: Milano, Monza e Brianza, Como, Lecco, Varese, Sondrio, Lodi, Pavia.

Aziende rappresentate:

* IB Rubinetterie - We Are IB
* Makro Bathroom
* Springbox
* Villeroy & Boch

Name: SKEM AMENAGEMENT
Description:
Fort d'une quinzaine d'années en tant que cuisiniste, notre mission est de véritablement accompagner nos clients sur l'ensemble du projet.
Au delà du prix, être à vos côtés est la plus grande des satisfactions...
La SKEM touch "ce n'est que le reflet de vos envies"

Name: The Carpet Stop
Description:
We've been helping people across the UK find ideal carpet and flooring solutions since 2007. 

Over the years, we have invested in a vast warehouse, allowing The Carpet Stop showrooms to look stunning and lower prices. Our expansion has included opening retail carpet outlets throughout the UK with carpet stores in Nottingham, Ilkeston, Manchester, Burton and Derby.

We pride ourselves in providing excellent customer service and will always go out of our way to ensure you leave our stores satisfied. Our customers' positive feedback and loyalty are a testament to the quality of our service.

You can learn more about our carpet and flooring services and what makes us tick over on our website. 

Are you interested in joining our team of Carpet and Flooring Experts?
Browse our current vacancies on the 'Jobs' tab above. 

The Carpet Stop - for the best on-the-floor price.

Name: ORCA CONGO
Description:
Créé en 2001, le groupe Orca dont le siège se trouve à Dakar (Sénégal) est leader du mobilier et de la décoration en Afrique Subsaharienne.

Au fil des années, Orca est devenue une référence dans la grande distribution. Car chacun est unique, nous vous proposons des styles décoratifs variés afin que vous puissiez vivre dans une ambiance singulière qui vous appartiendra. Pour votre salon ou votre chambre à coucher, votre salle de bain, votre cuisine ou votre chambre d'enfant, vous trouverez chez nous tout ce dont vous rêvez pour aménager votre maison. 

Présent dans 19 pays sur son continent fétiche, l’Afrique, des nouveaux magasins ont encore vu le jour et continuerons d’ouvrir... et cela grâce à vous, chers clients ! Vous nous inspirez, nous poussez à être plus curieux et ainsi d’être en quête de recherche afin de vous satisfaire encore et encore !

Name: Geahchan Group
Description: Established in 1928, Geahchan Group is one of the Middle East’s leading players in high-end homewares. Providing everything needed for complete luxury living environments—from bathrooms and kitchens to interior and exterior furnishings—it is the region’s exclusive supplier of some of the world’s most sought-after brands and products. The umbrella organization, Geahchan Group Holding, was founded in 1990 to facilitate corporate diversification and has been led by Michel Geahchan since its inception. Products and interior design services are distributed through six specialist companies, operating seven multi-brand and mono-brand showrooms across Lebanon. Headquartered in Beirut, the company is ideally located to serve its Middle Eastern and European markets. Geahchan Group Holding has earned a unique reputation among private industry professionals and clients alike. Its success is built on the discerning contemporary taste that defines its product ranges, supported by a standard of service delivery that consistently exceeds customer expectations.

Name: Smart Design Studio Srl
Description:
Benvenuti nella Pagina di SMART DESIGN STUDIO SRL su LinkedIn!

 Chi Siamo:
SMART DESIGN STUDIO SRL, fondata nel 2019 da Corrado Arienti, è un'eccellenza nel settore della progettazione e vendita di soluzioni d'arredo per abitazioni residenziali.
 La nostra mission è creare ambienti che non siano semplicemente spazi, ma opere d'arte che riflettano il gusto unico di chi li abita e ispirino emozioni positive.

 Il Nostro Approach:
Come un abito sartoriale su misura, ogni progetto di Smart Design Studio è creato con la massima cura e attenzione ai dettagli. 
Così come un sarto considera ogni misura e la vestibilità perfetta dell'abito, Corrado e il nostro team di progettisti si dedicano a comprendere appieno le esigenze dei nostri clienti e a garantire che ogni soluzione d'arredo si adatti perfettamente al loro stile di vita.

 La Nostra Vision:

La strada che SMART DESIGN STUDIO SRL sta percorrendo ci vede impegnati a diventare un punto di riferimento nel settore dell'arredamento residenziale. 
Siamo dedicati a offrire non solo design straordinario, ma anche un servizio clienti.
 Vogliamo trasformare le case dei nostri clienti in spazi che raccontano la loro storia e rispecchiano la loro personalità.

Seguiteci su LinkedIn per rimanere aggiornati sulle nostre ultime creazioni, ispirazioni di design e notizie aziendali. 

Siamo pronti a collaborare con Professionisti del settore ed aziende di costruzioni che abbraccino la nostra mission.
Unisciti a noi in questa straordinaria avventura nel mondo del design d'interni! 

 #SmartDesignStudio #DesigndInterni #ArredamentoResidenziale

Name: Quatuor Design
Description:
Quatuor Design is a multi-brand design furniture concept with a shop based in Brussels.

We offer indoor and outdoor furniture selected for their quality, their unique design and for their middle-high range price. 

Beside our selection of products, Quatuor can also handle all kind of design architecture projects for both professional and private contract. 
Our unique methodology along with our knowledge of the products and our creativity ensure you to choose the best partner for your projects.

For more information about our company and/or our products and services, please visit our website: www.quatuordesign.be

Name: İDAŞ FLORYA SHOWROOM
Description: Uyku ve Ev Tekstili alanında 1965 yılında kurulan Sektörün İlk Markası İDAŞ ın Florya Showroom Linkedin Hesabıdır

Name: Conceito Harmonize
Description:
A  HARMONIZE é uma empresa de decoração situada em Niterói, que dispõe de um amplo portfólio de produtos com design diferenciado e está constantemente em busca de novidades e tendências que atendam todos os tipos de projetos, residenciais e corporativos. Com atendimento personalizado, acreditamos que um tempo dedicado exclusivamente para o cliente, proporcionam uma atmosfera em que as boas ideias surgem.

MISSÃO : Oferecer soluções em ambientes que integram as pessoas aos seus desejos e sonhos, através da decoração de excelente qualidade, serviços superiores e bom relacionamento.

VISÃO: Estar entre as marcas mais admiradas pelos consumidores e parceiros do segmento, por proporcionar uma experiência de atendimento diferenciada. Produtos inovadores, soluções personalizadas, alta qualidade e design. Ser respeitada pela seriedade e tradição nos negócios e compromisso com o cliente.

VALORES: Cumprir rigorosamente todos os compromissos assumidos. Respeitar as pessoas, tratando a todos com amizade, honestidade e ética. Apoiar, orientar e auxiliar funcionários, clientes e fornecedores em todas as suas ações que levem ao crescimento profissional, pessoal e da própria empresa.

Name: Neue Werkstätten Gesellschaft für Planung und Einrichtung mbH
Description:
Neue Werkstätten – Ikone der Münchner Designszene
Seit über drei Jahrzehnten prägen wir vom Promenadeplatz – einer der schönsten Adressen Münchens, nur wenige Schritte vom Bayerischen Hof entfernt – die Kultur des Interior Designs. Unsere Handschrift verbindet kreative Präzision mit höchster Umsetzungskompetenz, kuratierter Einrichtungskultur und kunsthandwerklicher Exzellenz. Mit einem besonderen Fokus auf italienisches Design und einer stilübergreifenden Perspektive übersetzen wir Stil in Raum – individuell, zeitlos und immer mit Blick auf die Menschen, die ihn erleben. Als Plattform für Austausch, Zusammenarbeit und visionäres Denken machen wir Interior zur gelebten Kultur.

Name: Casa by Josephine Jenno
Description: Homewares inspired by the world’s most treasured antiques and designs. Express your style with our unique cherished home décor.

Name: Spazio Living
Description:
Spazio, an authorised dealer of iconic Italian luxury furniture brands, owns the largest luxury furniture showrooms in the nation. With a retail collection of top-tier Italian luxury brands, Spazio is renowned for its exclusive designs that revolutionise the concept of luxury living. 

Spazio has successfully bridged the gap in the market for high-end furnishings by offering a collection that includes Luxence, B&B Italia, Lema, Bonaldo, Trussardi Casa, Eichholtz, Poltrona Frau, Kettal and Medea. 

With a retail collection of top-tier Italian luxury brands, Spazio is renowned for its exclusive designs that revolutionise the concept of luxury living. With a remarkable area of 20,000 square feet, the showroom in Pune is situated on the ground floor of the prestigious Trump Towers in Kalyani Nagar. Alongside, another showroom can be discovered at Poonam Chambers in Mumbai, offering an unparalleled experience to a discerning clientele.

Spazio Living - Experience the Ultimate 

Pune | Mumbai

Name: Fahmy Furniture
Description:
Since 1973, Fahmy Furniture has grown from a humble shop in Ruwi into Oman’s premier furniture destination, renowned for quality and innovation. From stylish home essentials to sophisticated office solutions, we’ve dedicated decades to expanding our range and enhancing our service to meet the evolving tastes of our customers. Now spanning 7,000 square meters at our new location in Al Azaiba, we continue to be a trusted name, bringing exceptional furniture and interior design expertise to the people of Muscat and beyond.

أثاث فهمي
تأسست شركة أثاث فهمي عام 1973م  برؤية واضحة تهدف الى تقديم كل ما هو مميز بمعايير دقيقة ذات جودة عالية  تتناسب مع تطلعات الزبائن، مما جعلنا علامة مميزة في السلطنة. وقد كانت البداية صعبة ولكن مع الالتزام والإصرار وإيماننا بمبادئنا استطعنا أن نوسع نطاق عملنا في الأثاث المنزلي و المكتبي . 

وتغطي منتجات أثاث فهمي وخدماتها مبيعات التجزئة الخاصة بالأثاث المنزلي والمكتبي، المناقصات التجارية ، حلول تصميم متكاملة واستشارات التصميم الداخلي.


و يقع مقر أثاث فهمي بحلته الجديدة في العذيبة بمساحة عرض لا تقل عن ٧٠٠٠ متر مربع .

Name: MILANO International Company | شركة ميلانو انترناشونال
Description:
Milano International | Crafting the Luxury of Life 
With over 15 years of experience, Milano International is a Saudi company specializing in woodwork and luxury interior solutions.
We design and execute custom kitchens, wardrobes, and wooden cladding, and import premium furniture from the world’s finest brands.
We proudly serve individual clients and major projects, with a proven record in national developments and partnerships with leading real estate developers across Saudi Arabia.

 Based in Saudi Arabia – Khobar , Riyadh, Saihat, and Al Ahsa.
شركة ميلانو إنترناشونال | نصنع رفاهية الحياة 
بخبرة تزيد عن 15 عامًا، تتخصص شركة ميلانو إنترناشونال في الخشب والحلول الداخلية الفاخرة.
نصمم وننفذ المطابخ، الخزائن، والكسوات الخشبية، ونستورد أثاثًا فاخرًا من أرقى العلامات العالمية.
نهتم بخدمة الأفراد والمشاريع، ولدينا تاريخ حافل في المشاريع الوطنية وشراكات مع أبرز المطورين العقاريين في المملكة

 نخدم بفخر في السعودية – الخبر، الرياض، سيهات، والأحساء

Name: مفارش العييري
Description: شركة سعودية متخصصة في قطاع التجزئة للمفارش، المراتب، مخدات النوم. بدأت أعمالها في عام 2017م كمتجر إلكتروني، ثم توسعت لاحقًا بافتتاح عدد من الفروع , تمتلك الشركة حاليًا تسعة فروع في مدينة الرياض وفرعين في مدينة جدة وفرعًا واحدًا في مدينة الخرج وفرعًا واحدًا في مدينة الطائف وفرعًا واحدًا في منطقة القصيم وفرعين في الدمام وفرعين في الخبر وفرعاً واحد بالاحساء ويجري حاليًا العمل على افتتاح فروعا اضافيه في كل من منطقة مكة المكرمة وحائل والمنطقه الشماليه الجوف وتبوك  والمنطقة الجنوبية خميس مشيط وابها ، مع وجود خطة توسعية استراتيجيه قريبة المدى للشركة للتوسع حول المملكة باذن الله

Name: QiU
Description:
Les collections de QiU sont toujours composées d’objets de décoration réalisés dans les règles de l’art avec le respect des méthodes ancestrales des artisans du monde. D’une matière vivante et de sa collaboration avec des artistes, QiU donne naissance à du mobilier et de la décoration alliant savoir-faire et esthétique.

Des essences de bois rares, sélectionnées avec minutie pour leurs qualités et leur résistance, gage de durabilité. Telle une œuvre d’art, chaque pièce de bois est pensée et dessinée bien avant d’être conçue. Souvent plusieurs nuances de tons clairs et foncés se mélangent pour donner aux collections un caractère intemporel.

Fabrication sur mesure, formats hors normes, des produits aux matières naturelles ultras résistantes avec des finitions exceptionnelles qui sublimeront votre intérieur.

Name: OZ Design
Description:
Here at the home of OZ Design, we make products, for life. We’re family-run ourselves and understand the life that gets lived inside our homes. It’s where we’ve come from, and it’s what we do best. We remain focused on providing beautiful and high-quality furniture and homewares collections for Australian’s and their homes every season.

We’re here to live with you through every moment.

OZ Design. For Life.

Name: Quatro Estações Decorações
Description: Fundada há mais de 35 anos, a Quatro Estações é uma empresa de tradição familiar que atua com destaque no mercado de decoração da Bahia. Somos especialistas nas soluções em papéis de parede, tecidos, cortinas, persianas e toldos. Contando com as melhores marcas do nosso segmento, possuímos o maior acervo do Estado, sempre oferecendo a opção ideal para o seu projeto. Mantendo o foco na satisfação de nossos clientes, dispomos de estrutur a e equipe especializada para prestar um atendimentoe pós-venda de excelência!

Name: Brinovar Oficial
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada no segmento de casa, construção e decoração, com mais de 100 mil clientes satisfeitos em todo o país.

Na Brinovar, acreditamos que sofisticação e qualidade devem estar ao alcance de todos. Por isso, desenvolvemos produtos com fino acabamento, alta durabilidade e design contemporâneo, ideais para quem busca transformar o lar com estilo e praticidade por um valor justo.

Presentes nos principais marketplaces do Brasil e com site próprio, seguimos crescendo com o propósito de tornar cada ambiente mais bonito, funcional e inspirador.

Name: Tréca Paris
Description:
Brand of ADOVA Group, a French artisanal bedding group, Tréca Paris embodies the French Art of sleeping, thanks to the heritage of master craftsmen whose unique know-how has been passed down since 1935. 
With creations inspired by the finest palaces and conceived by internationally renowned designers (Constance Guisset, Quaglio Simonelli, Andreas Weber, Christian Lacroix...), Tréca invites you to an experience of made-to-measure comfort. 
All our collections are crafted from rare, precious natural materials, sublimated in our workshops in Reichshoffen (Alsace) and Mer (Loir-et-Cher), guaranteeing a sleep of excellence.
- 
Awarded the Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant (EPV) label in 2023.

Name: Redesk
Description:
Chaque année, 250 000 tonnes de mobiliers de bureau sont jetés en France. 

 Notre objectif : éviter 2 500 tonnes de gaspillage de mobilier de bureau d'ici à 2030 

 Comment ? En développant le premier agent mobilier capable d’offrir une solution clé en main de revalorisation du mobilier de bureau des entreprises déménageant et de vendre du mobilier à 50% du prix du neuf.

Name: Lekker Home
Description:
Lekker Home is the source for luxury European design. Founded by Natalie van Dijk in 2003, Lekker Home was inspired by the impact design can have on a person and a room.

We offer high-end furniture, lighting, and décor for homes, as well as exclusive contract grade furniture for commercial and hospitality applications. Our curated collection includes the best of modern design — from European design icons to emerging artists. We serve luxury residential, commercial and hospitality interior designers, architects and homeowners.

Name: Vip Decor Interiores
Description:
Nossa missão é fazer você realizar o seu sonho. Os seus móveis desde sofá, poltronas e mesas, devem ser na medida correta para a sua casa ou apartamento, nas cores que combinem com o ambiente. Precisam ser bonitos, confortáveis e funcionais, além de terem a garantia de qualidade e segurança para você e sua família. O projeto de decoração, feito pelo designer de interiores, pelo proprietário ou pelas consultoras de venda, deve levar em consideração os desejos e aspirações, o uso e a individualidade de cada morador. E atender aos seus desejos é o nosso maior desejo. 
Qualidade desde o atendimento e todo cuidado na escolha dos fornecedores, equipe técnica devidamente treinada e capacitada para realizar a entrega, montagem e organização de acordo com o especificado no projeto, além da equipe de consultoras que podem auxiliar em todo seu projeto.

Name: Ethan Allen UAE
Description:
Welcome to Ethan Allen UAE – where each piece of furniture reflects our commitment to excellence that shines through in our showrooms and personalized interior design services.

Instagram: @ethanallenuae
Facebook: Ethan Allen UAE
Pinterest: ethanallenuae

Name: Urban Natural Home
Description:
At Urban Natural, our team is dedicated to providing you with the highest quality furniture that is free from harmful chemicals. In the furniture industry today, many of the practices and goods of our globalized economy are directly at odds with the health and beauty of our homes and our planet. We strive to curate a collection of handcrafted, heirloom-quality furniture that is both safe for your family and sure to meet your discerning taste.

All our furniture is made ethically and responsibly by fairly compensated, expert craftsmen from sustainable materials. Each piece is built to last, meaning it will withstand the day-to-day rigors of your family's busy life before being passed down to the next generation. Furniture that is made to last reduces waste, decreases negative environmental impacts, and diminishes the need for "fast furniture.” Urban Natural Home values sustainable, heirloom-quality furniture that is handcrafted in the USA using the most natural and durable materials available today.

Name: sid + siddy homewares
Description:
At Sid + Siddy Homewares, we take pride in offering affordable and elegant products that will add a personal touch to your living space. Our exclusive collection includes distinctive photography pieces and a range of serving ware & décor items. We are committed to providing you with the highest quality products that will make home feel cozy and stylish.

Sid + Siddy Homewares is more than just a name, it's a reflection of our childhood memories and the fun times we shared together. We wanted a name that had meaning and significance, and Sid + Siddy was the perfect choice. We hope our homewares bring joy and laughter to your home, just like our childhood memories do for us. Welcome to our store!

Name: NOD - Network of Design
Description:
People in every corner of the world should be entitled to enjoy unique Scandinavian Design. That is the very purpose of Network of Design – a group set on a mission to bring carefully selected design brands to a much greater audience.

NOD was established in 2020 with the acquisitions of Photowall and String Furniture, and then Cooee Design, Kids Concept and Wall of Art during 2021. During 2022, Norling Studio joined the Group together with two pieces of Swedish design history, Byarums Bruk and Grythyttan Stålmöbler. In 2023, Kasthall, a true design icon became part of NOD and in 2024, the Finnish disruptor Vaarnii joined forces with the Group. Early 2025, Astrid became part of the group and the collaboration with Kasthall started day one. The combined NOD network of brands has a strong position in our home market of Sweden, but the growth is significant in countries such as Germany and France.

The Group will continue to gather design companies with strong brands and help them to deliver on their respective growth plans. The more companies that join the Group, the more the network and company-to-company learnings will help these brands take the next step on their international growth journey.

The goal for NOD is to establish a leading network for design brands and increase their global footprint.

Name: James Lane | Sleeping Giant
Description:
James Lane and Sleeping Giant is a proudly Australian, family-owned business where people come first — always. Our owners are hands-on, working side by side with our team every day. We genuinely care about our people, and it shows — some of our team have been with us for over 40 years. With a passion for creating beautiful homes and a culture built on care, respect, and opportunity, we're more than just a furniture brand — we're one big family.

At James Lane and Sleeping Giant, we're all about creating beautiful spaces — from dreamy bedrooms to laid-back living. Born in Australia, we design furniture that blends style, comfort, and quality, without the designer price tag. Our vibe is fresh, modern, and always a little playful. Whether you're styling your first home or your forever home, we're here to help you live your best at home life.

Name: Penthouse Livings Limited
Description:
Penthouse Livings Limited is aimed to grow into a comprehensive retailer of luxury and glamorous lifestyle products to develop the partnership with customers with pride. Penthouse Livings Limited is the exclusive importer and retailer of premium International furniture brand of Italy, USA and tableware brand of USA, Germany in Bangladesh. We live to make our surroundings as glamorous as you are.

We offer Complimentary Interior Design Services in our retail location, and for large-scale projects, we have an Interiors team assist lifestyle custom-made products solution. The main objective of Penthouse Livings Limited is to capture sustainable market share of Bangladesh along maintaining steady growth of the company.

Name: TALKA DECOR
Description:
Fondée en 2020 par Célia Boulbès et Thomas Molard, TALKA est une maison de mobilier haut de gamme spécialisé dans la pierre naturelle et les matériaux nobles. Nous créons des pièces élégantes, durables et résolument intemporelles, conçues pour sublimer la matière et traverser le temps.

Chaque objet est imaginé en interne, mêlant design et technique, avec une attention extrême portée aux détails et à la qualité. Nos créations, fabriquées en Turquie par des artisans au savoir-faire précieux, s’intègrent naturellement dans des intérieurs contemporains ou des projets hospitality exigeants.

TALKA, c’est une marque familiale, à taille humaine, où chaque projet est une collaboration réfléchie et passionnée. Nous croyons qu’être entouré de belles matières et d’objets que l’on aime transforme nos espaces et notre quotidien.
Découvrez notre univers et nos collections sur www.talkadecor.fr.

Célia & Thomas

Name: THE NEW CRAFTMAKER
Description:
The New Craftsmen was established in 2012 as a platform for genuine and meaningful craft, playfully imagined and properly made by artisans of the British Isles.

Founded on a belief in the joyful, enduring value of finely crafted wares, our pioneering initiative has grown to become a substantial community of makers with a rich variety of expertise, including textiles, furniture and pottery, lighting and artwork.

With our makers we develop collections that reinvent traditional techniques and create contemporary work imbued with the specific cultures and places in which they take shape. Hammered, thrown, woven, gleaned, spun, spliced, bound, knotted, whittled, blown and dyed – every work is alive with the spirit of its making.

Working across a generous range of scales – from a humble ceramic bowl to complete interiors – we also enable bespoke commissions and produce wholly unique projects.

We make visible the life of things: useful, beautiful objects to enjoy every day.

"A collection of the coolest crafters in the land" - Sunday Times

Name: divani.store
Description:
divani.store è un’azienda italiana che produce divani e poltrone artigianali e di qualità, capaci di rispondere alle mutevoli esigenze del mercato in modo innovativo e durevole. divani.store nasce dall’idea di Davis e Loris Di Pancrazio, che nel 2020 decidono di aprire un e-commerce di divani di qualità artigianale ad un prezzo accessibile, appoggiandosi all’azienda di famiglia dotata di un eccellente know-how tecnico e produttivo e specializzata, da oltre 40 anni, nella produzione di divani destinati a rivenditori. 

Obiettivo dell'azienda è quello di fornire una vasta scelta di poltrone e divani di qualità, offrendo un servizio in grado di soddisfare in modo efficace le necessità della clientela con prodotti artigianali e personalizzabili. Come brand nativo digitale, si prefigge l’obiettivo di accompagnare il cliente lungo tutto il percorso di acquisto attraverso una seriedi servizi: l’invio preliminare di campioni di tessuto, consulenze telefoniche, videochiamate di supporto con un team di esperti, strumenti digitali innovativi come il configuratore per personalizzare il proprio prodotto per valorizzare l’esperienza di vendita dei clienti. 

Nel 2023 è stato inaugurato il primo punto vendita del brand a Corropoli (TE).

Name: Lorenzo Home UAE
Description: Founded in 2004, Lorenzo Home has established itself as a beacon of luxury in home furnishings within the heart of Dubai. With a strong presence in major retailers across the globe, Arthouse is known for its stylish, accessible products that help transform living spaces with ease and creativity.

SEIT 1959 STETIG IM WANDEL UND DOCH GLEICH GEBLIEBEN
Seit über sechzig Jahren steht der Name MÖBEL MARTIN für ein zukunftsorientiertes und innovativ handelndes Familienunternehmen. 1959 von Werner Martin mit dem ersten Standort in Neunkirchen, Saar, gegründet, ist MÖBEL MARTIN stetig mit seinen Aufgaben und seinen Erfolgen gewachsen. Das größte Möbeleinzelhandelsunternehmen in Südwestdeutschland wird heute in zweiter und dritter Generation von Prof. Dr. Silvia Martin sowie ihren Kindern Nicolas Martin und Dr. Isabel Martin geführt.

Name: AM.PM
Description:
We are AM.PM – the sanitary ware industry’s most dynamic brand with a unique philosophy and business model. What is so extraordinary about us? 

Well, it’s not only about us.
We all have dreams. Most of us aspire to a better lifestyle. Surrounded by beauty. By things that reflect our personality and taste. Things that prove — sometimes to others, but most importantly to ourselves — that we’ve made it.

At AM.PM we bring you extraordinary everyday places that reflect YOU, your lifestyle and inspire you to dream forward. We offer the most sophisticated designer collections of bathroom products, with unique bespoke quality at mass segment price! 

We are a team of first-class professionals from all over the world united by one inspiring goal — to make bathroom the most important place in your home. True entrepreneurs, we are hardworking, always open to new ideas and unlimited creativity to bring you the bathroom of your dreams. And we make the process fun every time by caring for and supporting each other! 

Isn’t it a dream? With AM.PM it is a reality!

Name: ASHLEY
Description:
Trivett’s Furniture | Ashley Furniture - Virginia

At Trivett’s Furniture, we’re proud to bring the trusted name of Ashley Furniture to communities across Virginia. For decades, we’ve helped customers turn houses into homes with stylish, comfortable, and affordable furniture that fits every lifestyle.

As a family-owned and locally operated business, we combine the strength of the Ashley brand - the world’s largest furniture manufacturer - with the personalized service and community focus of a hometown retailer. Whether it’s a living room refresh, a bedroom upgrade, or the finishing touches that make a house feel like home, our team is dedicated to delivering quality, value, and an exceptional customer experience.

Our Virginia stores are more than furniture showrooms - they’re places where our teams build relationships, solve problems, and celebrate milestones with our customers. We’re passionate about helping people create spaces they love, while supporting the communities we live and work in.

 What We Offer:

- Ashley’s wide range of furniture and home décor
- A commitment to quality, affordability, and style
- Friendly, knowledgeable staff who put customer care first
- A career environment where employees can grow, lead, and succeed

At Trivett’s Furniture, we believe home is where life happens - and we’re here to help make it beautiful.

Name: Alaska Circular
Description:
En Alaska Circular sumamos compromiso, acción y tecnología a favor de la economía circular en el sector del mueble. Reducir su impacto negativo en el Planeta es responsabilidad de tod@s.

Somos una comunidad on line para la compraventa de muebles y artículos de decoración preloved de calidad. Vinculamos empresas, profesionales y consumidores para dar una segunda vida a muebles de marcas, restauradores, fabricantes que hacen del residuo y la innovación su materia prima, y piezas singulares de particulares.

Integramos en un mismo espacio:  una oferta circular de muebles y artículos de decoración para explorar, inspirarse y seleccionar la pieza ideal a la que dar una segunda vida, y una oferta operativa integral de servicios. Brindar una experiencia eficaz a un consumidor exigente es la mejor forma de sumar comunidad a favor del Planeta.

Diseño, producción, consumo y servicios responsables para habitar y disfrutar de espacios más bellos y sostenibles.

Súmate al cuidado del Planeta! Es el espacio que tod@s habitamos

Name: Urban Nature Culture
Description:
With a lifelong experience in home and lifestyle collections, Dutch entrepreneur and wayfarer in life Anne Marie Hermans is proud to bring you the brand that mirrors her vision on the world: Urban Nature Culture. 

Always on the look-out for new inspiration for her home deco collections, Anne Marie finds unforgettable stories far beyond her hometown of Amsterdam. She sets out to meet the world on a weekly base, traveling in search of hidden gems to take home. UNC brings you the many stories, rare finds and lost treasures she’s collected throughout the years, found in different cultures, giant metropolises and far-away villages. Its products are part of the global society as the work of inventive minds and hard-working, creative people. UNC brings you the world right at home.

We sell and represent many renowned international brands including Garden Art, Gescova, EMU, Glatz, Tribù, Dedon, Manutti, Gloster, RODA, OFYR, The Bastard, Weber and so much more. As well as our own range of lounge, dining and pool furniture. We work with interior designers and architects to create complete outdoor living spaces that include lighting, heating, and decorative items for clients throughout Portugal, and we have a large range on display and in stock all year.

A Alaire é especialista em mobiliário de interior, exterior e jardim, com sede em Cascais, Portugal. Vendemos e representamos muitas marcas internacionais de renome incluindo Garden Art, Gescova, EMU, Glatz, Tribù, Dedon, Manutti, Gloster, RODA, OFYR, The Bastard, Weber e muito mais. Assim como a nossa própria gama de mobiliário de sala de estar, sala de jantar e piscina. Trabalhamos com designers de interiores e arquitectos para criar espaços exteriores completos que incluem iluminação, aquecimento, e artigos decorativos para clientes em todo o país, e temos uma vasta gama em exposição e em stock durante todo o ano.

Name: Colorado Ski Chairs
Description:
At Colorado Ski Chairs/Furniture we are dedicated to creating quality works of art for your home, business or as a perfect gift for someone special.    Our designs are inspired by the beauty and majesty of the mountains and we work to weave them into your life and favorite environment year round. Primarily using retired skis and snowboards and locally sourced wood as the main materials we hand craft custom furniture to bring the magical memories of skiing home.

We’re skiers, hikers, snowboarders, outdoorsmen, mountain bikers and adventurers and we get the mountain lifestyle.  That’s why we live here!   There’s just way too much outdoor furniture out there that’s not inspired nor beautiful nor long lasting.  Our mission is to raise the bar on quality outdoor furniture that you’ll love for years to come and be able to enjoy everyday at home or at work.

Our designs range from adirondack ski chairs to ski tree houses, snowboard benches, wine racks, mailboxes, and everything else in between. Give us a call and we will work with you to design, then construct, your personal slice of mountain paradise. perfect for porches, condos, gifts, or dusting off those old, loved skis and putting them back to good use. If you can think it, we can build it.

We offer custom paint jobs on everything we craft, which offers the perfect place to cheer for your favorite sports team or represent your home state. for business owners, our painted chairs offer a unique and useful space to market your restaurant or store. We can paint your logo on one of our outdoor, weatherproof chairs to create a special outdoor seating arrangement that is sure to raise eyebrows and bring in customers.

As an independent, locally owned business based out of colorado, we are dedicated to sustainable living, comfort, adventure, and really cool furniture. Look for our stickers out on the mountains, and check out examples of our work along main street in Breckenridge, Colorado. Let us bring our passion to you.

Name: ZIMMER Working in Concept
Description:
ZIMMER ist eine Plattform für Working in Concept an der Schnittstelle von Raum, Design und Media.

Aus unternehmerischer und gestalterischer Praxis entstanden, bündelt ZIMMER unterschiedliche Kompetenzen unter einem gemeinsamen konzeptionellen Dach – klar strukturiert, nachvollziehbar und wirksam im realen Umfeld.

Im Zentrum stehen Projekte, die Nutzung, Gestaltung und Kommunikation gemeinsam denken. ZIMMER arbeitet dort, wo klassische Zuständigkeiten an ihre Grenzen stoßen, und entwickelt Konzepte, die Raum nicht nur bespielen, sondern aktivieren, Design nicht isoliert zeigen und Medien gezielt in den Kontext integrieren.
Die Plattform gliedert sich in drei eigenständige, klar zuordenbare 
Bereiche:

RAUM – ZIMMER
ZIMMER entwickelt Raum als strategisches Werkzeug. Dazu zählen Nutzungskonzepte für bestehende Flächen und Leerstand, die inhaltliche Strukturierung von Orten sowie die Entwicklung von Settings für Austausch, Präsentation und Zusammenarbeit. Raum wird dabei als Teil des Konzepts verstanden – nicht als bloße Hülle.

DESIGN – möbel im ZIMMER
möbel im ZIMMER bündelt den Designbereich innerhalb der Plattform. Im Fokus steht kuratiertes Möbeldesign, das in räumliche und inhaltliche Zusammenhänge eingebettet ist. Die Zusammenarbeit mit Herstellern, Händler:innen, Architekt:innen und Planer:innen erfolgt bewusst projektbezogen und kontextuell.

MEDIA – MARA Media
MARA Media verantwortet den Medien- und Kommunikationsbereich von ZIMMER. Der Schwerpunkt liegt auf Ambient Media und Below-the-Line-Maßnahmen – dort, wo Marken im Alltag sichtbar werden. Medien werden nicht additiv eingesetzt, sondern aus Raum und Situation heraus entwickelt.

ZIMMER versteht sich als strukturierende Plattform, die Disziplinen verbindet, ohne sie zu vermischen.
So entstehen klare Angebote, eindeutige Zuständigkeiten und Projekte mit langfristiger Relevanz.

Working in Concept.
Raum · Design · Media

Name: Meubles RD
Description:
Compagnie dynamique qui se spécialise dans la vente de meubles, matelas et électroménagers neufs depuis 2005. Nous avons un choix impressionnant de meubles aux styles variés. Vous allez voir, ça vaut le coup de se déplacer ! 

Meubles RD, c'est le fruit d'une stratégie de développement, alignée sur une croissance continue qui se traduit aujourd'hui par l'existence de plus de 34 magasins à travers le Québec.

Name: GUMA
Description:
Bir ofis masasının başında, çalan telefonlar ve sonu gelmeyen toplantılar arasında günlerin birbirine karıştığı bir hayat... İşte GUMA’nın tohumları bu tekdüzeliğe karşı duyulan özlemle filizlendi. Tasarımcı ve Moda fotoğrafçısı İki genç, beyaz yaka dünyasının griliğine sıkışmış ruhlarını özgür bırakma cesaretini gösterip küçük bir sermaye ve büyük bir tutkuyla yola çıktı. Zihinlerindeki sınırları kaldırıp “AYKIRI LÜKS” kavramını baştan tanımlayacak bir marka hayal ettiler. Ve bu hayal GUMA oldu.

GUMA, rengârenk kültürlerin, hikâyelerin ve sürprizlerin iç içe geçtiği bir evren. Her biri özel tasarım ve üst kalite olan ürünler, bazen New York’un graffitilerinden, bazen Selçuklu’nun hat sanatından ilham alıyor. Kimi zaman beş yaşında bir çocuğun boya kalemiyle yarattığı küçük bir çizim, GUMA atölyesinde sanat eserine dönüşüyor. Bazen de Ayasofya’nın görkemli motifleriyle süslü, zamanın ötesine dokunan bir mobilya olarak karşımıza çıkıveriyor.

Bu marka, sadece “Maksimalist lüks” sözcüğünün sınırlarına sığmıyor; GUMA, sanatsal lüks, sürdürülebilir lüks ve hatta minimal lüksün bile harmanlandığı bir deneyim sunuyor. Her ürünün ardında, farklı kültürlerin, coğrafyaların ve sanat akımlarının cesur bir kolajı var. Bu kolaj sadece tasarımla kalmıyor; GUMA, düzenlediği sıra dışı organizasyonlarla da sanatın ve şık yaşamın peşindeki insanları bir araya getiriyor.

GUMA için zamansızlık, yalnızca modanın ötesine geçmek değil; her detayın geleceğe ilham vermesi. Ve bu özgün dünyada sürdürülebilirlik de vazgeçilmez. Ürünlerimizin çoğu, artan veya geri dönüştürülebilir malzemelerle tasarlanıyor. Çünkü GUMA, gerçek lüksün aynı zamanda geleceğe duyulan saygıyı gerektirdiğine inanıyor.

İşte bu yüzden GUMA, hiçbir kalıba sığmayan, cesur, uçarı, özgün ve renkli bir başkaldırı. Beyaz yaka dünyasından doğan bu aykırı lüks yolculuğu, her gün yeni bir hikâyeyle büyümeye devam ediyor. 

Çünkü GUMA’da lüksün bir kuralı yok; burada her şey mümkün!

Name: Bay Window
Description:
Bay Window speaks diversity. A home decor brand with a purpose to bridge the gaps within the home-decor landscape in the Indian subcontinent. With a team of experts dedicated to deliver transformative home decor solutions projecting lifestyle, we aspire to become a catalyst for innovative & unconventional interior spaces that goes one to  become a conversation starter in your life. 

Creating a balance between creativity with functionality, our ideologies are inculcated in our products, with each object showcasing a diverse design element, we emerge to redefine convenience, providing an unmatched shopping experience rendering coveted pieces with lightning fast delivery.

Behind the curtains of BAY WINDOW, stands our visionary founder, Siddhant Anand. Endowed with a particular and conscientious approach, Siddhant invests his heart and soul into every facet of the brand. Home decor runs through his lineage, as he hails from a family of seasoned experts in the field, with knowledge and expertise handed down through generations. 

A distinguished alumnus of the esteemed University of Illinois, he honed his skills and broadened his horizons, pursuing higher education at the prestigious Indian School of Business, and his insatiable thirst for knowledge led him to the revered halls of Stanford University, where he mastered the art of running a thriving enterprise.

United with Siddhant's unwavering ardor and our brand's foundational principles – namely Balance, Convenience, Functionality & Unconventionality,  we embark on a quest to transform mere houses into cherished homes, inspiring a new way of living, presenting a new outlook on life.

Name: Viggore
Description:
Desde 1989 no mercado, como uma pequena loja familiar, onde seu administrador possuía o desejo de revolucionar o ramo moveleiro no Rio de Janeiro.

Assim surgiu em 2008 a Viggore Móveis, uma rede de lojas com móveis de qualidade, ambientes decorados e muita elegância.

Em pouco tempo, com muito trabalho e excelência no atendimento a Viggore passou de 6 colaboradores para mais de 240 pessoas, 2 centros de distribuição e diversas lojas físicas. Todos em busca de um único propósito: Ter e oferecer satisfação em viver bem, com bom atendimento, ética, bons relacionamentos e móveis de qualidade. Passando a ser reconhecida desde 2014 como uma das marcas mais queridas pelos cariocas (Revista Marcas Cariocas/ O Globo).

Nossa missão é continuar sendo reconhecida pela ética nas relações e qualidade dos produtos, que são cuidadosamente escolhidos e avaliados.

Visamos manter nossa reputação idônea e estabelecer relações de longo prazo baseadas em ética, confiança mútua, integridade, respeito e transparência com nossos colaboradores, fornecedores, parceiros, comunidade e principalmente com Você: Cliente.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Brunes Group
Description:

•	Brunes Construction, with an experience of 15 years, strives to be the contractor of choice by providing quality construction services in an environment of integrity and trust.
•	Dekoll Company established in 2015 is the most modern building factory in the Balkans. With the latest Italian production technology, and with its openings of Pintocolor and Termax, has achieved great success being appreciated not only by customers but also by the community.
Dekoll was awarded 5 stars by the Prime Minister of Albania and won the “Best Entrepreneur in the Industry” by the “Golden Bee 2015”. Modern technology, product quality, environmental care and protection, employee safety and meeting customer requirements are the main elements attested by the certifications and standards that Dekoll currently holds.
•	Lobby Home is a shopping center of about 13,000 m2 in Tirana, where you can find everything related to your living space, starting from building materials and ending with interior furniture and home appliances. It is the first and the only one of its kind in Albania, where the client can find everything needed to complete his home and with the most economical prices on the market.

Name: Guma Collection
Description:
Bir ofis masasının başında, çalan telefonlar ve sonu gelmeyen toplantılar arasında günlerin birbirine karıştığı bir hayat... İşte GUMA’nın tohumları bu tekdüzeliğe karşı duyulan özlemle filizlendi. Tasarımcı ve Moda fotoğrafçısı İki genç, beyaz yaka dünyasının griliğine sıkışmış ruhlarını özgür bırakma cesaretini gösterip küçük bir sermaye ve büyük bir tutkuyla yola çıktı. Zihinlerindeki sınırları kaldırıp “AYKIRI LÜKS” kavramını baştan tanımlayacak bir marka hayal ettiler. Ve bu hayal GUMA oldu.

GUMA, rengârenk kültürlerin, hikâyelerin ve sürprizlerin iç içe geçtiği bir evren. Her biri özel tasarım ve üst kalite olan ürünler, bazen New York’un graffitilerinden, bazen Selçuklu’nun hat sanatından ilham alıyor. Kimi zaman beş yaşında bir çocuğun boya kalemiyle yarattığı küçük bir çizim, GUMA atölyesinde sanat eserine dönüşüyor. Bazen de Ayasofya’nın görkemli motifleriyle süslü, zamanın ötesine dokunan bir mobilya olarak karşımıza çıkıveriyor.

Bu marka, sadece “Maksimalist lüks” sözcüğünün sınırlarına sığmıyor; GUMA, sanatsal lüks, sürdürülebilir lüks ve hatta minimal lüksün bile harmanlandığı bir deneyim sunuyor. Her ürünün ardında, farklı kültürlerin, coğrafyaların ve sanat akımlarının cesur bir kolajı var. Bu kolaj sadece tasarımla kalmıyor; GUMA, düzenlediği sıra dışı organizasyonlarla da sanatın ve şık yaşamın peşindeki insanları bir araya getiriyor.

GUMA için zamansızlık, yalnızca modanın ötesine geçmek değil; her detayın geleceğe ilham vermesi. Ve bu özgün dünyada sürdürülebilirlik de vazgeçilmez. Ürünlerimizin çoğu, artan veya geri dönüştürülebilir malzemelerle tasarlanıyor. Çünkü GUMA, gerçek lüksün aynı zamanda geleceğe duyulan saygıyı gerektirdiğine inanıyor.

İşte bu yüzden GUMA, hiçbir kalıba sığmayan, cesur, uçarı, özgün ve renkli bir başkaldırı. Beyaz yaka dünyasından doğan bu aykırı lüks yolculuğu, her gün yeni bir hikâyeyle büyümeye devam ediyor. 

Çünkü GUMA’da lüksün bir kuralı yok; burada her şey mümkün!

Name: Old Brick Furniture + Mattress Co.
Description:
Price low, and tell the truth.

While other stores keep prices high except for special Sale Days, our theory for Old Brick was to charge our lowest price every day. Knowing how much other stores marked things up, we determined to always be 10 to 30% lower than even their "Door-Buster Blow-Outs".

The whole point was to deal honestly and transparently with the public. No gimmicks. No do-or-die sales people.

Just - the good stuff for a lot less every day.

Name: GOODFORM AG
Description: Die Themen Design, Formschönheit und moderne Wohn- und Einrichtungstrends haben uns von GOODFORM schon immer inspiriert und angetrieben. Angefangen haben wir damit, eigene Möbel zu entwerfen und fertigen zu lassen. Relativ schnell stellte sich dann die Frage, wie wir diese Möbel verkaufen sollen und stellten fest, dass es für ein unbekanntes kleines Label sehr schwierig ist über den herkömmlichen stationären Fachhandel zu verkaufen und so starteten wir mit einem kleinen Onlineshop und wenigen Produkten im Sortiment. Dies zu einer Zeit als Onlineshopping von Möbeln und Leuchten noch unbekannt war. Ein Onlineshop für Designermöbel und -leuchten? Ja, das funktioniert – sogar so gut, dass GOODFORM mittlerweile zum grössten Schweizer Onlinehändler für Designmöbel und -leuchten avanciert ist.

Our services include project management, CAD drawings, ergonomic assessments,  mood board and furniture selection. We accompany our clients from the initial design phase to the selection and ordering of products, and from supply and installation to follow-up and hand-over.

"À quoi ressemble la maison de vos rêves ?"

Chez Kave Home, nous pensons que chaque maison mérite d'être un espace unique, une véritable extension de votre personnalité. Imaginez un intérieur où chaque détail, chaque meuble, raconte votre histoire, un lieu où vous vous sentez non seulement à l'aise, mais aussi inspiré.

Depuis plus de 40 ans, Kave Home transforme les intérieurs en véritables œuvres d'art vivantes. Nous allions design contemporain, confort et durabilité pour créer des pièces qui non seulement embellissent votre espace, mais aussi enrichissent votre quotidien. Nos collections, inspirées des dernières tendances, sont conçues pour s'adapter à votre style de vie, vous offrant un intérieur où vous vous sentirez vraiment chez vous.

Mais Kave Home, c’est bien plus que des meubles. C’est un engagement envers la qualité, l’innovation, et le respect de l’environnement. Chaque pièce que nous créons est pensée pour durer, pour vous accompagner dans les moments précieux de votre vie, et pour créer une ambiance où chaque jour devient un plaisir.

Alors, comment imaginez-vous votre maison idéale ? Avec Kave Home, nous vous aidons à transformer cette vision en réalité, en vous offrant des solutions de design qui allient esthétique, confort et fonctionnalité. Parce que chez Kave Home, nous croyons que votre maison est bien plus qu'un simple endroit où vivre — c'est le lieu où vous créez des souvenirs inoubliables.

Avec nous, donnez vie à la maison de vos rêves.
