Name: House of Amitié
Description:
House of Amitié is a fresh and contemporary interiors brand launched in May 2023.

Amitié 
‘a mee tyay’ 
Feminine noun meaning friendship.

House of Amitié is the creation of lifelong friends Jemma Lewis and Angela Bush. Their joint creative careers have led them towards the development of a collection of wallpapers and fabrics dedicated and inspired by the heritage craft of paper marbling. 

Paper marbling has been around for hundreds of years, in fact it dates all the way back to 12th century Japan in the art form known as ‘Suminagashi’ which translates to ‘floating ink’. How we marble today is not too different to how marbled papers were created centuries ago. Paints are floated onto a thick and viscous ‘size’ which is derived from an Irish Seaweed and the paints can be magically swirled and manipulated into endless patterns before being transferred to a sheet of paper.

Long associated with the insides of antique books, marbling is finally being expressed as a design resource in its own right and here at House of Amitié our vision is to bring these wonderful designs to life in your own homes. 

As advocates of sustainability, House of Amitié responsibly source our products, using natural fabrics produced in Europe and an Eco Non-Woven Substrate used for selected wallpaper designs. Our other Mica Coated Non-Woven Wallpapers are partially made from  recycled plastic bottles. 

At House of Amitié we strongly believe in supporting British manufacturing, with a commitment to print all of our products in the UK, using digital printing for all of our designs. Being an eco friendly print option, this consumes less energy and water than other more traditional print methods. 
By working to this print discipline, it also produces less waste with no harsh chemicals required in the process.

Please join us and enter the House of Amitié; www.houseofamitie.com and follow us on our Instagram page @houseofamitie for all updates.

Name: Практикер
Description:
Практикер е верига специализирани хипермаркети за дома и градината с 20 години опит на българския пазар. Ние сме лидер в сектора “Направи си сам“ като осигуряваме широк набор от продукти в различни категории, комфортно пазаруване, професионална консултация и разнообразие от услуги, за да отговорим на нуждите на всеки един клиент.

Най-добрите резултати се постигат в среда на доверие, комфорт и сигурност, затова ние в Практикер се стремим да осигурим на своите над 1 700 служители възможности за непрекъснати обучения, развитие и благоприятни условия за баланс между професионалния и личен живот.
 
Ние сме отговорна компания. Към потребителите, към нашите екипи – хората, изграждащи нашия успех всеки ден и не на последно място - към обществото и околната среда. Инвестираме в личностно-професионалното развитие на служителите си. Подпомагаме българската култура и образование и полагаме усилия за по-чиста природа и градска среда.

Практикер стъпва на българския пазар през 2004 г. През 2014 година българската компания „Видеолукс Холдинг“, собственик на хипермаркетите за техника за дома, офиса и свободното време Технополис, придобива целия бизнес на Практикер в България и към момента управлява 17 обекта от веригата в 15 големи града на страната.

Name: Rug & Home
Description:
Rug & Home was founded in 1995 with a very simple mission.  To be the Ultimate Destination for Rugs and Home Furnishings by delivering products with value, passionate service, and a delightful shopping experience.  We are proud to say that our mission has never wavered.  Our mission embodies four key themes:

Home décor with a conscience.  We have an absolute commitment to giving back to the communities and artisans that have supported us so much as we have grown. Through our Rug & Home Foundation, we have given millions of dollars, as well as countless volunteer hours, to aid thousands of individuals and non-profit organizations in the past 25 years.  Read more about our past and current initiatives at Rug & Home Cares.

Products with a story.  We have an ever-changing mix of unique products from leading artisans from around the world.  The Rug & Home buying team travels the globe to personally select and inspect every piece individually before adding it to our inventory. We have direct, personal relationships with our vendors, both foreign and domestic. This means that you can expect better deals and service both on brand-name items and on our exclusive products. It enables us to offer you new products and the latest home fashions before other retailers can. And it means that when you buy from Rug & Home, you can rest assured that each of our eclectic, curated pieces has been chosen with care, expertise and love.

Affordability.  We have always had a strong focus on bringing the best possible prices to our customers.  We believe that home décor should be accessible.  In many cases, we ship products directly from the artisans who make them.  Since there is no middleman, we can afford to offer highly attractive prices.  We also buy many products in scale, and are able to negotiate the lowest prices as a result. 

Make the process simple.  At Rug & Home, our staff of Design Consultants will help you do anything from selecting a rug to designing an entire home.

Description:
La tienda por departamentos más grande de Panamá, con una trayectoria de más de 50 años en la exportación de muebles de alta calidad. Desde hace 8 años, hemos ampliado nuestra presencia en el mercado minorista panameño, ofreciendo a nuestros clientes una amplia variedad de productos para el hogar. MISIÓN
 
Nuestra misión en Kennedy Home es poner a tu disposición mobiliario y accesorios modernos, conservadores, contemporáneos, que conlleven calidad, innovación tecnológica, tendencias y estilos internacionales, sustentados en la constante búsqueda de corrientes estéticas, así como propuestas con nuevos materiales, formas, colores y estilos, con el compromiso de mejorar día con día y estar a la vanguardia, con el propósito de satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes.
Estamos seguros de que nuestros compradores: profesionistas, empresarios, arquitectos, diseñadores, decoradores de interiores y amas de casa que busquen crear o renovar la imagen de sus hogares, oficinas y espacios especiales estarán más que satisfechos con nuestra propuesta y podrán encontrar en esta página todo lo que deseen decorando sus sentidos.


VISIÓN
 
La visión de Kennedy Home es ser una empresa con proyección nacional e internacional, lo cual será posible mediante el esfuerzo, dedicación y profesionalismo de nuestro equipo de trabajo, tomando en cuenta las tendencias del mercado, las necesidades actuales y futuras de nuestros clientes, seguirnos renovando y actualizando en esta área para llegar a ser la mejor opción para el público de venta de muebles y accesorios en decoración para residencias, oficinas, hoteles, restaurantes, hospitales y mucho más.

Name: Vikram Goyal Studio
Description:
Vikram Goyal leads his studio practice with innovative craftsmanship, composing a new contemporary design vocabulary from India.

For over two decades, the studio has created collectible design objects with a focus on metal, particularly brass, as its primary material. Led by a sense of curiosity about the affordances of materiality, Goyal and a team of skilled craftspeople continually experiment with extending boundaries of traditional techniques, base pairings, and conceptual narratives—with extraordinary results. The inventiveness of the studio’s work is most striking in its seamless use of material wherein sheet metal, with its firm rigidity, takes on a sensuous, visceral persona. Large-scale objects become singular statements through detailed and deeply skilled processes of making, underpinned by the studio’s intergenerational knowledge and mastery of techniques including repoussé, pietra dura, and hollowed joinery.

Located in New Delhi, the studio is a typical, with a dedicated team and workshop globally recognized for its approach to making via ideas of materiality,culture, and tradition. It undertakes bespoke commissions and collaborates with architects and designers globally.

Name: Bina Warehouse
Description:
Since 1972, Bina Warehouse has established itself as the leading household name in the Malaysian bathroom & kitchen industry, offering world-recognised award-winning labels.

The organisation is set in a 22,000sqft Bathroom & Kitchen showroom in Petaling Jaya. 
For imported kitchens, we have a 12,500sqft Kitchen Gallery in Kuala Lumpur, which is also the flagship showroom for SieMatic in Malaysia. 

With over 50 years of experience in the high-end kitchen & bathroom industry, we pride ourselves on being specialists in these fields. 
From fitting out Istana Negara & Carcosa Seri Negara, and now to the very highest of the private homes, hospitality and residential developments by our country’s foremost architects and IDs, Bina Warehouse has been synonymous with the nation’s building industry.   

HELPING MALAYSIA TO BUILD EXTRAORDINARY SPACES
This is what puts a spring in our step each day. Our vision is to make it possible for fellow residents and designers of Malaysia to have world-class bathroom & kitchen designs right here in this country. 

OUR HERITAGE
Our story began with 3 brothers from Ipoh at a time when Malaysia was being ‘built’. In the 70s, “Bina Malaysia” was a slogan that was used all around the country to instil a strong sense of building and developing the country. Our founders subscribed to that vision and wanted to contribute to the development of our nation. Hence the name Bina Warehouse was born. 

OUR FUTURE
Never standing still, we will continue to scour the earth for the latest innovations that we can bring back to Malaysia. 
Our future is bright and the next few years are set to be our busiest yet. As a family-owned organisation, we are bound to no one, free to create and innovate. 

THE TEAM
From humble beginnings, we have grown into a loyal team of 70. Each and everyone of our team, from the delivery boy to the senior designer plays an important role, like members of an orchestra. In order to create a masterpiece, we rely on each other.

Sustainability isn't just a trend for us; it's at the core of our mission. That's why we're proud to be the UAE distributor for FEYDOM, an award-winning brand of sustainable sofa beds.

FEYDOM: Designed for Small Spaces, Big Comfort

FEYDOM furniture is perfect for maximizing functionality in compact apartments. Their innovative, modular designs offer:

Easy adjustment for day and night comfort
Multifunctionality for versatile living
Easy assembly, requiring no technician
The high-quality European-made sofas feature:

Convertible functionality
Expandable elements
Changeable covers for a customized look
FEYDOM: Committed to Sustainability

FEYDOM shares our commitment to the environment:

Planting Trees: With every sofa purchased, FEYDOM plants a tree, contributing to a growing forest of over 10,000 trees.
Solar Power: Their factory utilizes 100% solar energy, reducing their carbon footprint.
Recycled Materials: FEYDOM incorporates recycled plastic into their furniture, minimizing waste.
COMFICASA: Bringing Sustainable Comfort to Your Home

At COMFICASA, we're proud to introduce FEYDOM furniture to the UAE market. Discover quality, sustainable furniture that promotes comfortable living and environmental responsibility.

Welcome to Newance India, the epitome of opulence and style in the realm of luxury modular kitchens and wardrobes. We are the trendsetters, catering to the elite who crave the finest in design and aesthetics.

At Newance India, we are a dynamic and innovative force, infusing our creations with a youthful flair and an unyielding dedication to staying ahead of the curve. Our portfolio showcases extravagant modular kitchens and wardrobes that redefine luxury living. Impeccable craftsmanship and attention to detail are at the heart of our designs, ensuring each space exudes an air of exclusivity and refinement.

What sets us apart is our unwavering pursuit of cutting-edge trends and our global exposure to the most prestigious design showcases around the world. Armed with unrivaled technical expertise, we seamlessly merge contemporary elements and advanced features into our creations, resulting in spaces that embody the perfect blend of form and function.

But our prowess extends beyond kitchens and wardrobes. Our customer interior design services are curated for the crème de la crème, offering personalized consultations that breathe life into their wildest design dreams. From conceptualization to execution, our talented team of designers and artisans work tirelessly to transform visions into awe-inspiring realities, leaving an indelible mark of sophistication.

At Newance India, we don't simply create spaces; we curate experiences that transcend the ordinary. Each project is meticulously crafted to captivate the senses and ignite a sense of wonder. Our obsession with perfection drives us to push boundaries and redefine what it means to live in the lap of luxury.

Stay connected with us on LinkedIn to immerse yourself in our world of opulent projects, design innovations, and the latest trends that shape the landscape of luxury living. Let Esthete India be your gateway to a life of unapologetic grandeur, where style knows no bounds.

#newance #LuxuryReimagined

Name: Semeraro
Description:
Siamo italiani, amiamo l’arredamento, siamo passionali, creativi con la forza di credere nelle nostre idee e con la voglia di realizzarle. La nostra tradizione è italiana legata all’arredamento, alla moda, alla cucina, al cibo, al vino all’arte del saper vivere felicemente, qualità che ci distingue nel mondo. Sviluppiamo e proponiamo arredamenti e oggetti per la casa garantendo impegno nella ricerca dei materiali in forme e colori per rendere il tuo ambiente piacevole ed accogliente.

Amiamo tutto ciò che facciamo e, ogni giorno sviluppiamo oggetti di arredamento in uno stile nel quale ci riconosciamo; il gusto che nasce dalla tradizione italiana. Il nostro sviluppo creativo è in continua evoluzione con sensibilità, cultura, condivisione e conoscenza. Il nostro obiettivo è garantire ai nostri clienti valori che corrispondono
a qualità, onestà e trasparenza.

Ci impegniamo per la soddisfazione dei nostri clienti. Farti vivere la tua casa con funzionalità e soddisfazione è la nostra missione. Ti promettiamo il rispetto dell’ambiente che ti circonda avendone cura al fine di avere un rapporto di trasparenza in quanto sicuri di considerarti tra i nostri nuovi messaggeri.

Name: MAWI Tegels B.V.
Description:
MAWI Tegels B.V.  is een jong bedrijf dat in 2014 is gestart. Wij verkopen tegels en sanitair, en leggen de focus op bijzondere en kwalitatief hoogwaardige tegels voor particuliere en bedrijfsmatige toepassingen. 
Ondertussen is MAWI Tegels een begrip op het gebied van wandtegels, vloertegels, natuursteen, (keramische) patroontegels en Keramisch Parket (de houtlook tegelvloeren) en bestaat het team uit 4 enthousiaste en toegewijde medewerkers.  Wij bedienen zowel de particuliere als zakelijke markt, en werken samen met verschillende aannemers en architecten binnen en buiten de regio.

Sinds 2015 is het bedrijf gevestigd in de oude papierfabriek aan de Handelsweg 5a in Maarssen (Utrecht).  In 2016 is het assortiment uitgebreid met een sfeervolle showtuin en kunt u bij MAWI Tuin terecht voor sierbestrating en tuinadvies. Ons pand is gelegen naast de A2 Utrecht-Amsterdam en de Zuilense Ring en is perfect bereikbaar.

Hartelijk welkom; de koffie staat klaar!

Name: Bem Bacana Locações
Description:
A Bem Bacana nasceu, há 12 anos, como uma empresa especializada em locação de mobiliários, acessórios e objetos de decoração para eventos corporativos e sociais.

Em 2022, explorando as novas tendências de consumo e o conceito da economia compartilhada, ampliamos nossa atuação e criamos mais 2 verticais de negócios:
- Locação para Casa: passamos a atuar também no mercado residencial, baseados na ideia de estimular os consumidores a repensar em como mobiliar suas casas, usufruindo de produtos como se fossem seus, porém sem precisar comprar.
Através de Planos de Assinatura customizados, os clientes podem escolher os móveis, por quanto tempo querem locar e ainda, realizar trocas ao longo do período de locação. Ao término do contrato, é feita a devolução dos itens ou renovação do plano. E a qualquer momento, é possível realizar a compra de qualquer item.

- Concierge Bem Bacana: foi criado para atender às necessidades que fazem parte do dia a dia de uma casa.
A partir de uma rede de profissionais selecionados e especializados em serviços complementares e voltados ao bem estar de uma casa, nossos clientes poderão acessar e contratar uma solução rápida e eficaz.

Queremos proporcionar uma experiência diferenciada e exclusiva de serviços, com o acompanhamento da equipe da Bem Bacana.

Tudo pensado para facilitar e resolver a vida dos nossos clientes!

Name: Jazz My Home
Description:
Jazz My home is India’s noted premium International home décor brand. 
We are contemporary brand, manufacturing in rich luxury embellished linen invidious fabrics such as Silks & Satin. Our products are embellished with appliqués & exclusive handcrafted patterns. 

A home is what you make of it. At Jazz My Home, we believe, beautiful hearts make beautiful people, and beautiful people deserve beautiful creations.

What began as a hobby, soon became an inspiration for life and is ready today, to be showcased as a wide range of premium home décor creations – for you to light up your house.

Our sole aim and core belief, manifested in every product, is that it should lend voice to an expression, bring warmth, glow and beauty of design into your lives.

From expressing unsaid thoughts to your loved ones, to designing a custom-made furniture piece, a hand-made cushion cover to a new born's quilt of peace – Jazz My Home, is growing up to be an intrinsic part of your daily lives. The life that we all wish to celebrate, to cherish, to love, for who we are, and who we choose to be.

MISSION:
To enable home owners to reflect their personal style & life tales in their homes.

VISION:
We aim to take fashion home by ensuring that trends flourish beyond wardrobes to bedrooms now. We believe to own & control the state of the art technology required to manufacture world class quality products of Indian origin and reign the globe across all countries/markets where we can make a significant contribution in upgrading lifestyles.

We believe in saying yes to only a handful opportunities & taking them forward par excellence with the self-honesty to admit wherever we go wrong in the process & courage to change by learning from our mistakes.

Name: Furnishing Kart
Description:
We at Furnishing Kart started with a simple dream: a world where everyone can create a home that sings to their soul. We saw countless people, ourselves included, yearning for beautiful spaces, but the reality was a frustrating jumble. Interior designers, while talented, often came with a hefty price tag, out of reach for most. The industry itself felt fragmented, a collection of disjointed notes that never quite formed a symphony.

Unlike the big-box furniture stores with their generic, one-size-fits-all approach (think endless rows of flat-pack purgatory), we envisioned something different. We wanted a space where customization reigned supreme. A place where your existing furniture could find its perfect match, where color palettes weren't dictated by some pre-written score, but where your personal taste could take center stage.

This frustration with the status quo, this yearning for a more harmonious solution, is what birthed Furnishing Kart. It wasn't just about creating an online store; it was about starting a revolution. We saw the possibility of beautiful, functional furniture being accessible to everyone, without needing to take out a second mortgage for a designer's touch.

Furnishing Kart became the conductor, guiding you to create your own unique symphony. A space that reflects not just the latest trends, but the melody of your life. So next time you hear the whispers of your dream home, remember us. We're here, ready to help you write the soundtrack, one beautiful, functional piece at a time.

Name: Casa Gusto
Description:
There are often words in a language which is not our own that capture a meaning that is precise; a feeling or description so perfect that we must bridge over and take from the other land to claim it. GUSTO is one such word in both Spanish and Italian that captures a vibrant feeling of taste and pleasure.

GET THE GUSTO is just that. CASA GUSTO, a recently hatched company of antiques, objects, and artworks, opened its doors on Georgia Avenue in West Palm Beach, Florida, in November of 2018. The space is filled with goods old and new, gathered and invented from around the globe.

17th, 18th- and 19th-century furniture mixed with a dose of mid-century hand-painted and hand-thrown Talavera from Mexico evoking 19th-century Lebrillo from Granada. End runs, and vintage fabric cushions come together to make dowry quality comfort. Hand molded ceramics from France where earthly pigments dress the table in colors that you can almost taste. Lively and exotic canvases of artist Catharine Warren make the walls on which they are hung come to life.

“Sexy and provocative is the goal, as well as wanting to repurchase everything in the shop for ourselves,” says Cris Briger, co-proprietor with her son Charles Peed and recently joined in by her son Augie Briger. The family exudes excitement for all that is within. It is a very personal journey sought after and going public in a mutual love of the hunt, chase, and capture of all that is….. GUSTO.

Name: MWIMA Concept
Description:
MWIMA is a brand that celebrates Algerian craftsmanship in a creative and modern way. We offer authentic products from all over the country, to make this craftsmanship more accessible and innovative while preserving its essence. Our goal is to contribute to the radiance of our cultural heritage, and to the valorization of local artisans.

OUR VALUES
Authenticity, Passion and Diversity.
Each creation is the result of a know-how that respects traditions and local natural materials. Our passion is reflected in the energy that we infuse into our products. Algerian diversity is a wealth that we translate into unique pieces.

OUR VISION
To be a driver of Algerian cultural renewal. Our creations bridge generations and catalyze a renewed love for this heritage. We also work for the economic development of artisans, through an ethical and sustainable network.

Our dream is to see our works adorn emblematic places, blending traditional and contemporary aesthetics, for an immersive cultural experience.

OUR MISSION
To offer an inspiring aesthetic, transcending borders. Our creations weave sensitive links with Algerian artisanal roots, educate and enlighten.

OUR DISTINCTION
Thanks to our large and coherent collection, our customers can compose their interiors only with our products. Our range is designed by the creative team of PUBDEC agency. We accompany each project.

In partnership with La Galerie Jaune, we offer a cultural and artistic immersion, inviting to contemplate our heritage. Concerned with sharing our culture more than making profits, our prices are unbeatable.

Tailor-made solutions for your simple or complex bedding projects. Technical studies, architectural integrations, excellent upholstery work on beds and headboards.

Creative and professional, the specialists of the Treca stores know the collections of the major fabric editors, master all the techniques and finishes and will be able to make proposals to personalise your project.

Fitting out of bedrooms for master suites, VIPs or guets of complete villas, guest houses, hotel projects, Yachts, Jets. Custom-made beds, traditional upholstery work, excellent dressing of headboards or bed bases.
 
Design, customisation, manufacturing, delivery, installation and white glove integration throughout Europe. Our tailor-made solutions meet every wish and every project. Contact us to find out more.

Name: Origin Blueprints
Description:
At Origin Blueprints, we believe that every space has a story waiting to be told. Our passion for interior design goes beyond aesthetics; it's about crafting narratives that resonate with the essence of your lifestyle or business.

Embark on a journey with Origin Blueprints, where innovation meets imagination, and spaces come alive with purpose. Let us be the architects of your story, transforming your surroundings into an Origin masterpiece.

Contact us today to explore the endless possibilities of design. Your story awaits its perfect space!

Name: HOMEKYND
Description:
Customer’s can’t visualize their space in home buying and home furnishing! This leads to lower Conversion Rates and a frustrating buying experience that is fraught with buyer’s remorse. Enter HOMEKYND!

Homekynd is an AI-powered immersive shopping platform that transforms a single 2D photo of a room into an interactive, shoppable environment. Unlike traditional AR tools that focus on placing a single item in a live phone camera view, with Homekynd, shoppers don’t just glance, they explore. Our full-room discovery experience keeps them engaged for 25–30 minutes on average, brings nearly half of them back for more, and inspires bigger baskets with every visit.

We already power experiences for partners like Apartment Therapy, Impact, and Ricoh delivering 200,000+ monthly clicks and expanding reach beyond brand sites into lifestyle media. Homekynd’s technology is fully white-label and frictionless—no app downloads required—making it easy for partners to scale immersive commerce across web, mobile, and publisher ecosystems.


HK Philosophy:
There’s no place like HOMEKYND. Where beautiful design is accessible. Connection drives your experience and inspiration becomes your reality. A place where you feel at home because kindness is in our brand DNA.

Carl Hansen, dk3, Flos, Fredericia Furniture, Lange Production, Louis Poulsen, Naver, House of Finn Juhl, Swedese og Vitra m.fl.

Name: Roche Bobois Australia
Description:
Roche Bobois Australia is proud to bring the world-renowned French ‘art de vivre’ to Australian homes. As a global leader in high-end furniture and interior design, Roche Bobois has a unique heritage that blends creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation. Each piece of furniture is designed to offer more than just functionality—it’s a statement of style, comfort, and timeless elegance.

Our Sydney showroom in Roseville presents a curated collection of luxury furniture, lighting, and decorative accessories, including iconic pieces from celebrated international designers such as Sacha Lakic, Philippe Bouix, and Marcel Wanders. Roche Bobois is known for offering highly customizable furniture, with over 250 materials and finishes to choose from, allowing you to create pieces tailored to your individual tastes and lifestyle.

At Roche Bobois, we believe that each home is a reflection of the people who live in it. Whether you are seeking contemporary, modern, or classic designs, our collections are crafted to inspire and transform your living spaces. From the playful curves of the Bubble sofa, to the elegance of the Eden Rock collections, our designs push the boundaries of creativity and craftsmanship.

In addition to offering exclusive furniture, Roche Bobois takes pride in collaborating with fashion houses such as Jean Paul Gaultier, Missoni Home, and Christian Lacroix Maison to create unique pieces that reflect the intersection of fashion and interior design.

Roche Bobois Australia offers personalized services including interior design consultations, delivery, and installation to ensure a seamless experience from the showroom to your home. Our team is passionate about helping clients create spaces that reflect their personality and enhance their living experience.

Name: Varga Keukendesign
Description: Draai het eens om. Wat als jij je niet laat inspireren door de keukens in een catalogus, maar de ontwerper zich laat inspireren door jou? Het verhaal dat alleen jij kunt vertellen, neemt hij als vertrekpunt in zijn designproces. De manier waarop jij woont, werkt en leeft. Of ‘jullie’ wonen, werken en leven. De gezinssituatie. De omgeving. Praktische wensen. Frank Varga is die ontwerper. Hij luistert. En vertaalt individuele stijl naar een individueel keukendesign. Kortom, de keukens die hij ontwerpt zijn geïnspireerd door jou.

Zusammen mit unseren knapp 600 Mitarbeitern geben wir tagtäglich unser Bestes, um unseren Kunden ein tolles Einkaufserlebnis zu bieten. Wir haben große Ziele für die Zukunft: Insbesondere im fokussierten Ausbau unserer digitalen Vertriebskanäle sehen wir große Chancen! Name: DECOMARKET - interiérové štúdio
Description:
Spoločnosť Decomarket, s.r.o. pôsobí v oblasti interiérového dizajnu so širokým portfóliom produktov a služieb. Naša firma sa špecializuje na predaj kvalitného nábytku na mieru a komplexných riešení pre vytváranie harmonických a funkčných interiérov. Ponúkame vám širokú paletu produktov pre domácnosti aj komerčné objekty, ktoré spájajú estetiku, kvalitu a inovatívnosť.

Prečo si vybrať DECOMARKET?
* Kvalita a dizajn – naša ponuka zahŕňa produkty, ktoré sú nielen krásne, ale aj odolné a funkčné. Spolupracujeme s renomovanými výrobcami, ktorí sa zameriavajú na kvalitu spracovania a moderné dizajnové trendy. U nás nájdete to, čo potrebujete.
* Široká ponuka – v našom sortimente nájdete produkty pre rôzne štýly interiérov, od minimalistických až po bohaté a rustikálne aranžmány. Od obývacích izieb, spální, kuchýň na mieru po kancelárske priestory, ponúkame riešenia, ktoré dokonale zapadnú do vášho domova alebo firemného prostredia.
* Profesionalita a poradenstvo – naši odborníci sú pripravení poradiť vám pri výbere správneho nábytku a dekorácií, aby váš priestor vyzeral harmonicky a funkčne. Sme tu, aby sme vám pomohli pri realizácii akéhokoľvek interiérového projektu.
* Flexibilita a dostupnosť – chápeme, že každý zákazník má svoje špecifické požiadavky. Preto sa zameriavame na individuálny prístup a prispôsobenie našich produktov vašim potrebám. Naša široká ponuka zahŕňa produkty rôznych cenových kategórií, čo znamená, že si môžete vybrať podľa vášho rozpočtu.

Naša misia:
V spoločnosti Decomarket, s.r.o.  sa usilujeme prinášať našim zákazníkom kvalitné a originálne riešenia pre ich interiéry. Naša misia je podporovať vás pri vytváraní prostredia, ktoré bude nielen krásne, ale aj funkčné a príjemné na každodenný život. Sme presvedčení, že kvalitný interiérový dizajn môže ovplyvniť našu pohodu a produktivitu, a preto sa každý projekt snažíme dotiahnuť do posledného detailu.

Name: MOMA studio
Description:
MOMA studio to nie tylko salon meblowy i sklep internetowy z nowoczesnymi meblami. Jesteśmy tu dla Ciebie, aby tworzyć miejsca ciepłe, żywe, komfortowe oraz idealne do celebrowania życia. Chcemy wypełniać je pięknymi meblami i wyjątkowymi przedmiotami.

Znajdziesz tu nowoczesne sofy, łóżka, krzesła, stoły, komody. Jeśli poszukujesz najlepszych rozwiązań do swojego domu, zatrzymaj się na chwilę, aby poznać naszą ofertę mebli do salonu, jadalni oraz sypialni. Szeroki wybór, wysoka jakość oraz niepowtarzalny design to tylko niektóre cechy, które wyróżniają oferowane przez nas produkty. Mamy coś odpowiedniego dla każdego – meble do salonu najlepszych polskich oraz europejskich marek: sofy z funkcją spania, sofy modułowe, meble do jadalni: stoły drewniane, krzesła, komody, krzesła barowe, meble do sypialni: łóżka, szafki nocne, materace.

Z nami urządzisz również swoje biuro domowe, do którego zaproponujemy Ci wygodne krzesła biurowe oraz oryginalne drewniane biurko, które doda wnętrzu ciepła oraz charakteru!

Name: Drømmeland
Description:
Hos Drømmeland er vi eksperter i senge og søvn, og det er der en god grund til. Vi ved nemlig, at professionel og personlig rådgivning er altafgørende for at opnå en god søvn i den rigtige seng.  

Hver eneste dag arbejder vi fokuseret på at give vores kunder en bedre søvn og dermed blive sundere, gladere og mere optimistiske mennesker, der drømmer gode og store drømme.  

Drømmeland har siden sin spæde begyndelse i 1982 udviklet sig fra at være en traditionel møbelforretning til at blive Danmarks første sengekæde med hele 25 butikker fordelt over hele landet.  

I 2021 blev Drømmeland opkøbt af søvnspecialisten Swiss Sense, en hollandsk familieejet virksomhed. Med 128 butikker og en e-handelsplatform i Holland, Belgien, Tyskland, Østrig og Danmark er søvnspecialisten Swiss Sense en førende aktør på det europæiske marked for søvnprodukter. 

Med nationale rødder og et internationalt udsyn er Drømmeland en stærk spiller på søvn-scenen.

Name: Hygge Casa
Description:
Hygge è un termine della lingua danese usato per rappresentare la sensazione di benessere che si prova nei momenti trascorsi con le persone care, in un’atmosfera intima e confortevole, assaporando i piccoli piaceri quotidiani in un ambiente accogliente e rilassante. E’ ciò che assomiglia di più all’ideale di felicità.
La casa è il luogo dell’hygge, dove ciascuno desidera vivere questa sensazione: è lo spazio in cui ci fermiamo dal fare e ci dedichiamo all’essere. 

I nostri concept store nascono da questa ispirazione, dall’idea di questo sentimento per il quale la lingua italiana non possiede un termine, ma che rispecchia profondamente il nostro amore per le cose belle, lo stare insieme, il buon cibo e la gioia di vivere.

Abbiamo scelto di chiamarci Hygge Casa perché la nostra mission è accompagnare i clienti nella progettazione dei propri ambienti attraverso un’esperienza di acquisto semplice e piacevole che li faccia sentire “felici di arredare”. 
La scelta di essere hygge si riflette anche in altri aspetti della nostra organizzazione aziendale.
Il settore dell’arredamento italiano gode di un riconoscimento internazionale grazie alla qualità, allo stile e all’innovazione; per questo abbiamo scelto i migliori produttori italiani con cui condividiamo la sensibilità alle tematiche ecologiche e ambientali, il gusto per il design e la ricerca di elevati standard qualitativi. 
Altrettanto  importante è il nostro approccio alla gestione delle risorse umane: Hygge Casa seleziona costantemente persone sul territorio, con percorsi didattici e professionali specifici nel design, investe in formazione e collabora con istituti formativi per creare sinergie tra studio, ricerca e lavoro. 
Il piano di sviluppo di Hygge Casa prevede l’apertura di negozi fisici in tutte le principali città italiane e una piattaforma di ecommerce per raggiungere i clienti su tutto il territorio italiano ed estero.

Name: DuroDeco
Description:
DuroDeco is the sister company of New York-based architecture office Dunham Robinson. We're a furniture brand that recognizes that sometimes ready-made solutions don’t quite work, and a bespoke product is a much better fit. 

Our furniture collection is designed to make it easier to build the shapes and sizes you need to fit your space. Our styles are built on the idea that simple, elegant, high-quality furnishings can make any room come together for living well.

Name: Arcane Decor

The process is as simple as Logon > Upload Photo/Art Image > Choose your frame options/Talk to a nurture expert > Get your custom frame delivered to your doorstep/Choose to pickup the frame from one of our nurture centers.

Our framing studios are based out of India and we ensure that the materials chosen are the best in class with no compromise on quality! Our production team is super obsessed about quality of the end product and each framed piece undergoes multiple checks before it is sent out to the customer to be hung on the wall. If you're not happy with the end product in terms of quality or finish, we'll do whatever it takes to get that smile back on your face! Our google reviews are testament to this commitment!

The team comprises of technologists, creative designers, artists, dreamers, story tellers and thinkers ready to nurture your memory to the fullest!

Look forward to a disruptive new company! We will soon arrive at a city near you and on the browser/app of your choice!

Stop by any of our stores and say a hi or meet our nurture experts!

Description:
Fracazzini House è molto più di un negozio di arredamento: siamo il partner ideale per chi desidera trasformare la propria casa in uno spazio unico, funzionale e ricco di stile.

Con una selezione curata di oltre 30 brand di arredamento made in Italy, siamo sinonimo di eccellenza e design. Come Centro Stosa Cucine, offriamo soluzioni innovative che uniscono estetica e praticità, valorizzando ogni dettaglio della tua casa.

Ma ciò che ci distingue davvero è il nostro impegno verso i clienti:
- 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘂𝗹𝗲𝗻𝘇𝗲 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘇𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗲 ascoltiamo le tue esigenze e trasformiamo le tue idee in realtà, progettando insieme ambienti su misura che riflettano il tuo stile di vita.
- 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗮̀ 𝗲 𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 il nostro team di esperti ti accompagna in ogni fase, dalla progettazione alla realizzazione, per garantirti un’esperienza senza compromessi.

Cucine, camerette, divani e living: ogni elemento che proponiamo è scelto per creare ambienti armoniosi e accoglienti, in perfetta sintonia con i tuoi sogni.

Affidati a chi fa del design e della soddisfazione del cliente la propria missione. Vieni a scoprire Fracazzini House e lasciati ispirare.

Name: Find Edmonton
Description:
Find is a social enterprise with two goals: providing essential furnishings free of charge to individuals and families who are moving out of homelessness, and supplying low-cost, quality furniture and housewares for sale to the public.

The start-up cost for anyone moving into their first home is expensive, so imagine the challenges for someone moving out of homelessness. It can be a barrier for someone securing sustainable housing.

People in the Housing First program come to Find to pick out their own furniture at no cost. From kitchenware to living room sets, donations provided by you help people transform their house into their home.

Find is also a haven for urban treasure hunters!
Only high quality and gently-used furniture, housewares, 
and decor are accepted. Whether you’re furnishing your 
first home or looking for a unique do-it-yourself project, 
you know the items you’ll get at find are clean, high quality 
and unique.

Soft furniture, such as sofas, is professionally steam 
cleaned and all furniture is inspected for pests before
being placed on the retail floor. This ensures that clients
and customers alike can shop worry-free.

Every donations makes it HOME!

Home is just a building from the outside, but inside, home is full of memories of a life with those we love and trust most. We believe everyone deserves to have a comfortable, well-designed space. Not only is it our standard to create unique spaces in a fun, enjoyable way - it's our passion. Inspirations brought to life; we turn what matters most into a beautiful story as if turning the page of a favorite book.

How We Do It:

We provide our customers with an unparalleled experience by offering multiple ways to furnish their homes. Customers can have pieces custom-made to suit their style through our special-order furniture. Our showroom and outlet give customers two different ways of shopping our wide variety of in-stock furniture. Lastly, our design program takes the guesswork out of transforming a space. We uphold the highest standards in all our work and strive to develop relationships that make a positive difference in our customers' lives.

What We Do:

We proudly carry, display, and deliver the finest home furnishings for our customers. Each brand we sell shares our philosophy of offering quality products at an outstanding value. We understand furniture is a vital aspect of design, as it sets the tone for the home and reflects an individual lifestyle. At Adcock Furniture & Design, it is our job to make the customer's shopping experience a positive one by providing all their home furnishing needs in the same location. From the small cottage to the large, multi-room estate, we can help create a home that reflects unique personalities in a truly beautiful and creative way.

Name: Katei Srl
Description:
KATEI, si è specializzato nella distribuzione di arredamento, proponendosi ai rivenditori del settore kitchen forniture. Sviluppando un metodo innovativo e altamente remunerativo in grado di rivoluzionare di sovvertire le attuali dinamiche di acquisto “Siamo essenzialmente sviluppatori di business prima ancora che fornitori di prodotti”.

Katei è infatti un Gruppo d’Acquisto che concorda con il produttore un listino vantaggioso sull’acquisto del prodotto e, poi, grazie alla trasformazione degli agenti in consulenti, forma i negozianti per fargli adottare pratiche di relazione evoluta con il cliente.

“Selezioniamo solo i migliori produttori europei, seri ed affidabili che lavorano con passione per offrire qualità, performance eccellenti e soluzioni uniche. Puntiamo molto sull’innovazione e orientiamo la nostra scelta sulle richieste dal mercato, per questo abbiamo in esclusiva molti prodotti di aziende leader che credono nel progetto quality in your name”, e che garantiscono al gruppo d’acquisto condizioni economiche e di fornitura in linea con i nostri principi. Design, funzionalità, dettagli esclusivi, ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo e precisione nella realizzazione sono il mix imprescindibile che concorre a conferire unicità ad ogni progetto”

Inoltre il “quality in your name”, è un progetto che si traduce per l’associato proporre prodotti di alta qualità a proprio marchio. Le cucine diventano, così uniche e incomparabili con le altre presenti sul mercato, con il plus di un listino che lo stesso rivenditore può personalizzare a seconda delle caratteristiche della sua clientela.

Katei è partito con l’analizzare il segmento “arredamento vendita al dettaglio”. Dai risultati di questa analisi “Ci siamo chiesti come sostenere i negozianti che oggi faticano nella generazione di utile e nella gestione della propria impresa”.

Name: iD2 Woning & Projectinrichting BV
Description:
ID2 Woning & Projectinrichting BV.

Is een onafhankelijke leverancier van vloeren, zonwering, gordijnen en aanverwante interieur oplossingen voor zowel de zakelijke als particuliere markt.
Wij streven naar een optimaal resultaat in uitvoering en budget bewaking, waarbij wij zeer goed luisteren naar de gebruikerseisen van onze klanten.

Vanuit onze 20 jarige ervaring in de diverse sectoren, zorg, onderwijs, overheid, industrie en horeca, weten wij wat er bij onze klanten speelt en welke behoefte er op facilitair gebied bestaat.
Wij bewaken deze behoefte, creëren nieuwe mogelijkheden en proberen samen met onze klant te streven naar dat ene optimale concept of product welk binnen hun eigen huisvesting, behoefte, gebruiksgemak of sfeer past.

ID2 kent een 24/7 cultuur wat tegenwoordig steeds belangrijker is voor de continuïteit van de arbeidsprocessen van haar cliënten.

Projecten van 1 tot meerdere duizend vierkante meter is voor ons niet vreemd, waarbij wij op een heldere manier plan van aanpak, reëel tijdsbestek, begroting, en planning vooraf met u bespreken.

Door onze zeer uitgekiende inkoop kanalen rechtstreeks bij alle fabrieken in Europa en daarbuiten, zijn wij in staat een goede prijs/kwaliteit verhouding te kunnen garanderen.

Bel altijd eens voor een vrijblijvend gesprek met een adviseur en laat u verrassen door de expertise, vakkundigheid en vele mogelijkheden welke wij u kunnen bieden.

Team

ID2 Interior Projects BV

T:  +31-(0)88-350 0600
M: info@id-2.nl

Freedom is one of Australasia’s most iconic brands - where inspiration is at its best. Freedom is one of the nation’s leading lifestyle retailers. We don’t just sell furniture, we sell the dream. With over 35 years in the furniture and homewares industry, Freedom has established itself as a market leader, in style, on-trend products and quality. We are known for our great design and a customer experience that you will be proud to be part of.

We believe: 
Great design doesn’t just look good, it enhances the quality of your life. 
Great style never dates, it just gets better with age.

Since 1996 Freedom has empowered Kiwis to create their own story at home. With 13 stores nationally and a world-class online store, we believe in beautiful homes.

We believe in Freedom.

Name: Bromberger Moderne Einrichtung GmbH
Description:
Mit Kompetenz, innovativen Methoden und hochwertigen Kollektionen konzipieren wir individuell anspruchsvolle Interior Projekte. 
Die Kombination unseres Angebotes ist im deutschsprachigen Raum einzigartig.
Mit unserem Beratungs- und Planungsansatz „Liveplanning“, mehr als 100 Markenkollektionen sowie unserer Innenausbaukompetenz schaffen wir die Grundlage für sichere Entscheidungen bei zukünftigen Investitionen in Mensch und Raum. 
Über digitale Systeme und virtuelle Darstellung machen wir Raumdesign erlebbar, Funktions- und Raumkonzepte sichtbar und Budgets kontrollierbar.
Mehr als 30 Jahre Erfahrung in Beratung und Planung, Handel- und Logistik sowie die Expertise eines Generalübernehmers machen uns zum Partner in zahlreichen Projekten unserer Endkunden, in allen Sparten und Unternehmensgrößen.
Durch die loyale und partnerschaftliche Haltung gegenüber Architekturbüros, Innenarchitekturbüros und Office Consultants und unserer Begleitung als Fachplaner in Kombination mit „Liveplanning“ 
begeistern wir durch ein großartiges Netzwerk Unternehmen an Ihren Standorten weltweit.

Deze uitbreiding vroeg om een passende naam – en zo ontstond Kantoor360. Of je nu een bureaustoel zoekt of een volledige kantooroplossing, wij regelen alles. Jouw kantoor, compleet en professioneel ingericht, met één betrouwbare partner: Kantoor360.

Name: Modeve - oasis urbaines
Description:
Bienvenue chez Modeve, votre partenaire suisse spécialisé dans la création et la fabrication de mobilier urbain modulaire végétalisé !

Dans un monde confronté aux défis de l'urbanisation, du changement climatique et de la perte de biodiversité, nous nous engageons à apporter des solutions novatrices pour préserver nos villes et améliorer la qualité de vie de leurs habitants.

Notre mission : rafraîchir nos environnements urbains et préserver la biodiversité. Mais comment y parvenir dans des centres-villes densément peuplés et où il est difficile de planter ? La solution: Modeve, le mobilier urbain modulaire végétalisé.

Nous avons développé une solution innovante permettant de créer des oasis urbaines modulaires végétalisées offrant de multiples possibilités d’usages. 

Les avantages : 

- favoriser la végétalisation des espaces urbains,
- créer des espaces de vies et d’usages du quotidien,
- combattre les îlots de chaleur, 
- enrichir la biodiversité en offrant une alternative durable lorsque la pleine terre n’est pas disponible

Modeve représente ainsi une approche innovante pour améliorer la qualité de vie des citoyens tout en préservant l'environnement.

Notre solution est modulaire, respectueuse de l'environnement, modulable, rapide à mettre en place et économique.

Le processus Modeve est simple :

1. Choisissez vos modules et vos options pour répondre à vos besoins spécifiques. 
2. Sélectionnez les végétaux adaptés
3. Laissez-nous nous charger du reste : Notre solution est clé en main !

Notre équipe est là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape de votre projet d'aménagement urbain. Rejoignez-nous dès maintenant pour créer ensemble des villes plus vertes, plus durables et plus agréables à vivre !

Description:
VISION
We are an innovative custom design company that seeks collaboration with our customers.
Together we express creativity to fulfill the desire for a better lifestyle.

VALUES
We strive to balance profitability while improving social responsibility and environmental sustainability.

HISTORY
We design, manufacture and retail stoneware and porcelain ceramics, and table-top accessories. Established in 1976, in Bali, Jenggala is the foremost producer of quality handcrafted ceramic ware in Indonesia. We are inspired by the quality of the hands-on craftsmanship and the Balinese culture in the development of our designs.

MARKET FOCUS
In addition to our high-end retail showrooms in Indonesia, we mainly supply five star resorts and retailers worldwide, from Japan to the Middle East, including South East Asia and America. Our minimum order quantity for customized designs is just 100 pieces, and we currently have over 2,700 designs and 200 different glaze finishes to offer.

At Jenggala, we work closely with both local and international designers to develop our product range. Our aim is to provide our customers with a range of ceramic ware that both appeals and endures.

Description:
About ÜLKEA

Established under the ÜLKÜ Group, ÜLKEA is Turkey's premier local and national home concept store, offering an extensive range of products designed to meet all your household needs. With a robust presence in İzmir, our 10,000 square meter store reflects over 59 years of industry expertise and commitment to quality.

Furniture for every room in your home

White goods

Description:
At Ivory & Deene, we help customers create amazing spaces through timeless lighting and homewares.

Our key pieces are handmade with love and exquisite detailing. You are assured that every item in our collection is made of the highest quality and from the finest materials for your styling pleasure. Neutral soft furnishings for the minimalist, or a splash of colour for the extrovert - discover a newfound love of interior design that can be directly attributed to our statement pieces. Carefully curated by hand, we have selected objects, furniture and linen that resonate with our values of how a home should look and feel: intimate, sophisticated and functional.

From French provincial to the Hamptons, industrial to modern luxe, all the way through to quirky retro, we have all the right styles to transform your indoor and outdoor living spaces. Embrace new colours and textures or stay traditional with classical hues and prudent finishes. Whatever your taste, you are sure to find it amongst our range of home decor accessories for every room.

When you’re looking for home styling inspiration, you can find it right here at Ivory & Deene. Browse our collection online or get in touch with our professional and friendly staff, who are happy to answer any questions you may have. 

With fast shipping to anywhere in the world from Northern Tasmania in Australia, we are sure our charming decor and accessories will feel right at home within the walls of any residence.

Name: Schmidt Fréjus
Description:
Schmidt a été fondé il y a plus de 60 ans par une famille d'artisans. Ces origines nous ont permis de devenir le principal fabricant français de cuisines et de meubles sur mesure. Grâce au professionnalisme de nos équipes, comprenant des concepteurs, des designers et des conseillers, nous sommes devenus la référence en matière de solutions innovantes, personnalisées et sur mesure. Nous nous adaptons avec une précision au millimètre près pour tous les aménagements.

Grâce au sur-mesure et à la personnalisation, Schmidt Fréjus vous propose des aménagements sur mesure pour tous vos espaces de travail, tels que vos bureaux, salles de coworking et meubles de rangement pour vos dossiers et cuisines communes. Tous vos espaces de travail ont la possibilité d'être aménagés de manière innovante, optimisée et fonctionnelle.

Nous sommes au service des professionnels pour vous apporter des espaces de travail qui correspondent à vos activités professionnelles en prenant en compte vos contraintes et attentes.

Nos concepteurs/vendeurs s'occupent de l'intégralité de vos projets, du premier contact en passant par le choix des matériaux et des coloris, la prise de mesure jusqu'à la réception de chantier, afin que vous soyez sereins, car votre satisfaction est notre priorité.

Vous êtes chef d'entreprise sur le secteur de Fréjus, Saint-Raphaël, Puget-sur-Argens, Saint-Aygulf, Roquebrune sur Argens et vous recherchez de nouvelles solutions d'aménagement qui correspondent à vos activités professionnelles, contactez-nous au 04 94 40 24 24 ou prenez directement rendez-vous sur notre lien https://www.home-design.schmidt/fr-fr/prendre-rdv?storeId=0003000492 pour créer ensemble votre projet.

Sur ce compte, nous allons partager avec vous les dernières informations concernant nos innovations, y compris nos événements, nos réalisations et le quotidien de l'équipe. Nous vous encourageons vivement à suivre cette page afin que l'on partage ensemble notre passion.

Name: The Griffin.AntiqueMall
Description:
The Griffin Mall stands at the intersection of vintage charm and modern sophistication, offering a unique shopping experience for antique enthusiasts and interior designers alike. 

Specializing in high-quality antiques, collectibles, and vintage pieces, we pride ourselves on the diversity and quality of our vendors. What sets us apart is our curated selection that ensures every item has a story, blending seamlessly into modern aesthetics while honoring their historical significance. From heirloom-quality furniture that lasts generations to unique art pieces and decor, 

The Griffin Mall is a treasure trove for those seeking to add character and luxury to their spaces.

Name: Coro Cora
Description:
Coro Cora is a brand that supports Colombian artisans by blending their wonderful craftsmanship with contemporary design. We work directly with artisan communities across Colombia to design and create fun, unique tabletop, accessories and home decor, that celebrate the vibrancy of our country.

We strongly believe in sustainable and slow consumption and we aim to create a lasting social change in the communities we collaborate with. We work mainly with women artisans and our goal is to empower them and ensure they receive a sustainable income for them and their families.

All of our products are 100% handmade, using mostly natural fibers with a minimal ecological footprint.

Name: MOEBEL COMPAGNIE
Description:
MOEBEL COMPAGNIE – Hier gibt es Holzmöbel fürs Leben. Wir sind Gunnar und Sophie Brand. Gunnar ist Tischler, beide sind wir Architekten. Uns fasziniert es, traditionelles Handwerk mit modernen, zeitlosen Design zu kombinieren.

Alles fing damit an, dass wir selbst leidenschaftlich gern kochen. Natürlich auch und gerne für viele Gäste. Gemeinsam genießen wir das gute Essen, einen leckeren Wein und das Zusammensein. Und das alles am liebsten an einem großen Tisch …

HOLZMÖBEL OHNE KOMPROMISSE
Wir wollen die perfekte Harmonie von Funktionalität, Ästhetik und Haltbarkeit. Wir designen für ein Leben und darüber hinaus. Da sind wir mehr als anspruchsvoll.

Warum das so ist? Weil uns das Material so viel bedeutet. Und weil wir beweisen wollen, dass sich Holzhandwerk „hand made“ lohnt. Klar, reicht „gut“ manchmal völlig aus.

Mit unseren Möbeln gehen wir für Sie aber weit darüber hinaus. Das werden Sie spüren und sich mit unseren Möbeln zu Hause rundum wohlfühlen.

Name: MILLEFORMIS WOOD
Description:
Milleformis Wood acopera o paleta larga de produse de mobilier din lemn masiv, de la cel mai bun stejar din Croatia pentru interior pana la teak-ul din Indonezia pentru exterior; canapele si fotolii, piese de mobilier, covoare, tapet si materiale textile pentru personalizarea casei tale.

Forme variate create de designeri prestigiosi precum Karim Rashid, Salih Teskeredzic, Gabriela Bellon, Zoran Jedrejcic, Alain Van Havre, Jacques Deneef si multi altii, modele bine gandite, colectii destinate fiecarei zone in parte, eleganta materialelor, aspect contemporan si atemporal, iata ce poti gasi la noi. O ambianta creatoare si o echipa profesionista alaturi de care visele pot deveni realitate. Te ajutam sa gasesti cele mai bune solutii pentru confortul casei tale. Descopera miile de oportunitati. Indrazneste sa visezi si vino sa ne cunosti sau sa colaborezi cu noi!

Te asteptam,
Echipa Milleformis

Name: Stores-Discount
Description:
Bienvenue chez Stores-Discount.
Depuis 2004, nous faisons de votre "chez-vous" un lieu plus beau, plus confortable et plus performant grâce à des solutions pour fenêtres sur mesure à prix bluffants.

Aujourd'hui, notre ambition est d'être la marque française de solutions pour fenêtres en plus forte croissance, la plus efficace et la plus aimée sur notre marché.

Notre plus grande richesse est notre équipe. Nous grandissons grâce à l’engagement, au respect et au plaisir de travailler ensemble. Rejoindre Stores-Discount (et le groupe Hunter Douglas), c'est intégrer une équipe passionnée qui transforme l'univers de la maison.

Nos valeurs sont le socle de notre quotidien :
• Transparence
• Engament
• Autonomie
• Mérite

Chez nous, vous trouverez le même confort et épanouissement que nous proposons à nos clients, alliant la force d'un groupe international à l'agilité d'une équipe locale bien soudée.

Name: Nestern
Description:
At Nestern, we believe beautiful interior design should be accessible to everyone. We curate an exquisite collection of home goods that blend function with style, helping you create spaces that reflect your unique personality and taste.
Our carefully selected range includes everything from chic furniture and stunning decor to ambient lighting and cozy rugs. Each item is chosen for its quality, design, and ability to elevate your living space.
We're more than just a brand; we're your partner in crafting a home where cherished memories are made. Our commitment to excellence extends beyond aesthetics to superior craftsmanship and durability.
Nestern stands for:

Quality and thoughtfully curated home goods
Accessible and inspiring interior design
A perfect blend of timeless classics and contemporary trends
Exceptional customer service and satisfaction

We're proud to give back to our community, donating 4% of our annual profits to support underprivileged children's education and development.
Discover the art of elevated living with Nestern. Let's transform your house into a home that tells your unique story.

Name: Worth & Co. Brand
Description:
Worth & Co.’s purpose is to be a brand that provides a home and a lifestyle to those within their community. Our goal is to provide our guests with unique and high-quality products and services that allow them to update and continuously improve their lifestyles as they see fit. The assortment of products we carry is continually being refreshed to stay following the latest trends. This way, we can offer you the very best when you look to update your home and lifestyle. We also want you to feel encouraged to try new styles and step outside your comfort zone, and we’ll help you get there if you let us. 

We’re a team of passionate & knowledgeable professionals who partner with leading brands to help deliver unique and premier products and services to you and to those within our shared community. From the moment you walk in, we strive to deliver a personalized shopping experience that enables you to live a life made well with the help of our team here at Worth & Co. You’ll be engaged with our helpful professionals wherever you need us, and you can also interact with the products and services we offer. From start to finish, we want your overall experience to be enjoyable and unparalleled.

Name: Casa Lusso

Casa Lusso Furniture
A homegrown brand in the UAE, Casa Lusso Furniture brings with it a heritage of over 30 years in the UAE furniture industry. Our brand offers luxurious and on-trend interior solutions, which aim to redefine interior of your home or work space.

Located in Umm Suqiem Street, Al Barsha 2, Dubai, Casa Lusso’s collections bring international styles of furniture to your door-step. Offering complimentary interior design services, the brand promises to glamorise your living space with its unique and stylish solutions.

Our product portfolio consists of a variety of dining tables, dining chairs, modern chairs, armchairs, ottomans, side tables, sideboards, beds, cabinets, bookshelves, dressers, desks, consoles, chandeliers, lamps, and modern home decor items. For selected products, we offer a tailor-made option where customers can have furniture custom-made to their preferences. Additionally, we provide interior design consultancy for our customers with the guidance of our in-house interior designer.

Name: DLB Amenagement
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page LinkedIn de DLB Aménagement. Nous sommes honorés de vous accompagner dans vos projets d'aménagement de bureau en tant que partenaires de la marque italienne, Quadrifoglio. Notre objectif simple et sincère est de vous proposer des solutions d'aménagement intérieur qui marient élégance et fonctionnalité.

Depuis nos débuts, nous nous sommes engagés à améliorer les espaces de travail pour les rendre plus agréables, efficaces et adaptés à vos besoins. Sur cette plateforme, nous sommes impatients de partager avec vous nos connaissances, nos projets et d'écouter vos retours sur le monde de l'aménagement professionnel.

Que vous soyez un professionnel du design, un dirigeant d'entreprise ou simplement intéressé par l'ameublement, nous vous invitons à découvrir l'univers de Quadrifoglio à travers nos yeux et à explorer comment DLB Aménagement peut vous soutenir dans vos aspirations d'aménagement.

N'hésitez pas à nous suivre pour des mises à jour sur nos projets, les tendances du secteur et les événements que nous organisons. Ensemble, cherchons à créer des espaces de travail qui reflètent vos valeurs avec simplicité et authenticité.

#DLBAmenagement #Quadrifoglio #AménagementIntérieur

Son partenariat avec Holly Hunt aux Etats Unis lui permet une présence à l’échelle mondiale. 
La galerie s’attache à offrir des services exclusifs à ses clients : tels que la possibilité de faire personnaliser les pièces ou de les faire fabriquer sur mesure. Ainsi, la commande de chaque client est traitée avec l'excellence et le savoir faire que peuvent offrir les artisans français.

Name: Möbel Heinrich
Description:
Als inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen haben wir mittlerweile eine 65-Jährige Erfolgsgeschichte, auf die wir zurückblicken können. 1958 startet Firmengründer Heinrich Struckmann mit einem kleinen Ladengeschäft in Rodenberg. Im Laufe der Jahre ist Möbel Heinrich zu einem der größten und modernsten Möbelhäuser der Region geworden und umfasst vier große Einrichtungshäuser sowie vier Filialen der Handelsmarke clevva.

Name: Utility Design Limited
Description:
Utility Design is home to a host of incredible furniture and lighting designs from top European brands, such as Vitra, Kartell, Menu, &Tradition, Flos and many more. As official stockists, we only sell authentic originals - no replicas.

We’re proudly independent, and our mission is simple - to curate the best selection of designer furniture and lighting online, and offer best-in-class customer service. We’re not a corporate machine and this is reflected in our hands-on, personable customer care, at every stage of the buying process.

Whether you’re a residential customer, architect, specifier or project manager, our dedicated, professional specialists are on hand, Monday to Friday, 8.30am to 5.30pm, to help with any product advice, service questions or queries. 

We deliver to over 100 countries and work tirelessly to ensure we do so in the most cost-effective, reliable and speedy way possible. For UK mainland orders of in stock items, we offer next-working-day delivery as standard.

Our Liverpool-based Flint showroom is due to open in Summer 2023, allowing you to touch and test our product selection. Experts will be on hand for all product and project advice.

Name: Agecrafts (Artisanal Global Emporium)
Description:
Welcome to Artisanal Global Emporium, trading as Agecrafts. Established in 2024, we are dedicated to bringing the finest handmade items to discerning customers around the world. Our specialty lies in offering exquisite rugs, carpets, doormats, and wool products that reflect the rich heritage of artisanal craftsmanship.

At AGEMart, we believe in making high-quality artisanal products accessible to everyone. By sourcing directly from skilled manufacturers, we ensure that our customers receive the best value for their money. This direct-to-consumer model allows us to offer our unique products at highly competitive prices, both on our dedicated eCommerce platform and through established marketplaces like Amazon.

Our Mission & Offerings:

- To bridge the gap between traditional artisans and modern consumers by offering beautiful, handmade products that bring warmth and character to every home.
- Handmade Rugs and Carpets: Each piece is crafted with care, using traditional techniques passed down through generations.

Artisanal Global Emporium (Agecrafts) - Where Tradition Meets Affordability.

Name: Mazu Design Studio
Description:
Mazu; meşe ağacından ve meyvesinden yola çıkarak masif meşe ve mermer gibi organik malzemeleri sizlerle  buluşturmak için başladığımız bir yolculuk bizim için. 

Mazu olarak her mekanın ruhunu yansıtacak minimal dokunuşlarla işlediğimiz fonksiyonel, sade tasarımlarla, doğayı yeniden dizayn ediyoruz. 

Yaşamınızda yıllarca değerini kaybetmeden sizlere eşlik eden, İskandinav stilini yansıtan, usta ellerde yeniden yorumlanan tasarımlarımızla güzel ve sakinleştirici kişisel alanlar yaratıyoruz. 

Mevcut koleksiyonlarımızın yanı sıra müşterilerimizden gelen özel ölçü ve tasarım esnekliği ile müşterilerimizin kendi tarzlarını kişisel alanlarına taşımasına destek oluyoruz.

2000 m2 kapalı üretim tesisimizde zanaatkar ustaların el işçiğiyle değer kattığı mobilyalarımızı sizlerle buluşturmayı, bu yolcukta sizlerin ilgi ve sevgisiyle büyümeyi çok seviyoruz.

Name: Sant'Alberti
Description:
A Sant'Alberti nasceu da busca por um estilo de decoração com mais sentido e profundidade, acompanhada da necessidade de desenvolver no Brasil peças que ainda não eram por aqui encontradas.

Nosso desejo é entregar mais beleza, elegância e conforto a lares únicos e foi por meio das cabeceiras que começamos a realizar essa missão.

Pioneiros no e-commerce de cabeceiras soltas com capas removíveis, nosso objetivo é transmitir delicadeza, aconchego e versatilidade em cada peça, para composições leves, atemporais e exclusivas.

O que começou com uma enxuta coleção de capas para cabeceira e saias de cama, hoje já conta com um portfólio com mais de 40 produtos e continuamos desenvolvendo peças exclusivas, com atenção a cada detalhe, do design à escolha dos materiais.

Name: Polidoro Home
Description:
Somos uma marca que promove momentos especiais e únicos a partir de peças com design autoral e exclusivo, materiais nobres (mármore, quartzo, linho etc.), elegantes e atemporais. Nossa missão é levar ainda mais beleza ao lar de nossas clientes e facilitar sua vida quando o assunto é decoração e mesa posta com produtos práticos e funcionais. 

Mariana, fundadora e diretora criativa da empresa, que desenha todas as peças da marca. Todo o desenvolvimento de uma peça é dado de forma muito artesanal. O desenho é feito à mão por nós, o processo de fabricação é minucioso, detalhista e, em algumas etapas, manual. O processo de envio também é feito por nós. Embalamos internamente cada peça, colocamos nossa essência exclusiva. um cartão de agradecimento, tag, envelope, todos personalizados e únicos. Para fechar, um saco de veludo envolvendo a peça, com nossa fita personalizada em nossa caixa. Uma experiência única. 

Participamos dos momentos mais especiais da vida de nossas clientes, trazendo ainda mais beleza a eles. Isso que nos move a continuar a nossa missão.

Name: Vero Cuisine
Description: Vero Cuisine is a top-tier retailer of high-quality European kitchens and closets, located in Dubai, UAE. With a keen eye for design and functionality, Vero Cuisine offers a curated selection of premium products from the best manufacturers in Europe. With fast and efficient delivery services throughout Dubai and the UAE, Vero Cuisine makes it easy to get the kitchen and closet of your dreams. Contact us today to learn more about our European kitchens and closets, and discover why Vero Cuisine is the go-to destination for luxury home solutions in Dubai.

Name: Bobu Lifestyle
Description:
Bobu Africa Lifestyle
Inspired by Africa’s Nature. Rooted in its Culture. Crafted for the World.

Bobu Africa Lifestyle is a creative ecosystem of lifestyle brands born from the rich textures, stories, and soul of Africa. Headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya, we collaborate with local designers, artisans, and educators to transform African nature and culture into meaningful products and experiences for a global audience.

Our mission is to celebrate Africa’s beauty through craftsmanship, design, and storytelling—while building fair, sustainable creative industries across the continent.

Our Brand Family:

Zama Craft
“Objects of meaning, shaped by hand and spirit.”
Zama Craft is the heart of our creative vision. A brand rooted in African nature, shaped by human hands, and infused with cultural soul. From hand-carved pieces to thoughtfully designed objects, each creation reflects Africa’s textures, rhythms, and ancestral wisdom. Zama means “to strive.” We partner with artisans and designers to preserve heritage, honor materials, and grow a future where African creativity is deeply valued.

Savana Story
“Wear your journey.”
Savana Story is a safari-inspired fashion brand offering tailor-made clothing and accessories. From wax print dresses to safari bags, jewelry, caps, and nature-based souvenirs, each item is a living memory—crafted by local artisans and delivered before your departure. Not just worn, but lived.

Palachichi
“Where nature meets childhood.”
Our children’s brand focused on nature-based education and creative expression. From storybooks and flashcards to safari wear and workshops, Palachichi nurtures learning and wonder through Africa’s natural world.

Together, these brands form a new African lifestyle narrative—one that is authentic, imaginative, and globally relevant. We are telling Africa’s story not through stereotypes, but through the hands of its people, the wisdom of its traditions, and the beauty of its lands.
This is Bobu Africa Lifestyle.

Name: LoftyLoo
Description: Created out of love and necessity, LoftyLoo plays into a cat's natural instinct to be elevated and lifts litter pans for joint-friendly cleaning. Designed to fill a need for elderly and disabled cat owners, LoftyLoo is wheelchair accessible and helps keep them independent. Dog-proof, LoftyLoo ensures a safer and easier experience for all.

Name: Ayr Barns
Description: Ayr Barn’s is a homewares and lifestyle brand. Our concept; lovingly grown from our British heritage, is to holistically practice overall well being through the introduction of local produce, hand crafted products, and through our curated lifestyle brand. We seek to acquaint conventional lives with an organically enriched abundance, as well as nurture peoples everyday habits into a happier and healthier place.

Name: LA FRENCH STUDIO PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
La French Studio: A Bridge Between Two Worlds
La French Studio is a constantly evolving company, built on the foundations of French craftsmanship excellence. Under the leadership of its founder, Amandine Schira, heir to a family of Norman industrialists specializing in hardware, the studio draws inspiration from Parisian design before opening itself to the world of Indian karigars.

Travel, encounters, and collaborations with exceptional artisans have been the fertile ground of our journey. Like a creative Big Bang, these exchanges have given birth to the singular universe of La French Studio. We first put our expertise at the service of visionary creators—designers like Toro & Liautard, Laura Gonzalez, and visionary hoteliers such as Michel Delloye. These pioneers gave us the opportunity to bring their ideas to life through our MAKE IN INDIA expertise.

Our journey, shaped by challenges and learning, has taught us patience, foresight, and empathy. Working in India, between the high expectations of clients and local realities, has positioned us as mediators between two design cultures. Each creation is born from a dialogue with artisans, blending expert craftsmanship and creativity. With experience, our ambition has grown: to build a lasting bridge between French and Indian craftsmanship, honoring both traditions to create timeless and boundary-defying objects.

Name: FROMM.
Description:
FROMM. is a luxury contemporary furniture and home accessories design brand with a global perspective. We collaborate with international designers to create collections that blend heritage innovation and contemporary aesthetics. 

Our mission is to provide an educational platform, FROMM.Lab, for both emerging and established designers to showcase their talent on the global design stage through our brand, FROMM. inspired by the rich heritage and architectural marvels of diverse countries.

The name “FROMM.” derives from the origin of the collections and the start of our journey as a brand and platform. FROMM. was founded in Msheireb, Qatar and Milan, Italy. The additional “M” in the name represents Msheireb and Milan, creating the ideal fusion of design and manufacturing.

At FROMM., we believe in the power of design to transcend borders and celebrate cultural exchange. 

FROMM. Design Without Borders.

Name: Rest Lords - massage chairs
Description:
Carefully selected products, professional assistance, years of experience (from 2009) and the most extensive expertise in Poland (and maybe even in the world). 

Our consultants are at your disposal. We look forward to seeing you.

We have been active in the Polish and European markets since 2009, specialising exclusively in massage chairs. As an authorised distributor, we proudly offer top-tier brands, including Japanese Fujiiryoki, Korean Bodyfriend, Spanish Keyton, our own Massaggio brand, and the globally renowned iRest.

Beyond retail sales through our website restlords.com and dedicated showrooms, we are developing business partnerships by creating corporate relaxation rooms and relaxation areas, for example, in airports. Every massage chair we offer is rigorously tested to ensure the highest quality and reliability. By carefully selecting our product range, we provide the latest innovations available on the global market. We stand by the exceptional quality of the massage experience and the superior craftsmanship of every model.

With our Carefree Delivery and 5-year B2C warranty, you can order and enjoy your chair with complete peace of mind. While our models are designed for near-faultless operation, we also provide a fast and professional mobile service whenever needed. Rooted in our values and supported by comprehensive service before and after purchase, we have sold thousands of units and received just as many glowing reviews.

And all this for the sake of your well-being! 

wellness | massage chairs | massage equipment | massage products | massage furniture | spa furniture | Massaggio | iRest | Bodyfriend | Fujiiryoki | Keyton

Name: Kannasu
Description:
Kannasu is a design-forward interiors and furnishings studio rooted in thoughtful making and layered storytelling. We work across custom furniture, textiles, rugs, wallpapers, and curated design objects - bringing together contemporary sensibilities, artisanal processes, and material intelligence.

Our strength lies in the space where design meets craft. From bespoke embroideries and tailored textiles to custom-built furniture and large-scale interior applications, each piece is developed with care, context, and longevity in mind. Alongside our custom work, we curate a considered selection of global and Indian design brands that align with our philosophy of quality and relevance.

We collaborate closely with architects, interior designers, hospitality groups, and private clients - adding value through design development, material exploration, and execution support. Whether it’s a residence, a hotel, or a space still taking shape in the imagination, Kannasu exists to translate ideas into grounded, lasting design experiences.

Kannasu means dream - everything we create is built to live beautifully in the real world.

Name: DEfy - Decor For You
Description:
Welcome to DEfy - Decor for You! 

Greetings! I'm Ayush, one of the co-founders of DEfy, a visionary venture born out of the passion for transforming living spaces into havens of style, comfort, and individual expression. Alongside my brother Meet, we embarked on this journey in 2022, driven by a shared commitment to redefine the home decor landscape.

About DEfy:
At DEfy, we're not just a home furnishing destination; we're curators of experiences, offering an extensive range of high-quality products. From manufacturing exquisite sofas and aesthetic chairs to providing curtains, blinds, headboards, bedding, imported wallpaper, mattresses, and more, DEfy is your one-stop solution for all things home decor. Our mission is to blend innovation, quality and inspired designs seamlessly.

Our Vision:
We believe in the transformative power of well-designed spaces. Our vision at DEfy is to create homes that reflect the unique personality and aspirations of each individual. We're dedicated to offering a seamless and delightful home furnishing experience that goes beyond expectations.

Why DEfy?
QUALITY EXCELLENCE: Every product, including our meticulously crafted sofas and aesthetic chairs, undergoes rigorous quality checks.
INSPIRED DESIGNS: Our collection combines the latest trends with timeless elegance.
CUSTOMER-CENTRIC APPROACH: Your satisfaction is our priority, and our team is here to assist you every step of the way.
INNOVATION: We embrace innovation to bring cutting-edge solutions to your home.

The DEfy Experience:
Step into our world of inspiration, where every piece tells a story. Join us on this exciting journey as we continue to redefine home furnishing with passion, creativity, and an unwavering commitment to making your home uniquely yours.

Let's connect! I'm eager to engage with fellow enthusiasts, industry professionals, and anyone passionate about transforming living spaces. Feel free to reach out, and let's explore the possibilities together!

Name: RealifyAR
Description:
RealifyAR empowers furniture retailers to showcase their products in stunning, true-to-scale augmented reality—directly in any web browser, no app downloads required. What We Do:

3D Modeling & Texturing: High-fidelity assets with two rounds of revisions

AR Deployment: Instant, white-label AR experiences via custom links & QR codes

Insights & Optimization: Real-time dashboard tracking views, “View in Room” activations, dwell times, and user interactions

End-to-End Support: Secure asset intake, platform maintenance, and a dedicated account manager

Why Choose RealifyAR:

Speed: Go live in days, not weeks or months

Simplicity: One submission form, one integrated workflow, zero technical hurdles

Results: Boost engagement, slash return rates, and gain actionable data to drive your catalog performance

Join the future of furniture retail—where every customer can “try before they buy,” right from their phone or desktop. Connect with us to learn how RealifyAR can elevate your e-commerce experience.
