Name: Ricci Casa
Description:
La storia di Ricci Casa inizia nel 1923, dal sogno di Fioravante Ricci, artigiano del legno di Ciano D’Enza (RE) che, da costruttore di ruote per carri, diviene mobiliere per vocazione.
 
È una storia di famiglia, che riunisce padri e figli in laboratorio a progettare e creare con passione dei mobili destinati alle case di tutti.
 
Negli anni Sessanta la famiglia Ricci passa dal laboratorio al primo vero grande negozio a Ciano d’Enza: la Supermostra del Mobile, la più grande esposizione di mobili di Reggio Emilia e provincia.
 
Il passaggio generazionale degli anni Ottanta innesca l’evoluzione del marchio: la cura artigianale imparata in laboratorio diventa alto standard qualitativo nella selezione dei prodotti della nuova realtà Ricci Casa.
 
Il catalogo Ricci Casa si distingue subito per l’ampia varietà di design e soluzioni personalizzabili e per il vantaggioso rapporto qualità-prezzo. La formula è innovativa, vicina ai desideri delle persone e conduce a un rapido sviluppo: dal 1991 al 2013, Ricci Casa apre a Bologna, Fombio, Modena e Milano.
 
Un secolo e quattro generazioni dopo Fioravante Ricci, l’azienda resta fedele alle proprie radici e aspirazioni, riassunte in un cognome: offrire proposte d’arredo con un forte accento sulla libertà di progettazione e sviluppate con soluzioni originali.
 
Ricci Casa arreda ogni anno oltre 50.000 case con proposte d’arredo che declinano tutte le esigenze e tutti i gusti… ma sempre progettate con cura, una a una.

Name: Rooms For All
Description:
Rooms For All began as a concept after Tony (Director) had spent many years selling furniture for big faceless chains: he wanted to start a shop with a more honest, personal, customer friendly feel to it where customer service for local people played a key part, and where he could champion quality British and Yorkshire furniture makers. Starting out on Ousegate, Selby in 2002, then moving to Micklegate after 8 years.

Over the years the range of products that Rooms For All offer has expanded so that we now sell beds and mattresses, bedroom furniture, large semi fitted wardrobes, pine and oak occasional furniture, sofas, lamps, giftware cushions and pictures, as well as having carpets and rugs available - our Selby shop has a whole department devoted to this. A real effort is made to source as much as we can from Yorkshire, so for example many of our mattresses and sofas are made locally, and can be altered to your specifications. Many other items are made in Britain.

Rooms For All has continued to grow steadily, and I now have 6 other staff working alongside Tony, all of whom are very knowledgeable about furniture. 

We believe in doing our best by customers. We never double the price of things so that we can have a half price sale the next month! We don’t send people substandard goods in the hope we can get away with it, (a particular problem with online shopping). If we ever encounter a problem with our suppliers, such as a delay, we call the customer to keep them fully informed. When we deliver, we arrange that around the customer, and give a time for that delivery. If we are running late, we tell you. We always endeavour to put the customer first. 

This sort of ethos runs through all we do. And don't forget our offer of free local delivery - we really are doing our best to provide the sort of service to our customers that we would like if we were the customer.

Name: Manglam Handicrafts
Description:
Welcome to Manglam Handicrafts, where tradition meets innovation, and every piece tells a story of craftsmanship. Nestled in the heart of Aligarh, the brass city of India, our journey began with a vision to redefine the art of handicrafts.

Our extensive range showcases the essence of pure brass, meticulously crafted by skilled artisans. From intricately designed god idols that resonate with spiritual energy to exquisite home decor items that redefine elegance, each creation is a testament to our commitment to quality and tradition.

At Manglam Handicrafts, we take pride in being more than just a brand; we're custodians of heritage. Our products are born from a fusion of ancient craftsmanship and contemporary design, ensuring a seamless blend of tradition and modernity. Explore our collection, and you'll find not just artifacts but stories waiting to be told.

From the ethereal glow of brass diyas illuminating your festive moments to the timeless elegance of our god idols gracing your sacred spaces, our creations transcend mere objects. They become a part of your narrative, enriching your surroundings with a touch of cultural finesse.

We believe in accessible luxury, making our pieces not just exquisite but affordable. From brass idols to kitchenware, wall decor to curios, every creation is a celebration of Indian artistry, offering a piece of Aligarh's rich heritage to adorn your home.

Steeped in the legacy of our city, we are proud to be a part of the brass city's tradition, where every piece is more than a product – it's a work of art. Our journey from local markets to leading online platforms like Amazon and Flipkart signifies our commitment to sharing the beauty of brass with the world.

As an environmentally conscious brand, we prioritize sustainable practices, ensuring that our creations not only adorn your spaces but also contribute to a greener planet. Each product is a step towards responsible craftsmanship, a harmonious blend of aesthetics and ethics.

Description:
Nel 1947 a Lonate Pozzolo Mario Moro fonda Moro Arredamenti come produzione artigianale di mobili, casse d'imballaggio, serramenti e carpenteria. Oggi Moro Arredamenti S.r.l., alla sua terza generazione, rappresenta una solida realtà nel campo dell'arredamento e del design. 

Ci ispiriamo a una cultura aziendale basata su valori essenziali quali la qualità di tutti i prodotti offerti, la creatività e la funzionalità delle soluzioni progettuali; il servizio scrupoloso e accurato dal momento dell'imbastitura dell'idea a quello della sua concretizzazione. Questi valori sono i punti di forza dei nostri showroom: lo store Malpensa a Lonate Pozzolo (VA) e i negozi monomarca Veneta Cucine di Gallarate (VA), Tradate (VA) e Castelletto Sopra Ticino (VA). Il nostro e-shop DTime (dtimeshop.com) offre un'attenta e sempre aggiornata selezione di complementi di arredo e mobili di design con consegna in tutta Italia e nei principali Paesi europei.

Crediamo fermamente nella nostra attività e amiamo il nostro lavoro: questo ci consente non soltanto di essere competenti e professionali ma, soprattutto, di applicarci sempre con passione e dedizione. 
I nostri partner sono i fornitori che condividono con noi la filosofia aziendale, che scelgono innanzitutto la qualità, che apprezzano il design, le nuove idee e le innovazioni e che attuano una conduzione aziendale seria e professionale.

Description:

Our Vision:

Accessibility to All:
To us, accessibility means more than just offer an affordable and reasonable price that align with global pricing. It means creating a seamless and enjoyable experience for our customers. We are dedicated to providing a wide range of products, catering to various tastes and budgets. Whether you're an interior design enthusiast, a homeowner looking to revamp your living space, or professional looking to create ideal office, workspace, hospitality, or public spaces.

Our Partners:
While our primary focus is to offer authentic Scandinavian design products, we understand that good design transcends borders and cultures. Our current partners included, Hay, Fritz Hansen, Vitra, Artek, Gubi, &Tradition, Verpan, Tacchini, Nani Marquina, and more.

Our Stores:
1. NORSE Store offers curated lifestyle products, including furniture, home decorations, and accessories from our exclusive brand partners.
2. House of Fritz Hansen  is a unique mono-branded concept store featuring Danish furniture by Fritz Hansen in the charming modern Thai house from 1960s.

B2B Partners:
We have been trusted by industry leaders to serve various type of commercial projects in Thailand whether it's offices, restaurants, hotels, and more.

Join Us on Our Journey:
We invite you to join us on this exciting journey. Explore our collection, be inspired by the beauty of our curated design, and create spaces that reflect your individuality. Together, we can transform the way we live, work, and play, one exceptional design at a time.

Name: Lemieux et Cie
Description:
LEMIEUX ET CIE launched in 2020 by designer and home furnishings entrepreneur Christiane Lemieux with a focus on the creative design process, partnering with master artisans and producers around the globe, and letting the creative process happen. What if together we made something beautiful that was meant to last?

Rooted in a studied appreciation of iconic European ateliers of the likes of Jean Arp, Constantin Brancusi and Alberto Giacometti, LEMIEUX ET CIE is a celebration of the creative process and the global community of artisans that make each piece possible. Whether in the evidence of the hand or the imperfection of materials, we believe that how something is made is just as important as the end product—and we only partner with artisans who believe the same. Weavers in Nepal. Glassblowers in Eastern Europe. Carvers in Vietnam. Furniture makers in North Carolina. Each piece we design is made in small batches by human hands with a legacy for craftsmanship.

For her first collection, Lemieux drew inspiration from her personal archives, a design library she has been compiling in her New York City loft for over two decades. A deep dive into the world of heirloom materials—burled oak, undyed Moroccan wools, solid travertines—these pieces are a retrospective on timeless design in both form and tactility.

As we enter the decade of home, we are creating pieces that turn your space into your favorite place to work / rest / eat / learn / teach / play … Lemieux Et Cie is here to help make your home your most inspiring space.

Name: FROM LIGHTING
Description:
We design the new gestures of our time.
With the spirit of the contemporary European generation, we produce iconic luminaires made in Italy.

ORIGINS
The word FROM speaks about the origins of our doing. With the spirit of the contemporary European generation, we produce in Italy where design is tradition.

ICONIC
As a product driven company we aim at creating what is fresh and long lasting. We reduce innovative ideas to their essence. Our luminaires have simple shapes, precise details and the character of an icon.

GESTURES
We balance the contrast between illumination technology and the nature of light as our lamps call for human interaction to shape different lighting atmospheres. We design new gestures of our time.

FOOTPRINT
We take care of the footprint we leave with our products, both on culture and nature. You will observe this care when experiencing our products: eco-friendly packaging, careful selection of all the components and products that are so well constructed that you keep them for a long time. If one day anything might break, we will fix it.

Name: OUR HOME (Casamia Furniture Center, Inc)
Description:
From the day we first opened our doors in 1997, our philosophy has been simple – help our customers create that perfect dream home, the home they’ve always wanted. And we take great pride and pleasure in that philosophy.

We make sure that our wide array of modern+contemporary furniture, home decor, and accessories is carefully curated to excite our customers and awaken their creativity. The great designs you find in our stores all have the potential to bring your vision to life.

We believe that a customer’s budget should not, and must not, be a hindrance towards the fulfilment of their dream. That’s why all our furniture and furnishings come at great prices, so that our customers get best value for money. Customers can look forward to special sale events where selected items are marked down. Flexible payment terms, such as 0% interest on selected credit cards, are also made regularly available.

When we say we value our customers, it’s not just lip service. We do our best to make sure that shopping at Our Home is a happy and fulfilling experience for every person that walks through our doors.

Our trained, passionate, and enthusiastic staff members are willing, able, and eager to help our customers go through their wonderful journey of home improvement.

We are invested in our customers and continue to think of ways to improve the shopping experience. We’ve made things easier and more convenient by offering online shopping, contactless shopping, and a personal shopper service. What’s more, our interior design team is always available to answer questions and give design advice, no purchase necessary.

Nothing makes us happier than to learn a new customer’s name and see them come back and become a regular. It’s all about relationships. And we’d love to have one with you.

Great Designs. Great Prices. And Great Service. Only at Our Home.

Name: Portobello
Description:
Créé en 1998, Portobello vous invite à découvrir un univers subtil, audacieux et éclairé où les collections de mobiliers, luminaires, textiles haut de gamme et linge de maison côtoient les créations de Rebecca Felcey, la fondatrice des lieux.


Sélectionneur de beaux designs et dénicheur de talents :

Une sélection éclectique et singulière de marques de design iconiques, ainsi que de jeunes maisons d'éditions ou d’artisans, constitue l'un des points essentiels de l’ADN de Portobello.


Textiles d'ameublement et rideaux sur mesure :

Spécialiste dès l'origine de lignes de textiles d'ameublement et de rideaux sur mesure contemporains, Portobello développe le goût des beaux tissus, accorde une importance particulière aux détails et aux finitions couture, et présente un large choix de grands noms du monde des éditeurs de textiles d'ameublement.


Les Éditions Portobello :

L'affinité pour le dessin et les belles matières nourrissent le travail de Rebecca Felcey. Elle signe des canapés généreux au confort enveloppant, réalisés en France selon les critères tapissiers. Des pièces fortes et sculpturales telles que les bibliothèques, tables à manger et tables basses sont exécutées dans des matériaux nobles comme le bois massif, la pierre ou le terrazzo. Chaque meuble fait appel à un travail artisanal et est réalisé en France et en Europe.


Créateur d’intérieurs inspirés :

Notre bureau d’études, sous la houlette de Rebecca Felcey, vous accompagne dans vos projets de décoration intérieure.

Name: BedMart Mattress Superstores
Description:
BedMart is a family-owned and family-operated mattress and furniture retailer serving Portland Metro, Central Oregon, and Hawaii. 

Since 1992, BedMart has been committed to transforming the way people mattress shop by providing an innovative personal shopping experience that is focused on the individual’s unique needs and circumstances. Our exclusive SmartMatch diagnostic technology helps identify the ideal sleep products that customers need to obtain optimal sleep. Professionally-trained sleep experts are available to guide customers through the shopping process and provide options to help make mattress shopping easier. 

BedMart offers a variety of products that allow every person who shops there an option for their body and budget.  Each BedMart store carries a wide selection of mattresses including innerspring, memory foam, hybrid and more. They also have bed protectors, pillows, furniture and other mattress accessories available for purchase. 

As the company has grown and expanded, one thing as always remained the same, their goal – to transform the lives of their customers one night at a time.

Rise also offer Government and Non Profit partner discounts to help better serve social causes: Reach out to mike@risedesk.io for more information.

Rise is headquartered in Toronto, Canada, with a local focus in North America. All products are designed and manufactured in Canada and Asia.

Name: Mastello - Sanitair Boutique
Description:
De badkamer als verlengstuk van het interieur: Mastello is een Nederlands sanitairmerk waar stijl en eigenheid centraal staan. We creëren badkamers die volledig aansluiten op jouw woonwensen. Met een scherp oog voor design en interieurtrends ontwikkelen we vernieuwende producten en eigenzinnige collecties.

Bij Mastello geloven we dat de badkamer niet slechts een functionele ruimte is, maar een essentieel onderdeel van de woonbeleving, dat evenveel aandacht verdient als elke andere leefruimte. Onze maatwerk opties zorgen ervoor dat iedere badkamer uniek is. Van stijlvolle designs tot gedurfde statements – met Mastello wordt elk detail een bewuste keuze.

Werken bij Mastello
Mastello is opgericht door twee broers, Mark en Dennis, met een passie voor design, innovatie en vakmanschap. Bij Mastello werk je in een professioneel, groeiend en dynamisch bedrijf dat zich volledig richt op high-end design badkamers. Met een team van ruim 20 collega’s werken we dagelijks aan het adviseren en realiseren van unieke badkameroplossingen. Dit doen we met onze eigen hoogwaardige producten, waarmee we niet alleen consumenten, maar ook architecten en projectontwikkelaars weten te verrassen.

In onze Sanitair Boutique in Hilversum ontvangen we klanten en partners en laten we hen de volledige Mastello-beleving ervaren: stijlvol, exclusief en altijd met oog voor detail. Wat Mastello bijzonder maakt is een ambitieus team met korte lijnen en vrijheid voor ideeën en ontwikkeling. Iedereen krijgt hier de kans om verantwoordelijkheid te nemen, mee te groeien met de ontwikkeling van het merk en direct impact te maken. We werken hard, maar vieren onze successen ook samen: van gezamenlijke lunches tot vrijdagmiddagborrels en kwartaaluitjes. Zo combineren we professionaliteit met een informele en creatieve sfeer waarin iedereen zich thuis voelt.

Name: ExteriorConcept
Description:
ExteriorConcept nace con la idea de distribuir muebles para el exterior con las nuevas tendencias y de la mas alta calidad los cuales no existen en el mercado mexicano.

Por ello creamos alianzas comerciales con empresas de renombre internacional con el fin de poder ofrecer muebles creados especialmente para el exterior , los cuales satisfagan la necesidad y gustos de nuestros clientes.

Con el apoyo y experiencia tomada por Exteriores, fundada en 1994 en la Ciudad de Cuernavaca, Morelos. La cual empezó con la idea de una tienda de venta de muebles de jardín, ofreciendo productos que no existían en ese momento. Se comenzó con la fabricación así como la importación de muebles que sirvieran para la intemperie y el clima de la ciudad. Hoy en día somos una empresa la cual es importadora directa de más de 7 compañías internacionales de renombre.

MISIÓN

Somos una empresa comprometida con nuestros clientes ofreciéndoles la mejor calidad y servicio para exterior

VISIÓN

Ser la empresa líder en la comercialización de muebles y servicios para exterior, con presencia a nivel nacional cumpliendo con los más altos niveles de calidad y satisfacción de nuestros clientes.

Name: CuddleCo
Description:
With over 30 years combined experience here at CuddleCo, we are rapidly on our way to becoming the nations go to for your little ones nursery.

From small beginnings and big dreams, CuddleCo’s journey began with the award winning Comfi-Cush Stroller Liner. We wanted to put comfort on par with convenience and create something to keep our little ones comfy all day long. After all, happy babies = happy parents!

So, we used our experience in textiles and materials to create a stroller liner with a difference. Using super supportive memory foam, the Comfi-Cush was born, offering unrivalled impact cushioning along with amazing anatomical benefits. Soon our Comfi-Cush was winning awards, and as our knowledge and expertise grew, so did our product offering.

Since then we have taken that knowledge and expertise and expanded into Mattresses and Furniture, picking up new awards along the way. 

We are proud to deliver safe, affordable and stylish essentials that are made to last.

We understand that every parent wants the best for their baby and so all of our products are designed and thoroughly tested here in the UK.

We also understand the pressures on modern parents so we make useful, multi-functional, long lasting products that will grow with your baby, for before and after birth, to ensure that our solutions truly are for baby and beyond.

Parents still want to look and feel good and basics don’t have to be boring, so we select the best materials, in a range of stylish prints and designs, to create beautiful products that look great both in your Nursery and for around town.

You can currently find CuddleCo products online and in-store all over the UK and Ireland, with more products and markets being added to our portfolio each and every year, it's clear we're onto a winner here.

Last but not least, we want say thank you for choosing CuddleCo to help with the wonderful journey you've started as a parent and we're here to help every step of the way.

Name: Cosmo Group
Description:
Over 30 years of experience in high-end home renovation and thousands of customers all over the world.
Our deep-rooted presence in Italian market and long-standing relationships with manufactures led us to gain an extended portfolio across private, commercial and hospitality projects.
Thanks to a wide central warehouse and solid local partnerships, we can guarantee the best and fastest service for our clients.
24/7 Customer support and  on site supervision.
Instagram accounts: @cosmoceramiche @clabceramiche @universoceramiche

Name: IF HUB
Description: IF HUB was born as a vibrant space where designers and architects thrive. Surrounded by a community of passionate creatives, it's a place that fuels imagination, sparks collaboration, and turns bold ideas into reality.  Inspired by a passion for exceptional design and a deep appreciation for European craftsmanship, IF HUB was founded to bring the world’s finest interior brands and products to the heart of the UAE. Our portfolio features iconic and emerging European brands selected for their originality, and forward-thinking design. From artisanal furniture, kitchens, sanitary, wardrobes to bespoke lighting, wall finishes and advanced smart systems, every item reflects a story of heritage and innovation. IF HUB is a creative ecosystem; a space where inspiration meets functionality, and design journeys are fully supported.

Name: Plufl
Description:
Plufl was founded by Noah Silverman and Yuki Kinoshita during their final year of college, when the classmates (and best friends) were craving a nap after a long, exhausting day. 

Walking home, the two spotted a Great Dane napping blissfully in the biggest dog bed they had ever seen. 

And that’s when the founders had their lightbulb moment.

Dog beds … but for humans!! 

From there, the two put everything aside to bring their idea to life and create the most comfortable product the world had ever seen.

Plufl is the world’s first dog bed for humans and is the closest thing you’ll ever experience to laying on a cloud. 

Once you get in the Plufl, you might never want to leave … so don’t say we didn’t warn you.

Name: Process Home
Description: Interiors | Lifestyle | Design

Name: Furnicher

We are an Amsterdam-based furniture brand, with a focus on fresh design, quality and sustainability.

Our indoor and outdoor furniture is timeless, crafted using the finest quality materials, and built to last. We strive to empower interior spaces, whether in homes or businesses, to achieve their utmost potential, providing comfort precisely when it is needed.

What makes us stand out from our competitors:

  - Passionate about interior design and furniture
  - Free shipping on all Orders
  - 80% of orders dispatched on the same day

  - Environmentally conscious approach

Together, taking care of the business:
Your choice of furniture can make the difference between an average business and an exceptional one.

Nous faire confiance, c’est vous assurer la réussite de votre projet

Cédric Storme

Name: KASSANE
Description: KASSANE est une entreprise sénégalaise qui propose des mobiliers fabriqués localement avec d’excellentes finitions aux entreprises et particuliers en étant l’intermédiaire entre l’offre et la demande grâce à un modèle de structuration qui offre qualité et conformité aux clients puis montée en compétences et marchés aux artisans menuisiers sénégalais

Name: tamminh
Stagecraft Display Ltd
Description:
Stagecraft has been at the forefront of the design, manufacture and installation of retail display systems for over 30 years. Based in rural Mid Wales, the company began life working with garden centres and later developed into the much wider retail sector, working with a variety of businesses, from large retail chains, including Waitrose, Laura Ashley and John Lewis, to small independent retailers throughout the UK.

As the business has grown so too has its experience, skills and capacity. The company now additionally offer their expert manufacturing services for timber frame panel production for housing, as well as CNC cutting services to a variety of business sectors and private individuals, catering for both large and small scale runs. 

We operate from a 32,000 sq ft modern factory facility, equipped with a CNC machine and edge bander, with dedicated joinery and spray painting areas on site. 

The company portfolio includes a wide variety of interior and exterior timber based retail systems, ranging from exterior benching and shade structures for Garden Centres, to interior displays and shop fit, Stagecraft can help you transform any retail area.

Name: FINEZ
Description: FINEZ is Sri Lanka's most awarded furniture and interior decor brand providing an elaborate collection of contemporary furniture and homeware products with showrooms in Colombo, 5, Pepiliyana and Athurugiriya along with fully-fledged production factories.

Name: CELLINI DESIGN CENTER
Description: Cellini is a home-grown designer furniture brand that designs and curates inspiration for all modern homes. Founded in Singapore in 1986, we have always been passionate about art, connecting people to the creative works of our skilled artisans and local designers. Designed and produced by our team, Cellini brings you quality craftsmanship, exclusive designs, and timeless furniture pieces – all powered and manufactured by new technology and top-quality materials. Providing a seamless shopping experience both in-store and online, our furniture brand unites the beauty of old traditions with innovation, bringing the visionary concepts of our creators to life.

Name: MIO Culture
Description: We design and make acoustic solutions, room dividers, decor and furniture that tell your story. Sustainable by design and B Corp. Certified.

Name: Decorators.ro
Description: Cu o echipă de oameni creativi și pasionați, oferim servicii și produse care depășesc așteptările, transformând fiecare proiect într-o experiență memorabilă.

Name: Luxl Living
Description:
At LuxL, furniture isn’t made, it’s orchestrated. Every piece reflects discerning taste, blending lasting design with effortless comfort.

Visit our Experience Center in Bengaluru, where fine materials, curated selections, and tailored design come together. It’s more than a showroom; it’s where craftsmanship becomes lifestyle.

 HSR Layout, Bengaluru
 +91 9000 869 859

Name: The Pillow Company
Description:
The Pillow Company is a distinguished luxury home décor brand, celebrated for its unique aesthetic, innovative designs, and unparalleled quality. We offer a curated selection of exquisite bed linens, decorative cushions, sophisticated dining accessories, and refined home decor, embodying timeless elegance and sophistication.

For over 8 years, The Pillow Company has redefined luxury in the home furnishings industry. Our collections blend contemporary chic with traditional craftsmanship, using only the finest materials to create pieces that are both stylish and enduring.

Experience the epitome of luxury living with The Pillow Company—where exceptional quality, impeccable design, and timeless elegance come together to transform your home into a sanctuary of sophistication and style.

Name: OMHU
Description:
At OMHU, we design furniture with a focus on comfort, functionality, and timeless aesthetics.
We are a Danish design brand, and our signature piece, the TEDDY sofa, is created to adapt to modern living. With its modular design, it functions both as a sofa and a bed, combining flexibility, quality craftsmanship, and considered details. Everything we create is made with care — from material selection to the smallest finish.

Name: Nuovarredo
Description: 25 anni di storia, 28 negozi, 2 outlet, quasi 300 collaboratori, migliaia di clienti soddisfatti: sono questi i numeri di Nuovarredo, il marchio di mobilifici che ha sviluppato una rete capillare in tutta la Puglia, Basilicata, Toscana, Lazio e Lombardia e punta ad aumentare la sua presenza su tutto il territorio nazionale. Nuovarredo nasce nel 1997 a Francavilla Fontana, da un’idea di Antonio Magrì: una catena di negozi di arredamento costruiti intorno alle esigenze del cliente, che si possa distinguere sul mercato grazie alla qualità, alla convenienza, all’esclusività degli arredi offerti per portare nelle case degli italiani il meglio del design e dello stile. Nuovarredo propone il giusto connubio tra i vantaggi di una grande realtà distributiva e quelli tipici del negozio specializzato indipendente. “Acquistare i mobili per la propria casa è una scelta importante e non viene mai fatta con leggerezza”, ci spiega A. Magrì, attuale Presidente del CDA, “il cliente vuole essere coccolato, non deve vivere questo momento come qualcosa d’impegnativo”.

Name: Bespoke Home
Description:
Sofabulous is a home-made, home-grown, tailor-made brand created in the city of Dubai for the people of Dubai.

We make fabulous soft furnishing, offering customized sofas, joinery pieces, rugs, curtains, outdoor furniture and wallcoverings.

Name: House of Abndnce
Description:
House of Abndnce is a design led lifestyle brand built at the intersection of design, craft, and technology, with furniture as our starting point.

We create expressive, craft driven pieces inspired by maximalism, colour, intimacy, and a sense of fun. Our ambition extends beyond furniture. We see design as a way of living, shaping objects and experiences that feel layered, generous, and deeply personal.

We use technology thoughtfully to elevate how design is discovered and experienced. From a highly interactive, high fidelity digital presence to a more considered end to end customer journey, we believe craft and innovation should evolve together.

Founded in Dubai and proudly homegrown, House of Abndnce is global in outlook from day one. Shaped by diverse influences and international collaborators, we believe thoughtful design travels well. We are currently in our founding phase and working towards our first launch in 2026.

Our culture is curious, hands on, and collaborative. We value taste and rigor equally, move with intention rather than urgency, and care deeply about how things are made. We are building House of Abndnce with ambition and care, alongside people and partners who want to shape something meaningful and grow it beyond borders.

Name: Unearth
Description:
We help people get rid of their old furniture, appliances, and other household goods through our consignment service. These items are sold at great value deals to improve the homes of everyone who's ever thought - I want that sofa, but it's just too expensive.

Always looking for helping hands - shoot us a message if you think you'd wanna join!

Name: Home Center
Description:
Home Center Wolvega is één van de grootste woonbelevingswinkels van Nederland en onderdeel van het familiebedrijf Kapenga Wonen. Met ruim 75.000 m² wooninspiratie en meer dan 200 merken, werken ruim 300 collega’s dagelijks samen om onze klanten te helpen aan een mooi(er) thuis.

Onze kernwaarden zijn: klantgericht, duurzaam en het zijn van een écht familiebedrijf. Je treft bij ons een informele cultuur, grote betrokkenheid vanuit directie (van oprichter tot de kleinkinderen) en dynamiek. 

Binnen Home Center vind je verschillende teams en functies: van verkoop & interieuradvies tot logistiek, administratie, HR, marketing en service. Elke afdeling draagt bij aan de woonbeleving die Home Center uniek maakt.

Name: House of Icons
Description:
House of Icons is an inspiring showroom that presents the iconic collections of globally recognized, distinguished design brands.

 House of Icons (Hi) is a reference point in the luxury furniture world for individuals with refined taste, as well as for architects and project developers. Located at the heart of Skyland HOM, Hi is not just a store but also a center for lifestyle and inspiration. It operates with the promise of offering an “iconic experience” at every touchpoint. It offers not only products, but also inspiration, prestige, and a holistic living experience. You can feel sophistication in every detail and timeless design in every collection.

Name: Marylebone Design Collectif
Description:
Marylebone Design Collectif is an interior design company with showroom launching in the West End in 2024. With 15 years of industry expertise, Marylebone Design Collectif brings together artistry and functionality to create stunning, value-enriched spaces. The company is made up of a passionate team of designers who work collaboratively to bring their clients' visions to life.

The launch of their Digital Storefront & Flagship Marylebone Showroom is set for 2024.

For more information, partnerships, or investment opportunities, please email Michelle@marylebonedesigncollectif.com

Name: Feydom
Description:
Where Adorable meets Modular, Versatile, Comfortable, Durable, Sustainable...
and if we are still talking about a sofa, then we are talking about FEYDOM.

Name: FurnitureDealer.Net
Description:
FurnitureDealer.Net helps independent indoor and outdoor furniture retailers turn online shoppers into in store customers.

Today, more than 80% of furniture shoppers start their journey online. They research brands, compare products, and decide where to shop long before they ever walk into a showroom. We help local retailers show up where those decisions are happening and turn that online interest into real foot traffic.

Since 1996, we have designed and managed high quality websites built specifically for the furniture industry. Our sites feature rich, accurate product content that improves local search visibility, answers shopper questions, and builds confidence before a customer ever visits the store.

Our work goes beyond website design. We focus on generating qualified online leads and helping retailers convert those leads into in store visits. With dedicated account managers, ongoing optimization, and technology developed for the furniture industry, we solve real problems retailers face every day. Getting found locally. Standing out against big box and online competitors. And bringing more informed, ready to buy shoppers into the showroom.

What sets us apart is our deep connection to the furniture industry. Through long standing relationships with manufacturers and industry organizations, we deliver better product content and a stronger online presence for local retailers.

At our core, we are service driven and committed to helping local furniture stores grow online and in store.

Name: Moltow
Description:
Moltow propose des solutions d'aménagement pilotées de A à Z afin d'optimiser vos revenus locatifs. 

Nous meublons, décorons et équipons tous les types d'investissements locatifs meublés afin d'augmenter l'attractivité de vos biens.

Name: Zorora Sofas
Description:
Zorora is a proudly South African sofa brand based in the heart of Cape Town, South Africa.

Each sofa is made-to-order using high quality materials, offering our customers a great quality sofa at a surprisingly affordable price. 

We care about people, our customers & staff. No toxic chemicals are used in the production of our sofas, to ensure everyone's safety. We work consciously to improve and find innovative ways to reduce waste.

Zorora means rest in Shona, a sentiment we carry through to our retail spaces. We welcome & encourage our customers to rest & relax at any of our showrooms. Zorora Homes offer a place; to sit & talk, to work, to play and a place to be seen.

Name: MIA Interiors Beyond Space
Description:
A shopfitting company offering global delivery of furniture tailored to your brand!  

Our primary markets encompass France and Germany, but in fact we will go wherever you need us.  

We care about modern, quality and sustainable solutions that are perfectly suited to the character of your store.  



Entreprise d’agencement de magasins offrant nos meubles sur mesure à votre marque !  

La France et l’Allemagne sont nos principaux marchés, mais nous serons là où vous le souhaitez. 

Nous proposons des solutions modernes, qualitatives et durables ainsi qu’un mobilier parfaitement adapté au caractère de votre magasin.  



Ein Ladenbauunternehmen, das weltweit Möbel liefert, die auf Ihre Marke zugeschnitten sind!  

Unsere Hauptmärkte sind Frankreich und Deutschland, aber wir kommen überall hin, wo Sie uns brauchen. 

Wir legen Wert auf moderne, hochwertige und nachhaltige Lösungen, die perfekt zum Charakter Ihres Geschäfts passen.

Name: MisterDesign
Description:
MisterDesign is dé designretailer van Nederland. Ontdek een zorgvuldig geselecteerd aanbod van karaktervolle klassiekers en nieuwe iconen in zowel de winkels als webshop. Het aanbod bestaat uit designmeubelen, -verlichting en woonaccessoires van merken als Vitra, de Sede, Flos, Carl Hansen, Knoll, Ethnicraft, Flexform, MDF Italia, Occhio, HAY, Artifort, Moooi en Muuto. 

Bezoek de karakteristieke winkels in ’s-Hertogenbosch voor meer dan 2800m2 aan inspiratie. Hier komen unieke designstukken samen die bijzondere en altijd persoonlijke interieurs vormen. Loop binnen of maak een afspraak met een van de ervaren interieurspecialisten. Zij staan 7 dagen per week klaar om hun passie voor design met je te delen en je te adviseren met een op maat gemaakt interieurplan. 

Daarnaast is MisterDesign ook actief in de zakelijke markt en heeft een ruime ervaring in het ontwikkelen van interieurconcepten voor de zakelijke- en hospitality branche. Van het leveren van designmeubelen en -verlichting, tot een complete projectinrichting inclusief wandbekleding, raamdecoratie en afstyling. Met onze adviseurs bent u verzekerd van een professioneel team met een vast contactpersoon.

Name: Veneta Cucine a Bologna
Description:
Un negozio Veneta Cucine è uno spazio polifunzionale: non solo showroom, ma anche centro di progettazione in grado di risolvere eventuali criticità legate a spazi o progetti particolarmente complessi o insoliti.
Veneta Cucine offre la possibilità di vedere e toccare con mano ambienti cucina progettati secondo le più importanti novità del settore. Inoltre, è possibile trovare esperti consulenti d’arredo in grado di proporre soluzioni arredative personalizzate per rispondere alle più ampie necessità ed esigenze.

Name: FortyTwo
Description: FortyTwo (previously BEDS.sg) first went "live" in September 2007 with a humble team of 3 and barely 50 products. Our team now consists of 85 employees and our product range has now expanded to include over 20,000 items under an ever-broadening range of furniture, home decor and lifestyle items. After almost a decade and over 200,000 satisfied customers later, we're now the biggest home furnishing eCommerce website in Singapore with the highest traffic* of more than 230,000 visitors a month.

Name: Naterial Uruguay

Name: CASA COSTA
Description: Nossa missão é criar um ELO entre as pessoas através do carinho e cuidado ao receber, decorar e presentear.

Name: AbhicaryaLane
Description:
AbhicaryaLane – Home Utility & Furnishings Industry

AbhicaryaLane is a leading e-commerce company dedicated to making high-quality home utility and furnishing products accessible to everyone. At www.abhicaryalane.com
, we offer thousands of varieties of functional, stylish, and affordable home essentials across India. Our products combine practicality with aesthetic appeal, designed to enhance everyday living.

Our design and manufacturing team collaborates with over 150 skilled artisans and designers across India, assisting them from ideation to the final product. Each item is crafted with precision, ensuring durability, functionality, and style.

Our Culture
At AbhicaryaLane, we are a self-driven, motivated, and non-hierarchical team. We believe in ownership, meritocracy, and empowering our employees with the right tools and opportunities. Work at Abhicarya is challenging yet rewarding—we encourage innovation, creativity, and result-driven contributions.

If you are passionate about home utility and furnishings, and want to be part of a workplace that values quality, design, and excellence, AbhicaryaLane is the perfect place for you.

Name: Desenhabitado
Description:
Desenhabitado is an Architecture and Interior Design studio that develops and implements projects that bring life to new spaces. For us, it is essential to establish a coherent relationship between the design and the lifestyle of our customers. We offer personalized decoration advice creating unique and extraordinary spaces . 

Based out of Rua das Amoreiras 70 B, Lisboa, Portugal.

Name: Divani&Divani by Natuzzi
Description:
Divani&Divani by Natuzzi, creata nel 1990 dal Gruppo Natuzzi, è la prima catena italiana di negozi in Franchising specializzata in divani, poltrone e complementi d’arredo. 
Oggi le nuove collezioni si contraddistinguono per la loro essenza Made in Italy, la grande innovazione, la straordinaria funzionalità e un comfort senza paragoni. Qualità autentica, impegni sul fronte della ricerca, della responsabilità sociale e della sostenibilità ambientale i valori che Divani&Divani by Natuzzi condivide con il Gruppo Natuzzi. 
Anche nel 2022 Divani&Divani by Natuzzi è risultato il miglior marchio italiano nel settore arredamento per il servizio (Istituto Tedesco Qualità e Finanza).

Name: FLW Handels GesmbH
Description:
Discover ergonomic office furniture, furnishings for public institutions, hospitals or nursing homes and let yourself be inspired. As a specialist dealer with more than 150 different brands, we guarantee you objective advice and individual support. 

We are happy to take over your room planning and support you in the selection and coordination of the furniture that is right for you.

Name: Urbanloft
Description:
URBANLOFT specializes in contemporary designer furniture, lighting and accessories which offered at the highest quality from across the globe at affordable price.

URBANLOFT has the largest collection and finest reproduction of all mid-century modern classics series from Arne Jacobsen to Roberto Dordoni of their elegant living, lounging, dining, lighting and office furniture. All are developed and manufactured to the original design specifications at an exceptional quality with their supervision. Each finished piece is meticulously inspected and packaged to ensure delivery of only perfection, duplicating the original designs of the Bauhaus / Modernist Classic Era.

Reassured in the knowledge that manufacturers' production processes, source materials and quality craftsmanship meet only the highest standards of excellence, URBANLOFT consistently delivers expertly designed and finely crafted furniture to customers on time.

It doesn't stop there. URBANLOFT is constantly sourcing new and exciting contemporary collections to meet their discerning customers' needs and expectations.

Supplying both home and contract markets, URBANLOFT’s clients range from private individuals to dealers, architects and designers to interior design companies. Our project ranges from single piece through complete packages for homes, offices, restaurants and bars, hotels and corporate offices.

A commitment to customer care, satisfaction and excellent service is fundamental to URBANLOFT’s success consequently make URBANLOFT’s your best source for high style contemporary furniture.

Name: HomeFitt
Description: We understand the importance of finding the right balance between high-quality and affordability. That's why we are dedicated to providing a curated selection of bathroom accessories that meet this standard. Our quest is to offer products that not only enhance the aesthetic of your space but also stand the test of time. We believe that everyone should have access to beautiful, functional bathroom accessories without breaking the bank. Join us in finding the right balance for your bathroom.

Name: KITEA GHANA
Description: Furniture and home decor retail Store

Name: IKEA for Business Nederland
Description:
Welkom op de officiële LinkedIn-pagina van IKEA for Business Nederland.

Of je nu een start-up runt of een gevestigde onderneming hebt, bij IKEA for Business geloven we dat elke werkruimte slimmer, duurzamer en menselijker kan. Op deze pagina nemen we je mee in de wereld van werk zoals wij die zien: praktisch én inspirerend, betaalbaar én toekomstgericht.

Je ontdekt hier verhalen van Nederlandse ondernemers die hun werkplekken transformeerden met IKEA-oplossingen. We delen ideeën, tips en nieuws om jouw werkruimte efficiënter en aangenamer te maken, en houden je op de hoogte van ontwikkelingen in duurzaamheid, circulair ontwerp en slimme innovaties.



 Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of IKEA for Business Netherlands 

Whether you're running a start-up or managing an established company, we believe every workspace can be smarter, more sustainable, and more human. This page is your window into our vision of work – practical yet inspiring, affordable yet future-focused.

Here, you'll find stories from Dutch entrepreneurs transforming their spaces with IKEA solutions, along with fresh ideas, tips, and updates on circular design and sustainability.

Name: Denver Modern
Description:
Specializing in the fusion of function and art, Denver Modern designs simple and timeless modern furniture and accessories, showcasing the unparalleled beauty of carefully selected mixed materials. 

We are committed to partnering with businesses, architects, and interior designers in Denver and beyond, ensuring that commercial spaces exude contemporary elegance and impeccable taste. Let's redefine your business spaces together.

Name: Reoffice.at
Description: 360° Umzug und Büromöbel-Services

Name: Lilás Decorações
Description:
Nós somos uma empresa que se orgulha em ter um espírito jovem e uma história marcada pelo rápido atendimento, transparência, agilidade tanto na entrega, quanto na instalação de  produtos, construindo assim uma relação de sucesso e confiança com nossos clientes em cada projeto realizado.
Temos os mais recentes lançamentos em papéis de parede do mercado. São diversas opções de combinações, em todos os estilos com condições exclusivas.
São diversas linhas de tecidos para cortinas, em opções que vão desde tecidos mais rústicos até mais leves com garantia e o padrão de qualidade da Lilás Decorações.
A Lilás Decorações é representante da Amorim, empresa com mais de 35 anos de tradição e  qualidade na produção de cortinas e persianas e   que traz a inovação em cada um de seus produtos.
Nossa linha de adesivos de parede personalizados é ideal para deixar qualquer ambiente com um toque único de estilo e sofisticação.
Na Lilás você também encontra diversas opções de tecidos para cabeceira, perfeito para deixar a decoração de sua cama personalizada com diversos modelos exclusivos.
Nossa linha de Colchas e Almofadas é ideal para completar a decoração de qualquer tipo de projeto.

Name: Mercado da Mesa
Description: 4 Lojas em Belo Horizonte e região de artigos de decoração, utilidades e cama mesa e banho.

Name: BossaNossaCasa
Description:
Bossa Nossa Casa is a leading online marketplace that specializes in selling pre-owned luxury furniture and decor objects. 

Our mission is to promote the circular economy, reduce carbon emissions and encourage creativity by offering a sustainable alternative to traditional furniture shopping.

Our platform offers a curated selection of pre-owned high-end furniture and decor items from top designers and brands. We believe that luxury and sustainability can go hand in hand, and we are committed to sourcing products that are both stylish and eco-friendly.

At Bossa Nossa Casa, we are passionate about reducing the environmental impact of furniture production and consumption. By giving new life to pre-owned items, we are helping to reduce waste, conserve natural resources, and combat climate change. We also believe that our platform can inspire people to be more creative with their interior design, as well as make luxury furniture more accessible to a wider audience.

In addition to offering a wide range of pre-owned products, we also provide a seamless shopping experience for our customers. Our platform is user-friendly and easy to navigate, and our customer service team is always ready to assist with any questions or concerns.

Join us in our mission to promote sustainability, creativity, and luxury. Shop Bossa Nossa Casa for pre-owned furniture and decor today!

Name: Simon James
Description:
Through honest materials, a desire for simplicity and lasting craftsmanship, Simon James celebrates the spaces we spend time in. Through the showroom, retail store and online store, our own designs are shared alongside the work of others.

Furniture and lighting are accompanied by an evolving edit of clothing, modern artefacts and home goods that go beyond what is necessary. All share common ground in their ability to combine beauty with function, and ritual with basic need.

Since establishment in 2001, we have prided ourselves on a holistic approach to design and offer a growing set of services. Collaborate on custom furniture solutions; collect treasures via the online gift registry, use the Journal as a place to discover talented makers, distinctive aesthetics and modern life musings.

Based in Auckland, New Zealand, our Mount Eden furniture and lighting showroom is open for impromptu visits and purchases within the daily retail hours, just like our Herne Bay and Newmarket homewares and accessories stores.

Our brands include Aesop, Ariake, Arno Declercq, Bassamfellows, Emma Lewisham, Emilia Wickstead, Established & Sons, Jessica McCormack, Kvadrat, Massproductions, Matter Made, Mattiazzi, Michaël Verheyden, Ozeki & Co, Resident, Simon James, Studio Henry Wilson, Tekla, Tom Dixon, When Objects Work and more.

Name: Leather Gallery
Description: Leather Gallery is an independent furniture retailer that sells locally manufactured and imported quality furniture as well as home accessories. We are passionate about the products that we sell and about the needs of our consumers. Our staff are honest and respectful and understand the excitement of buying furniture for one’s home Visit one of our stores today or visit us at www.LeatherGallery.co.za

Name: HomeKode
Description:
Home Kode arose from a desire to create a unique collection of homeware products that couldn’t be found elsewhere, with customers encouraged to find their own style and to love every corner of their home. Our collection continues to curate natural style for design lovers of all tastes, with every detail for a look that is distinct, harmonious, trendy, and always unique.
 

Based in the UAE, all of our products continue to be chosen with you in mind. Our design led collections are inspired by culture and trend to offer new ways to transform the homes and gardens of every interior enthusiast. From inspirational furniture, storage and accessories, we capture the season with a timeless aesthetic and effortless style.

Name: The Everset
Description:
The Everset makes furnishing your home hassle free and flexible. We provide full-service staging and furniture rental solutions. 

Property owners and real estate agents now have an affordable and design savvy staging option. We work with NYC's largest real estate firms to provide high quality staging at a reasonable price. 

Resident can take advantage of our monthly subscription service that offers designer-curated furniture packages, without the burden of ownership.

Name: Ukrainian Product Design
Description:
We represent Ukrainian Product Design. We want to showcase the many fine design products created by professional industrial designers and architects, who have already won many prestigious design awards, including the Red Dot Award. 

Our designers are striving to continue their creative work despite the destruction going on around them and our goal is to introduce them to people in Britain to help these talented professionals keep their businesses afloat, and so to preserve the unique artistic and cultural heritage of modern Ukraine. 

We, the founders of Ukrainian Product Design, are professionals that have hands-on experience in all areas of the design product sphere. We guarantee a safe purchase and we know that it’s important for you. We are seeking to market to interior designers and architects.

Name: PUUR Design & Interieur
Description:
Niet alleen particulieren voelen zich thuis bij PUUR Design, maar ook zakeijke relaties, architecten en stylistes zijn bij ons van harte welkom! 

Een kantoor of kantine inrichten in de stijl die bij jou en jouw collega’s past is het halve werk. In een sfeervolle werkomgeving wordt er nu eenmaal efficienter en prettiger gewerkt. 

Ook voor de inrichting van een restaurant, hotel of spa ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres. Iedereen is anders en zo is ook ieder project anders. Dankzij onze enorme collectie (design) meubelen en verlichting  kunnen wij aan al jouw wensen voldoen!

Meer info via onze site / webshop: www.puurdesign.nu of stuur een mail naar verkoop@puurdesign.nu

Volg ons ook via: https://www.instagram.com/puur_design/

Name: Details Afrika
Description:

We are consistently curating for generations with an unmatched signature style on the Ugandan market.

Name: Dock Four
Description:
Wij zijn Dock Four en geven designers een tool om regie te behouden in hun interieurontwerpen. Dit doen we met onze Stylepads; functionaliteit gecombineerd met design. Een modulair systeem waarmee de wand onderdeel wordt van het interieur.
Dock Four werkt met een jong en bevlogen team vanuit het hoofdkantoor in Nunspeet, waar zowel het atelier als de productie is gevestigd.

Dock Four maakt onderdeel uit van de B&C Groep. B&C Groep houdt van creativiteit en ondernemerschap. De focus ligt op het interieur. Voornamelijk op de functionele wand- en raambekleding die met sfeer en gemak meerwaarde geeft aan het interieur.

Name: Daamaira Home & Living Ltd.
Description:
Daamaira - Elite. Elegant. Exquisite.
At Daamaira, we believe in transforming ordinary spaces into timeless sanctuaries. Fullfilling the bridge to luxury withing todays world. With an unwavering commitment to superior craftsmanship and meticulous attention to detail, Daamaira offers a curated collection of elite home decor, elegant glassware and exquisite artefacts designed to elevate interiors. Each piece embodies sophistication, elegance, and luxury, creating an atmosphere of refined beauty.
Our exclusive collections are crafted for discerning clients who appreciate the finer things in life, seamlessly blending classic artistry with contemporary refinement. From elite home décor and elegant glassware to exquisite artifacts and accessories, each Daamaira creation tells a unique story of craftsmanship, exclusivity, and style.
Every Daamaira product is a testament to our dedication to quality, ensuring that luxury resonates through every corner of your home. With Daamaira, elevate your living spaces with the finest in design and décor.
Discover the Art of Elevated Living with Daamaira — where luxury and sophistication meet to transform your home into a reflection of your lifestyle.
You can also visit our experience centre located at: 33 Araya House, Rama Road, New Delhi-110015.
You can also contact on 9899800800/989913700 for any queries.

Description: Add a little magic to your world- TwinklingTree brings you whimsical lights that turn your home and garden into a fairytale wonderland, one sparkle at a time!  From glowing branches that dance in the dark to enchanting lanterns that light up your every step, our creations are here to make your spaces shine with wonder.

Name: Deloudis
Description:
Deloudis SA has been specializing in the area of designer furniture in Greece for more than 50 years. Deloudis SA  is the representative of Arclinea, B&B Italia, Cassina, Poliform, Flos, Herman Miller, Knoll, Vitra, Henge and Edra among many others.

Founded in 1972 Deloudis was the first company worldwide to import and represent B&B Italia and Cassina. Deloudis has presented many well known architects and designers to the Greek public, such as Piero Lissoni, Patricia Urquiola, Michael Anastassiades, Alessandro Mendini, Jasper Morrison, Marc Newson, Ettore Sotsaas, Borek Sipek, Marcel Wanders and William Sawaya to name a few.

Since the beginning Deloudis SA has developed a uniquely diversified portfolio, covering the needs of the home, kitchen and office.  Apart from operating flagship stores for B&B Italia and Cassina, there is a dedicated space for kitchens as well as Poliform and Fendi Casa shop-in-shops.

In terms of physical presence, Deloudis SA operates 7 showrooms and self-owned corporate warehouses of 5000 sqm, where essential management and coordination of the company takes place.
The company occupies 40 employees along with 15 exceptionally trained fitters.
The coordinated image profile of the showrooms, has solidified the image of absolute aesthetics in the Greek public’s mind that follows the principles of minimalism, functionality and high quality. With a high level of presentation in each store and with a great emphasis in aesthetics and visual merchandising, Deloudis SA contributes to the promotion and knowledge of design culture.

In the last years Deloudis turnover has reached 15 million euros, solidifying its position as one of the  biggest high-end furniture retailers in Eastern Europe.

Deloudis SA aims in always upgrading and updating its business, thus remaining the ultimate design retailer in Greece and Cyprus.

Name: Tuinmeubelshop B.V.
Description: Tuinmeubelshop is dé specialist in tuinmeubelen met 16 experience stores en een uitgebreide webshop. Name: Practice Space
Description: Practice Space is a contemplative design studio exploring how media, experiences and objects can be reminders to practice connection and presence. We’re devoted to supporting people on their path and elevating contemplative traditions in a changing world for the benefit of all.

Name: The Porch Swing Company
Description: Since 2008, The Porch Swing Company has been helping homeowners make their porch feel more like home. Featuring classic porch swings, expansive swing beds, and heavy duty rockers, gliders, and benches, our collection brings outdoor furniture craftsmanship direct to your door.

Name: Créma Design
Description: Crema Design is a company based out of 317 Albert Road, Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa.

Name: HOME GOODS
Description:
" HOME GOODS " - a complete production cycle from design textiles and fabric to create a form ready collections.




unique products of home textiles and accessories: complete solutions for living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, children's and youth rooms. The range of exclusive bed covers, curtains, decorative pillows, kitchen sets, clocks, paintings, posters, and other items of interior (more than 120 collections).
More than 12 years of active service have enabled us to become a manufacturer of unique and made-up textile solutions  substantially expand the range of products offered. The company regularly participates in major textile and furniture fairs.

The constant search for new textures and techniques, careful selection of materials, as well as creativity and individual design matches the latest trends and distinguish our products in the market upholstery and decorative fabrics.

Name: PERIGOLD
Description:
Perigold is the destination for luxury home. We've brought together the best names in interiors, all in one place. Above all else, we believe that beautiful designs made with uncompromising quality are worth the investment, and we have a deep appreciation for meticulous craftsmanship and original design. From traditional to modern, indoors and out, our curated selection spans every style and space, so you can create a look that's uniquely yours. The best part? We promise an extraordinary experience at every step. Need inspiration? Browse hand-selected picks from well-known interior designers in our Design Shops, or schedule a complimentary session with our Design Services team to help customize a sofa or design a full room. Enjoy reliable and free white-glove delivery on most items. And if you're not satisfied -- whether the piece isn't quite what you expected or you find a better price? Our Concierge Team will make it right, guaranteed. Life's too short for ordinary. Unlock extraordinary.

Headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, Perigold is part of the Wayfair Inc. (NYSE:W) brand portfolio. Visit www.perigold.com and follow @perigold on Instagram, Facebook, and Pinterest.

Description: Dar Al Arkan Interiors is a multidisciplinary collective comprised of stylists, designers and interior architects. We offer everything from curated interiors and light-touch refurbishment to styling solutions for all occasions, creating meaningful design narratives in a single room or across an entire home.

Using some of the most incredible, sought-after marbles & granites, we ensure every hand carved piece is beautifully crafted and finished to the highest quality.

We take our love of materials, the passion for creating & the 
knowledge of the industry to provide customers with bespoke yet affordable homeware.

Name: Homemonde Lifestyle
Description:
Homemonde is more than just a home furnishing brand; it's a celebration of India's rich cultural heritage and the incredible talent of its artisans and women. Our mission is to empower these talented individuals by providing them with a platform to showcase their skills, while also creating a sustainable livelihood for them.

We work closely with our artisans, curating designs that blend traditional Indian art forms with modern aesthetics, ensuring that every product tells a story. By doing so, we bridge the gap between the traditional and modern worlds, showcasing the exquisite craftsmanship of the artisans and women. But our mission goes beyond just creating beautiful products; it's about creating a positive social impact on the lives of the artisans and their communities.

At Homemonde, we believe that our trends are global, but our techniques, skills, and culture are deep-rooted in India. We are a brand from the artisans of India, for the people of the world.

Choose Homemonde for exquisite home decor products that are not just beautiful, but also create a positive social impact on the lives of the artisans and their communities.

Our commitment to our customer’s complete satisfaction forms the basis of our founding principles; Quality, Value, Service, and Integrity.

Name: Qdore Home
Description:
Welcome to Qdore Home, where luxury meets sustainability and elegance. Qdore Home is dedicated to get you exquisite home decor statement pieces that elevate your space with refined sophistication. We work with the finest materials - metal, solid wood, marble, and glass - to create meticulous, high-quality designs that not only impress but also tell a story.

From sleek metal accents to rich wooden textures, elegant marble finishes, and stunning glasswork, our collection is designed to inspire and delight. Experience the art of luxury, redefined with sustainability and elegance, at Qdore Home.

Our mission is to make an international home decor brand from India, and promote our Indian Craftsmanship all around the world. Our mission is to provide timeless, statement pieces that add a touch of glamour and poise to your space, while also aligning with your values. Our mission is to cater to the skilled Indian artisans with the reward which they deserve for their unparalleled skills and talent. 

So, transform your spaces with luxurious handcrafted statement pieces made by artisans from all over India.

Name: Onepercent Group
Description:
At onepercent we have built an impressive portfolio of beautiful homes around the islands, inhabited by unique characters with one thing in common - their taste and their ability to express themselves as a result of their lived environment.
Representing some of Europe’s most prestigious furniture brands and curating design pieces from beyond these catalogues, onepercent has access to an unparalleled spread of beauty.

But beauty is not enough. onepercent wants to help its clients tell their own deepest truth by transforming their spaces into a living autobiography, a space that reveals their personality in a way that’s honest and beautiful.
Clients come to onepercent with a yearning for self-expression and encounter a team of great listeners who help them uncover their truth and to embark on a journey. The journey starts with an element of self-discovery and, through a meticulous process of design and curation, allows them to craft their legacy through their environment.

Our clients love beauty, emotional connection, and homes that they are proud to call part of their self-expression. Spaces we curate with our clients are inevitably beautiful, deeply personal, perfectly functional, and often including a surprising element that shows its owners true colours.

Let us build your story and turn your space into a statement.

Name: Arté Form Design
Description:
We specialize in handcrafted artistic furniture and home decor, inspired by nature and designed with creativity. We love working with raw materials and organic forms to bring out the beauty in every piece.
In our workshop, skilled artisans from Poland meticulously create each item, ensuring the highest level of craftsmanship and attention to detail. Whether you are furnishing your home or sprucing up your garden, our collection offers a wide range of exquisite and one-of-a-kind pieces that will transform any space into a masterpiece.
From beautifully carved wooden tables to chairs, our furniture combines functionality with artistry. Our home decor accessories, such as handmade ceramic vases and wall abstracts on canvas, add a touch of elegance and Arté charm to any room. The web soon. Stay tuned!

Name: ScreenAway Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
ScreenAway is a unique Retractable Blind and Fly Screen solution designed especially for windows and skylights. It is retrofitted into all types of windows, old and new and can be easily maintained. The system provides attractive and practical use with a neat and tidy fit within the reveal of your window or face mounted.

The ScreenAway Retractable Fly Screen system allows you to clean your windows without any hassle of trying to get them out to get to your window. The retractable system allows you to enjoy your beautiful views with no obstructions. It sits where your existing fly screen would go and is made to measure.

The ScreenAway Retractable Blind system provides light block out with no dangerous hanging cables or cords and a range of different material colours to suit your taste. The blinds are fitted within the reveal of your window to provide a tidy neat look with no bulky components.

Name: Natuzzi Editions Philippines

Name: VNTG, Inc.
Description: Welcome to the Homesphere! At VNTG, we bring the world’s most iconic pieces of design, art and technology into your home.

Name: AMEUBLEMENT SAINT VINCENT
Description:
Institutions depuis plusieurs décennies en région Rhône-Alpes, les 4 magasins Ameublement Saint-Vincent / ASV sont de véritables espaces dédiés à l’ameublement et à la vente de mobilier d'intérieur et d'extérieur, de luminaires, d' accessoires & objets de décoration.

Toujours à l'affût de nouveautés, nos produits sont sélectionnés selon leur qualité, poésie & fonctionnalité.

Entre passion, exigence et expertise, ASV permet aux particuliers et aux professionnels d'aménager des intérieurs, des bureaux d'entreprise ou des commerces avec du mobilier design et haut de gamme.

Des chaises et fauteuils design au mobilier de jardin, en passant par des suspensions et lampes design, notre équipe est là pour vous accompagner et vous conseiller dans tous vos projets d’aménagements. Ameublement Saint-Vincent a la confiance de grandes marques françaises du design telles que Cinna, Tolix, Petite Friture, Dix heures Dix ou Jieldé.

Vous retrouverez également des grandes marques comme Artemide, Hay, Artisan, Emu, Fatboy, Zuiver, Innovation Living, Sovet Italia, Fontana Arte ou encore Todus.

Name: GRUPPO SERENO
Description:
Da falegnameria artigiana a leader dell’arredamento contemporaneo in provincia di Cuneo e Piemonte e non solo. Il tutto nell’arco di quattro generazioni.
Nel 2001 la nostra sede di Centallo è stata oggetto di un restyling che ha interessato il suo aspetto esterno e la suddivisione interna dei locali. Nel 2019 al Gruppo Sereno abbiamo aggiunto il nuovo spazio espositivo di Alba, acquisendo lo storico marchio Ruatasio Home. Abbiamo raggiunto così gli 11.000 m2 nelle due esposizioni di Centallo e Alba, per toccare con mano il meglio dell’arredamento contemporaneo in ambienti curati e ricchi di realizzazioni sempre diverse. Insieme al laboratorio di falegnameria interno, il Gruppo Sereno si compone oggi della commerciale Sereno Spa, che si occupa di tutta la vendita, e della Sereno Servizi, società addetta alla logistica, allo stoccaggio dei prodotti, ai laboratori e all’assistenza post-vendita. Un gruppo che conta oggi più di 50 persone di cui 7 squadre di consegna.

Name: Solza.nl
Description: SOLZA is dé online vloerenwinkel van het moment. Met een groot assortiment vloeren dat uiteenloopt van verschillende soorten laminaat en parket tot click PVC (klik PVC) en plak PVC. Koop jij een vloer bij ons? Dan kun je rekenen op correcte levering aan jouw deur, lange garanties en uitstekende service! Kom je er niet helemaal uit met het maken van jouw keuze, heb je een vraag of loop je tegen een probleem aan? Neem dan gerust contact op met onze klantenservice!
Location: Alphen aan den Rijn, South Holland

Name: Hank's Furniture

From the very beginning, Hank's Fine Furniture's success has been built on offering quality furniture, bedding and accessories at excellent values. As a family-owned business, Hank's Fine Furniture has thrived because of our dedication to service after the sale.

Name: TOM Designs
Description: Purchase luxury furniture, finishing materials, elegant & affordable accessories from Turkey, At Tom Designs, based in the heart of Istanbul, we create exceptional interior spaces that blend form and function. Drawing on Turkey’s rich heritage of design and craftsmanship, we craft premium furniture and fixtures for residential and commercial spaces. Through trusted partnerships with top-tier factories, we offer bespoke, high-quality pieces and replicas of international brands at competitive prices. Every project is completed with precision, elegance, and attention to detail, ensuring our clients receive premium products that reflect the finest in Turkish design.

Name: SEMPER FORTIS FURNITURE
Description:
We believe in having a clear purpose. It’s at the centre of who we are and what we do. Simply put, we believe that everyone should have a purpose - purpose for our employees, purpose for their families and purpose for our customers and trade partners. We strive to cultivate and maintain an environment of mutual respect and inclusion, while innovating, designing and crafting furnishings for your home and life in order to live with purpose. 

 We’ve been preserving the craft of making bespoke furniture in South Africa for over 20 years, employing skilled artisans and passionate professionals at our factory in Cape Town. With generations of expertise, these talented furniture makers and designers are at the very heart of our brave brand.

Name: Lily Bronson Home Decor
Description:
Online Home Decor Shop:

Hand Poured Soy Candles, Vases, Flower Pots, Throws, Cushions, Rugs, Greenery, Candles, Candle Holders, Baskets, Wall Decor, Table Top, Furniture, Hardware, Original Paintings, Commission Paintings (Custom), and more.
_________________________________________________________________________________

Welcome to Lily Bronson,

This venture is a homage to my late grandmother, Lily, whose spirit once enlivened a restaurant on Ottawa's Bronson Avenue from 1956 -1976. Known for her resilience and warmth, Lily charmed patrons and ran the establishment with dedication, especially after facing the sudden passing of her loving husband and business partner on January 8, 1961.

After that, she bravely took the helm of the business, all while raising five boys on her own. Quite the feat!

Throughout her life, my grandmother, Lily, met challenges head-on with a remarkable blend of dedication, honesty, and fortitude. These qualities, which so deeply inspired me in my early years, and have greatly influenced the person I’ve become. This business is a tribute to her legacy, a way for me to honor and carry forward Lily’s strength, grace, and fervor in all that I do.

We hope you enjoy our products as much as we enjoy making them available to you.

Happy shopping!

Sincerely,

Lily's Granddaughter - Melissa

Name: Mapland Design Studio Pvt. Ltd.

Name: DG Design SA
Description:
DG Design SA | Le concepteur de votre intérieur

DG Design SA est une entreprise suisse spécialisée dans l’aménagement intérieur, alliant design contemporain, fonctionnalité et exigence de qualité. Fondée en 2012, l’entreprise a débuté dans l’univers de la cuisine avant d’élargir son expertise aux armoires, dressings et aux aménagements intérieurs.

Basée à Saint-Sulpice, à proximité de Lausanne, DG Design dispose d'un showroom totalisant 230 m², pensé comme un véritable lieux de conseil, d’inspiration et d’échange.

Chaque projet y est abordé avec précision, sens du détail et compréhension des usages.
Le conseil est au cœur de notre approche. Chez DG Design, chaque projet est conçu comme un projet unique.

Proches de nos clients, nous privilégions une relation fondée sur l’écoute, la transparence et la confiance. Nous les accompagnons de la conception, technique et esthétique, jusqu’à l’installation et service après-vente, avec un suivi rigoureux à chaque étape.

DG Design conçoit et réalise des aménagements pour l’ensemble de l’habitat :

  Cuisines.
  Dressings & armoires.
  Salles de bains.
  Salons et espaces de vie.
  Chambres et rangements personnalisés.

Nous travaillons avec une large palette de matériaux de qualité et de finitions soignées afin de créer des espaces à la fois esthétiques, fonctionnels et durables.

DG Design s’adresse aussi bien aux clients privés, qu’aux architectes, aux maîtres d’ouvrage ainsi qu'aux promoteurs dans le cadre de projets de rénovation, de constructions neuves ou de développements PPE.

Nous collaborons avec des partenaires qualifiés partageant nos standards de qualité et notre exigence de précision.

Notre engagement

 Un intérieur qui vous ressemble.
 Un projet maîtrisé, dans le respect des délais et du budget.
 Une approche humaine, durable et orientée solutions.


 Saint-Sulpice – Suisse
 www.dgdesignsa.ch

Name: Studio Decorai
Description:
Bringing the beauty and colours of nature into everyday life.


Artists by heart & soul, and full of girl power - we bring classy and exclusive lifestyle products inspired by nature, life, and culture, and infused with our original and one-of-a-kind artwork.

A fusion of art and design in various forms, Studio Decorai, was initiated when daughters decided to celebrate their mother’s love for art and created some home accessories from her artwork as a way to use art in various forms.

With some incredible support from the family, and this girl gang’s collaborative knowledge of art, design, market, consumer behaviour, and technology, we have come a long way. Our Philosophy - Value for Customers, Value for Money.  

Living your dreams, crafting your imaginations… Anu Furniture was born out of discontent with the status quo, and a desire to change the furniture industry for the better. Our core mission? To deliver design-forward products, straight to your doorstep. We are in the business of serving the furniture needs of people since 1994. Operating one of the largest and finest showrooms of the city with 3 lakh sft floor space, today “Anu Furniture” is recognized as the fastest growing furniture chain of Hyderabad.

Besides being renowned for its premium quality products, Anu Furniture is the most celebrated brand for its wide range and impeccable designs. Name: City Home | سيتي هوم

CITY HOME is a Saudi-based furniture retail marketplace established in the year 2021 with the most experienced and trusted pioneer in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. 

We proudly introduce CITY HOME furniture from our vast business experience over a period of decades in different industries in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which includes trading, supply chain logistics, marketing, and real estate business activities all over the Kingdom.  

City Home design concept formed by a group of expertise intellectuals who has tremendous knowledge of Furniture retail, information technology, digital marketing, and other related industries and their value chain.

Such a vast experience in the business confers us the power to dream and further expand our business into furniture retail. Whatever goal we have in our life, the beginning is knowledge and experience.  We enjoy a strong reputation, vast experience, and thorough knowledge. 

CITY HOME furniture principally involved in home furnishings Sales, eCommerce, Custom-made designs, Marketing, Villa Projects, and Distribution of all kinds of furniture which includes home, office, and Outdoor Space. 

At CITY HOME, ultimate elegance is a quality and price we adhere to, and yet we offer the best design which is not only trendy but also fits our customers’ furnishings expectations. Name: Beyond Basic Home
Description: Beyond Basic Home offers a carefully curated selection of home décor accents that redefine elegance and charm. From hand-embroidered cushion covers to table linen and décor accents, each curated piece blends ancestral Kashmiri craftsmanship with modern sensibilities, yielding unique and captivating creations for discerning living spaces. Embracing the beauty of maximalism, the brand celebrates vibrant hues, intricate patterns, and layered textures that conjure immersive, visually stunning environments. Explore the collection and discover the beauty of timeless craftsmanship, reimagined for the modern sanctuary.

Van kastenwand in de woonkamer en de stalen ensuite deuren bij de woonkeuken. Elk project wordt volledig op jouw wensen afgesteld.
