Name: Matisse
Description:
Our mission: To be New Zealand’s leading supplier of future proofed sustainable world-class designs that create ‘inspirational’ places to work and live

With over 30 years of experience in dealing with the International furniture and interior fit out supply sector, Alan and Jeanne Bertenshaw the co-owners of Matisse have forged a reputation unique in New Zealand with the world’s leading manufacturers and designers of quality contemporary furniture for the home and office as well as kitchens, wardrobes and bathrooms.

In order to maintain our world-class reputation, Matisse is committed to only working with manufacturers that produce an all-encompassing level of quality and superior design, providing the highest levels of comfort and unmatched durability over time.

Name: Penny Morrison Ltd
Description:
Over the past forty years, Penny Morrison has grown into a global brand which today expands across three core facets of design: Accessories, Fabrics and Wallpapers, all of which embody the ethos of  our original founder, Penny and her bold and playful use of colours and pattern in her designs.

As the Penny Morrison brand continues to grow and evolve, we are committed to staying true to our core values which inform how we design our products and how we choose to run our business. Here are some of the things that are important to us: 
 
Customer First:
Our mission is to empower our customers to feel confident to design spaces they truly feel at home in; to be bold; pair the unexpected; have fun and go by their own rules.
 
A British Brand:
We are a British brand with an international perspective. While our inspirations, influences and customers come from all around the globe, at the heart of all of our designs is an undeniable character that can only be described as ‘British’.
 
Sustainability and Craftsmanship:
We recognise the responsibility of companies like ourselves in the textile and design industry to make eco-conscious decisions that will protect our planet and the environment, not harm it. All of our fabrics and wallpapers are sustainably sourced and designed and printed here in the United Kingdom in order to minimise our carbon footprint and work sustainably. 
 
We Are Family:
Over the past forty years, Penny Morrison has grown into a family-run business, working with an array of highly talented artisans and craftsmen across the world, who have become part of our family. They are who bring our designs to life, through their age-old techniques and traditions passed on through generations

Name: Purely Scent
Description:
Purely Scent is a brand of quality Home Fragrances,
comprised of scented candles, reed oil diffusers and air fresheners, made from pure ingredients and 10% Essential Oils. 

The brand exports to 8 countries, supplying well-known supermarkets, home-wear chains and department stores such as 6th Street, Al Rugaib Furniture Group, Lulu Hypermarket, Home Centre and Danube Home.

With 3 wicks & 10% scent concentration in each vessel, Purely Scent focuses on delivering only pure, strong fragrances. 

The brand is also minimal & elegant, to serve as aesthetic decor for any interior.

Name: Espace Bureaux
Description:
Depuis bientôt 40 ans, Espace Bureaux imagine, conçoit et aménage des espaces professionnels uniques, pensés pour refléter son identité à ses clients et à optimiser le bien-être au travail.

 Notre rôle ? Accompagner les entreprises dans leur projet d’agencement sur-mesure : bureaux, commerces, espaces d’accueil, open spaces, salles de réunion, réfectoire ...
Nous combinons une approche commerciale terrain avec une vraie sensibilité à la communication, à l’image de marque, et aux enjeux humains et fonctionnels liés à l’aménagement.

 Nous intervenons dès la première idée jusqu’au projet finalisé, en lien avec plus de 60 fournisseurs, nos propres équipe de livreurs/monteurs et des partenaires menuisiers.
Objectif : créer des lieux cohérents, ergonomiques, esthétiques, durables, sur-mesure, à votre image tout en étant présent de A à Z.

Description: FID Paris, founded by designer and creative director Sahar Famouri, creates high-quality, functional, and combinable furniture for modern living. Our designs evolve with each user’s life, transforming any space into a personalized, sustainable sanctuary.

Name: MELQUIADES
Description:
MELQUIADES est né avec le but suivant: fabriquer des meubles sur mesure durables et de haute qualité à un prix raisonnable. 

MELQUIADES est le partenaire privilégie d'une sélection de menuisiers qui fabriquent des meubles sur-mesure. Nous fabriquons à partir du matériau de votre choix: bois massif, contreplaqué, MDF (peint ou décoré), aggloméré… et autres matières de votre choix.

Les meubles et les matériaux utilisés sont fabriqués et proviennent de nos partenaires menuisiers en Europe et, principalement, au Portugal. En effet, depuis plusieurs décennies, le Portugal reconnu dans le secteur de l'ameublement sur-mesure par la qualité et la précision des produits créés. La quincaillerie, les peintures et les huiles sont sélectionnés pour la qualité de leurs produits par nos partenaires menuisiers.
Notre procédure est très simple pour votre projet. Vous pouvez nous fournir des croquis, des photos, des diagrammes avec les principaux paramètres et nous les traduirons dans une langue que les menuisiers comprennent. Nous avons développé notre propre processus de fabrication pour vous offrir la meilleure offre du marché. Ce réseau nous permet de vous offrir des meubles de qualité inégalée dans une variété de matériaux à des prix équitables.  

MELQUIADES s'engage à vous apporter de la tranquillité et de faciliter la réalisation sur vos créations. importations à travers différents services : suivi de production, contrôle qualité, sourcing, développement de produits et logistique. Pour répondre à celle-ci,  nous sommes au plus proche de vous au quotidien dans le suivi de vos besoins et de vos commandes.

Name: Vero International
Description:
The brand was born from the meeting of Pasquale Apollonio, founder of Level Project. It embodies fundamental values in this historical moment, promoting concepts of truth, solidity and availability translated into aesthetics, raw materials, communication, offer model and purchase mode. 

Italian design company Vero transforms everyday environments into contemporary places, with simplicity, honesty and timelessness. Vero products look beyond their functionality to interpret a new philosophy that believes in design as a promoter of contemporary values. Thanks to the combination of the Italian savoir-faire and the creativity of designers operating from all over the world, Vero offers both novelties and experimentation. 

Vero is the spokesperson for a new era of Italian design: for those who consider inclusiveness and transparency essential values to be integrated into everydayproducts. The name refers precisely to this concept of truth (Vero means True in Italian), solidity and availability that is found in the aesthetics of the products, in the selected raw materials and in the selling methods. Small families of ready-to-order furnishings and objects that arise by intercepting the interests, needs and desires of the community by proposing a real and tangible o er, according to a launch model by drop.

Name: New England Home Interiors
Description:
The premier retailer of luxury and bespoke furniture and accessories in Surrey & West Sussex.

Established in Horsham in 2009, New England Home Interiors is a family run business that has been at the forefront of bespoke furniture solutions in the Sussex area for over a decade. Our approach is based on a combined 60 years of home furnishings, interior design and restoration expertise, and an uncompromising commitment to quality. 

Due to increasing demand, we have recently expanded our premises to accommodate a much larger range of furniture, accessories and samples for custom designs. Spanning 6000 square feet in total (4000 more than before!), we have retained the original New England Home Interiors showroom in Horsham and combined it with the building next door.

Please do visit us today, for inspirational interiors, a friendly service & expert advice.

Name: Espaço Arte Italínea
Description:
Conhecimento e empatia na criação do projeto, segurança no pagamento, confiança na entrega e compromisso na montagem.
Somos uma loja representante Italínea, a maior fábrica de móveis planejados da América Latina.

Name: Minima Home Ltd
Description: Our designers guide clients and their A&D early in the project to visualise the pieces proposed which are functional as well as sympathetic to the architecture. Overseeing and managing the supply and fit to timely completion has enabled Minima to build a loyal clientele and to work on many prestigious projects. Minima is an authorised dealer for every brand we sell and do not sell replicas or fakes.

Name: Hästens Knysna
Description: Hästens makes beds that will change your life, and alter the way you think about sleep forever. Handmade from ethically-sourced natural materials.

Name: Corso Design
Description:
For over two decades, our founders have been revolutionizing the furniture and design industries by creating innovative solutions for our clients based all over the globe.

With a fresh perspective that lives at the intersection of elegance, fashion and high-end design, our principals have developed a technique through which each client's personal style and space guide a curated assortment of key pieces and accents, combined to best flatter each home, office or a public space.

Art meets design with our approach to curating your living space, driven largely by our desire to deliver not only a look but a feeling of belonging and pride to our clients.

With over 30 years of combined experience in the markets of Europe, East Asia and Middle East, we have sensed a void in the market for a highly individualistic approach to curating clients’ space and decided to open our first UAE concept shop.

Today, we strive to be at the forefront of the fine design and furniture industries, having earned a reputation for offering the best service and expertise in the curation of individualized styles. With satisfied clients with beautiful spaces from Hidd Al Saadiyat, Mamsha, Al Gurm, Palm Jumeirah and Downtown Dubai to name a few, we are the leading luxury furniture and design destination for tastemakers and connoisseurs alike.

Name: The Modern
Description:
Inspired by the timelessness and versatility of Mid Century Modern design.

Founded in 2010, The Modern is a family-run furniture brand dedicated to creating warm, beautiful spaces through timeless design, enduring craftsmanship, and a deep respect for simplicity and function.

Our collection is grounded in accessibility, clean lines, honest materials, and the refined forms of Mid Century Modern design. From solid timber and genuine leather to versatile, enduring essentials, we’re committed to crafting furniture that’s lived with and loved for generations.

With eight showrooms across Australia, our team is here to help you create a home that supports the rhythm of your days - the quiet moments, the family traditions, and everything in-between. 

Brisbane ◦ Noosa ◦ Sydney ◦ Melbourne ◦ Canberra ◦ Southern Highlands

Name: CASA V.   mobili | design
Description:
Acreditamos que a casa é um lugar muito especial. 
É o lugar onde criamos memórias com as pessoas que amamos e onde nos refugiamos para encontrar paz, descansar e recarregar as energias. 
Mas, mais do que isso, acreditamos que a casa é o lugar onde a vida acontece.
A Casa Videira, ou CASA V., tem o objetivo de transformar o lar dos nossos clientes nesse lugar tão especial.
É mais do que uma empresa, é uma extensão da nossa própria casa, porque aqui cuidamos de cada projeto como se fosse nosso, desde a concepção até a execução.
É mais do que móveis de qualidade, é sobre experiências. 
Nós queremos que nossos clientes se sintam parte da nossa família, e que confiem em nosso trabalho. 
Nós queremos que nossos clientes se surpreendam com a qualidade, o design e a funcionalidade dos nossos produtos. Que eles se orgulhem, e que seus móveis reflitam a sua personalidade e o seu estilo.
É sobre profissionalismo e dedicação, sempre buscando oferecer o melhor serviço e experiência para nossos clientes. 
É sobre valorizar a honestidade e a transparência em todas as etapas do projeto, do primeiro atendimento à entrega do produto final.

É sobre ser, viver e inspirar.

Name: Brdr. Sørensen Møbler
Description:
Brdr. Sørensen Møbler består af fire butikker; tre i Aalborg og en i Randers. 
 I vores butikker møder du et bredt fagligt team, som står klar til at rådgive indenfor boligindretning. 
Vi ønsker at være en personlig og kreativ  sparringspartner for vores kunder, så de netop får den indretning de drømmer om. 
Vi har stor erfaring indenfor indretning - både privat og erhverv. 

Vi er stadig i en rivende udvikling og altid opdateret med tidens trend samt hvad der rører sig i udlandet, men samtidig mener vi, at det er vigtigt, at holde fast ved de værdier og traditioner, der er indenfor dansk designhistorie.

Name: soñho Schweiz AG
Description:
soñho ist ein Schweizer Startup, welches Portugalfeeling in dein Zuhause bringt.  soñho ist die Brand die international und kulturell verbindet und unsere Freude an Design, Branding und Business Building in die Realität umsetzen lässt.

Die soñho Welt bietet alles rund um den Tisch und vermittelt ein portugiesisches Ferien- und Lebensgefühl, welches unsere Kundschaft mit nachhause nehmen kann. Vom handgemachten Keramik Teller, über exklusive verarbeitete Tischtextilien , traditionellen Food und Wein bis hin zu dekorativen Interior Accessoires und exklusiven Geschenksideen lädt soñho ein , mehr Meer und mediterrane Atmosphäre zuhause geniessen zu können. 
 
Lass dich jetzt von unserer portugiesischen soñho Welt inspirieren.

Name: Bagane

Name: Konto Furniture
Description:
Konto is an on trend brand focusing on modern home furnishings with an eclectic flare.  We bring the best furniture from around the world together under one roof making it easy for you to decorate your home and enhance your lifestyle.    

Family
We will always work hard to ensure that we never lose sight of our roots and that our stores maintain that special touch that can only be found in a family business.  We will always strive to make sure that each and every person that works for Konto Furniture feels like part of the family.

Experience
Customer experience is very important to us and we strive to create a shopping experience both in store and online that exceeds our customer’s expectations.  We will continually look for ways to improve our sales process and customer experience based on new ideas, and feedback from our customers and employees.

Service
After sales service is a big part of our reputation.  Our goal is to take care of every customer concern as quickly as possible.  We will always do what is right, and whatever is in our power to ensure customer satisfaction.

Lifestyle
We strive to create a lifestyle brand that is on trend.  When you walk into our stores or go onto our website we want you to be inspired.  We strive to paint a lifestyle picture that will compliment your home and enhance your lifestyle.  

Support Local
We’re stronger when we stick together. Konto Furniture is born, bred and 100% Albertan. When you put together that we have the best selection, quality, and value, then add in that your purchase also helps support Alberta’s economy exclusively, shopping at Konto simply makes sense.

Unique
We shop the world to find unique items that fit with our lifestyle brand.  For that reason many of our products are exclusive to us and you will not find them anywhere else.

Name: Bij Ons Binnen
Description:
Warme woonwinkel met persoonlijke service, styling advies.
 Volledige inrichting kantoorruimtes & vastgoedstyling.
 Meubels | Decoratie | Tapijten & gordijnen.

Esther Scholtens, oprichtster en eigenaresse van Bij Ons Binnen, heeft 31 jaar gewerkt als stewardess bij KLM en heeft tijdens haar reizen veel inspiratie opgedaan op het gebied van interieur. Met de collectie van onder andere Dutchbone, Zuiver en By-Boo in combinatie met bijzondere woonaccessoires creëert Bij Ons Binnen een ‘Global Inspired Interior’. Door een steeds wisselende selectie van de merken te etaleren in de winkel, blijft het meer dan leuk en inspirerend om Bij Ons Binnen te blijven komen.

Persoonlijke benadering en goede service staat voorop. De winkel biedt een eigen bezorg- en montagedienst aan. Dit betekent dat producten bezorgd worden tot in de woonkamer en er wordt indien nodig een gehele montage verzorgd. 

Bij Ons Binnen richt zich naast de winkel ook op (zakelijke en privé) projecten en inrichtingen. Vastgoedstyling, projectinrichting... Veel is mogelijk bij Bij Ons Binnen. 

Bezoek www.bijonsbinnen.nl voor meer informatie. Voor een vrijblijvend advies en/of vragen, neem gerust contact met ons op.

Qortuba Furniture Co. was established at 1988 the company has grown to become one of the Kuwait’s Leading Home Furniture retailer, offering at affordable prices, high quality furniture and accessories.

Qortuba maintains an exclusive world’s top brands and suppliers. With over 150 employees committed to the highest level of quality services The Company offers the best updated designs, installation and quality responsibility to reach the highest level of customer satisfaction.

Name: HJEMME HOS
Description:
HJEMME HOS er en kæde af møbelbutikker, som bygger på den lokale fagmands viden og erfaring. Vi kan altid tilbyde det bedste og nyeste inden for møbler og boligindretning fra flere forskellige møbelfabrikker – heraf flere danske – så vi har stort udvalg af møbler og stilretninger. Vi lægger vægt på god faglig service, kvalitet i udvalg og rådgivning – og vi leverer og monterer gerne møblerne hjemme hos dig.

Vi leverer møbler, der skaber hjem. Hjemme hos dig og hjemme hos din nabo.

HJEMME HOS startede ud som MØBELKÆDEN i januar 1986, og blev hurtigt til en af landets førende og mest erfarne inden for boligindretning. D. 1. februar 2018 blev Møbelkæden til HJEMME HOS og d. 1. juli 2020 blev HJEMME HOS en del af kædesamarbejdet i In2house.

Name: Reejhul Furniture & Cooler
Description: Transforming your shopping experience with quality furniture that fits your budget!

Name: Patrician exports
Description:
The Patrician Exports concept was born from a dedication to superior design and sourcing premium quality products. Using ethically sourced inlay, we are passionate about creating vibrant living spaces.

The inlay process breathes freshness and personality into a space. Our team is enthusiastic about the potential of inlay. Patrician Exports is known for its thoughtful designs, premium quality, and unique color palettes.

Handcrafted by skilled artisans in Rajasthan using a technique passed down through generations, our bone inlay and pearl inlay furniture is designed in Udaipur (Mewar), Rajasthan.

By sourcing materials ethically, we make bone and pearl inlay affordable for everyone. Competitive but fair pricing is something we are passionate about. Therefore, we do not support fast, mass-produced furniture. We create pieces that are completely handmade, unique, and promote the traditional culture of Rajasthan worldwide.

Name: Virginia Furniture Market
Description: Virginia Furniture Market is a rapidly growing locally-owned and operated family of stores throughout Southwest and Central Virginia.

Name: Schmidt Draguignan
Description:
Schmidt a été fondé il y a plus de 60 ans par une famille d'artisans. Ces origines nous ont permis de devenir le principal fabricant français de cuisines et de meubles sur mesure. Grâce à notre professionnalisme, comprenant des concepteurs, des designers et des conseillers, nous sommes devenus la référence en matière de solutions innovantes, personnalisées et sur mesure. Pour tous les aménagements, nous nous adaptons avec une précision au millimètre près. 

Grâce au sur mesure et à la personnalisation, Schmidt Draguignan vous propose des aménagements personnalisés pour tous vos espaces de travail, tels que vos bureaux, vos salles de coworking, vos meubles de rangement pour vos dossiers et vos cuisines communes. Tous vos espaces de travail peuvent être aménagés de manière innovante, optimisée et fonctionnelle. 

Nous sommes au service des professionnels pour vous offrir des espaces de travail adaptés à vos activités professionnelles, en prenant en compte vos contraintes et vos attentes.  

Nos concepteurs/vendeurs s'occupent de l'intégralité de vos projets, du premier contact jusqu'à la réception du chantier, en passant par le choix des matériaux et des coloris ainsi que la prise de mesure. Notre objectif principal est votre satisfaction, afin que vous puissiez être sereins. 

Vous êtes chef d'entreprise dans le secteur de Draguignan, Trans-en-Provence, les arcs, Flayosc, Figanières... Vous recherchez de nouvelles solutions d'aménagement adaptées à vos activités professionnelles ? Contactez-nous au 04 94 35 37 35 ou prenez directement rendez-vous via notre lien home-design.schmidt pour créer ensemble votre projet. 

Sur ce compte, nous partagerons avec vous les dernières informations concernant nos innovations, y compris nos événements, nos réalisations et le quotidien de l'équipe. Nous vous encourageons vivement à suivre cette page afin que nous puissions échanger sur nos métiers.

Name: GROUPE BRANDILY
Description: Le Groupe BRANDILY propose depuis déjà plus de 50 ans des aménagements sur mesure sous les marques SCHMIDT et CUISINELLA. Toute l'entreprise est organisée autour de vous. Depuis votre visite en magasin jusqu'aux finitions à votre domicile. Le relevé de vos dimensions est effectué par nos spécialistes, la livraison assurée à une heure précise par notre service de livraison, et la pose réalisée par notre équipe de poseurs. Votre satisfaction est notre mission !

Name: Revive
Description:
At Revive we contribute to a more sustainable world by reusing and repairing products.

Our ultimate goal is to become the go to destination for refurbished products & make people rethink the lifespan of their products.
We are achieving this by making reusability simple and profitable. Initially by building a strong foundation in which we cover the whole process of purchasing, refurbishing and selling ourselves and eventually opening up to 3rd party sellers building the 1st refurbished only marketplace. Covering one vertical at a time. Think of it as amazon for pre-owned products.

Once it is not only ethically and financially appealing but also comfortable to buy pre-owned products, people will consider it as a viable alternative.

It is our mission to provide you, the customer, with not only 5-star customer service but modern, stylish pieces to make your home beautiful; whether it be something small to finish off a room or a new statement piece.

With the courage to innovate, we create trends and unique furnishing collections being affordable and desirable for all people. Come and visit us in Hervey Bay and tour our beautiful new furniture store, open 7 days a week.

Name: Mediteránea
Description:
Mediteranea is a brand dedicated to Mediterranean craftsmanship in Home Decor and Lifestyle that interprets the Mediterranean lifestyle by offering a careful selection of handmade products from the countries bordering Mare Nostrum.

A crossroads of histories and cultures, a land of encounters and the scene of great traditions, the Mediterranean region retains a timeless and boundless charm made up of lights, colors, scents and ways of doing things that accompany daily living and enrich conviviality.

A craftsmanship that celebrates warmth and a slower pace of life, to bring into the everydayness of our spaces the memory of summer vacations and languid days that stretch late into the night. In an increasingly digital world and the hustle and bustle of urban life, these spaces evoke salty air and sandy fingers, and the Mediterranean teaches us the art of savoring time even within the walls of home.

Name: Dolce Casa
Description:
Dolce Casa è un punto di riferimento nella vendita e progettazione di soluzioni d’arredo per interni, pensate per coniugare estetica, funzionalità e convenienza.

Nasciamo con un obiettivo chiaro: rendere l’arredamento di qualità accessibile a tutti, offrendo mobili e complementi dal design contemporaneo, realizzati con materiali selezionati e curati nei dettagli, a prezzi competitivi e trasparenti.

Sappiamo che arredare casa può trasformarsi in un percorso complesso e stressante: trovare soluzioni coerenti con il proprio stile, senza rinunciare alla qualità e senza superare il budget, richiede tempo e competenze.

Name: Hafele Kuwait
Description: Häfele is an experienced specialist for intelligent hardware and fitting systems, lighting and electronic access control systems. The company's history goes back to the year 1923 in Germany, where everything started and developed rapidly – and globally. Today, customers from more than 150 countries around the world rely on Häfele's expertise. More than 8,100 employees and 38 subsidiaries. along with numerous other representatives around the world make Häfele the global player it has become. Despite a strong international focus and worldwide networking, Häfele has always been rooted locally, which is demonstrated in its distinct regional presence. This benefits our customers, not least in the form of individual and personal support.

Name: HTH Storkøbenhavn
Description:
Gør køkkendrømmen til virkelighed

Hos HTH på Gammel Kongevej, Amager, i Glostrup og Lyngby, hjælper vi dig med at gøre drømmen om et nyt køkken til virkelighed. Køkkenet er hjemmets hjerte, og det skal passe til mange forskellige gøremål. Derfor skræddersyer vi alle HTH-køkkener, og sammen med dig skaber vi dit drømmekøkken i gennemtestet kvalitet og smukt design. Vi har altid dine ønsker og behov i fokus, og du kan få den ideelle køkkenløsning.

Vi tilbyder meget mere end elegante køkkenløsninger. Er du på jagt efter et nyt bad eller en garderobe, har vi den rette løsning til dig. Vi stræber efter perfektion, som opnås gennem fokus på detaljerne. I samarbejde med vores dygtige køkkeneksperter, kan du få dine drømme realiseret i en løsning, som du kan have glæde af mange år fremover.

Opfyld dine drømme

Få hjælp til at komme i gang med at realisere dine køkkendrømme. Book et gratis designmøde med en af vores dygtige køkkenkonsulenter og få en uforpligtende samtale om, hvordan vi kan skræddersy en løsning til dig. Gennem nyskabende detaljer og moderne design kan vi i fællesskab komme et skridt nærmere dit nye drømmekøkken.

Du er altid velkommen til at besøge vores butikker, hvor du kan blive inspireret og få vejledning.

Name: RR INTERIEUR Luxembourg

RR is a faithful reflection of the daily life of a dynamic team driven by the passion for elegant interiors and the desire to explore the world.
The tremendous inspiration that we draw from all over the world, could not be summed up in a few collections and deserve to find their place at RR. 
RR is an exclusive blend of design, which is perfectly highlighted in stylish decor and which is likely to inspire you.

RR opened their first store in Knokke, Belgium, 17 years ago. At the moment, we have a total of 4 stores, and since 2017 we opened our new store and design studio at Route d’Arlon, Luxembourg. 
We love what we do!  Our projects are as important to us as they are to you.  
We are committed to design houses as stylish as eveRR!

RR est un mélange exclusif de design, qui est parfaitement mis en valeur dans un décor stylé et qui est susceptible de vous inspirer.

La nostra filosofia aziendale è di offrire un'ampia e articolata gamma di soluzioni con grande attenzione ai materiali, al design e alle esigenze di personalizzazione estetiche e dimensionali, richieste dal cliente. 
La nostra mission è interpretare lo stile di vita di un consumatore che evolve con il mutare del tempo, delle mode e del gusto. Nulla è mai uguale a sè stesso, tutto cambia. Ciò che non muta è la filosofia di un'azienda che pone al primo posto la consulenza, la professionalità e la disponibilità. Proposte uniche ed originali ma in particolare un servizio di assistenza alla vendita che accompagna il cliente  nell’acquisto durante tutte le fasi dall’ accoglienza, scelta del prodotto, progettazione fino a quella del post vendita con l’ esclusivo obbiettivo della sua piena soddisfazione. Crescere è una continua conquista e un obiettivo che perseguiamo tutti i giorni: il pensiero è dedicato al percorso di crescita e di continuo miglioramento grazie all’ esperienza degli anni maturati  che oggi consente di poter scegliere di acquistare  presso  un'azienda forte, solida e dinamica.

Name: LOOMLAN
Description:
LOOMLAN: Where Sustainability Meets Style
At LOOMLAN, we're committed to more than just furniture; we're dedicated to creating a sustainable future. As a "business for purpose," we blend style with eco-friendly practices, offering furniture that supports ethical manufacturing. 


The LOOMLANDER Community: Your Impact Matters
We call our customers "LOOMLANDERs" because each purchase contributes to environmental initiatives. With every item sold, we plant 10 trees, remove 30 plastic bottles from the ocean, and offset 50 CO2, supporting UN-certified projects. By choosing LOOMLAN, you join a community that cares deeply about the planet.

Join Us: Be a Part of the Change
LOOMLAN is more than a furniture company; we're a movement towards a more sustainable and ethical future. By choosing LOOMLAN, you become part of a community that values the planet and its people. Join us in making a difference, one piece of furniture at a time.


#LOOMLAN #loomlander #globalwarming #climatechange #climateaction #conservation #homedecor #circulareconomy #furnituredesign #givingback #payitforward #madeinamerica #future #inspiration

Nel corso degli anni, questa visione si è evoluta, affermando l’azienda come punto di riferimento nel settore delle ceramiche, dell’arredo bagno, della rubinetteria e del wellness.
L’idea originaria ha subito una profonda trasformazione, abbracciando un concetto di design sempre più raffinato: oggi le superfici non sono più solo elementi funzionali, ma veri e propri oggetti d’arredo per tutta la casa, grazie anche all’utilizzo di grandi lastre e soluzioni di home decor all’avanguardia.

Our products, which include both new and vintage pieces, appeal to connoisseurs and collectors as well as to those who simply appreciate craftsmanship and one-of-a-kind pieces.

Name: Circular Office Group
Description:
Circular Office Group is redefining how organisations and individuals furnish their workspaces, providing a full turnkey solution with furniture, IT, accessories, and even plants to create flexible, ergonomic, and sustainable environments that are ready to go from day one. We have partners with leading brands such as Orangebox, Lenovo, Ezobord, Extremis, Patch Plants, and more.

By embracing a circular economy and Product as a Service (PaaS) approach, Circular Office Group ensures that high-quality, ergonomic furniture is reused, refurbished, and responsibly managed throughout its lifecycle. Its model supports both purchase and subscription options, helping clients achieve sustainability goals such as BREEAM certification, all while converting CapEx into OpEx.

We have a dedicated team experienced in large-scale projects. We manage every step from planning, delivery, and installation through to ongoing maintenance and support, delivering spaces that enhance wellbeing, productivity, and environmental responsibility.

Circular Office Group also offers tailored, home-compliant work-from-home bundles that support employee wellbeing and comfort, ideal for organisations with hybrid or remote working policies.

Disrupting the norm with smarter setups.

Name: ArteHome
Description:
ArteHome powstało z pragnienia do podzielenia się zamiłowaniem do rzeczy pięknych, pełnych blasku i dodających wytworności każdemu wnętrzu. Pomieszczenia w stylu glamour to kwintesencja wytwornej klasyki z nutą nowoczesności w oprawie charakterystycznych kontrastów. Uważamy, że piękno tkwi w detalu i kolorze. W naszym sklepie internetowym można znaleźć wyselekcjonowane i wyjątkowe dodatki do naszych wnętrz. Wszystkie produkty w naszej ofercie, od ekskluzywnych i ponadczasowych mebli, poprzez szeroki wybór luster, aż po inspirujące i zaskakujące dodatki, wyróżnia najwyższa jakość i dbałość o każdy szczegół.

Naszą misją jest zaspokojenie potrzeby piękna, tkwiącej w każdym z Nas. W dążeniu do ideału przyświeca nam pasja, jaką darzymy stylowe meble i dodatki, wierząc w ich moc odmieniania nawet z pozoru nudnych wnętrz. Jesteśmy przekonani o tym, że miejsca, w których spędzamy nasz czas, wpływają na nasz nastrój. Z nami przekonasz się jak możesz odmienić swoje wnętrze i poprawić swoje samopoczucie.

Stawiamy na wysoką jakość obsługi Klienta i fachowe wsparcie podczas szukania wymarzonego dodatku do domu. Wierzymy, że nasze produkty podbiją i skradną Wasze serca!

Odmień z nami swoje wnętrze. Jesteśmy tu dla Was!

Description:
Fundada em 2014, a Apartamento 61 é uma galeria especializada em peças dos maiores designers brasileiros do século XX, como Lina Bo Bardi, Joaquim Tenreiro, Sergio Rodrigues, Jorge Zalszupin, Jean Gillon, Zanine Caldas, Martin Eisler & Carlo Hauner, Giuseppe Scapinelli, entre outros. Além de grandes nomes do design moderno, a galeria também representa designers contemporâneos como Ricardo Graham (Oebanista) e Bianca Barbato.

Localizada no coração de São Paulo, em uma casa modernista desenhada pelo escultor ítalo-brasileiro Victor Brecheret e posteriormente reformada pelo arquiteto Rino Levi, a galeria abriga um acervo refinado de peças à venda.

Mais do que o catálogo disponível, a Apartamento 61 mantém relacionamento próximo com grandes colecionadores e os principais fornecedores do país, tendo acesso a garimpos exclusivos sob demanda para clientes do mundo todo.

A galeria foi idealizada pelo casal Vivian Lobato, jornalista, e André Visockis, designer gráfico, que, ao montar seu próprio apartamento com peças do modernismo brasileiro, perceberam o potencial da curadoria como negócio. A paixão virou ofício, e o que começou como coleção se transformou em galeria.

Name: Zusjes Groen
Description:
Wij zijn Fey en Mirte Groen. Ja, echt waar, onze achternaam is Groen. Wij zijn twee creatieve zussen, die niet alleen ‘groen’ zijn geboren, maar ook groen zijn opgevoed. Fey met een achtergrond in interieur en Mirte met een achtergrond in de mode, viel het ons op dat er veel textiel op de vuilstort belandt. We consumeren er op los, met alle gevolgen van dien. In een tijd waarin grondstoffen schaars zijn en er een overvloed is aan producten, is het tijd voor de Zusjes Groen om onze krachten te binden en te werken aan een groenere wereld.

Dus, zo stroopten wij onze mouwen op en zijn we aan de slag gegaan. Uit verschillende hoeken van Nederland hebben wij ‘afgedankte’ materialen verzameld. Ieder met zijn eigen unieke verhaal. Deze materialen hebben wij elk met zorg, plezier en heel veel liefde een nieuw jasje gegeven en verwerkt in een nieuw product. Want wij geloven dat, juist deze producten en materialen, extra waardevol zijn.

Textiel heeft vaak een emotionele waarden. Het brengt emoties, herinneringen en gebeurtenissen met zich mee. De producten vertellen een verhaal. En dit verhaal vertellen wij graag door. Door het opnieuw bij je te dragen, te gebruiken en er vooral veel plezier van te hebben. Goed voor de wereld én goed voor jou.

Ontdek de kleurrijke wereld van De Zusjes Groen op www.zusjesgroen.nl

Liefs,
Fey en Mirte

Name: B&B Italia, Panamá
Description:
Bienvenido a B&B Italia! Personas, ideas, lugares, proyectos y productos son los que hacen que B&B Italia sea único, ahora como siempre.

B&B Italia es un grupo italiano de renombre internacional líder en el sector del mueble de diseño de alta gama.

El Grupo B&B Italia trabaja en los sectores residencial y contract (hotelería, retail, oficinas y náutica) con sus cuatro marcas, B&B Italia, Maxalto, Arclinea y Azucena.
 
La fructífera colaboración entre el Centro de Investigación y Desarrollo de la empresa, un taller de ideas y excelencia, y los mejores profesionales del diseño internacional permitió la creación de productos icónicos que marcan radicalmente la historia del diseño: Serie Up, Le Bambole y Charles, que son solo algunos de los productos se originaron de la unión creativa entre B&B Italia y los nombres de diseño más prestigiosos, incluidos Antonio Citterio, Piero Lissoni, Mario Bellini, Gaetano Pesce, Naoto Fukasawa, Patricia Urquiola, Barber & Osgerby, Doshi Levien, Michael Anastassiades y muchos otros.

Su sede en Novedrate (Como), fue diseñada en 1971 por Renzo Piano y Richard Rogers. La compañía cuenta con un total de 600 empleados y presencia en más de 80 países a través de 70 tiendas monomarca y 1000 tiendas especializadas.

Desde diciembre de 2018, B&B Italia forma parte de Design Holding, el grupo europeo más grande del mundo en el sector del diseño de alta gama. Investindustrial y The Carlyle Group son propietarios conjuntos de Design Holding, que incluye a B&B Italia Group, así como a empresas líderes en iluminación como Flos. y Louis Poulsen. Design Holding tiene ingresos consolidados de más de 500 millones de euros.

Name: Oikade
Description:
Από τα τέλη της δεκαετίας του '70 η οικογένεια Σταφίδα δραστηριοποιείται συνεχώς στον χώρο του επίπλου στην ελληνική αγορά. 

Το 1999 δημιουργήθηκε το brand Οίκαδε (Αρχαία Ελληνική οἴκαδε < οἶκος + -δε) εγκαινιάζοντας ταυτόχρονα τον ιδιόκτητο σύγχρονο εκθεσιακό χώρο και τις εγκαταστάσεις στην περιοχή  Ίλιον στην Αθήνα. 

Στόχος του Οίκαδε είναι να παρουσιάσει και να προωθήσει στον τελικό καταναλωτή ενήμερες, επώνυμες και ποιοτικές προτάσεις επίπλων, φωτιστικών και ειδών διακόσμησης για τον οικιακό και επαγγελματικό χώρο. Το άρτια εκπαιδευμένο και εξειδικευμένο προσωπικό μας αναλαμβάνει την μελέτη και υλοποίηση του έργου σας παρέχοντας υπηρεσίες διακόσμησης προσαρμοσμένες στο σήμερα με καινοτόμες παροχές και τεχνολογίες.

Το Οίκαδε συνεχίζει την 23ετή επιτυχημένη πορεία του στον χώρο του ελληνικού design με επώνυμες συνεργασίες με μεγάλους οίκους του εξωτερικού αλλά και της εγχώριας κατασκευής επίπλων και φωτισμού. Πάντα βασισμένο στην εμπιστοσύνη και την αγάπη που εισπράττει όλα αυτά τα χρόνια.

Συμβαδίζοντας με τις εξελίξεις το 2022 το Οίκαδε δημιούργησε το δικό του διαδικτυακό κατάστημα κάνοντας την πρόσβαση στα προϊόντα και τις υπηρεσίες του πιο άμεση.
Βρείτε περισσότερα στην ιστοσελίδα μας  www.oikade.com.gr

Since the end of the 70s, Stafidas family has been continuously active in the field of furniture in the Greek market.

In 1999, the brand Oikade was created (Ancient Greek oikade < οἶκος + -δε) simultaneously inaugurating the privately owned modern showroom and facilities in the Ilion area of Athens.

The aim of Oikade is to present and promote to the end consumer informed, branded and quality proposals of furniture, lighting and decorative items for the home and business. 

Oikade continues its 23-year successful course in the field of Greek design with branded collaborations with major foreign and domestic furniture and lighting manufacturers. 

Keeping up with developments in 2022, Oikade created created its own online store. Visit: www.oikade.com.gr

Name: PurCerès
Description:
Purceres, özel tasarlanmış mermer kalıplarda el yapımı olarak üretilen, zarafeti ve benzersizliğiyle öne çıkan bir mum markasıdır. Her bir ürünümüz, doğanın en kaliteli malzemeleriyle ve ustalarımızın özenli çalışmasıyla, titizlikle hazırlanır. Ürünlerimizde kullanılan esanslar, özenle seçilir ve doğal bir karışım sürecinden geçirilerek sizler için hazırlanır. Her bir mumun özgün mitolojik bir karaktere sahip olması koku notalarının da özenle seçilmesine neden olmuştur. Mitolojik tanrılardan esinlenen mumlar, uzun süre kalıcı bir koku yaymasını sağlayacak şekilde hazırlanmıştır. Ancak, sadece kalıcı koku sunmakla kalmayız; aynı zamanda evlerinizde eşsiz bir atmosfer oluştururuz.

Özel tasarlanmış mermer kalıplarımız, her bir mumun benzersiz ve estetik bir görünüme sahip olmasını sağlar. Bu kalıplar, Purceres mumlarının sadece hoş bir koku değil, aynı zamanda görsel bir şölen sunmasına olanak tanır. Mermer kalıpları ustaların ellerinde sizler için özenle hazırlanır.
Purceres olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini her şeyin üzerinde tutarız. Kalite ve el işçiliğine verdiğimiz önemi korurken, her bir müşterimize tatmin edici bir alışveriş deneyimi sunmak için çaba gösteririz. Evlerinizdeki atmosferi dönüştürmek ve kalıcı bir etki bırakmak için özenle tasarlanmış olan Purceres mumları, antik çağlardan gelen hikayeleriyle evinizin atmosferini mistik bir hale dönüştürür. Her bir mum, özel bir öyküyü yansıtarak, evinizde unutulmaz bir deneyim sunar.

Description:
Во ARYA MATERASSO - Sleep Shop веруваме дека секој заслужува повеќе од само место за спиење. Нудиме внимателно одбран асортиман на душеци, кревети, перници и постелнини со висок квалитет, создадени за удобност и траен квалитет.

Нашата мисија е едноставна — да ти помогнеме да спиеш подобро, да живееш подобро и да се будиш одморен секој ден. Без разлика дали бараш нов душек или целосна трансформација на спалната соба, нашиот тим е тука да ти помогне да го најдеш совршеното решение за спиење.

Посети нè онлајн или во продавница и откриј колку добриот сон може да го промени твојот живот.

Name: COVOLO SRL
Description: Covolo srl nasce nel 1987 con sede a Molvena iniziando la propria attività nel settore della fornitura e posa di pavimenti e rivestimenti. Negli anni l'innata propensione all'innovazione, ha portato l'azienda ad affacciarsi al mondo dell'arredo bagno e del riscaldamento domestico.La formazione settimanale di tutto lo staff offre al cliente un servizio sempre aggiornato con le ultime novità, sia in termini di design che di sviluppo tecnologico.Grazie ad uno show room in continua evoluzione e alla collaborazione affiatata con i nostri partner, offriamo un servizio completo pronto a soddisfare ogni esigenza.

Name: Best Deal
Description: Nous sommes une entreprise spécialisée dans la vente d'équipements de maison, de décorations et de nécessités de cuisine. Notre mission est de fournir à nos clients tout ce dont ils ont besoin pour rendre leur maison confortable, élégante et fonctionnelle. Avec une large sélection de produits de qualité, nous sommes là pour aider nos clients à transformer leur espace de vie en un véritable sanctuaire de confort et de style.

Name: DarwazehLiving
Description: The home of the most luxurious brands from all over the world, selected to meet your taste, style and comfort. Operated by our passionate and professional designers, offering you a wide range of furniture, home accessories, lighting, carpets, wallpapers, curtains and interior design services. Ever since its establishment in 1982, the company has been catering to the most reöned tastes in high-end furniture. We strive to make every project a piece of art and satisfy our clients to have their own signature in the design.

Name: Quarters
Description:
Quarters is a concept store and gathering space created by Felicia Hung and Nick Ozemba, founders of the design studio In Common With. Styled as a residence in a 19th-century Tribeca loft, Quarters represents a marriage of warmth and grandeur, and an inventive understanding of the concept of home. Visitors are warmly welcomed to explore the entirety of the In Common With lighting collection alongside curated vintage furnishings, rare books, specialty pantry items, and independent works by peers and fellow artists.Through ongoing collaborations with artists, designers, gallerists, and chefs, Quarters explores how we live with objects and come together around them.

After hours, Quarters is available for private events, from intimate dinners and celebrations to brand activations and cultural programming.

Quarters reimagines elements of familiar spaces—the traditional showroom, the well-appointed shop, to craft a vision of home and hospitality that’s not only novel, but ever-shifting, improvisational, and alive.

Name: Rénu Design
Description: Rénu is humbly established by Christophe Glorieux’ intuitive passion for personal interiors and interior items with a story. His aim is to add comfort and joy in a space with handpicked objects that radiate life. Original and authentic, bringing value to your home or professional environment. His renovated barn studio in Drongen is open on appointment for showroom and advice. Every weekend and holiday his Gallery store in Knokke is open for public.

Name: Junto
Description:
Chez Junto, nous créons bien plus que des braseros.

Nous proposons des pièces uniques, conçues et fabriquées en France, qui allient design, convivialité et élégance.

Notre mission? Sublimer vos moments en extérieur en créant des instants de partage et de chaleur, que ce soit en famille, entre amis ou dans un cadre professionnel.

Retrouvez-nous sur notre site internet pour découvrir comment nous transformons chaque instant autour du feu en un moment d’exception.

Name: Muebles Lluesma
Description:
En Muebles Lluesma, nos apasiona transformar espacios con muebles modernos y elegantes desde 1940. Como líderes en la industria del diseño de interiores, ofrecemos una amplia gama de muebles y accesorios únicos que combinan estilo contemporáneo con funcionalidad excepcional.

Nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la innovación nos ha permitido colaborar con reconocidos diseñadores y marcas internacionales, asegurando que cada pieza en nuestra colección refleje la excelencia en el diseño.

Desde nuestro showroom en Valencia y nuestra tienda online, brindamos inspiración y soluciones personalizadas a clientes en todo el mundo. Ya sea para hogares, espacios comerciales o proyectos de interiorismo, estamos aquí para ayudarte a crear ambientes extraordinarios.

Únete a nosotros en Muebles Lluesma y descubre cómo podemos llevar el arte del diseño a tu vida cotidiana.

Name: Antolini Arredamenti
Description:
UN AMBIZIOSO AVVENIRE COSTRUITO SU SOLIDE RADICI

Antolini Arredamenti è oggi un negozio d'arredamento conosciuto ed apprezzato nel territorio locale, il cui esordio si colloca intorno agli anni Venti in una bottega di falegnameria, passando alla produzione di mobili in serie e approdando all'attuale struttura dedicata alla commercializzazione. Questo lungo cammino ci permette di offrire professionalità, esperienza, affidabilità ed efficienza: ecco quello che viene messo a disposizione dei nostri clienti, per costruire insieme, passo dopo passo, il loro progetto, fino a realizzare un ambiente che, rispecchiando le aspettative ed i desideri di ciascuno, comunichi benessere e serenità a chi lo vive.

Name: Schmidt Strasbourg Centre
Description:
Sublimez votre espace avec Schmidt Strasbourg Centre !
Depuis 2019, membre du Groupe Erhart votre magasin se distingue par son expertise dans tous les types d’ #aménagement. Nous habillons votre maison, de la cave au grenier en passant par la #cuisine. De la création des #vues3D à la réalisation concrète de votre projet d’ #ameublement, Schmidt Strasbourg Centre est le partenaire qu’il vous faut !
Notre équipe #dynamique et forte de ses #compétences techniques, diplômée en architecture d’intérieur et en décoration, vous apporte des #solutions adaptées. Nous vous accompagnons dans la réalisation de vos projets #surmesure chez vous et dans vos locaux professionnels.
Notre objectif : avancer à vos côtés avec une marque de renom et un produit de qualité fabriqué en #Alsace pour faire naître vos projets d’agencement.
Contactez Schmidt Strasbourg Centre dès aujourd’hui et collaborez avec les leaders de l’aménagement à la #maison comme au #bureau !

Name: InSTYLE Home & Rugs
Description:
Since its inception by its founder Alvin Pourvakil in 2003, InSTYLE Home & Rugs has been your complete modern home furnishings source for the best design, quality, service and price for the past 19 years. Shop in store or browse online through our extensive collection of modern European style furnishings and decorative accessories.

We specialize in contemporary furnishings in Toronto, for living rooms, dining areas and bedrooms, as well as multifunctional furniture pieces such as sofas and sectionals, sofa beds, ottomans, home office desks, extendable dining tables, dining chairs, bar and kitchen counter stools, entertainment TV units, mirrors, decorative paintings and much more.

Name: Besarto
Description:
BESARTO designs and produces unique lifestyle products for outdoor and indoor.

Ultimate relaxation during every season of the year, for which BESARTO  develops affordable innovative products. Beach, garden, living room or workplace, BESARTO designs products that offer comfort, are durable and beautiful.

BESARTO is the combination of the English "Bespoke" and the Italian "Sartoriale", both of which means traditional custom work.

A sustainable future cannot be missed, which is why our products are washable, last a long time and are of course recyclable.

Experience for yourself the passion with which the products are developed, and step into the World of BESARTO.

Name: Sierra Dreams
Description: At Sierra Dreams, we are redefining the way you experience comfort and style in your home. With a fresh approach to home decor, we blend innovation, modern design, and unparalleled comfort to create products that elevate your home to new heights.

Name: ViaÉvora
Description: Produtos para Casa & Decoração.

Name: Diluvium
Description: Somos una tienda en línea que vende productos para evitar inundaciones en casas y negocios

Name: RELATIVE DECOR LLC
Description:
At Relative Decor, we believe our customers' surroundings should be beautiful, stylish, high-quality, and functional.

Our complete room packages include carefully selected furniture, wall decor, accessories, essential items, and soft goods.

We currently service Manatee, Sarasota, Hardee, Desoto, Charlotte, and Lee Counties.

Name: Presente ao Cubo
Description:
Nós da Presente ao Cubo acreditamos que um ambiente com personalidade atrai boas energias, melhora o humor e torna o espaço mais aconchegante. Aliado a isso, o ato de presentear, seja a si próprio ou ao outro, traz uma nobre combinação de sentimentos que vai de encontro ao que queremos projetar pelo mundo.

Nosso processo produtivo é ligado à revolucionária técnica de impressão 3D em filamento plástico (PLA), material biodegradável e de origem vegetal, com cada peça sendo feita sob encomenda para seu pedido. Com isso, conseguimos uma redução de impactos ambientais, sem necessidade de estoque, utilizando-se da ideia de produção descentralizada através das novas tecnologias.

Comprando na Presente ao Cubo você incentiva a inovação e o design independente brasileiro.

Name: Sweetnight Mattress
Description:
‘SweetNight’ is a rapidly growing global mattress and sleep solutions company bringing high quality sleep related products to the world. With over 2,000 employees internationally, our factories in both Indonesia and China, supplies to the world’s largest markets such as North America, Asia, Europe, and the Middle East. Having more than a decade of hard work, tireless research and understanding in quality sleep needs SweetNight strives to bring quality sleep solutions to the world.

Starting from humble beginnings as an affordable mattress manufacturer, SweetNight realised that ‘modern sleepers needed modern sleep solutions,’ and began developing high-quality memory foam mattresses using eco-friendly plant-oil based production techniques. The initial SweetNight product line, which focused on affordable luxury was a great success in the American market, with endorsement from industry experts and media such as Forbes, Slumber Yard and more. 

Having more than a decade of hard work, tireless research and understanding in quality sleep needs SweetNight strives to bring quality sleep solutions to the world.

Name: Maverick Soul Interiors
Description: Maverick Soul Interiors is a thoughtfully designed online lighting and home decor destination. We've gone global hunting & styling so you don't have to, for an illuminated home that’s as unique & adventurous as you are.

Name: Nova Vita
Description:
Nova Vita c'est la marketplace de meubles vintage relookés.

Boutique en ligne de meubles anciens, chinés et relookés par des créateurs passionnés de la France entière.

Sur Nova Vita, chaque meuble a une âme sœur qui l'attend quelque part.

Sur Nova Vita, vous trouverez des meubles:
Uniques: Votre ami.e n'aura jamais le même meuble que vous, c'est promis!
Responsables: Luttez contre le gaspillage en donnant une nouvelle vie aux meubles.
Locaux: Favorisez l'économie locale grâce au filtre géographique.
Authentiques: Réveillez l'âme des meubles grâce au travail de créateurs passionnés.

Vous pouvez y shopper des chevets Art Déco repeints, des tables vintage patinées ou encore des secrétaires anciens peints au pochoir. Les prix commencent à 60€ et peuvent aller jusqu'à 1 000€ pour les grosses pièces. 

La promesse de Nova Vita? 

Dépoussiérer les meubles anciens, mettre à l’honneur l’artisanat de créateurs locaux et lutter contre le gaspillage !

Name: norliving aps
Description:
norliving aps ejes af to partnere, Mikkel Elgstrøm og Patrick Jespersen som har mange års erfaring fra møbelbranchen og e-commerce. 
Vi har møbler, senge og interiør til hele dit hjem fra kendte danske og udenlandske brands.
Mere end 10.000 kunder har handlet hos os på bare fire år!

Flagship store Hillerød
På vores adresse i Hillerød driver vi vores møbelforretning på 1000 m2, smagfuldt indrettet med senge, møbler og interiør til hele hjemmet. Vi yder kompetent betjening og et super lækkert udvalg. Herfra driver vi ligeledes vores e-handel. 

Ubemandet showroom i Vejle
I Vejle har vi et 100% ubemandet showroom på 300 m2 med et lidt mindre udvalg af vores produkter. 

Vores vision
Vi vil tilbyde et bredt sortiment inden for senge, møbler og indretning til de bedste priser og betingelser.

Name: VAN YILD TEGELS
Description:
Met trots presenteren wij ons toonaangevende tegelverkoopbedrijf, ondersteund door een team van 25 ervaren en toegewijde tegelzetters. Met meer dan 25 jaar ervaring in de industrie zijn wij dé bestemming voor hoogwaardige tegels en professioneel vakmanschap.

Onze uitgebreide showroom biedt een uitgebreide selectie tegels van topkwaliteit, variërend van tijdloze klassiekers tot de nieuwste trends in design. Of het nu gaat om keramische, natuursteen, mozaïek of porseleinen tegels, wij hebben de perfecte oplossing voor elk project, groot of klein.

Wat ons onderscheidt, is ons team van deskundige tegelzetters. Met een schat aan ervaring en een passie voor perfectie, staan zij garant voor vakmanschap van het hoogste niveau. Of het nu gaat om het betegelen van vloeren, wanden, keukens, badkamers of buitenruimtes, onze tegelzetters leveren altijd uitmuntend werk met oog voor detail en precisie.

Bij ons staat klanttevredenheid voorop. Onze vriendelijke en deskundige medewerkers staan klaar om u te begeleiden bij elke stap van het proces, van het kiezen van de juiste tegels tot de professionele installatie ervan. Wij streven ernaar om aan al uw wensen en eisen te voldoen en uw visie tot leven te brengen, met resultaten die zowel duurzaam als esthetisch verbluffend zijn.

Kies voor ons tegelverkoopbedrijf en geniet van de perfecte combinatie van hoogwaardige producten, professioneel vakmanschap en uitstekende klantenservice. We kijken ernaar uit om met u samen te werken aan uw volgende tegelproject.

Name: Krea & Colifac
Description:
Thuiskomen bij Krea en Colifac. 

Wat in 1949 begon als een modebedrijf, is vandaag uitgegroeid tot twee gerenommeerde interieurzaken in Sint-Niklaas. Dit familiebedrijf, doorgegeven van generatie op generatie, staat bekend om zijn toewijding aan kwaliteit en persoonlijke service.

Bij Colifac vind je een selectie van tijdloze merken en stijlvolle interieurstukken, perfect voor wie op zoek is naar duurzame kwaliteit voor het leven.

Krea biedt betaalbare en veelzijdige oplossingen voor elke woning. Het is de ideale plek voor iedereen die op zoek is naar kwaliteit en functionaliteit met een stijlvol design.

Kom langs bij onze winkels in Sint-Niklaas en ontdek samen met onze interieurspecialisten hoe we jouw woonwensen tot leven kunnen brengen.

Name: Homeland Center GmbH
Description:
At Homeland there is always something for me, great inspiration, good quality a local cafe with coffee that touch my senses to be enjoyed in a welcoming environment.

 Homeland Center GmbH
 Vienna, Austria 
 Opening: Fall 2025
Because living is more than furniture. It's an attitude.

⸻

We don't just build spaces – we create experiences.

Homeland represents a new generation of home & interior stores: design-driven, immersive, and human-centered. Starting in fall 2025, we will launch a modern concept across three levels – combining furniture, kitchenware, home accessories, textiles, and bathroom products with gastronomy, inspiration, and digital convenience.

Become part of the team – and help shape a one-of-a-kind project.

We’re looking for passionate individuals with vision and heart to bring this innovative concept to life. Whether in sales, visual merchandising, purchasing, marketing, or customer service – at Homeland, you help shape the future.

⸻

What you can expect:

 An inspiring work environment with fully staged living spaces
 Modern technologies & digital touchpoints for customers and staff alike
 A place to connect – our Café Vienna as a meeting spot for clients & colleagues
 A family-like company culture with real opportunities for growth
 Excellent accessibility, modern infrastructure & benefits that support your daily life

⸻

Our vision as an employer:

We believe in the potential of every individual. At Homeland, you can contribute, grow, and become part of a movement that redefines the way we live – emotionally, functionally, and with attention to detail.

Excited to be part of something from the very beginning?
We look forward to hearing from you – or receiving your application via our careers page.

Name: Wocha
Description: Bij Wocha hechten we veel waarde aan een goede nachtrust én het maken van een positieve impact. Met zorg hebben we de hoogste kwaliteit linnen en katoen satijnen materialen geselecteerd om beddengoed van te maken. Door samen te werken met verschillende stichtingen dragen we ook bij aan lokale en nationale initiatieven om mensen te helpen.

Name: Owen & Finch
Description:
Of je nu een professional bent die aan een project werkt, of op zoek bent naar producten voor je eigen badkamer, Owen & Finch biedt een breed assortiment uniek sanitair met een eigenwijze en eigenzinnige twist. Wij geloven dat een badkamer niet enkel functioneel moet zijn, maar ook moet voldoen aan uw persoonlijke stijl en smaak.

Wij streven ernaar dat jij kan pronken met unieke items, wat Owen & Finch mogelijk maakt door een combinatie van trendy design en exclusieve producten aan te bieden. 

We spenderen dagelijks heel wat tijd in de badkamer, dus waarom zou deze ook niet stijlvol ingericht mogen zijn? 

Al onze producten zijn gemaakt om lang mee te gaan waarbij alleen materialen en vakmanschap van de hoogste kwaliteit worden gebruikt.

Alle producten zijn gemaakt van loodvrij messing. Ze zijn met precisie ontworpen om te werken en te blijven werken volgens Europese
normen en voorwaarden. Ze zijn verkrijgbaar in een reeks kleuren en afwerkingen die het besten passen bij uw eigen individuele smaak en behoeften. In feite is ons design één van onze belangrijkste redenen waarom we ons onderscheiden. Deze prachtige nieuwe serie, de Opal
Collectie, is gebaseerd op de veelzijdige textuur, strakke en aantrekkelijke lijnen en ongecompliceerde functionaliteiten onderstrepen deze collectie. Deze collectie weerspiegelt moderne designtrends met een luxe uitstraling.

Name: H&H créateur de meubles / XOOON ATOLL - ANGERS
Veneta Cucine Belgique
Description:
Showroom exclusif Veneta Cucine Belgique !
Nous sommes ravis de vous annoncer l'ouverture de notre nouveau showroom Veneta Cucine à Gosselies !

Veneta Cucine est une entreprise familiale avec une histoire longue de plus de 50 ans. Au fil des années, la petite réalité locale s’est transformée en une multinationale, devenant ainsi la plus grande plateforme italienne de meubles de cuisine.

Une excellence industrielle italienne qui a évolué dans le temps grâce à l’instinct de son fondateur encore à la tête de l’entreprise et accompagné de ses trois fils. L’entreprise a su se rénover dans le temps en passant d’un modèle de type entrepreneurial à un modèle de type managérial, impliquant une équipe de managers en charge des différents cadres de compétence.

Fondée en 1967 dans la province de Trévise, l’entreprise prend le nom de Veneta Cucine S.p.A. en 1978. Le Groupe, avec ses 120.000 m2 d’espace industriel couvert, comprenant le site de Biancade (Trévise) qui accueille la production et les bureaux, ainsi que l’usine d’ennoblissement du bois de Codissago - Longarone (Belluno) et quelle de San Biagio di Callalta (TV) dediée à la ligne de produits Caranto, emploie plus de 800 personnes grâce auxquelles il conçoit, gère et distribue 10 systèmes, 40 modèles sur 5 différents caissons, totalisant ainsi 300 options de couleurs et de matériaux. Cela donne lieu à d’infinies possibilités de personnalisations et à la commercialisation de 90.000 cuisines chaque année.

2021 voit le lancement du nouveau plan industriel qui vise un saut dimensionnel significatif de l'entreprise à travers le développement international de l'activité.

Name: Kim Soo Home
Description:
The Kim Soo story began in 2015 out of a decaying and wonderful old Dutch Colonial style building, in Seminyak, Bali. We lived in this setting and drew inspiration from the spiritual surroundings, the bohemia that was on our doorstep, the now iconic arches and quirky beauty. We transformed her thick white masonry walls into a place of natural calm and personal style and in the process, found ourselves surrounded by the exceptional artisans of Indonesia.

As it happens in love, we quickly fell for their craft and soon we began dreaming about our own vision of beauty; something stylish, decorative and spirited, something unpretentious and filled with island ease. We knew that it would be hard to label so we decided to instead be just that; very nicely hard to label. And in that moment the Kim Soo brand was born.

At the heart of the brand and store are the curators. A mother-daughter duo, driven by passion and their shared vision of the rare and beautiful. Together with their team they search the Indonesian Archipelago while working alongside local artisans to source and create pieces that promise to capture that je ne sais quoi spirit Kim Soo has become renowned for by locals and tourists alike.

Name: Verde Interior
Description: Bij ons draait alles om het creëren van unieke interieurs die perfect passen bij uw levensstijl en persoonlijke smaak. Wij nemen de tijd om naar uw wensen en behoeftes te luisteren en creëren vervolgens een op maat gemaakt ontwerp dat perfect bij uw huis en stijl past.

Name: Weaver Green
Description:
At Weaver Green, we transform discarded plastic bottles into beautiful, practical textiles. Our journey began when founders Tasha and Barney, with backgrounds in organic drinks and flooring, were inspired by a fishing rope made from plastic bottles during their travels in Asia and this moment sparked the idea of converting plastic waste into a practical yarns.

Barney's expertise in textiles and Tasha's design and environmental ethos combined to address the issue of the 35 billion plastic bottles discarded yearly. Their goal was to create a textile that looked and felt like wool but was machine washable, stain-resistant, environmentally friendly, and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. After seven years of research and development, they perfected a process to turn hard plastic into soft, wool-like fibres.

Today, from their Devonshire home, Tasha, Barney, and their team offer a wide range of stylish, sustainable products. They continually improve their sustainability practices, ensuring a positive environmental impact.

All our textiles are hand-loomed, with artisans in Europe and Asia paid fairly and working safely. Our commitment to quality and ethical production ensures our products are as kind to people as they are to the planet.

Name: NOOK - Outdoor Living
Description:
Stil | Design | Qualität | Komfort |Funktionalität |
→ Das ist NOOK! 

 Mit unserer Exklusivität wird dein Aussenbereich zur Luxusoase!

Name: Hästens Cape Town
Description:
At Hästens, we strive for a world where people sleep well – one that’s more joyful, peaceful and loving. Every day since 1852, we continue to hone our world-class craft in our factory in Köping, Sweden.

Sleep may be today’s ultimate modern luxury. But it’s more than that; it’s a biological necessity and the foundation of our entire wellbeing. We want people to sleep well so that they can create the future they dream of upon waking. That’s why our master craftsmen consider and handcraft every detail of our bespoke designs using only the finest natural materials.

We are proud to be a world-class international brand, operating in more than 40 countries with over 300 partners in Europe, Asia, America and Africa – and still growing.

Name: Cosmostyle
Description: Our experienced team at Cosmostyle are dedicated to creating the perfect bespoke window solution for any space. Cosmostyle offers a range of window solutions from bespoke curtains and roman blinds, to quality custom-made shutters, motorised blinds, outdoor blinds and awnings.

mad over metal is a Bespoke Luxury brand offering tailor made products which reflects one's true self.

Name: Oak Furniture Store NZ & AU
Description: By offering a wide ranges of high quality hard wood furniture at affordable prices to every families in New Zealand, we ensure competitive prices, prompt delivery and a after-sales service to ensure that all our customers are satisfied at every stage of a purchase. Whatever you might be searching for, we supply solid hard wooden furniture for every room of the house, in a vast range of designs to suit any type of décor. From the hall way when you walk in, to the bedroom when you go to bed, we ensure only the best quality furniture for your home. We guarantee the best furniture solutions for your varying needs. Our approach is simple: we make beautiful, high quality and solid hardwood furniture accessible to every family in NZ.  Our online store is fully supportive of e commerce functionality, please feel free and confident to shop on our online store, we also keen to hear your feedback about our products and services for our overall improvement in the future.

Name: Harisons Furnishings

Name: India Craft Art
Description:
Empowering Rural Women:
Our story is a tapestry interwoven with the narratives of rural women who are the backbone of India Craft Art. These talented professionals have honed their craft over time, but they've been held back by barriers such as limited connectivity, lack of transportation, and an inability to communicate. But we've changed that. We've torn down those walls, forged connections, and bridged the gap between these gifted professionals and the right consumers. In doing so, we've transformed lives, uplifted families, and strengthened entire communities.
Why Choose India Craft Art?
When you choose India Craft Art, you're not just acquiring beautifully crafted artefacts; you're supporting a movement that empowers women, preserves traditional art forms, and uplifts communities. Every piece you bring into your home is a story waiting to be shared, a dream realized, and a future brighter for many.

Come, join us on this incredible Journey:
This isn't just our story; it's yours too. Connect with us here on LinkedIn and become a part of this remarkable journey. Stay updated on our latest offerings, stories of empowerment, and exclusive handcrafted collections. Together, we can continue to spread happiness and celebrate the rich heritage of Indian craftsmanship.
Together, let’s build a better world, one jute creation at a time.

Bij Keukens van Hoorn draait alles om vakmanschap, kwaliteit en service. Wij ontwerpen, leveren en plaatsen high-end maatwerk keukens die volledig aansluiten op de wensen en levensstijl van onze klanten. Van strak modern tot tijdloos klassiek – wij realiseren keukens die niet alleen functioneel zijn, maar ook een statement maken in elk interieur.

Dankzij onze samenwerking met de grootste bladenleveranciers en de meest innovatieve apparatuurmerken bieden wij keukens van topkwaliteit, voorzien van de nieuwste technologieën en hoogwaardige afwerkingen. Onze aandacht voor detail en passie voor het vak maken het verschil.

Naast keukens bieden wij ook een breed assortiment aan kwalitatieve PVC-vloeren in diverse stijlen en structuren. Dit maakt ons de ideale partner voor een complete interieurtransformatie.

Transparantie, kwaliteit en service staan bij ons op nummer één. Wij geloven in eerlijk advies, heldere communicatie en een persoonlijke aanpak. Ons doel? Een keuken en interieur creëren waar u jarenlang met plezier van geniet.

 Op zoek naar een keuken op maat? Neem contact met ons op en ontdek de mogelijkheden!

Name: Nordic Ergo
Description:
Hos Nordic Ergo er der fokus på ergonomiske kontorløsninger, til både små og store kontorer.
Vi er eksperter i ergonomiske kontorløsninger, samt tilbehør til kontorer.

Jeg var træt af at sidde i min kontorstol hele dagen og få ondt i ryggen. Som kontorarbejder vidste jeg, hvor vigtigt det var at have et komfortabelt og ergonomisk arbejdsmiljø, men jeg kunne ikke finde en stol, der passede til mine behov.

Efter år med brug af en billig og ubehagelig kontorstol, begyndte mine rygsmerter at påvirke både mit arbejde og min fritid. Efter et besøg hos min kiropraktor, kom sætningen: 

“Den næste stilling er den bedste stilling”.

Jeg vidste, at jeg måtte gøre noget ved dette problem. Jeg begyndte at afsøge markedet efter kontorstole, der imødekom denne devise, men til en overkommelig pris. Desværre ledte flere timers søgning ikke til nogen svar.

Jeg besluttede mig for at tage sagen i egen hånd og skabe vores eget brand af ergonomiske produkter – Nordic Ergo var født. Jeg samlede en gruppe kontorarbejdere, der ligesom mig forstod vigtigheden af at have et godt arbejdsmiljø.

Vores mission blev at hjælpe folk med at skabe en mere ergonomisk arbejdskultur, hvor produktivitet og trivsel går hånd i hånd. Vi tror på, at et bedre arbejdsmiljø fører til en bedre work/life balance, hvor vi kan arbejde mere produktivt og stadig have tid til at slappe af og nyde vores fritid. 

Vi er dedikerede til at levere produkter af høj kvalitet for alle.

RANKL macht Ihr Leben draußen – und mit ausgewählten Produkten auch drin – zum Erlebnis. Zum sinnlichen Fest. Zum perfekten Moment. Sehr individuell. Sehr qualitäts- und serviceorientiert. With a focus on high-quality ingredients and thoughtful design, we aim to bring a touch of elegance and a sense of discovery to every home. Whether it's Paris, New York, or Brussels, our candles capture the essence of travel, making every moment a memorable one.

Name: Kart Bux

Welcome to Kart Bux, your premier destination for all your pooja samagri needs. Our aim is to streamline your search for Indian pooja items online, offering convenience without compromising authenticity.

At Kart Bux, we're more than just a store – we're a manifestation of our deep-rooted reverence for religious practices. Our founders, driven by a profound spiritual inspiration, envisioned a platform that seamlessly blends age-old traditions with modern technology. The result is Kart Bux – a unique puja store that bridges the gap between tradition and innovation.

Our offerings extend beyond pooja essentials to encompass a wide array of home decor items, including incense burners, dhoop stands, brass statues, and pooja plates. Whether you're seeking to adorn your living space or create a sacred sanctuary within your home, Kart Bux has everything you need to elevate your surroundings.

Join us on a journey to rediscover the beauty and sanctity of Indian traditions.

Name: Hogar Mobiliario
Description: Nuestra historia comienza hace un par de décadas, cuando se fundó con la idea de poner al alcance del usuario, productos de los mejores fabricantes de mobiliario nacionales e internacionales, muchos de los cuales no contaban con un punto de distribución en la provincia, Hogar Mobiliario cuenta con el trabajo y la experiencia de muchos años trabajando en interiorismo de Vanguardia, lo cual le permite continuar innovando y proponiendo nuevos conceptos sin caer en la repetición, la imitación, o influenciarse con modas que llegan tarde o incluso que se interpretan incorrectamente debido a la inexperiencia. Hogar Mobiliario no es un Estudio de Interiorismo al uso, ya que nació como Showroom y es por ello por lo que es reconocido. Cabe destacar, que todo esto no sería posible sin un equipo humano detrás. El nuevo departamento de diseño, arquitectura y reformas. Después de años realizando todo tipo de proyectos integrales, Hogar Mobiliario incorpora disciplinas específicas para todas las fases de proyecto, ofreciendo a sus clientes el “servicio total”. Esto permite mejorar exponencialmente los resultados finales y la eficiencia presupuestaria, requisitos esenciales para los clientes que buscan sacar el máximo partido a sus viviendas, sin tener que preocuparse por la coordinación, revisión y problemas derivados de la mala gestión de los recursos existentes.

Name: Hometex-Messe
Description:
Die erfolgreichen Branchenmessen ABK OPEN und ABK OPEN Home firmieren ab 2024 einheitlich unter dem Markennamen „Hometex“. Im Zuge der Namensänderung wurde der gesamte Messeauftritt überarbeitet und das CI einem Facelifting unterzogen. Der neue Auftritt ist modern und frisch.

Unverändert bleibt aber das Erfolgsrezept: kostenfreier Eintritt, kostenlose Parkplätze, kostenlose Messeverpflegung von morgens bis abends, entspannte Messeparty auf der stimmungsvollen Eventfläche am Mittwochabend. Wo sonst trifft sich die Branche. Die Hometex ist Impuls- und Taktgeber. Intensiver Gedankenaustausch zwischen Industrie und Handel prägen die Messe von Anfang an.

Die Hometex Sommer 2024 ist seit Ende Februar ausgebucht. Die verfügbaren 20.000 m² Ausstellungsflächen in 2 Messehallen sind komplett belegt. 160 Aussteller mit 250 Marken, darunter das who is who der Lieferanten für Schlafsysteme, Bettwaren sowie Haus- und Heimtextilien aus dem DACH-Bereich freuen sich auf zahlreichen Besuch.

Name: Circular Furniture
Description:
Hos Circular Furniture arbejder vi for at gøre ansvarligt forbrug til det oplagte valg. Vi giver erhvervsmøbler et længere liv ved at købe, istandsætte og sælge brugt inventar til virksomheder, der ønsker kvalitet og bæredygtighed – uden at gå på kompromis med pris, funktionalitet eller design.

Circular Furniture er en del af Be2Green – Skandinaviens førende platform for cirkulær håndtering af erhvervsinventar.

Det betyder, at vores kunder ikke blot får adgang til markedets bedste udvalg af pre-owned møbler, men også til Be2Greens professionelle services inden for registrering, logistik, reparation, upcycling og CO₂-dokumentation.

Vi leverer klarhed, kvalitet og omtanke – i volumen og til tiden. Som kunde hos os får I 100 % tryghed, 5 års reklamationsret, hurtig levering og fast lav fragtpris.

Sammen med Be2Green gør vi cirkulær indretning nem, skalerbar og målbart ansvarlig. Fordi god stil også kan være god samvittighed.

Un chemin d'idées pour arriver à votre idéal.

Vous souhaitez intégrer une équipe soudée et dynamique, le tout dans un cadre de travail agréable ?

L’entreprise vous offrira un grand panel d’objectifs vous permettant une certaine diversification dans vos missions, qu’elles soient sous forme de projet ou temporaires. 

Vous souhaitez faire grandir l’entreprise et développer son image ? 

En recherche perpétuelle de nouvelles idées pour acquérir de nouveaux marchés et mettre en avant nos services, nous sommes à votre écoute pour développer chacune de nos facultés afin d’être toujours plus grand et plus présent dans l’esprit de nos clients. 

Bien plus qu’un lieu de travail, vous découvrirez des locaux remplis de savoir-faire

Name: French Country Collections
Description:
At French Country Collections, we have been passionately pursuing our dream to bring homes to life, for over 30 years. We believe a home isn't created overnight. It is built on and curated over time. Home is a collection of our treasures, memories, and experiences that we simply cannot live without.

Our collections are inspired by the simple luxury of the French way of life, and our passion for creating homes made to be lived in, loved and shared. Our style is an easy blend of classic appeal and modern-day aesthetic. Each piece has an enduring quality designed for living. From a big family dinner to a lazy Sunday lie in, our products bring every corner of your home to life. 

Founded by Sonia Watts around her kitchen table, family is still firmly at the heart of French Country Collections today. Sonia’s original passion for collecting – seeking out things that are both beautiful and useful – still forms the foundation of every product today. 

You will find our homewares available throughout New Zealand and Australia from select home and design retailers, online, and from our flagship store and outlet shops in Auckland, New Zealand.
