Name: LAPEYRE (GROUPE PARALLIANCE)
Description:
Filiales du Groupe PARALLIANCE et spécialistes de l'aménagement, Lapeyre Guadeloupe et Saint-Martin vous accompagnent dans tous vos projets intérieurs comme extérieurs.

Bienvenue au sein du GROUPE PARALLIANCE , acteur incontournable et en pleine expansion de la distribution de produits pour le bâtiment aux Antilles !

Avec une présence ancrée depuis plus de 70 ans dans notre belle région, le GROUPE PARALLIANCE a su évoluer avec le temps, façonnant son organisation pour répondre aux exigences du marché.

 Implantés en Guadeloupe, Martinique, Saint-Martin et prochainement en Guyane, nous tissons notre présence à travers un réseau dynamique de 4 enseignes et 15 magasins, offrant ainsi un maillage efficace pour mieux servir nos clients.

Nous mettons un point d'honneur à créer un environnement professionnel attrayant pour nos 250 collaborateurs. La  confiance et le  respect mutuels sont au cœur de notre culture d'entreprise, car nous savons que c'est ensemble que nous excellons.

 Notre quête de l'excellence opérationnelle guide chacune de nos actions. Nous sommes déterminés à offrir à nos clients des produits et services d'une qualité supérieure, car leur satisfaction est notre priorité absolue.

En ces temps où chaque réussite est une victoire collective et chaque épreuve est une occasion de renforcer nos liens, nous croyons en l'importance de partager les réussites et de rester unis dans les épreuves .

En tant qu'acteurs engagés dans la vie de nos territoires, nous avons conscience de notre responsabilité envers le développement durable et harmonieux de nos communautés.  L'action en faveur de l'environnement et du bien-être social est au cœur de nos préoccupations.

 Si vous êtes à la recherche de nouveaux défis professionnels, rejoignez-nous et construisons ensemble un avenir prometteur, où l'excellence rime avec épanouissement professionnel.

 Handcrafted Excellence– Every piece is meticulously designed by skilled artisans, celebrating India's rich ceramic heritage.

Our Vision:
To position Indian ceramic artistry on the global stage, redefining luxury home décor with a perfect balance of tradition and contemporary design.  

Whether you're an Interior designer, retailer, hospitality brand, or home décor enthusiast, COKO India is your go-to destination for high-end ceramic masterpieces.  

Explore our collection & experience the art of fine ceramics.

Name: Luciel
Description:
Designed for your world

At Luciel, we create bespoke furniture that reflects not only light, but identity. Each piece is a seamless extension of your world—carefully crafted to fit your interior, your lifestyle, and your sense of beauty.

What sets Luciel apart is our deliberate choice of materials and finishes. Our signature high-gloss coating transforms each surface into a mirror of elegance. This glossy finish is not just decorative; it is conceptual. It captures and reflects light with an almost ethereal clarity, infusing each room with brightness, openness, and depth. In contrast to untreated, rustic textures, Luciel’s high-gloss embodies refinement, serenity, and modern sophistication.

Every table we create is a sculptural object—a work of art. Designed with purpose, made by hand. Our process begins with pure intention and ends with a flawless, light-reflecting surface that invites interaction and admiration.

Luciel is the vision of Maxim and Stephanie—a duo driven by a shared passion for craftsmanship, design, and artistic expression. Maxim shapes each piece with precision and soul; Stephanie brings conceptual clarity and design finesse. Together, they create more than furniture—they shape experiences.

The name Luciel—inspired by Lumière (light) and Ciëlle (heavenly)—embodies our pursuit of lightness, both in form and feeling. Our pieces are designed to elevate—not just to furnish—and to live as timeless statements within any interior.

Name: Dutchvilt
Description:
DutchVilt.nl is de leverancier en productiebedrijf voor PET-vilt, interieurproducten en maatwerkprojecten. Onze akoestische producten van PET-vilt bieden een effectieve oplossing voor het verbeteren van de geluidskwaliteit in uw ruimte. PET-vilt staat bekend om zijn uitstekende geluidsabsorberende eigenschappen dankzij de open vezelstructuur van het materiaal. Hierdoor worden nagalm en storende geluiden aanzienlijk verminderd, wat zorgt voor een aangenamere en beter gebalanceerde akoestiek in je werk- of woonruimte.

Naast de akoestische voordelen zijn PET-vilt platen en producten ook een stijlvolle en duurzame keuze. Het materiaal voegt een elegant design toe aan elke ruimte en is veelzijdig toepasbaar, waardoor het aansluit bij diverse interieurstijlen.

Name: Norse Brands (Nordic Luxury Furniture and Lighting)
Description:
At Norse Brands, Nordic design finds a new home in India. We are curators of eight iconic Danish brands — including Carl Hansen & Søn, Fredericia Furniture, PP Møbler, Louis Poulsen, Audo Copenhagen, Design by Us, Frederik Bagger, and Nordic Sleep - each celebrated for its craftsmanship, simplicity, and timeless beauty.
Norse Brands is the official and authorized Indian distributor, contract and project partner for Nordic luxury furniture and lighting brands, serving architects, interior designers, developers, and hospitality projects across India.
Our experience centre in Alibag is a private villa where architects, designers, and homeowners can explore how Nordic minimalism blends with modern Indian living. 

It’s not a showroom - it’s an invitation to experience design as it was meant to be: authentic, enduring, and deeply inspiring.

Appointments are limited. Reserve your visit to the Norse Brands Experience Centre and experience Scandinavian icons up close.

Call on +91 8097743239 to book a private visit.

Name: FEYDOM | Sofás Modulares
Description:
E se um sofá fosse mais que um sofá?

Na FEYDOM, acreditamos que os sofás não devem apenas ocupar e decorar os espaços — devem transformá-los 

O que inicialmente nasceu de uma ideia de otimização de espaços, resultou numa linha de sofás modulares que redefine completamente o conceito de conforto, funcionalidade e design.

TRANSFORME O SEU ESPAÇO SEMPRE QUE QUISER
Os sofás modulares vão muito além da simples otimização de espaços. Os módulos multifuncionais proporcionam uma versatilidade sem precedentes.

No mesmo sofá, pode ter 2, 3 ou 4 lugares, chaise longue reversível, ou um sofá-cama de solteiro ou casal. 

Os sofás modulares destacam-se por serem soluções inteligentes que se adaptam a estilos de vida em constante mudança. São, por exemplo, a resposta para as necessidades de otimização de espaço em ambientes urbanos mais compactos, onde cada centímetro conta.

UM SOFÁ QUE SE ADAPTA A SI
Configure o sofá como quiser. Um simples puff pode transformar-se numa poltrona, ou seja, têm a capacidade de se adaptar ao seu espaço de acordo com as necessidades em constante mudança.

CONFORTO SEM PERDER ELEGÂNCIA
Na FEYDOM, não sacrificamos o conforto pelo design — procuramos a excelência em ambos. 

Os sofás apresentam designs inovadores, combinados com construções interiores que utilizam materiais premium focados no conforto, como molas ou espumas de silicone. Além disso, os mecanismos de ligação dos módulos garantem a sua durabilidade e estabilidade, mesmo em utilizações mais intensivas. Isto é, nunca corre o risco de que os módulos se afastem durante a utilização do sofá.

Na FEYDOM, redefinimos todo o conceito de sofás modulares. Muito mais do que uma peça de mobiliário, oferecemos soluções versáteis, flexíveis, confortáveis e esteticamente apelativas para diferentes tipos de espaços. 

Descubra tudo sobre os sofás FEYDOM no site ou no nosso showroom. Faça-nos uma visita.

Description:
At South Hill Home we are committed to carrying uniquely designed and impeccably crafted pieces to suit your home.  Combining classic ideas and modern elements, our furnishings will help you create an environment that is uniquely your own.  It’s about timeless design, contemporary elegance and furnishings that make your home become the place you’ve always dreamt it could be.  Our knowledge and passion for interior design allow us to help you find the perfect pieces to suit your home and your lifestyle.

As the charming and historic area of South Hill undergoes a transformation to a newly revitalized neighbourhood, we are thrilled to have taken up residence in such a growing, fashionable, design-driven locale.  Just south of Forest Hill and in close proximity to Yorkville, chic Bloor Street and Toronto’s Annex neighbourhood, we’ve found the perfect Home in which to accessorize yours.

At South Hill Home, we strive to bring to Toronto world-renowned and unique home furnishings that simply have not been available in the Greater Toronto Area until now.  We believe in the strength and quality behind each piece of furniture we carry and the designers who create them.

Name: CLIMA HOME
Description:
Every living space, be it indoors or out, is meant to be cherished. These are the places where we gather with loved ones, retreat from the stresses of the day, rejoice in celebrations, and reflect on nature. From a convivial great room to an indulgent master suite, a state-of-the-art kitchen to a luxe lanai and pool deck—nothing restores the spirit and nourishes the soul like home.

For 20 years, the world’s most talented interior designers and notable architects, dynamic hoteliers, and savviest homeowners, have turned to CLIMA Home for their furnishing and lighting needs. CLIMA Homes’ highly curated collection features over 40 brands representative of every celebrated design capital of the world—Milan, Paris, New York, London, São Paulo, Barcelona…and beyond.

Always at the forefront of innovation and the pinnacle of style, CLIMA Homes’ countless offerings are the entrée to award-winning furniture and industrial designers, gifted artisans and craftsmen, top tastemakers and pacesetters. With a deep appreciation for the significance of a life well-lived, and the crucial role that environment, décor, and atmosphere play in making it so, CLIMA Home has expanded its fêted outdoor collection to include an elite, hand-selected assortment of interior brands, making it not only the most impressive assemblage of fine furnishings beneath one roof but also, under the sun.

Crediamo che il design degli spazi esterni debba essere in perfetta armonia con l’architettura e l’interior design. Per questo, offriamo consulenze di progettazione e collaboriamo con architetti e interior designer, mettendo a disposizione la nostra esperienza in soluzioni d’arredo outdoor personalizzate e materiali di alta qualità.

Per arredare e ombreggiare giardini, terrazzi e dehors, proponiamo soluzioni su misura che uniscono estetica e funzionalità. Dal 2010 siamo Atelier Gibus e selezioniamo i migliori brand di pergole, tende da sole, vele e ombrelloni per garantire comfort e durata nel tempo.

Nel nostro showroom di 700 mq è possibile vedere e toccare con mano la qualità dei mobili da giardino, scegliendo tra proposte adatte a ogni esigenza di spazio e stile, con materiali progettati per un utilizzo professionale e privato.

Trattiamo marchi come Talenti, EMU, Vermobil, UNO Più, Serralunga, PLUS+, Royal Botania, Lyxo, Paolelli Garden, NARDI, Fat Boy e molti altri.

Se sei un professionista e vuoi offrire ai tuoi clienti soluzioni outdoor esclusive, contattaci. Possiamo costruire insieme spazi unici.

Ti aspettiamo in showroom.

Name: Room 66 the Interior Studio
Description:
Room 66 - The Interior Studio, dove la creatività si materializza. 
Qui, la magia si concretizza, e la nostra missione è trasformare le vostre visioni in realtà tangibili. In questo ambiente accogliente, uniamo creatività, professionalità e passione per ottenere risultati che superano le vostre aspettative. Siamo pronti a incarnare la vostra storia e condividerla con il mondo. Benvenuti in un luogo in cui i sogni prendono forma.

Room 66 - The Kitchen Studio non è solo uno studio di interior design, ma un luogo in cui arte e funzionalità si incontrano. Il nostro team di esperti creativi e professionisti lavora per creare soluzioni estetiche e pratiche per ogni progetto.

Ogni angolo dello studio riflette la nostra dedizione per l'estetica, la bellezza e l’innovazione. I colori, le texture e gli arredi sono attentamente scelti per trasformare gli spazi in opere d'arte viventi.

Siamo qui per dare vita ai vostri spazi, che siano residenziali o commerciali, moderni o tradizionali, minimalisti o lussuosi. La nostra filosofia è rendere ogni progetto unico, proprio come le persone che lo abiteranno. E lo facciamo con passione, con l'obiettivo costante di superare le vostre aspettative.

Vi invitiamo a entrare in Room 66 - The Kitchen Studio e a lasciarvi ispirare. Qui, la vostra visione prenderà vita e si trasformerà in realtà. Siamo pronti a guidarvi in questo straordinario viaggio di interior design a 360 gradi, in cui ogni dettaglio è curato con amore e ogni spazio racconta una storia. Benvenuti in un mondo di design senza confini. 
Benvenuti in Room 66.

The story of Luminesy began with its founder - Reinis. "The very origins of the idea can be traced back to my childhood - late evenings spent in the office of my mother, an interior designer... all of the furniture and lighting catalogs that were laying around on almost every cupboard at home... as well as the memories of how excited my mother was about her projects and sharing them with me, which taught me the appreciation for design, detail, and functionality at a very young age."

Name: Askona Azerbaijan
Description:
Компания "Аскона" с 1990 года присутствует на рынке матрасов нового поколения. С первых дней она сумела заявить о себе в качестве надежного партнера крупных мебельных комбинатов. Под маркой "Аскона" выпускается широкий ассортимент продукции по самым современным технологиям. Компания принимает активное участие в продвижении продукции на отечественном рынке и создании новых рабочих мест.
Сегодня "Аскона" уверенно смотрит в будущее. Мы имеем тесные деловые отношения с партнерами более чем в 100 городах России, в Казахстане, Белоруссии, Азербайджан на Украине, в странах Европейского союза и в США.  В распоряжении "Асконы" сеть региональных складов, охватывающая значительную территорию (Ковров, Москва, Санкт-Петербург, Новосибирск, Ростов-на-Дону, Урал), три современных производственных комплекса в Коврове, Новосибирске и Вязниках. Собственная розничная сеть по России.
Бренд "Аскона" снискал высокую репутацию на рынке. Под этой маркой выпускается широкий ассортимент продукции для здорового сна по самым современным технологиям.

1982 yılında ticari hayatına başlayan grup şirketlerin parçası olan “Mobiyaz Mağazacılık'', mobilya mağazacılığı, mobilya pazarlama, satış sonrası hizmetler ve çeşitli alanlarda faaliyetlerde bulunmaktadır. 


Mobiyaz Mağazacılık ve Bilişim Teknolojileri A.Ş. ile Samsun, Ankara ve Amasya illerinde  10 ayrı noktada hizmet veren Kelebek, Doğtaş ve Lova Yatak Mağazaları'yla faaliyet göstermektedir.

Toplamda 3 ilde, yaklaşık 100 kişilik  profesyonel ve güler yüzlü bir ekiple faaliyetlerini sürdürmekte olan şirketimiz her geçen gün büyüyerek siz değerli müşterilerimizden aldığımız güçle yine siz değerli müşterilerimiz için geleceğe doğru emin adımlarla yoluna devam etmektedir.

Name: Lattelier Design
Description:
Lattelier crée et vend du mobilier dont la totalité des matériaux proviennent de « déchets », collectés sur la voie publique lors des encombrants. 
Cela permet de les recycler habilement sans transformation coûteuse. Le volume de matériaux ainsi recyclés est un même volume de déchets revalorisé, de matières premières non prélevées et donc de ressources préservées. 

Les éléments qui composent les produits proviennent de lattes de sommier, de manches à balai et de cuir de vieux fauteuils. Les matériaux sont nettoyé, découpé, poncé puis traité à l’encaustique fait de cire d’abeille, d’huile de lin et d’essence d’écorces d’agrumes. L’assemblage utilise des vis métalliques. Les lattes servant aux dossiers des chaises sont courbées par cintrage à l’eau chaude. 

La commercialisation a commencé en 2022 sur la boutique Refair.fr et la plateforme Etsy.

Pour rester au plus près de l'actualité de Lattelier:
https://www.instagram.com/lattelierdesign/

Name: Arredo Italian Interiors
Description:
A group of companies “Arredo” has started its activity in 2002 by selling Italian furniture in Russia in wholesale. Availability of reliable partners in Italy and company’s desire of constant development contributed greatly to its continuous growth and dominance on the furniture market.

Our company is the main distributor of Italian furniture for its retail and wholesale partners in many areas of Russia and Ukraine (Yekaterinburg, Chelyabinsk, Novosibirsk, Tolyatti, Samara, Sevastopol and others). During the years of successful work we have cultivated strong and mutually beneficial relationships with a large number of Italian manufacturers, at present the complete list of our Italian partners counts more than 600 names (see the list of factories), which helps us to propose to our Russian partners mostly beneficial conditions even in comparison to official representatives of Italian producers in Moscow.

When talking about choice of Italian furniture, we have almost unlimited possibilities. (Better terms for architects and designers). Exclusive items, middle-class furniture, economy class furniture of good quality – everything is available to our clients. Our experience has proved our possibility to give the best solutions when arranging one’s interior on a high quality level, including design, interior work, delivery and assemblage of furniture.

Name: DECOAURA
Description:
DECOAURA: A New Era of Indian Luxury
At DecoAura, we are redefining luxury home decor by blending modern minimalist aesthetics with the timeless richness of Indian craftsmanship. As a homegrown brand, we aspire to embody the spirit of a new India—one that embraces a contemporary lifestyle while staying connected to its heritage. India has long been a beacon of excellence, and today’s discerning consumers seek products that reflect this legacy, made proudly on their own soil.

Our mission at DecoAura is to create a luxury brand that new India can showcase with pride. We offer premium home decor items that rival international standards in quality and design, while maintaining a commitment to sustainability and ethical practices. Every piece is crafted to be safe for both humans and pets, reflecting our inclusive values and dedication to creating products that enhance the well-being of all.

Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. From sourcing eco-friendly materials to adopting sustainable manufacturing practices, we ensure that every DecoAura product is created with minimal environmental impact. Our dedication to preserving the planet reflects our broader goal of building a future where luxury and responsibility coexist.

DecoAura is not just about products; it’s about delivering elevated everyday experiences. Our curated collections—ranging from home fragrances to lighting and decor—are designed to seamlessly blend into modern homes, adding elegance and sophistication that is uniquely Indian.

As India steps confidently onto the global stage, it’s essential to champion homegrown brands that reflect the nation’s evolving vision. DecoAura stands at the forefront of this movement, crafting a luxury brand that resonates with today’s consumers and sets new benchmarks for quality and style. Join us in celebrating a brand that’s more than just decor—it’s a testament to the promise and pride of new India.

Name: SWAYAM
Description:
Founded by Mrs. Neerja Garg  in 2001, Swayam has become a leading home fashion brand in Indian Retail, boasting a 25-year legacy of excellence. We have had the opportunity to serve over 25 million happy customers and are present in retail stores across the country, in stores and on all major marketplaces online. 

Our design house - driven by an exceptionally creative team - enables us to create an extensive range of home furnishings, with a product line featuring over 5000 unique SKUs. Our robust manufacturing setup is in Gurugram (National Capital Region), featuring a workforce strength of over 500 skilled and semi-skilled craftsmen and workers. Our expertise encompasses in-house designing, sampling, production, and finishing, with a daily capacity of 10,000 pieces. 

 Product Line:
Designer Bed Linens: Bed sheets, comforters, bedcovers, duvets, cushion covers, pillow covers, quilt covers, bed- in- a- bag sets, and more.
Living: Curtains (window, door, long door), sofa covers, diwan sets, bolster covers, and more.
Table & Kitchen Linen Products: Aprons, mittens, bread baskets, tiffin bags, table mats, dinner napkins, pot holders, and more.
Bags and Accessories: Chair pads, bottle covers, yoga mats, pouches, jute bags, organizers, satchels, bags with scarves, and more.
Hospitality Range: Bed runner sets, mattress protectors, fluff pillows, quilts, and more.

Name: The Kover Company | Luxury Handwoven Rugs
Description:
In a world rushing toward mass production, we chose to pause and honor the hands that create. The Kover Co is a revival of a centuries-old tradition, one that tells the storytelling of craftsmanship, culture, and the soul of handmade rugs.

Our journey began in 1927, when our parent company, Raheem & Son, was founded with a simple yet profound vision to craft rugs that embody artistry, precision, and tradition. For nearly a century, we have been at the heart of India’s rich weaving heritage, standing as one of the oldest legacy-driven rug manufacturers and exporters in the business.

Today, The Kover Co carries forward this legacy, bridging the past and present. Every rug we create is a tribute to our forefathers and their team of artisans who have passed down their craft through generations. Woven with fine yarns and exclusive high-end materials, each piece tells a story of patience, passion, and timeless beauty while specializing in custom, made-to-order bespoke projects that offer tailored designs, sizes, and textures to suit refined interiors and unique spaces.

In a time when authenticity is rare, we remain committed to preserving the authenticity of handmade rugs, ensuring that their legacy lives on in homes across the world.

From the hands of artisans to the heart of your home.

Join us in celebrating heritage, craftsmanship, and culture.

Each of our products is designed to provide maximum comfort and skin-friendly softness, ensuring you get quality rest every night.

We recognize that many people often neglect the importance of maintaining their bedding. Rarely changed fabrics can become breeding grounds for dirt, unpleasant odors, and mold, which can ultimately have adverse effects on your long-term health. At Close Your Eyes, we want to change this habit by offering bedding solutions that are not only beautiful and comfortable but also healthy and hygienic.

Our commitment is to provide you with more than just sleep products. We offer you a luxurious sleep experience, where you can truly close your eyes and feel at peace knowing that you're sleeping on safe and clean natural materials. With our bedding, you not only experience softness but also peace of mind knowing that you're taking care of yourself in the best possible way.

Name: Elsass Office
Description:
Qui sommes nous ?
Basé en Alsace, Elsass Office propose la vente de mobilier de bureau d’occasion.

A qui s'adresse Elsass Office ?
Pour les jeunes entreprises, start-ups, associations et TPE, ou toutes sociétés souhaitant favoriser le réemploi tout en économisant sur l'aménagement de bureau. La vente est également proposer aux particuliers désirant disposer de mobilier de bureau professionnel.

Elsass Office propose une alternative économique pour l’équipement de leur bureau en mobilier de qualité.
Nous proposons une large sélection de mobilier de bureau d’occasion à des prix compétitifs, avec des économies pouvant atteindre jusqu’à 60% par rapport aux prix neufs.

D'où vient le mobilier proposé à la vente ?
Après un déménagement ou un curage de site, il reste souvent du mobilier inutilisé.

C’est là qu’Elsass Office intervient en proposant des solutions de reprise de mobilier aux entreprises.
Nous reprenons une large gamme de mobilier de bureau d’occasion tels que des armoires hautes et basses, des coffres, des bureaux, du mobilier design, du rayonnage, etc.

En plus de la reprise de mobilier, Elsass Office assure la valorisation de vos déchets en les triant et en les réorientant vers leurs filières respectives.
Le mobilier non valorisable est quant à lui traité dans une filière dédiée. Elsass Office est également un point d’apport volontaire Valdélia.

Name: Quartzo Móveis
Description:
Com uma trajetória marcada por tradição, inovação e autenticidade, a Quartzo Móveis é referência no setor de mobiliário e decoração no Rio de Janeiro.

Nossa história começou em 1987, com a fundação da Marmoraria Stand, no bairro de Campo Grande. Uma empresa familiar dedicada à fabricação de pias, soleiras, peitoris e pisos. Em 1992, ampliamos nossa atuação com a produção de móveis em mármore Bege Bahia, atendendo exclusivamente o público corporativo.

O ponto de virada veio em 1996, com o início de uma sociedade entre amigos, que deu origem à primeira loja Quartzo Móveis, no Cachambi. Desde então, a marca marcou presença em diversas feiras e eventos, incluindo a Feira de Móveis do Rio Centro, em 1999, e expandiu com lojas no NorteShopping, Copacabana, Recreio, Campo Grande, Juiz de Fora e Barra, consolidando-se pela combinação entre design, qualidade e personalidade.

Em 2015, a empresa redefiniu sua estratégia, optando por concentrar esforços em uma única loja física — a matriz, localizada em Campo Grande. A partir dessa decisão, a Quartzo Móveis focou na diversificação de produtos, oferecendo uma linha completa de móveis, tapetes, decorações e planejados sob medida.

Com a pandemia em 2020, demos mais um passo importante: a expansão da marca para o ambiente digital, conquistando o público da internet por meio de um atendimento acessível e eficiente.

Hoje, com quase três décadas de história, a Quartzo Móveis mantém viva sua essência: oferecer produtos com identidade e estilo, valorizando o diferente e o exclusivo.

Quer fazer parte da nossa equipe?

Description:
“Lube Store Frattamaggiore” nasce nel 2001, quando lo storico “Marsella Arredamenti” diventa Store Ufficiale del Gruppo Lube. Un’origine che posa le sue basi sulle solide “fondamenta” di un negozio di arredamenti nato da una smisurata passione familiare e da una forte attenzione all’estetica, nel lontano 1990.

Il negozio offre da sempre un ampio assortimento di composizioni, colori e materiali tali da permettere di vagliare un arredo completo e coordinato, per la realizzazione di un ambiente unico e sicuro. 

Gli anni di esperienza hanno portato lo Store a specializzarsi sempre di più nell’interior design: la progettazione di spazi e oggetti d’uso all’interno di un luogo chiuso. Grazie ad un team di professionisti del design e nella progettazione è in grado di andare incontro a qualsiasi esigenza dei propri clienti: progetta l’uso di una casa e non solo la sua bellezza estetica e lo fa considerando spazi, forme e anche la provenienza delle fonti di luce naturale.

Qualità, competenza ed affidabilità sono i valori che caratterizzano “Lube Store Frattamaggiore”, che si affida alla tecnica ed alla creatività dei propri collaboratori, per offrire una serie di prodotti esclusivi e dei servizi che permettono di seguire i propri clienti in tutto il percorso: dalla consulenza alla progettazione, passando per la cura dei dettagli, come la scelta dei materiali e degli accessori, fino alla consegna ed al montaggio finale, affidato ad esperti del settore.

Oggi “Lube Store Frattamaggiore” si pone come punto di riferimento per chi ha necessità di arredare casa in modo “estetico e funzionale” allo stesso tempo.

Name: A Good Life
Description:
In a world that moves too fast, we believe in the power of slowing down.

A Good Life was born from a simple yet profound question: What if the objects we live with every day could spark joy, tell stories, and tread lightly on our planet?

We are artisans of intention, crafting handmade wooden pieces that transform houses into homes. Using 80% reclaimed pine wood timber that has reached the end of its term but not its life we breathe new stories into forgotten materials.

Each piece we create blends Nordic-inspired minimalism with ancient wisdom, designed not just to serve a function, but to hold space for comfort, meaning, and a slower way of living.Our approach is holistic yet simple: we don't chase trends, we create timeless pieces that age gracefully and carry soul.

From wall decor to furniture, every creation whispers rather than shouts, because we believe good design isn't loud, it's mindful, space-efficient and rooted in feeling.

Name: Domino Habitat
Description:
DOMINO HABITAT est le spécialiste de l’environnement extérieur, avec un très large choix de mobilier, parasols, barbecues, planchas et aussi luminaires et déco ! 
DOMINO est situé dans la Loire (42) depuis plus de 60 ans, et nos experts vous accompagnent et vous présentent notre sélection de produits dans notre showroom de 1500 m2. 
Nous développons nos collaborations avec les plus grandes marques pour vous apporter du confort, du design et créer un véritable cocon ou l’Art de vivre à l’extérieur prend tout son sens.
Venez découvrir des marques comme FERMOB, JATI&KEBON, LES JARDINS, EMU, EGO PARIS, LAFUMA MOBILIER, FORGE ADOUR, OUTDOOR CHEF, LIFESTYLE GARDEN, etc.

Name: NEXUS Retail  Hogar
Description:
NEXUS Retail Hogar nace para transformar el sector del mobiliario y la decoración en España. Integramos marcas líderes bajo una estrategia común para mejorar la competitividad, la eficiencia y el valor que ofrecemos a clientes, franquiciados y proveedores.

Nuestra misión es consolidar una presencia nacional fuerte, coordinando estrategias de marca, producto, promoción, exclusividades y expansión de puntos de venta. 

Aportamos orden, volumen y productos exclusivos a las tiendas; un modelo estable y rentable a proveedores y una oferta diferenciada a los clientes.

Aspiramos a liderar la evolución del sector, garantizando que las empresas nacionales mantengan una posición relevante y competitiva.

Name: Rumma
Description:
Generations of craftsmanship meet fresh new ideas.

Based in New York City, Rumma was founded from a love of heritage design with a contemporary twist while incorporating a mix of natural materials in the process.

We believe in creation, curation, and collaboration — providing customization in every detail, allowing you to embark on diverse projects with the same fervor for perfection.

Name: BoConcept Japan
Description:
北欧輸入家具の設計、製造、販売を行っています。
1952年にデンマークで創業し、現在67ヵ国以上の国に
310店舗以上を展開しています。

日本には1997年に上陸し、19店舗の直営店を持つリテール部門と、法人向けに空間の提案を行うコントラクト部門のほか、デリバリーやオペレーション、マーケティングなどの部門があります。

本拠地デンマークに工場を構え、デザインから生産、販売、配送を自社で一気通貫で行っています。
また、世界のトレンドを敏感に取り入れて商品やコンセプトに反映させているので、
ボーコンセプトで働くことは、世界のトレンドに常に接することを意味しています。

リテール部門、コントラクト部門など様々な価値提供の手法を通して、住居空間や商業施設、オフィス空間などの総合的なインテリア・デザインサービスを提供し、お客様が理想の空間を作るお手伝いをしております。

Name: Nexus Interieurprojecten

Nexus Interieurprojecten is gespecialiseerd in het adviseren, uitvoeren en begeleiden van Interieurprojecten voor een brede groep opdrachtgevers, waaronder winkels, bedrijven, particulieren, horecagelegenheden, zorg- en onderwijsinstellingen.

Bij ons kunt u rekenen op een persoonlijke benadering met één aanspreekpunt. Met een vlot en warm contact, jarenlange ervaring, vakmanschap en kwaliteit zorgen we voor een project dat aansluit op uw verwachtingen.

Name: Mark Krebs
Description:
Mark Krebs is a design and development studio that works with manufacturers and crafts people to bring those designs to market.  The company develops a collection of hand made rugs and home textiles avaialble through their website and at partnering furniture design retailers. 

Mark Krebs also designs, develops, and delivers white label product for several clients.  These projects are completed by executing on Mark Krebs' strengths in development for manufacturing and vendor sourcing.

Name: HASSON
Description:
HASSON elevates premium rest essentials to fuel your life. We offer medical standard, ergonomic design, and personal comfort. From pillows to comfort wears, from indoor to outdoor: we promise to be slective on good things.

More to this planet, we promote sustainability every angle from raw mateirals to packaging. It's our pride on being an environmentally conscious brand. Any plastic production in our value chain is offset with recycling and reuse methods. We wish, our users give more loves to this planet too!

Name: Interdesk
Description:
Interdesk is a leading provider of ergonomic and innovative workspace solutions, dedicated to enhancing productivity and comfort. We are a proud Singaporean company, passionately creating high-quality adjustable desks and ergonomic chairs tailored to meet the diverse needs of our customers.

Founded in Singapore, Interdesk is committed to providing top-tier ergonomic solutions that promote a healthier and more efficient working environment. 

At Interdesk, we offer a range of products that cater to both individual and corporate needs:
Adjustable Desks: Customizable to fit any workspace with options like Interdesk Custom, Classic, Pro, and MysticTimber.
Ergonomic Chairs: Featuring models like the InterGlide Klismos Gaming Chair and Aeras Premium Ergonomic Chair.
Accessories: From monitor arms and laptop stands to cable management solutions and leather desk mats.

We aim to transform workspaces into ergonomically optimized environments that enhance productivity and well-being. By continually innovating and adhering to the highest standards, Interdesk strives to be the preferred choice for ergonomic furniture worldwide.

Explore our range of products and transform your workspace with Interdesk. Visit our showroom by appointment or contact us for more information. Experience the difference of working with ergonomically designed furniture that truly cares for your well-being.

We engage in roadshows, career fair events and potentially even International expansion. At Interdesk, the departments remain tightly-knit despite the constant growing of our team. We organise company outings and birthday celebrations for all our employees. Join the Interdesk family if you desire to work in a supportive community where you can learn and grow with the team!

For more information, please visit our official website or contact us at sales@interdesksg.com!

Name: Fraser Wood Elements
Description:
Today, our store on Caroline Street features an exclusive inventory of individually crafted and locally-made furniture, fireplace mantels, home accessories, and reclaimed flooring. In the showroom, our team of designers assist clients in realizing their dreams for bespoke home furnishings by navigating current design trends and a broad selection of custom materials.

Our 8,000 square foot woodshop, located just a few blocks from our showroom, is where our team of craftsmen make dreams a reality. With years of experience and expertise, they create the highest quality products.

Name: Moku Meubels
Description: Moku Meubels is a solid wooden furniture supplier with a variety of practical and unique in-house Japanese products. We take pride in making sure each product is made with fine quality, detailing and the best wooden source.

Name: Kranen/Gille
Description: Kranen/Gille is a design studio based in Den Bosch, The Netherlands. We specialise in the design of interior products. Collaboration partners include MOOOI, Fatboy, Seletti and Pol's Potten. We also design museum and gallery work for museums such as Het Noordbrabants Museum and Zuiderzeemuseum Enkhuizen. We are able to realise custom-made productions within our broad network, contact us for more info.

Name: Revoluno Creation Pvt Ltd
Description: Luxury furniture brand specialising in bespoke furniture and premium comfort

Name: The Puzzle Table
Description:
The Puzzle Table is an innovative piece of furniture designed to keep your puzzles organized and all in one place. Its easy-open lid allows you to work your ongoing puzzle without having to move it or take up space on the table.  Plus, our tables come in a variety of heights and 2 different sizes to fit your living needs.

Our exclusive hidden puzzle table is handcrafted by skilled artisans in Holmes County Ohio, also known as Amish Country. We take immense pride in using locally sourced, high-quality brown maple hardwood to create this masterpiece.

Unlike mass-produced furniture, our craftsmen meticulously cut and shape each piece to perfection, ensuring a one-of-a-kind table that is built from start to finish with utmost care and attention to detail. No assembly line process is involved.

Experience the true essence of personalized craftsmanship with our custom-made jigsaw puzzle table. It's time to elevate your home decor with this stunning and functional piece. Say goodbye to frustration when it comes time to clean up after an evening spent puzzling. Now, you can simply close the lid and save yourself both time and energy! And with our elegant design, this piece will easily blend into any living room or den without sacrificing style.

Name: CREO Store Lourinhã
Description:
A CREO Kitchens – Lourinhã, representante das Cozinhas Italianas CREO e LUBE para a região Oeste de Portugal, Lisboa e Vale do Tejo, conta com um Showroom de mais de 300 metros quadrados que vão inspira-los na escolha da sua cozinha de sonho.

Primeiro, deixem-se guiar pelo desenho, pelo espirito e pela sua personalidade. Depois, conheçam a nossa ampla e abrangente gama de móveis para cozinhas e ambientes modernos, vintage e clássicos. Com os mais variados materiais, acabamentos e cores, elejam o mais adequado ao vosso estilo de vida.

Também podem misturar e combinar diferentes elementos e componentes dos diferentes modelos. As possibilidades são infinitas!

Fabricamos produtos à medida, capazes de realizar os seus sonhos, para transformar a sua cozinha num lugar acolhedor, operativo, agradável de viver e partilhar.

Mais que simples armários de cozinha, a CREO oferece soluções para ambientes bonitos, harmoniosos e que que vão de encontro aos seus projetos…

Hunter Douglas Showcase Dealer

Name: The House f Vintage
Description:
The House of Vintage was born from the passion for research and restoration of furniture and objects of the past. 

Here you can find: bookcases, sofas and lamps of all kinds, but also club chairs, design accessories, suitcases and containers, vintage fans, TV, typewriters, tables and coffee tables, antique toys, sports accessories and much more. All this can be seen in Milan, in Via Legnone 4, Maciachini area.

Our entire exhibition can be rented for film and television productions, theater sets, events, fairs, weddings.

The object of modern art, the unique piece of furniture that you are looking for, passes through here.

Na MH Interiores, transformamos espaços em lugares de beleza e inspiração. 

Com uma paixão pela decoração e um olhar atento aos detalhes, criamos ambientes que refletem a personalidade e o estilo de cada cliente.

Seja para uma casa, escritório ou evento, estamos aqui para tornar os seus sonhos de decoração uma realidade !!

Name: Outlet Arreda
Description:
Siamo una struttura commerciale e di servizi che mette in contatto diretto il consumatore con i produttori di mobili e complementi per la casa, garantendo un pacchetto prodotti-qualità-prezzo-servizio altamente competitivi nel mercato. 

Abbiamo selezionato e consorziato circa 90 aziende produttrici le quali sono state scelte in base a diversi criteri: rapporto qualità/prezzo, certificazioni, garanzia, assistenza ed organizzazione interna. 

Grazie a questa anlisi e selezione siamo in grado di fornire un'ampia gamma di prodotti che spaziano dal moderno al design, dal classico al country, con un'ottimo standard qualitativo, il tutto a prezzi di produzione. 
Cucina, tavoli e sedie, camere, camerette, salotti, soggiorni, complementi per la casa, reti e materassi. 

Molta attenzione è stata riservata ai servizi dove siamo in grado di offrire un supporto completo al cliente pre e post vendita con una consulenza per quanto riguarda la progettazione e la scelta dei mateiali e modelli fino ad arrivare all'assistenza post vendita con una garanzia fino a 5 anni.

Name: The Savvy Elephant Inc.
Description:
You want to BE HAPPY, FEEL HEALTHY, and LIVE WELL. We carefully select stylish, eco-friendly home décor products just for you. Your friends will notice, and the planet will thank you.
- Breathe Easier with reduced chemicals. 
- Relax More with natural materials. 
- Live Better with unique handcrafted products.
The Elephant in the room is most home furnishings are filled with unwanted chemicals. Chemicals that can affect your sleep, mood, allergies, and overall health. As interior designers, we know your health matters. We’ve done the research for you, guiding you to better, healthier furnishing choices. Providing you with vetted products, that will make you feel good.
Start living a happier, healthier you!

Name: Ignacio Agudo Interiorismo
Description:
Somos un estudio especializado en mobiliario de cocina y hogar desde 1999, distribuidores oficiales de INKO cocinas.

Realizamos proyectos de reforma integral llave en mano, acompañamos a nuestros clientes en todas las fases del proyecto y les ofrecemos diferentes soluciones en cuanto a espacios y materiales.

Name: Bureaux et objets
Description: La curiosité n’est pas toujours un défaut. Dans notre univers, elle se révèle même essentielle. C’est cette petite étincelle qui nous permet d’être constamment à l'affût des tendances et à la pointe de l’innovation. Fort de ses années d’expérience, Bureaux & Objets accompagne depuis 2011 les entreprises et les collectivités réunionnaises dans leur développement, avec des solutions d’aménagement performantes.

Name: Nordina Home
Description:
As a London-based furniture brand, we deeply cherish the quality of our products as well as our dear customers.

While our central core values stand with sustainability and fresh designs, we believe that everyone deserves furniture made from the best natural materials.

To give our customers the comfort they need, we ensure that every piece of furniture brings something unique and special. You deserve the best shopping experience, and with Nordina home, you will always get an up-to-3-year guarantee whenever you make a purchase.

Everything around us is green, and we are very environment-friendly. With more than a thousand items ready to be dispatched the same day you order or three days maximum, we bring you premium quality mixed with beautiful design.

PS: More than 90% of our products are made of vegan leather to reduce our carbon footprint as much as we can. Join us and make your interior stand out. You deserve nothing less.

Name: Desejo

Name: Sunshine Kitchens Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Sunshine Kitchen & Wardrobes is providing bespoke kitchen, wardrobe, and furniture solutions that align with each customer’s unique lifestyle. Our products are beautiful yet durable, functional yet luxurious offering excellent value for money.

Name: Snooze Design
Description:
Marca Pioneira no Mercado Pet Brasileiro: Criando uma conexão única entre bichos e pessoas

Desde 2017, a Snooze tem sido pioneira na introdução de novas tendências no mercado pet brasileiro.

Com uma visão de unir bichos e pessoas por meio de design autoral, nossos produtos refletem nossa preocupação com a inovação, beleza e funcionalidade.

Nossa missão é transformar a relação que temos com nossos bichinhos em algo belo e especial. Tudo começou em nosso lar, entre conversas, latidos e miados em família, quando decidimos dar aos nossos pets o conforto e a qualidade que eles merecem, sem abrir mão da estética. 

Orgulhamo-nos de oferecer produtos com beleza tanto por fora quanto por dentro.

Acreditamos que a relação entre humanos e animais de estimação é uma troca verdadeira e incondicional de carinho. 

Assim, nossos produtos são criados com todo cuidado para agradar tanto os bichinhos quanto seus donos. E é por isso que utilizamos matérias-primas nacionais e ecológicas, garantindo uma cadeia de produção sustentável.

Na Snooze, a beleza se encontra em cada gesto de gentileza entre bichos e pessoas. Nossos designers e artistas apaixonados por animais criam peças exclusivas, com estilo contemporâneo e funcional, que proporcionam a melhor experiência de conforto e durabilidade. 

Além disso, nossos produtos também podem ser usados como objetos de decoração nas casas dos clientes mais exigentes.

Queremos espalhar mais beleza pelo mundo, e é por isso que nos esforçamos para juntar bichos e pessoas em suas vontades e necessidades, unindo design e funcionalidade em cada produto que oferecemos. 

Nossa marca é a representação de carinho, respeito e conforto para os nossos pets e seus tutores. Seja bem-vindo(a) ao universo da Snooze, onde a conexão entre bichos e pessoas é verdadeira e significativa.

At Seasons Furnishings, we have excelled the art of providing perfect home solutions to our valuable customers, which is certainly inevitable without constant renewals and evolution of our product range.

PT. Cipta Ayu Sempurna is a Jakarta-based company that specializes in Furniture and Home Living Company. We represent our brand, Mademoiselle Liem.

Name: Bel Air furniture company
Description: The Bel Air furniture company designs and manufactures high quality furniture pieces that capture the spirit of the American fifties and mid-century design. Fun and functional designs of chrome plated, steel-bended frames and PVC (faux leather) upholstery make our furniture ultra durable, ideal for both residential and industrial use. Name: Niedermayer Neues Wohnen
Description:
Our family business has evolved over the past two decades from a simple furniture pick-up market into one of the leading home furnishing stores in the region, offering comprehensive services. With more than 50 long-term employees and over 65,000 loyal and satisfied customers, we have long established ourselves in Salzburg as one of the most modern furniture stores in Austria, as well as a creative and versatile interior design partner.

In Salzburg, we showcase barrier-free living environments across two floors in a spacious, airy, and climate-controlled atmosphere, spanning over 2,500 square meters of exhibition space.

Name: OK GALLERIES Interior Showroom
Description:
OK GALLIRIES is a leading company in the interior design market. We have been working for more than 18 years, and during this time we have implemented more than 2000 projects around the world.

Our main direction is interior equipment. We offer customers furniture, lighting, kitchens, decor, plumbing, household appliances, doors, floor coverings and electrical accessories of the premium&luxury segment from the best European manufacturers. Each product of these factories is a real luxury item that can breathe style and character into the space.

Our company's portfolio includes more than 1,500 factories. We are exclusive distributors of such famous European brands as Serip, Cesar Cucine, Flos, Caccaro, Antonio Lupi, ADL, Agrippa, Miele, Buster&Punch, Surco. These are global companies with a rich history that produce unique products that successfully combining an elegant style, unsurpassed quality, functional utility and comfort.

Nossas unidades estão localizadas atualmente em Guarulhos, Santana, Tatuapé, Lapa, São Bernardo do Campo, Shopping Interlar Interlagos, Alphaville. 
A empresa conta hoje com mais de 130 colaboradores, cerca de 30 prestadores de serviços e um negócio que investe em tecnologia, inovação e na capacitação e desenvolvimento da equipe.
Dessa forma, a D’Furlan Planejados há mais de 10 anos presta atendimento consultivo, desde a execução do projeto ao pós-venda, com transparência, agilidade e qualidade que garantem aos clientes acesso e acompanhamento de todas as etapas do projeto e que ele seja realizado da forma exata como foi planejado.

Ob es darum geht Materialien zu entdecken, Möbel für das neue Projekt zu finden oder sich für bevorstehende Veränderungen professionell beraten zu lassen. All dies erfordert in unseren Augen eine sehr wichtige Grundlage: Entspannung. Wie trifft man wichtige Entscheidungen im Trubel der Stadt und im Alltagsstress? Wie entdecken Sie außergewöhnliche Handwerkskunst oder Materialraffinessen, wenn Sie vor lauter Produkten den Überblick verlieren?
 
In der von der Innenarchitektin und Designerin Agnes Morguet geführten Interior Gallery haben Sie in entspannter Atmosphäre die Möglichkeit, sich über kuratierte Hersteller zu informieren und alles für Ihr Projekt aus einer Hand zu erwerben. Es ist uns sehr wichtig, nur Produkte und Materialien anzubieten , die unseren höchsten Ansprüchen an konstruktiver und kreativer Qualität genügen und die bei Herstellung und Vertrieb immer unseren Planeten im Blick haben. 

Seit 2020 ist die Interior Gallery in Schloss Lüntenbeck, Wuppertal ansässig und freut sich auf Ihren Besuch!

Du möchtest unsere aktuellen Wohnwelten entdecken oder Teil unseres engagierten Teams werden? Dann schau gern auf unserer Website vorbei.

Wir freuen uns auf deinen Besuch bei uns im Haus oder auf deine Kontaktaufnahme per Mail oder Telefon.

Dein Team von Möbel Weirauch

Name: Forest Decor
Description:
A ForestDecor é uma empresa especializada na criação e venda de móveis planejados, comprometida em oferecer soluções personalizadas que aliam design, funcionalidade e sustentabilidade. Nossa missão é transformar ambientes, proporcionando aos clientes móveis que atendam às suas necessidades específicas e reflitam seu estilo pessoal.

Nossos Diferenciais:

Personalização: Entendemos que cada cliente é único. Por isso, oferecemos móveis sob medida, garantindo que cada peça se encaixe perfeitamente no espaço disponível e atenda às preferências individuais.

Sustentabilidade: Estamos comprometidos com práticas ecologicamente corretas, utilizando materiais de origem sustentável e processos de produção que minimizam o impacto ambiental.

Qualidade: Priorizamos a excelência em cada etapa, desde o design até a instalação, assegurando que nossos produtos sejam duráveis e de alta qualidade.

Atendimento Personalizado: Nossa equipe dedica-se a entender as necessidades de cada cliente, oferecendo um atendimento próximo e soluções que superam expectativas.

Na ForestDecor, acreditamos que móveis planejados vão além da simples mobília; eles são parte essencial do lar, refletindo a personalidade e o estilo de vida de nossos clientes. Estamos comprometidos em entregar produtos que combinam estética, funcionalidade e responsabilidade ambiental, contribuindo para ambientes mais harmoniosos e sustentáveis.

Livraison dans toute la France

Rejoignez-nous dans notre quête pour redéfinir le style intérieur et découvrez comment une simple porte peut faire une grande différence. L'art d'entrer commence avec Coliséo.

„ელთიბი“ - კომპანია, სადაც შენი შესაძლებლობები ყოველ დე იცვლება!

„ელთიბი“ ავეჯის კომპონენტების იმპორტიორი ლიდერი კომპანიაა, რომელსაც აქვს 4 ფილიალი და დილერთა ფართო ქსელი საქართველოს მასშტაბით. კომპანიაში წარმოდგენილია პრემიუმ ხარისხის ფართო ასორტიმენტი და მომსახურებები.

„ელთიბი“ პროფესიონალებისა და განსხვავებული, თუმცა ერთი საქმისა და მიზნისაკენ მიმართული, მეგობრული გუნდია, ამიტომ ჩვენთვის მნიშვნელოვანია, რომ ადამიანებმა, რომლებსაც სურთ აქ დასაქმება, გაიზიარონ კომპანიის ირებულებები. 

„ელთიბი“-ს გუნდი ენერგიული და მოტივირებული ტალანტებისაგან შედგება, ამიტომ მნიშვნელოვანია, მომავალმა დასაქმებულებმა ნახონ მათი მუშაობის შედეგები, განვითარდნენ პროფესიონალურად, მონაწილეობა მიიონ საინტერესო პროექტებში, ჰქონდეთ აქტიური ცხოვრება და შეჰქონდეთ თავიანთი წვლილი კომპანიის მიზნების მიწევაში.

თუ თქვენ ხართ დაინტერესებული დასაქმებით, სტაბილურ და განვითარებად კომპანიაში, მაშინ „ელთიბი“ ზუსტად ისაა, რასაც თქვენ ეძებთ! გახდეთ ჩვენი გუნდის წევრი ნიშნავს, აირჩიოთ კარიერული ზრდა, სტაბილური და საინტერესო გარემო. „ელთიბი“-ში გამოცხადებული ია ვაკანტური პოზიციების შესახებ ინფორმაცია იხილეთ აქ.

Name: Kastenstudio
Description:
Met onze luxe kasten op maat geniet je van rust, overzicht én gemak. Jij hoeft alleen maar aan te geven hoe jouw ideale kast eruitziet, dan regelen wij de rest. De productie en montage wordt gedaan door Dorland Kasten, met een fabriek pal naast onze showroom in Duiven. Ja, vlakbij IKEA en Intratuin Duiven.

 Wist je dat de eigenaren van Kastenstudio en Dorland Kasten broers zijn? Je kast komt dus uit een echt familiebedrijf, opgericht door hun vader. Al meer dan 25 jaar stoppen we onze liefde voor het meubelmakersvak in een product waar jij minstens zo lang van geniet.

Van inloopkasten tot garderobekasten en van televisiemeubels tot wandkasten, wasmachinekasten en meer - ALLES is mogelijk. Want dat is de kracht van maatwerk: niets is hetzelfde en we kennen geen ‘standaard’. We passen de kast aan op jouw ruimte, in plaats van andersom. Zo benut je iedere millimeter.

Wil je een ombouw rond je open haard? Heb je een zolder met een schuin dak waar je he-le-maal niets mee kunt? Ga je verhuizen en wil je eindelijk je Sex and the City-droom waarmaken met een grote inloopkast? We vinden het heel tof om met je mee te puzzelen.

Je bent van harte welkom in onze showroom aan de Nieuwgraaf 48 in Duiven. Check voor je komt even de openingstijden op onze website, kastenstudio.nl. 

Tot snel!

Name: SOLEY HOME
Description:
Nous sommes une jeune équipe passionnée par l'artisanat et le design. Notre principale mission est d’offrir à nos clients les plus exigeants, que ce soit des particuliers ou des professionnels, des pièces sur mesure qui fusionnent l'élégance naturelle et l'excellence artisanale. 

Nos pièces sont principalement fabriquées à partir du bois de teck provenant des forêts indonésiennes en respectant toutes les normes environnementales, mais aussi assurant un soutien continu aux communautés locales qui dépendent de ces forêts. 

Le teck est un bois dur et gras, ne craint ni l'exposition aux rayons UV ni les intempéries. Nos meubles sont donc non seulement des éléments décoratifs uniques, mais aussi un investissement durable pour votre intérieur comme pour votre extérieur.

Visitez-nous et laissez-vous séduire par la magie de la nature retravaillée par la main de l’homme.

Name: Curate Home
Description:
Our customer is creative-minded, who appreciates quality, craftsmanship and detail. To them, Curate Home is a medium of exploration and expression- a glimpse into what could be. 

We at Curate believe that a home should be a sanctuary, whether its where you relax or work out of. We want to inspire you to design a space that reflects your personality and in doing so, creating your own comfort zone. In this current age of consumerism and mass-manufacturing, Curate is an oasis of inimitability. 

We don’t want you to choose between shopping at a value and shopping for your values. We hold ourselves to the highest level of quality to always guarantee our customers unrivalled luxury. Our products support slow and ethical living, and are crafted by the hands of  artisans. We see and respect the detail and beauty in their work and we hope you will too. At Curate, we ensure fair wages for all our artisans, so they are compensated justly for their skill. 

Each of our pieces has a unique story woven into it. We hope you find yours here too.

Name: Stolespecialisten / Ergotec ApS
Description:
Vores passion er at tilbyde dig det fineste design og håndværk indenfor stole
Hos os finder du en bred vifte af spændende stole til alle formål. Vores sortiment omfatter stole til private hjem, plejehjem, skoler, kontorer, mødelokaler, loungeområder, kantiner m.m. Vi har også professionelle musikerstole, klinik- og behandlerstole.
Stole for enhver smag – Vi har også en stol til dig
Hos Stolespecialisten har vi et bredt udvalg af stole til alle formål – og helt sikkert også en til dig. Vores sortiment består af spisebordsstole, loungestole, lænestole, sofaer, bænke, barstole til private, otiumstole, senior spisebordsstole, hvilestole og lænestole til ældre, handicappede – eller andre, der ønsker lidt ekstra komfort og støtte. Derudover har vi også et stort udvalg af stole til erhverv såsom kontorstole, loungemøbler, venterumsstole, kantinestole samt restaurant og caféstole.

Vi har stole fra mange forskellige brands, herunder otiumstole og lænestole fra de anerkendte danske producenter som Schou Andersen og Farstrup stole, men du kan også finde uforlignelig tysk kvalitet fra mærker som Himolla – og mange andre producenter af stole i højeste kvalitet. 

De fleste af os, har behov for at mærke, dufte og fornemme et nyt møbel inden vi investerer i det. Derfor har I naturligvis mulighed for at besøge et af Stolespecialistens flotte showrooms, hvor der vil være rig mulighed for at afprøve, indstille og mærke alle vores møbler.

Vi har udstillingslokaler placeret centralt i byerne Osted/Lejre, Kolding, Glostrup og Odense med let tilgængelighed og med parkering lige ved indgangen, men du kan også besøge os online på stolespecialisten.dk. Vi vil også altid gerne kigge forbi med vores gratis stolebus, der kører rundt i hele landet – så kan stolene komme til dig i stedet for omvendt.

Name: Reto INDIA
Description:
Reto India is a B2C e-commerce startup transforming the home decor landscape by offering authentic, handcrafted products that celebrate India’s cultural heritage. Our mission is to connect discerning customers with the finest artisans from across the country, ensuring every piece reflects unparalleled craftsmanship, quality, and tradition.

We curate a diverse collection of decor items, including intricately carved wooden furniture, vibrant textiles, exquisite ceramics, and more, each designed by skilled craftsmen whose artistry has been passed down through generations. Every product is a story of dedication and creativity, bringing a touch of cultural richness to modern homes.

At Reto India, we’re not just about selling decor; we’re about preserving traditions. By sourcing directly from artisan communities, we promote sustainability and support their livelihoods, ensuring these age-old crafts thrive in a contemporary world. Our commitment to ethical practices and eco-conscious production reduces environmental impact while fostering meaningful connections between creators and customers.

Our platform offers a seamless shopping experience, with intuitive navigation, secure payments, and reliable delivery, making it effortless to bring timeless elegance to your home. Each purchase is more than a transaction – it’s a step toward celebrating India’s artistic heritage and transforming your living space into a sanctuary of style and tradition.

Discover the soul of India with Reto India, where authenticity meets elegance.

Lo spazio è molto ampio, 850 mq, e ottimamente illuminato, all’interno troverai 20 cucine, 10 living, 4 bagni, 1 lavanderia e una stanza da 50mq interamente dedicata alla BoxLife, oltre a tantissimi complementi d’arredo come tavoli, sedie e consolle.
Abbiamo pensato proprio a tutto, un’area Relax e un’area bimbi dove poter attendere il vostro arredatore e rilassarvi davanti al nostro magnifico bonsai.
Ad accoglierti troverai uno staff altamente qualificato che ti affiancherà in ogni tua richiesta, consigliandoti sempre il meglio possibile perché il cliente è il nostro bene più prezioso da oltre 60 anni.
Nel 2022 lo store è stato il primo in Italia per fatturato.
Ti aspettiamo allo Scavolini Store Fiumicino Da Vinci per stupirti!

Name: muy mucho México
Description:
Nuestra máxima es hacer de la decoración algo accesible, ofreciendo productos atractivos y especiales para la decoración de cualquier hogar. Nuestro sueño es construir hogares confortables, que inviten a relajarse y a disfrutar de la vida en cada momento. Perseguimos crear ambientes íntimos, tranquilos, acogedores y cálidos, en los que compartir experiencias con los nuestros. 

¿Cómo lo conseguimos? Buscamos inspiración en nuestros viajes y reinterpretamos las últimas tendencias en torno a la filosofía hygge, una palabra de origen danesa que significa “felicidad en las pequeñas cosas”. El predominio de la madera y los textiles para crear ambientes cálidos y acogedores, los colores suaves, el uso de una luz tenue o natural, el equilibrio del orden… Let’s hygge!
