Here you will find the very best in pillows and mattress toppers from some of the fastest growing bedding brands anywhere in the world.  You will also find exceptional products manufactured exclusively under licence, from some of the most recognisable and established bed brands that you simply cannot find anywhere else.

Our aim is to deliver the highest possible quality at the lowest possible prices and deliver innovative products that stand out from the humdrum, commodity orientated industry standard.

100% Comfort was founded by Mike, Greg and Nick, who also founded and/or helped build some of the biggest UK brands from Dreams and DFS to Furniture Village and Carpetright.  They understand what makes a great brand and a great product.  They also understand the need for incredible value, especially in today’s tough trading environment where consumers are more price conscious than ever.  

They have a simple philosophy, be different and better in everything you do, build relationships and partnerships based on mutual success and always start by putting the customer first.

Name: Katta Indonesia
Description:
Katta is a luxury furniture store based in Jakarta, Indonesia. Freshly founded in 2023 by people with years of experience in fine craftsmanship. The brand principle is to offer only world-class furniture brands that indisputably deliver exquisite products and sophisticated services. Contemporary pieces focusing on exclusive design and advanced furniture-making are the landscape of the Katta showroom.

 

The aim is to cultivate and deepen the ultimate living experience for the design-conscious market who truly value high artisanship

Name: Talsma Furniture Inc
Description: Talsma Furniture Inc is a furniture company based out of 3620 Chicago Dr Hudsonville, MI 49426

Name: Apa Móveis Manaus
Description: A APA Móveis está presente na vida de milhares de amazonenses, através de suas lojas nos principais bairros de Manaus e nos municípios de Manacapuru e Tefé. Além disso, possui a operação de vendas para pequenos e médios varejistas.

Name: Marcas Lifestyle
Description: MARCAS offers a unique retail experience for furniture and home decor. We provide stylish, high-quality furniture at an affordable price. We make it easy for you to find the perfect piece of furniture for your home. Our team is passionate about design, and we are committed to providing excellent customer service. We are committed to making shopping for furniture fun, easy, and affordable.

Name: KAAN Winkelstelling
Description:
Kaan Winkelstellingen is een toonaangevend bedrijf in de winkelinrichting sector, gespecialiseerd in het leveren van hoogwaardige winkelstellingen en winkelmateriaal. Met een scherp oog voor detail en een diepgaand begrip van de behoeften van de retailmarkt, bieden wij op maat gemaakte oplossingen die perfect passen bij elke winkelomgeving. Onze producten zijn ontworpen om zowel functionaliteit als esthetiek te optimaliseren, waardoor uw winkel een aantrekkelijke en efficiënte ruimte wordt.

Wij bedienen een breed scala aan klanten, van kleine zelfstandige winkels tot grote winkelketens, en zijn trots op onze flexibiliteit en klantgerichtheid. Of u nu een compleet nieuwe winkelinrichting nodig heeft of slechts enkele stellingen wilt toevoegen, Kaan Winkelstellingen biedt u de kwaliteit en service die u verwacht.

Als voorloper in onze sector blijven wij innoveren door nieuwe configuraties van winkelmateriaal samen te stellen, zodat we onze klanten altijd de beste oplossingen kunnen bieden. De mogelijkheden om een top shop te realiseren bij ons zijn grenzeloos.

Name: Puur Keukens
Description: Puur Keukens staat voor persoonlijke aandacht, creativiteit, korte lijnen en een breed aanbod van keukens in diverse stijlen.

Name: Evviva - Santos
Description: Móveis planejados para sua casa

Name: Zinus Australia
Description:
G'Day! We're Zinus, nice to meet you. 

We're committed to helping everyone bring happiness home. That's why Zinus products are easy to understand, assemble, and enjoy. We design tiny reminders that life is good. 

We fill our mattresses with peace of mind by adding natural ingredients. Our Premium Infusions, like green tea, olive oil, charcoal, and copper, help you sleep better and keep your mattress feeling cool and fresh.

At Zinus, we manage every part of the manufacturing process. From our team of research and developers, who regularly win internationally-acclaimed Good Design Awards, to our teams in the manufacturing facilities who carefully build each piece of furniture to ensure it arrives at your home in perfect condition.

Name: Carelli Decor
Description:
Bem-vindo à Carelli Decor, a sua loja de móveis e decoração independente que tem como objetivo fornecer o melhor em termos de estilo, bom gosto e qualidade a um preço justo.

Na Carelli Decor, acreditamos que a decoração é uma forma de expressão pessoal, e é por isso que oferecemos uma diversidade de opções de móveis e itens decorativos para atender a todos os estilos e preferências. Seja você um amante do design contemporâneo, clássico ou vintage, ou esteja buscando criar um ambiente único com elementos ecléticos, nossa coleção tem tudo o que você precisa para transformar sua casa em um refúgio de bom gosto.

Estamos comprometidos em fornecer produtos de alta qualidade, selecionados cuidadosamente, que atendam aos padrões mais exigentes. Nossa equipe está sempre em busca das últimas tendências e novidades do mundo da decoração, para que você possa encontrar produtos exclusivos e inovadores em nossa loja.

Acreditamos que o bom gosto não precisa ser acompanhado por preços exorbitantes. Por isso, nos esforçamos para oferecer uma seleção de móveis e itens decorativos a um preço justo, tornando a decoração acessível a todos.

Na Carelli Decor, valorizamos a sua satisfação como cliente. Nossa equipe está sempre pronta para ajudar, fornecendo um atendimento personalizado e orientação especializada para ajudar você a tomar as melhores decisões de decoração para sua casa.

Explore a diversidade de estilos e opções que a Carelli Decor oferece, e deixe-nos ajudá-lo a transformar sua casa em um espaço único e acolhedor, que reflita o seu estilo pessoal. Estamos ansiosos para fazer parte da sua jornada de decoração!

Name: Ugoyn Estate Limited
Description: Specialized in interior and exterior furinitures for both residential and commercial properties.

Name: Marquardt Duiven
Description: Wij vinden het belangrijk om een gezellige omgeving te creëren in onze showroom, waar de deur altijd open staat. Loop gerust eens binnen, de koffie staat klaar en we helpen je graag met de zoektocht naar jouw droomkeuken. Of je nou in één keer een keuken wilt kopen of door middel van meerdere afspraken tot een gedegen besluit komt, het is allemaal mogelijk bij ons. Ons motto is: ben je niet 100% tevreden over de gekozen materialen of het ontwerp, dan willen wij je de keuken nog niet verkopen! En gaan we samen op zoek totdat het 100% naar jullie zin is.

Name: DIVYA Living
Description:
Divya Living is a luxury rug brand where centuries-old craftsmanship and contemporary design meet to create high-end products perfect for your space.

With a commitment to sustainable design and ethical business practices, we bring each product to life, beginning with premium material sourcing to exquisite hand-weaving and careful finishing.

Literally translating to ‘divine brilliance’, DIVYA captures the idea that a deeper appreciation for nature, people, and the world is all one needs to create a fulfilling life. Each of our products is inspired by the nuances of life and the nature that surrounds us.

Explore our Limited Edition and Quick Ship collections, or reach out to learn more about our Bespoke services and find the ideal centerpiece for your space today!

Name: Really Old Shit
Description:
Welcome to a time capsule of style and nostalgia, where the past comes alive through every carefully curated piece. Step into our vintage webshop, a haven for enthusiasts and connoisseurs of the timeless elegance that defined the 50's and 60's. Here, we invite you to embark on a journey through the mid-century era, where furniture and lighting transcend mere functionality to become exquisite works of art.

Immerse yourself in an era renowned for its innovation and creativity, as we present a handpicked collection that captures the essence of an era that redefined design. Our virtual shelves are adorned with meticulously restored furniture, each piece echoing the iconic lines, bold forms, and vibrant colors that characterize mid-century aesthetics. From sleek Eames chairs to iconic tulip tables, our inventory is a celebration of the designs that continue to influence the world of interior decor.

Discover lighting that not only illuminates spaces but also evokes emotions. The harmonious blend of functionality and artistic expression is evident in every pendant lamp, floor fixture, and sconce on display. These luminous gems take you back to a time when even lighting was an opportunity to infuse creativity into everyday living.

Whether you're an avid collector seeking the missing piece to complete your ensemble or a design enthusiast yearning to introduce a touch of retro charm to your surroundings, our vintage webshop offers a treasure trove that resonates with the spirit of the 50's and 60's. Each item tells a story, a testament to an era when design was a reflection of optimism, innovation, and a deep sense of style.

Join us in celebrating the legacy of mid-century design - an era that has left an indelible mark on the world of art and interior decor. Our vintage webshop is not just a marketplace; it's a tribute to the craftsmanship and ingenuity that have stood the test of time. Step inside and let the allure of the 50's and 60's captivate your senses once more.

Name: DFI Beds
Description: DFI Beds is Ireland’s largest online bedding retailer and Official Sleep Partner to the Ladies Gaelic Football Association (LGFA). With over twenty years in the online bed and mattress business, DFI Beds understands the importance of high quality product and great service at an affordable price. The company is has a factory showroom at the Unit 1, Saltmarine Complex, Tamnamore, Dungannon, and another showroom at the Quays Shopping Centre, Newry.

Name: La Boutique Circulaire par Tikamoon
Description:
La boutique circulaire est le lieu de revalorisation de la marque Tikamoon, le spécialiste du mobilier en bois massif.  

Installée depuis plus de 15 ans en région lilloise, cette boutique s’est développée autour d’une démarche zéro déchet et a pour objectif de devenir un site entièrement régénératif. 

C’est dans un lieu à vocation éco-responsable, à deux pas du siège, qu’elle entreprend ce beau projet. Composée d’un atelier de revalorisation et d’un magasin destiné à la vente, la boutique circulaire se veut être un lieu solidaire, écologique et humain. Chaque jour, l’équipe vous y accueille pour vous conseiller et vous accompagner dans votre recherche de mobilier durable.

Name: Dhom Store
Description: Dhom è il primo concept store della Sicilia a fornire soluzioni per la casa a 360°: dalla pavimentazione agli arredi, dai tessili al bagno, dal kids al tempo libero.

Name: Solsäkert
Description: Erbjuder helhetslösningar till hemmet eller företag. Boka ett gratis hembesök och få offert inom 1 dag.

Name: bulthaup Grenoble
Description:
Au cœur de la ville et pourtant si proche des sommets enneigés, le showroom bulthaup Grenoble se situe dans une rue commerçante où il fait bon flâner. Au rez-de-chaussée d’un immeuble haussmannien, il est entouré par des boutiques de créateurs et des marques. À la fois bureau d’étude et lieu d’exposition, cet ancien garage a su conserver son originalité pour se métamorphoser en espace atypique et contemporain, chic et chaleureux.
Le showroom bulthaup Grenoble vous propose de vous accompagner dans la conception et l'aménagement de votre cuisine haut de gamme sur-mesure.

Name: Fractions
Description: Fractions are unique aluminium shutters. They are used as exclusive window decoration in high-quality interiors and projects. Fractions create the romantic incidence of light of shutters in a refined and elegant manner. The aluminium slots can be adjusted to allow the right amount of light to enter the room. The dappled light creates a memorable experience. Fractions provide the option to vary between open and closed settings and to determine the light intensity in the room, thus forming a dance of moving patterns, of light and shadow. With Fractions aluminium shutters we have opened a whole new dimension in the universe of shutters. Functionality and beauty truly merge.

Name: Snow Slumber
Description: Sleep cooler with our unique mattress technology every night. We're a Singapore home grown brand and we believe that quality sleep on luxury mattresses doesn't have to be expensive.

Name: Rug the Rock
Description:
At Rug the Rock, we are collecting, curating, and selling authentic antique Rugs. All Vintage Rugs that we are selling were produced years ago with love by nomads and are treasures of the past, we enjoy sharing all these beautiful and unique hand-knotted vintage & antique rugs with our lovely customers.
With our established network of experts, our customers have a chance to try authentic rugs that are long-lasting and sustainable in the convenience of their house and then decide whether to buy them or not

Name: The Kitchen Draw
Description:
The Kitchen Draw is a prize draw website, hosting competitions for premium kitchenware at low cost-of-entry and with great odds of winning.

We are not expert chefs or cooking pros – we're normal people with normal kitchens (sometimes we don't even enjoy cooking!). However our experience has shown us that having awesome equipment and utensils can make cooking and hosting a much more enjoyable experience. This is really what The Kitchen Draw is all about: making kitchens as fun and exciting as possible.

Name: Nouhaus Inc.
Description: Our mission is to go beyond the old idea that furniture should only focus on one thing. In today’s smart and capable world; design, function and affordability is easy – and in fact, fun!  All-encompassing furniture is no longer a luxury that comes with a sacrifice, but instead a luxurious, meaningful must-have for anyone who chooses it.

Name: BADHUSET I JÖNKÖPING AB
Description:
Badhuset länets största badrumsbutik inom badrum, spabad och bastu.
Via ehandeln erbjuder vi brett utbud av skandinaviska badrumsmöbler, duschlösningar, bastu och spabad. 

Butik i Jönköping har inspirerande badrumsmiljöer och ett brett utbud av kakel & klinker. Här kan du prova och beställa badrumsmöbler, textilier och andra accessoarer, badkar & dusch inklusive montering hemma. 

Renovering av badrum kräver idag stor kunskap om de olika branschernas regelverk, lagstiftning, nya metoder och produkter/material. Om du väljer att anlita Badhuset för din renovering så kan du känna dig trygg och säker på att vi kan badrum. Vi gör cirka 100 badrum varje år och är väl bekanta med de produkter som vi föreslår.

Ett kontrakt = en riktig totalentreprenad. Badhuset erbjuder ett unikt totalkoncept där vi förenar styrkan i att ha en fullsorterad badrumsbutik med helhetsansvar och specialkompetens.

Name: Hagro Keukens
Description: Hagro Keukens, opgericht in 1982, is een betrouwbare partner voor zelfstandige keukenondernemers in Nederland en België. Met meer dan 40 jaar ervaring biedt het bedrijf een breed assortiment keukens van gerenommeerde merken zoals Rotpunkt, Schmidt en Schröder. Hagro ondersteunt ondernemers met diverse diensten, zoals dealerondersteuning, showroomontwerpen en verkoopassistentie, zodat zij zich kunnen richten op hun kerntaken. Door de jaren heen heeft Hagro zich gepositioneerd als een solide speler in de keukenbranche, met een focus op het leveren van hoogwaardige keukens en het blijven innoveren. Het bedrijf helpt ondernemers te groeien en hun onafhankelijkheid te behouden.

Name: Hulala Home
Description: Hulala Home is a female owned and operated furniture business based in Fort Worth, TX. We offer stunning and unique chairs, office chairs, sofas, loveseats, and storage options. No matter your style, the size of your space we have the perfect piece for you.

Name: Maison Henry | Jersey
Description:
Our seating collection combines playful lines with sink-in comfort and an effortless laid back attitude. Available in a variety of fabrics, cushion fillings and styles, there is something for everyone.

Every single one of our sofas and chairs are handmade using sustainable materials and hardwood frames, which are guaranteed for 30 years. They are all available as chaises, in custom lengths and as corner or U configurations.

Name: Atak Design
Description: Atak Design is a retail company based out of Żeligowskiego 43a, Łódź, Poland.

Name: BS Interiores
Description:
Nascida da paixão pelo bom gosto e bem servir, a BS Interiores conta com mais de duas décadas de atuação no mercado do Mobiliário, Design e Decoração.

Fomos consolidando os nossos serviços em áreas diversificadas, desde o fabrico próprio de mobiliário personalizado passando pela requalificação dos espaços, sem nunca esquecer a componente decorativa e estética que torna cada trabalho e cada casa, um espaço único!

Desde 1998, o nosso principal foco é atender às necessidades dos nossos clientes, trabalhando sempre com os mais altos padrões de qualidade de forma a assegurar a satisfação plena de todos aqueles que nos procuram.

A nossa singularidade reflete-se na exigência, exclusividade e acompanhamento que conferimos a cada desafio, a cada cliente!

Name: Grupo OCA (@agave.casa | @coso.work)
Description: Controladora das marcas @agave.casa e @coso.work.

Name: Chévous
Description:
Chévous is a Quebec-based family business with four showrooms — Laval, Montréal–Anjou, Montréal–Plateau Mont-Royal and Longueuil — and more opening soon. We offer:

Custom sofas: modular configurations, over 20 fabrics and dimensions tailored to your space

Complete furniture: dining rooms, bedroom sets, living room pieces, storage solutions and more, combining quality with design

Flexible financing: 0% interest plans and personalized monthly payments

Family service: bespoke design advice and local expertise

Experience Chévous in-store or online at chevous.ca.
Canapés sur mesure : configurations modulaires, plus de 20 tissus et dimensions adaptées à votre espace

Mobilier complet : salles à manger, ensembles de chambre, meubles de salon, rangements et plus encore, alliant qualité et design

Financement flexible : plans à 0 % d’intérêt et versements mensuels personnalisés

Service familial : conseils de design sur mesure et expertise locale

Vivez l’expérience Chévous en magasin ou sur chevous.ca.

Name: Display Center Agencement
Description:
Display Center est une entreprise spécialisée en création de points de vente. Nous proposons, en plus de notre vaste gamme de produits standards et personnalisés à des coûts très attractifs, des prestations de création de concept à votre image. 
Rendez-vous sur notre site internet pour visiter notre showroom virtuel.
Nous prenons également en charge les projets Tout Corps d'Etat (construction, agrandissement...).
Rendez vous sur notre site internet pour visiter notre showroom virtuel.

Name: Get Furnished
Description:
Get Furnished is the store for people with a designer taste and an eye for real value. Each product is crafted and designed to meet the highest quality standards. This way, we ensure that you our customer can purchase furniture that is tasteful, real value and top quality, but also comfortable, practical and hard wearing. We offer a choice of styles from modern and traditional living room, dining room, bedroom sets and occasional furniture.

Everything at Get Furnished is done with our customer in mind: great prices, great designs, great quality, a unique in store experience, as well as stock availability and white glove delivery.

Name: GALERIE GOSSEREZ
Description: La Galerie Gosserez est une galerie de design contemporain, leader de la nouvelle création depuis 2010 et fondée par Marie-Bérangère Gosserez.

Name: DIE EINRICHTER Albrecht & Bründl
Description: Wir sind seit 25 Jahren professionelle Einrichtungsberater und erstellen Ihnen Ihr Konzept für Ihr Büro, Ihr Hotel, Ihr Privatheim. Wir geben nicht nur Ideen, wir sind auch Gestalter und Umsetzer. "Von Abbruch bis Zierkissen" ist unser Slogan. Wir begleiten Sie von der ersten Idee, über die Konzeption, Angebot, Umsetzung bis zur Fertigstellung. Und das mit einem 8-köpfigen Team, das auch die kniffligsten Anfertigungen und Montagen mit Bravour meistert.

Name: El Armario
Description: El Armario Home cuenta con 41 años siendo pionera en el area de decoración. Abrio sus puertas en el año 1983 siendo la primera tienda en Tegucigalpa que ofrecía una atención personalizada al cliente en el area de decoración

Name: Glorious furniture town
Description:
Glorious furniture town is a furniture manufacturing company for both indoor and outdoor use. We have gained considerable experience in production & sale of household items. 
In store shopping || online shopping

Name: Tradition Hardware
Description: Every piece of our hardware is crafted from solid brass and thoughtfully designed by our in-house team of designers and engineers. Our designs are inspired by classic styles that have stood for generations.

Name: JENSENplus DK
Description: Møbelleverandør til store og små danske virksomheder. Vi arbejder sammen med arkitekter fra hele landet og mere end 250 forskellige producenter.

Name: Casa Sant'Alberti
Description:
A Sant'Alberti nasceu da busca por um estilo de decoração com mais sentido e profundidade, acompanhada da necessidade de desenvolver no Brasil peças que ainda não eram por aqui encontradas.

Nosso desejo é entregar mais beleza, elegância e conforto a lares únicos e foi por meio das cabeceiras que começamos a realizar essa missão.

Pioneiros no e-commerce de cabeceiras soltas com capas removíveis, nosso objetivo é transmitir delicadeza, aconchego e versatilidade em cada peça, para composições leves, atemporais e exclusivas.

O que começou com uma enxuta coleção de capas para cabeceira e saias de cama, hoje já conta com um portfólio com mais de 40 produtos e continuamos desenvolvendo peças exclusivas, com atenção a cada detalhe, do design à escolha dos materiais.

Name: Storeluxy
Description: Storeluxy is an international luxury fashion and designer shopping store. Shipping to 30+ countries worldwide. Made in UK with love.

Name: Moleta Munro
Description:
Moleta Munro is a UK based contemporary furniture and lighting company with a showroom in Edinburgh, the capital of Scotland.

Inspired by the finest designs from Scandinavia, Moleta Munro specialises in showcasing the world's premier furniture and lighting brands for the contemporary market. 

Moleta Munro was founded in 2007 from a shared passion for beautiful interiors, premium quality products and the philosophy that good design can enrich people’s lives.

Moleta Munro has an exceptionally creative and dedicated team with a wealth of experience working on both commercial and residential projects. We aspire to meet our clients’ expectations and find the perfect furnishing and lighting solutions for your project.

CONTRACT PROJECTS

Moleta Munro works directly with contractors, architects and interior designers in the specification and supply of furniture, lighting and accessories for contract projects. From bars, clubs and theatres to offices, hotels and restaurants we enjoy working in partnership with our clients to create beautiful, practical and cost effective solutions.

DESIGN SERVICES

We provide interiors advice for residential customers. For more information please visit our design services section.

VIPP KITCHENS

Moleta Munro is proud to be the only UK supplier of VIPP kitchens and shelters.

Name: Katin Life Sdn Bhd
Description: Welcome to Katin Life, where we redefine the art of relaxation with our premium Egyptian cotton bedding collections. As an OEKO-TEX certified brand, we prioritize quality, sustainability, and comfort in every thread. Experience the luxury of a restful night's sleep while indulging in the unmatched softness and durability of our meticulously crafted bedding essentials.Experience:Luxury Redefined: At Katin Life, we set the standard for luxury bedding with our exquisite Egyptian cotton products. From sumptuously soft sheets to plush duvet covers, our collections are designed to elevate your sleep experience to new heights of comfort and indulgence.Quality Assurance: As an OEKO-TEX certified brand, we adhere to the highest standards of quality and sustainability. Our products are free from harmful substances, ensuring that you can sleep soundly knowing that your bedding is safe for you and the environment.Craftsmanship Excellence: Each piece in our bedding collections is meticulously crafted with attention to detail and precision. From the sourcing of premium Egyptian cotton to the expert weaving and finishing processes, we take pride in delivering superior craftsmanship that stands the test of time.Customer Satisfaction: At Katin Life, customer satisfaction is our top priority. We are dedicated to providing exceptional service and support to ensure that your experience with our brand exceeds your expectations. From seamless online shopping to prompt delivery and responsive customer care, we strive to make every interaction with Katin Life a positive and memorable one.Sustainability Commitment: As stewards of the environment, we are committed to sustainable practices throughout our supply chain.

Name: Victoria Eggs Ltd.
Description:
Award-winning Victoria Eggs homeware is born from Great-British moments; the nostalgic whiff of salt and vinegar-y chips at the seaside, quirky colloquialisms, our Royal family, London. We’re as British as the cuppa. In fact we’ve a day dedicated to celebrating our favourite brew. #TeaTuesday

Victoria Eggs is stocked in over 150 retailers in the UK and around the world, including Harrods, Liberty, Waterstones, Scribbler, Selfridges, Paperchase and Whole Foods.  

Victoria's Best Selling Queen's Commemorative Collection was Highly Commended in the Commemorative & Collectible category for Gift of the Year 2023. 

Her iconic London collections are sold across all major London landmarks; St Paul’s Cathedral, Tower of London, Historic Royal Palaces and The Biltmore Estate in the USA. 

Victoria is available for bespoke commissions, and has created bespoke collections for Whole Foods, Abbey Road Studios, Laura Ashley.

Name: Rad Best Trading PLC
Description: Rad Best Trading PLC is a place where luxury meets functionality. We are here to assist your journey to success by creating a workspace that promotes productivity, creativity, and success. We pride ourselves on the highest quality, innovative designs, and craftsmanship of our products that aims to exceed your expectations.

Name: Nolte Küchen Qatar
Description:
The New Nolte Küchen Showroom Has Opened In Doha, Qatar
Visit Our Showroom To Explore Our Wide Range Of Kitchens
Design Your Dream German-Quality Kitchen With Us

Name: Sit Straight Ltd
Description:
Founded by Osteopath, Alex Prince. At Sit Straight we believe that sitting at home or the office should be healthier. Seating, especially at work (home or office) should be ergonomic, practical, sustainable but also have a sensible price tag.
We design and bring to the market ergonomic chairs that promote good posture and better back health. 
Our chairs are designed for the modern workplace (home and office), with sustainability and reducing carbon footprint a priority. Our chairs are sustainably made in the UK and with an attainable price tag.
Sit Straight's founder Alex Prince, an Osteopath with over 25 years experience treating and managing back pain aims to make a positive change. He believes that many chairs are terrible for our backs and contribute hugely to poor spinal health. Furthermore, most office chairs are unsustainably produced, with a massive carbon footprint and often impractical for modern work place, be that at home or in the office.
Sit Straight is developing more health driven seating products to accompany their first product the Z chair. We aim to give people healthier, sustainable and more affordable seating choices for working and living.

Name: Furniture Liquidation Warehouse
Description:
Furniture Liquidation Warehouse is one of South Africa’s fastest-growing value furniture retailers, committed to delivering brand-new, high-quality furniture at unbeatable prices. With multiple store locations and a strong online presence, we make it easy for customers to furnish their homes affordably—without compromising on style, comfort, or durability.

We specialise in sourcing premium overstock, end-of-range, and brand-new furniture directly from trusted manufacturers, allowing us to pass exceptional savings on to our customers. Our ever-changing inventory features a wide range of products, including lounge suites, recliners, beds and mattresses, dining sets, office furniture, and home essentials.

At Furniture Liquidation Warehouse, we pride ourselves on:

Value you can trust – premium furniture at liquidation-level pricing

Continuous new stock – fresh arrivals every week

Exceptional customer service – in-store and online

Fast fulfilment & nationwide delivery

Long-term brand partnerships with reputable suppliers

Our mission is simple: to make quality furniture accessible to every home in South Africa. Whether outfitting a first apartment, upgrading a family home, or sourcing for hospitality projects, we offer practical solutions backed by unbeatable value.

Name: The Wandering Bee
Description: The Wandering Bee are a small family-run business based in Staffordshire, who launched early 2021 with the mission of creating kick-ass kind candles handcrafted from beer bottles, that are kinder to the planet and better for your health.

Name: TAIL LIVING AB
Description:
At Tail Living we design all our furniture and accessories so that it is both beautiful and functional. Our high quality designs draw inspiration from Scandinavian style and are made using sustainable materials.
Our mission is to satisfy the cat's behavior as well as the style in your home.

Name: Maison Concept & Objet
Description:
Γιατί ΜΑΙSON σημαίνει σπίτι…
MAISON, το brand που αποτελεί την ταχύτερα αναπτυσσόμενη Ελληνική αλυσίδα καταστημάτων στον χώρο του επίπλου και της διακόσμησης.

Name: seyfarth einrichtungen
Description:
Historie
Ein Geschäft für hochwertige Möbel und Einrichtungen in Mannheim (M1.1) war bei der Gründung vor über 30 Jahren ein Wagnis, Georg Seyfarth ging dieses Wagnis ein, und der Erfolg gibt ihm und seinem Team recht. Nach gut 20 Jahren kam ein Geschäft in Heidelberg (die Plöck 64) und vor 8 Jahren ein weiteres in Mannheim (Augustaanlage 21-23) dazu.

Philosophie
In allen Geschäften geht es um Wohn- u. Bürokonzepte. langfristige Einrichtungslösungen werden in Beratung und Ortsterminen besprochen und gemeinsam mit den Kunden erarbeitet. der Kunde soll nicht nur zufrieden sein. die Möbel sollen auch auf die jeweilige Wohnung oder Geschäfträume und deren Charakter abgestimmt werden. ob es sich hierbei um Altbauten oder neue Räume handelt, um Ergänzung von vorhandenem, oder komplette Neueinrichtungen, für alle Bereiche findet man bei seyfarth Einrichtungen Ansprechpartner (Einrichtungsberater, Innenarchitekten u. Architekten). Für die Umsetzung vor Ort sind eigene Schreiner (Hermann Leis in Mannheim, und Volker Klatt in Heidelberg) zuständig.

Klar und einfach ist das Motto von seyfarth einrichtungen. Alt und neu werden nicht als Gegensatz aufgefasst, sondern sind Geschäftsphilosophie und Lebenseinstellung.

Name: AcoustX
Description:
Bij AcoustX combineren we wetenschappelijke precisie met esthetisch ontwerp om van elke ruimte een comfortabele en functionele omgeving te maken. Geluid beïnvloedt hoe we ons voelen, werken en leren, maar goede akoestiek zie je niet altijd – je ervaart het. Daarom meten en berekenen wij exact hoeveel geluidsabsorberend materiaal nodig is om de nagalmtijd en geluidsverdeling in jouw ruimtes optimaal te beheren.

 Onze missie: de juiste balans in iedere ruimte, waarbij akoestiek en esthetiek hand in hand gaan.

Bij AcoustX zorgen we voor:
• Geluidscomfort dat past bij elk interieur – van kantoor en horecazaak tot school en publieke ruimte.
• Een breed assortiment aan oplossingen – van subtiele, naadloze toepassingen tot opvallende designstatement-elementen.
• Volledige begeleiding van A tot Z – advies, materiaalkeuze, levering en plaatsing.
• Meetbare resultaten – minder nagalm, gerichte geluidsreductie en een prettige ruimte dankzij metingen, berekeningen, simulaties en materiaalkennis.

 Zo combineren we functionaliteit, comfort en esthetiek in elke ruimte. Bij AcoustX geloven we dat goede akoestiek zichtbaar én voelbaar moet zijn. Wij maken het verschil door comfort, rust en esthetiek te verenigen in een oplossing die perfect past bij jouw ruimte en wensen.

 Meer weten? Neem gerust contact met ons op!

 Que ce soit la création de bureaux réglables en hauteur pour favoriser le bien-être au travail, la conception de cafétérias pour stimuler les échanges entre collègues ou la mise en place de cabines acoustiques pour améliorer la concentration, nous avons l'expertise pour transformer n'importe quel espace de travail en un lieu d'inspiration.

 Découvrez notre gamme de services  :

 Design de bureaux : Création d'espaces de travail esthétiques et fonctionnels pour améliorer votre environnement professionnel.

 Mobilier de bureau : Sélection de mobilier de haute qualité pour une ambiance de travail confortable et productive.

 Aménagement d'espaces collaboratifs : Créez des zones de travail qui encouragent la collaboration et la créativité.

 Cabines acoustiques : Améliorez la concentration en créant des espaces insonorisés.

 Cafétéria et espaces de détente : Favorisez les échanges entre collègues dans des espaces conviviaux.

 Bureaux réglables en hauteur : Investissez dans des bureaux ergonomiques pour le bien-être de vos employés.

 Rejoignez-nous pour rester informé de nos dernières réalisations et découvrez comment nous pouvons vous aider à redéfinir votre environnement de travail. Ensemble, nous pouvons transformer votre lieu de travail en un endroit où la créativité et la productivité se rejoignent.

 #DesignIntérieur #EspacesDeTravail #MobilierDeBureau #Innovation #Collaboration #Productivité #BureauxRéglables

Description:
„Wein ist Poesie in Flaschen“, deswegen sollte er mit Genuss getrunken und mit Bedacht aufbewahrt werden. Aus diesem Grund freuen wir uns besonders, Ihnen sorgsam ausgewählte Produkte rund um den Weinkeller und das Thema Wein vorzustellen, die Sie begeistern werden. Dabei legen wir höchsten Wert auf hervorragende Produktqualität verbunden mit einem exzellenten Service.

Getreu unserer Maxime „Das Beste für Ihren Wein“ sind wir ständig auf der Suche nach neuen und innovativen Lösungen, um unseren Kunden in Deutschland und dem europäischen Ausland hochwertige Weinregale und stilvolle Wein-Accessoires anzubieten.

Die faszinierende Welt der Weinlagerung... können Sie in unserem Online-Shop www.weinregal-profi.de entdecken.

Umfangreiches Angebot an Weinregalen: Bei uns finden Sie Weinregale aus unterschiedlichsten Materialien wie Holz, Metall, Kunststoff oder Stein - je nachdem was das Beste für Ihren Keller ist. Das Spektrum reicht von Standardsystemen mit einfachen Basisregalen über originelle Designstücke bis zur individuellen, hochwertigen Maßanfertigung.

Alles, für die perfekte Klimatisierung Ihrer Weine: Auch der wichtige Punkt der Klimatisierung kommt bei uns nicht zu kurz: Je nach Bedarf erhalten Sie bei uns Weinkühl- und –temperierschränke sowie selbstverständlich Weinklimageräte. Wir unterstützen Sie gerne bei der Installation.

Vielfältige & praktische Wein-Accessoires: Was wäre ein Weinkeller ohne entsprechende Accessoires? Stöbern Sie bei Korkenziehern, Dekantern, Flaschenkühlern, Weinmöbeln oder Gläsern – etwas Schönes oder Nützliches ist für Sie bestimmt dabei!

Erfüllen Sie sich den Traum vom individuellen Weinkeller oder gekühlten, verglastem Weinkabinett in Ihren Wohn- oder Geschäftsräumen- angepasst genau auf ihr Wünsche. Neben hochwertigen privaten Weinräumen konzipieren wir auch attraktive Lösungen für Weingüter, Vinotheken, Weinhandelsgeschäfte, Gastronomie und Hotellerie.

We guarantee the highest quality for each piece of furniture through a rigorous control system covering all process steps. We hold international standard product marking and quality management system certificates. All LINSY products meet strict international quality and environmental standards, ensuring that our customers receive only the best.

OUR DETAILS
We view furniture as more than just a product—it's a craft. Our designs focus on comfort and versatility, ensuring your space is perfect for unwinding and bonding with loved ones. We are dedicated to sustainability, using eco-friendly materials and manufacturing methods to minimize our environmental impact.

Name: CGS Group Inc Designitalia
Description:
Welcome to Designitalia, where the essence of authentic 20th Century Italian Furniture comes to life. Discover a curated selection of remarkable designs sourced directly from renowned Italian creators such as Afra and Tobia Scarpa, Mario Bellini, Paolo Buffa, Gio Ponti, Osvaldo Borsani, Ico Parisi, Marco Zanuso, Massimo Vignelli, Cini Boeri, and many more. With our representatives based in the thriving cities of Milan and Venice, as well as frequent buying trips to Italy, we bring you the finest furniture pieces, shipping them directly to your doorstep in the USA.

Discover a curated collection of iconic masterpieces that have captured the hearts of interior designers and design enthusiasts alike. From the Camaleonda by Mario Bellini for B&B Italia to the Soriana sofa collection by Afra and Tobia Scarpa, our selection showcases the epitome of Italian design excellence.

CGS Group has been at the forefront of importing and distributing luxury Italian furniture to the North American market. From serving as an agency party for major Italian furniture companies in the 1990s to establishing our renowned 'Showroom in the Sky' at the historic Mason Building in New York City, we have catered to the discerning tastes of both trade professionals and private clients.

In 2016, CGS Group expanded its horizons to embrace the world of 20th Century design, with a particular focus on the Mid-Century Italian period. This evolution allows us to offer an even more diverse and captivating collection that celebrates the timeless allure of Italian design throughout the ages.

Description:
عن كاربت لاند | Carpet Land

في كاربت لاند، نعيد تعريف تجربة التسوق في عالم السجاد والمفروشات والمراتب. بخبرة تمتد لأكثر من 60 عامًا، رسّخنا مكانتنا كواحدة من كبرى شركات التجزئة والجملة في السوق المصري، حيث نخدم مئات آلاف العملاء من خلال شبكة قوية من المعارض ونقاط البيع في مختلف المحافظات.

نتميز بتقديم تشكيلة متنوعة من السجاد والمفروشات بتصميمات حصرية وجودة عالية، بالتعاون مع نخبة من الموردين المحليين والعالميين، وعلى رأسهم مصانع النساجون الشرقيون. كما نلتزم بأعلى معايير الاحترافية في خدمة العملاء، والتطوير المستمر لمنظومتنا التشغيلية والبيعية.

نؤمن بأن التميز لا يكون فقط في المنتج، بل في التجربة، ولهذا نعمل على بناء بيئة عمل محفزة واحترافية لفريقنا، الذي يشكل القلب النابض لنجاحنا.

كاربت لاند – بيت العيلة... حيث الجودة تلتقي بالثقة

Name: Möbel Inhofer Gruppe
Description:
Die Inhofer Gruppe ist mit rund 1.000 Mitarbeitern ein bekannter, sicherer und zuverlässiger Arbeitgeber in der Region. Der Vielfältigkeit an Arbeit werden hier keine Grenzen gesetzt! Es werden sowohl Fachleute in der Möbel- als auch in der Immobilienbranche ausgebildet und beschäftigt.

Die Möbel Inhofer GmbH & Co. besteht aus folgenden Vertriebseinheiten:
    • Möbel Inhofer: Das Möbelhaus in Senden ist überregional bekannt
     als Europas größte Wohnwelt. Es vereinigt die Vertriebsschienen Möbel 
     Inhofer und die Mitnahmemärkte Mega IN und Sparkauf. 
     Webseite: https://www.inhofer.de/
    • interni by Inhofer: Deutschlands großer Designtreffpunkt mit 
     unzähligen internationalen Herstellern in Senden. 
     Webseite: https://www.interni.de/
    • Innovation Küche &Bad: Hier finden Sie Deutschlands größtes 
     Musterhaus Küchen- und Badfachgeschäft in Günzburg.
     Webseite: https://www.innovation-kuecheundbad.de/

Der seit 1967 bestehende Immobilienzweig -August Inhofer Bauträger/ Hausverwaltung/ Immobilien GmbH & Co. KG- steht für höchste Ausführungs- und Servicequalität, kombiniert mit langjähriger Erfahrung im Einrichtungsbereich, und gilt daher als verlässlicher Partner für alle Bauherren. 
Er beschäftigt sich mit dem Bau, dem Verkauf, der Verwaltung und der Vermietung von Immobilien. 
Bis heute wurden über 5.000 Wohneinheiten in Form von Einfamilienhäusern, Doppel-/Kettenhäusern, Reihenhäusern und Etagenwohnungen fertig gestellt. 
Die eigene Hausverwaltung bietet auf Wunsch Verwaltungsleistungen für Miet- und Eigentumswohnungen an. Sie verwaltet derzeit rund 2.500 Wohneinheiten und sorgt somit für eine professionelle Betreuung und Verwaltung der Immobilien und trägt zur Werterhaltung der Objekte bei. 
Webseite: http://www.inhofer-wohnbau.de/

Seien auch Sie ein Teil unserer Familie...

Name: Tijhuis Totaalinrichting
Description:
Wij zijn een jong en dynamisch bedrijf met ervaren medewerkers op het gebied van totale inrichting. Wij ontwikkelen (soms in samenwerking met architecten) en realiseren functionele interieurconcepten, maar ook voor enkel raambekleding, vloer- en/of wandafwerkingen, meubilair, verlichting etc. kunt u bij ons terecht. Wij hebben uiteenlopende klanten in diverse sectoren. Van zorg tot horeca, van onderwijs tot overheid, maar ook de particulier kan bij ons terecht.

Korte communicatielijnen, laagdrempeligheid, goede kennis en service zijn onze kernwoorden.

Tijdens de inventarisatie horen wij graag uw wensen en eisen. Van de betreffende producten geven wij de voornaamste kenmerken weer. Dus wat u van het product kunt verwachten en wat de zaken zijn waarop gelet dient te worden. Er wordt ook rekening gehouden met belangrijke aspecten als sfeer, ergonomie, functionaliteit en duurzaamheid. Indien gewenst maken wij een moodboard of 3d-tekening van de in te richten ruimte.

Met diverse zorgorganisaties hebben wij raamovereenkomsten afgesloten. Een deel van de taken van hun interne technische dienst zijn door ons overgenomen. Hierbij moet gedacht worden aan allerlei calamiteiten, interne verhuizingen, reinigen en eventueel repareren van waterbedden etc., repareren van sloten etc..

Ons bedrijf is gevestigd in Hengelo. Hengelo ligt centraal in Twente. Dichtbij Almelo, Enschede en Oldenzaal. Wij beschikken over een ruime showroom, waar u doordeweeks van 8.00 tot 17.00 uur zonder afspraak welkom bent. In de avonden en in het weekend is de showroom op afspraak te bezoeken. Daar wordt veel gebruik van gemaakt.

Name: Spira - Trappen - Escalier
Description:
Depuis 1958, Spira à la fierté de concevoir, fabriquer et d’installer des escaliers avec la satisfaction d’apporter le meilleur conseil et le meilleur service. Entreprise de métallerie depuis sa création, nous avons, au fil des décennies, élargi notre gamme de produits et services afin de précéder vos exigences en matière de qualité, d’esthétisme et d’innovation pour devenir la référence dans la fabrication d'escalier à structure en acier en Belgique. La qualité de nos produits, de notre service, la fiabilité de notre pose ainsi que les compétences de nos collaborateurs, nous permettent de répondre à toutes vos attentes et de vous garantir un escalier sur mesure de qualité.

Sinds 1958 is Spira trots op het ontwerpen, vervaardigen en installeren van trappen met de tevredenheid van het beste advies en de beste service. Metaalbewerkingsbedrijf sinds zijn oprichting hebben we in de loop van de decennia ons aanbod van producten en diensten uitgebreid om aan uw eisen te voldoen op het gebied van kwaliteit, esthetiek en innovatie om de referentie te worden in de fabricage van staalconstructies van trappen in België. De kwaliteit van onze producten, onze service, de betrouwbaarheid van onze installatie en de vaardigheden van onze medewerkers stellen ons in staat om aan al uw verwachtingen te voldoen en u een kwaliteitstrap op maat te garanderen.

Exquisite, handcrafted, sustainable tableware from Colombia and Venezuela. CasaLatina embraces traditional craftsmanship and partners with local artisans to create luxury table and hostware that blends time-tested techniques with contemporary design.

Rooted in Latin American artistry, CasaLatina offers an elegant collection celebrating life around the table. From unique pottery and hand-painted crockery to hand-carved accessories and intricate basketry, each item is meticulously handmade, with a focus on meaningful design, functionality and enduring quality. By prioritizing responsible collaboration at the grassroots level, and with a commitment to sustainability and preserving ancient artistry, CasaLatina embraces products as carriers of traditions and net positive impact on the environment and the life of our artisans.

@thecasalatina

At PAUL RENE, we transform furniture into art, designing and handcrafting one-of-a-kind pieces that seamlessly reflect your style, space, and functional needs.

Our clients—discerning homeowners and top interior designers—seek more than furniture. They desire bespoke, heirloom-quality creations that elevate their interiors and express their individuality.

 Entertainment centers

 Custom tables and chairs

From Concept Cars to Custom Interiors
My journey began as a concept car designer at Ford Motor Company, where I learned to push creative and engineering boundaries. But my calling led me beyond corporate walls—to use my skills to address a void in design, leadership, and craftsmanship in the inner city.

How to Commission a Paul Rene Masterpiece
It all starts with a personalized design consultation at your home, office, or virtually via Zoom. I listen intently—to your vision, space, and unique style. From there, we apply our signature indigo blue design discovery technique, layering principles of shape, texture, and proportion, to craft a piece that is uniquely yours.

At PAUL RENE, we believe the key to great design is engagement. Our collaborative process ensures that your voice is heard, creating not just furniture but a true work of art.

 Let’s create something extraordinary together. Visit our website to schedule your complimentary consultation today.

Visit our BoConcept Malta Store and get professional advice about your home interior. At BoConcept, we are passionate about what we sell and take pride in achieving the best results for our customers. We have skilled interior consultants who care about furniture and urban design as much as you do. Their design and product knowledge can help you make the best choices for your home.

Name: Megi's Concept Premium & Rosanero
Description:
Tworzę przestrzenie, w których estetyka spotyka się z funkcjonalnością, a komfort z perfekcją wykonania. Megi’s Concept Premium & Rosanero to marka, która łączy rzemiosło polskich pracowni z najlepszym europejskim designem, włoskim wyrafinowaniem, hiszpańską lekkością i portugalską dbałością o detal.

Specjalizujemy się w modułowych rozwiązaniach premium – sofach, narożnikach i zestawach wypoczynkowych, które można dowolnie konfigurować, dopasowując ich formę i funkcję do indywidualnego wnętrza. Nasze kolekcje powstają w oparciu o naturalne materiały, tkaniny Aquaclean nowej generacji oraz konstrukcje z litego drewna. To meble projektowane nie tylko z myślą o estetyce, ale i o życiu, zrozumieniu potrzeb codzienności w przestrzeni prywatnej i biznesowej.

W naszej ofercie znajdują się również krzesła i stoły o charakterze rzeźbiarskim, wykonywane ręcznie przez polskich producentów, oraz lampy premium, które stanowią biżuterię wnętrza – tworząc klimat, nadając rytm przestrzeni i podkreślając jej wyjątkowy charakter.

Współpracujemy z architektami i projektantami wnętrz, udostępniając showroom jako przestrzeń spotkań, inspiracji i doboru materiałów. Każdy projekt traktujemy indywidualnie, oferując pełne wsparcie od koncepcji po realizację, transport i montaż w standardzie premium.

Megi’s Concept Premium & Rosanero to więcej niż marka, to filozofia tworzenia przestrzeni, w której każdy detal ma znaczenie, a luksus jest efektem harmonii, nie przypadku.

Name: Singapore Trading Post Pte Ltd
Description:
Bespoke furniture that pays homage to a bygone style.

A shared love and passion for Singapore's history is at the heart of Singapore Trading Post.

Our mission is to offer discerning lifestyle seekers with a stylish, but unique, shopping alternative to Singapore’s shopping mall monoculture. Singapore Trading Post sources every piece of its homeware collection directly from manufacturers across the region.

After running Singapore’s renowned Expat Auctions for several years, where they handle an eclectic array of furniture and decorative pieces from all over the world on behalf of relocating and redecorating clients, Rob and Jo saw a gap in the market for stylish and quality international homewares and decorator items at a reasonable price. And so Singapore Trading Post was born.

The store name, Singapore Trading Post pays homage to this country’s establishment as a vital trading post for the East India Trading Company in 1819. And they continue this tradition by sourcing carefully selected pieces from old East India Trading Company areas including Rajasthan and Uttar Pradesh as well as Indonesia, Vietnam and Myanmar. Our collection reflects this significant colonial era and is perfect for sourcing distinctive items that will add unique character to your space.

Name: Konvert Letti a scomparsa e camerette trasformabili
Description:
Konvert Arredamenti è uno studio di progettazione d'interni specializzato nell'ottimizzazione degli spazi. Il nostro obiettivo è realizzare ambienti spaziosi di giorno, che di notte si possano trasformare in comodi letti ortopedici. Si tratta di sistemi trasformabili sia singoli che matrimoniali, da adattare ad ogni stanza della casa: camera da letto, cameretta, soggiorno, studio e non solo.
In tutti i letti abbattibili sono presenti le reti a doghe e materassi standard, proprio come nei letti tradizionali. Possono essere lasciati sistemati, anche d'inverno con coperta o piumino. I meccanismi sono semplici da utilizzare e leggeri da muovere. 

Tutto lo spazio che ti serve è già nella tua casa. Richiedi ora un check up gratuito: riceverai diverse idee di progettazione con relativi preventivi per fasce di costo.

Per ottimizzare lo spazio e migliorare la vivibilità della tua casa!

Name: Su-Kham
Description:
Welcome to the World of Su-Kham! Born from the Sanskrit term 'Kham' meaning space, 'Sukham' means happy space and that is precisely what we aim to create for you!

We offer sustainable contemporary furniture, which is meant for modern housing and home decor that elevates your space to create a comfortable yet chic environment. Our pieces are also designed using materials that are meant for the climate in India and last a very long time!

Su-Kham was born in 2020 as a result of a conversation between our founder and her architect mother. Everyone was at home during the pandemic, and everyone wanted a beautiful home to come back to. And we realised we had the experience to provide it because every single person deserves a charming space of their own.

It was also important that while we maintain the vision and aesthetic of the brand, we consciously make an effort to make ecological and sustainable choices from the sourcing of the wood to transportation to packaging. We hope these are choices that make our clients proud to be customers of Su-Kham!

Name: Móveis Novo Macuco | Grupo Novo Macuco
Description:
Bem-vindo à Novo Macuco, somos uma empresa com mais de seis décadas de história na cidade de Santos.
 
A tradição e o tempo nos inspiram a olhar para o novo e transformar ambientes em lares e clientes em família. 

Desde 1957, quando o jovem imigrante libanês Said Rahim fundou nossa primeira loja no bairro Macuco, somos sinônimos de excelência em móveis convencionais e planejados. 

Ao longo dos anos, crescer não foi apenas um objetivo, mas uma consequência natural do nosso compromisso com a qualidade e o serviço excepcional. Em 2000, lançamos nossa segunda loja no centro de Santos, marcando um novo capítulo na nossa jornada.
 
Nossa visão era simples, mas ambiciosa: oferecer móveis de qualidade com atendimento especializado. 

O agora Grupo Novo Macuco abriga também a Trend Mobile, inaugurada em 2010, que trouxe o melhor em móveis planejados de alto padrão para região.

Name: Keldermans Wonen
Description:
Keldermans Wonen is de interieurpartner voor wie uniek wil wonen, slapen en thuiswerken met meubelen die lang meegaan. Want ons familiebedrijf in Herk-de-Stad staat voor advies en vakmanschap op maat over de (her)inrichting van je interieur. Helemaal afgestemd op jouw huis, levensstijl en persoonlijke noden. 

Je koopt bij ons het complete plaatje voor je interieur: van meubelen en keukens tot tapijten en raambekleding. Interieuradvies is daarbij altijd standaard inbegrepen. Of je nu gewoon één meubel wil kopen, kamers wil (her)inrichten of een totaal interieurproject wil realiseren.

Vergt je (her)inrichting kleine renovatiewerkzaamheden of afwerking? Dan kan je ook op ons rekenen. Onder meer schilderen, behangen, gyprocwerken, laminaat en PVC-vloeren leggen, behoort tot de mogelijkheden. Prima geregeld van a tot z. Want ontzorgen is een sleutelwoord voor ons. De K in ons concept staat niet alleen voor Keldermans, maar vooral ook voor Klant. Het zijn jouw persoonlijke interieurdromen die we helpen realiseren, zelfs op maat. Steeds zonder de K van kopzorgen of keuzestress.

Een smaakvol ingerichte woonkamer? Een huiselijk thuiskantoor? Een slaapkamer die doet wegdromen? Een keuken die esthetiek en functionaliteit combineert? Een totaalproject voor je inrichting? Bij Keldermans Wonen gaan we voor een interieur met een wow-effect dat jouw stijl en persoonlijkheid reflecteert en waarin je je honderd procent thuis voelt.

Name: Turquoise Luxury Redefined
Description:
Turquoise is a pioneer in the Indian furniture market, delivering top-quality imported furniture from renowned international manufacturers.

The most prestigious Turkish brands, including Bykepi, 216 Furniture, Coco Luxury, Norde, Homelizz, Kuka Home, and Casetto, are on show in our stores. We place a strong emphasis on offering our customers the greatest quality in even the smallest details. Our selection of household moveable furniture includes both luxurious and affordable options. The designs in our collection are a fusion of styles from around the globe. Furniture styles range from Jazzy traditional to Minimalistic modern.

Additionally, we deal in wall art. Our designer frames are built of a variety of materials, including glass, clay, acrylic, stones, mosaic, textiles, and others. All of these products are ready to ship today because we have them all in stock.

We are transforming our shop into a one-stop shop for home décor.

These materials include organic ones like cork, mica, grasscloth, jute fabric, and wall coverings made of fabric. Top Korean companies, including LG Hausys, are represented by our flagship products.

Name: Casa Valentina
Description:
A Casa Valentina é uma marca que nasceu com o objetivo de trazer ao mercado de decoração e lifestyle uma proposta diferenciada e singular. Fundada por Jemine Alencar, entusiasta da casa, a empresa é movida pela paixão em criar ambientes acolhedores e cheios de personalidade, capazes de transformar momentos simples em experiências únicas e inesquecíveis.

Com um forte compromisso com a qualidade, a elegância e o bom gosto, a Casa Valentina busca sempre oferecer aos seus clientes produtos e serviços que atendam aos mais altos padrões de excelência. Para isso, a marca investe constantemente em curadorias impecáveis, selecionando cuidadosamente peças exclusivas de design, obras de arte e outros itens que possam agregar valor estético e emocional aos espaços.

Além disso, a Casa Valentina valoriza a colaboração com artistas e designers de renome, buscando incentivar a criatividade e a originalidade em todas as suas coleções. Com isso, a marca busca não apenas fornecer produtos de qualidade, mas também inspirar seus clientes a explorar novas possibilidades e criar seus próprios universos de arte e design.

Em resumo, a Casa Valentina é muito mais do que uma simples plataforma de decoração e lifestyle. Ela é um reflexo da paixão pela casa, da valorização do bom gosto e da busca pela excelência em tudo o que faz. E é isso que a torna uma marca única e inspiradora, capaz de transformar a maneira como as pessoas vivem, convivem e se relacionam com seus ambientes.

A Doural oferece uma variedade de tapetes e cortinas para decoração de ambientes, disponíveis em sua loja virtual e em suas lojas físicas em São Paulo. São diversos modelos, materiais e tamanhos, para atender a diferentes necessidades e gostos. Há opções de tapetes clássicos, modernos, estampados, lisos, com pelo alto ou baixo, entre outros. Além de dispor de tapetes e cortinas sob medidas para se adequar a necessidade do nosso cliente. 
Fundada em 1.895 as Lojas Doural são sinônimo de tradição, qualidade e excelência.

Name: AESTORY
Description:
AESTORY is an independent design brand and studio based in Paris, France.

Originally founded in London in 2020 by French industrial designer and Central Saint Martins graduate, Felix Blanc, AESTORY was born from a desire to share beautiful places with others as well as creating meaningful objects for modern day living.

Inspired by travel and experience, Felix poetically reinterprets landscapes into timeless everyday homeware.

AESTORY is the meeting point between aesthetic and storytelling.

At AESTORY, we believe in creating less but better by celebrating craftsmanship and producing in small batches.

We don’t design for seasons and we don’t follow trends, instead we aim to create timeless objects.

Each collection is inspired by a unique aspect of a landscape with the purpose of giving meaning to functional everyday objects.

Name: IN & OUT SRL
Description:
In & Out è una moderna e solida realtà presente a Venturina Terme (LI) da oltre 15 anni. Il fondatore dell’azienda è partito da una piccola idea ed ha fatto crescere il progetto fino a farlo diventare il luogo ideale dove creare la propria casa a 360°, riuscendo ad integrare tutti i settori ad essa legati. Il progetto si è spinto così lontano fino a diventare un punto di riferimento per le persone che desiderano dare alla propria casa un tocco unico e personalizzato. Il nostro team, formato da professionisti di esperienza, è pronto ad occuparsi di ogni aspetto della casa dei tuoi sogni; dalla scelta delle finiture, la fornitura dei migliori materiali, la consegna e il montaggio a domicilio, fino all’assistenza postvendita. Ogni fase è curata nei minimi dettagli, con creatività e attenzione alle esigenze del cliente. Il nostro team sarà a disposizione per aiutarti a personalizzare e concretizzare ogni tua idea!

Il punto di forza che ci contraddistingue è la soluzione “chiavi in mano”: ci poniamo come soggetto unico a cui il cliente farà riferimento per  rinnovare o realizzare la propria casa. Seguiremo tutte le fasi del progetto, passo dopo passo, partendo dal sopralluogo iniziale, e passando per le opere edili, assistenza al cantiere, direzione dei lavori, fino alla consegna dell’ appartamento. Penseremo a tutto noi: pratiche burocratiche, richiesta di permessi, gestione dei fornitori.

A te rimarranno da scegliere finiture e personalizzazioni per rendere la tua casa… davvero TUA. Siamo in grado di soddisfare ogni tipo di richiesta di privati, professionisti, piccole-medie imprese e settore turistico-ricettivo.

Name: Jenzie's Store
Description:
Das Ehepaar Jen und Oliver erfuhr ein zunehmendes Chaos durch Kleingegenstände, z.B. Gewürze in der Küche oder Schminke im Bad. Um wieder Ordnung herzustellen, wurde der flexible Mini Organizer aus Holz entwickelt. Dessen einzigartiges Design integriert kontinuierliche Individualisierung (modulare Architektur, zahlreiche Konfigurationen und Erweiterungen) sowie Umweltfreundlichkeit (Produktion und Material aus Österreich, Vermeidung von Plastik, nur erneuerbare Ressourcen).

The couple Jen and Oliver experienced an increasing chaos of small items, e.g. spices in the kitchen or makeup in the bathroom. Aiming to restore order, the flexible mini organizer made of wood was developed. Its unique design integrates continuous individualisation (modular architecture, numerous configurations and extensions) and environmental friendliness (production and material from Austria, avoidance of plastic, only renewable resources).

Name: ENNEBÊ PLANEJADOS
Description:
A história da ENNEBÊ PLANEJADOS é uma jornada de paixão por design, arquitetura e empreendedorismo que começou em 2018. 

Fundada por Nathalia Schwinn, Bruno Schwinn e Cesar Bilibio, a empresa tem suas raízes na cidade de Criciúma, Santa Catarina.

Tudo começou com a visão compartilhada dos fundadores de proporcionar aos clientes móveis planejados que fossem não apenas funcionais e práticos, mas também elegantes e feitos sob medida para se encaixar perfeitamente em qualquer espaço.

Inicialmente, a empresa operava sob o nome "Finger Criciúma," trabalhando em estreita colaboração com a indústria de móveis Finger Planejados.

No entanto, à medida que a ENNEBÊ crescia e desenvolvia sua identidade própria, ficou claro que era hora de seguir seu próprio caminho e estabelecer uma marca própria.

Foi então que surgiu a marca "ENNEBÊ PLANEJADOS" e a empresa passa a representar outras indústrias visando o crescimento, além de uma maior oferta de produtos para os seus clientes.

Com um compromisso inabalável com a qualidade, o design personalizado e a satisfação do cliente, a ENNEBÊ PLANEJADOS rapidamente ganhou reconhecimento na região de Criciúma e sul catarinense. 

Seus móveis planejados são conhecidos por sua qualidade, durabilidade e capacidade de transformar casas em verdadeiros lares.

 A empresa cresceu ao longo dos anos, expandindo sua equipe de profissionais. 

No entanto, o foco sempre permaneceu na criação de móveis que atendem às necessidades individuais dos clientes,

Hoje, a ENNEBÊ PLANEJADOS é uma marca de destaque no mercado de móveis planejados, mantendo sua sede em Criciúma, Santa Catarina, e continuando a tradição de excelência em atendimento personalizado, produtos de extrema qualidade, e móveis que transformem a vida de seus clientes para melhor.

Name: Area Domus
Description:
Area Domus is an import and trade company of all-purpose furniture and illumination, with design origin.

The company is constituted as Area Domus since 1988 but exists under another name since 1976. Area Domus began as a company commercializing design furniture.

Area Domus is responsible for dealing with customers, selling, delivery and setting of items. Moreover we operate an interior design department  were special aid is given to customers. Particular focus is given onto contracts/ projects sector. With over 100+ large scale completed projects on our portfolio,  where 30% of company's annual turnover is made from. Area Domus has also entered the field of company representation. Since December 2004 Area Domus is the official agent of Kartell S.p.A. in Greece. Kartell has trusted our company for handling all operations within Greek territory. 

Area Domus holds four showrooms, one multi-brand in Thessaloniki, two mono-brand (as Kartell Flagship stores) in Athens & Thessaloniki and one outlet shop in Thessaloniki. 

Area Domus is characterized as a never stopping searching importing company. With constant presence at all major fairs and endless informing on companies, design tendencies, and materials.

Alles is leverbaar met ladderbanden, koorden en zelf volledig gemotoriseerd.

Onze stoffencollectie bestaat onder andere uit verticale stoffen lamellen, vouwgordijnen, verduisterende rolgordijnen en nog veel meer. Elk product komt met alles wat u nodig heeft om dit op of in het kozijn te monteren. Al onze producten komen met een reeks aan opties en extra mogelijkheden. U krijgt ons product vanaf 150,- euro gratis thuisbezorgd in geheel Nederland en België.

U kunt bij ons terecht met elk type interieur. Elk modern, hedendaags of urban interieur kan voorzien worden van 1 van onze producten. Talloze Nederlandse interieurontwerpers bestellen rechtstreeks uit onze fabriek en zijn zeer tevreden over de kwaliteit van de producten en de snelle levertijd. Vraag nu een gratis kleurstaaltje aan, of neem contact op met 1 van onze medewerkers via het contactformulier op de website.

Name: Contour Bedden
Description:
Nachtrust waarvan je alleen maar kunt dromen!

Waar begin je je zoektocht naar het perfecte bed en matras? Hoe weet je wat ergonomisch het beste bij jouw lichaam, manier van slapen en mogelijke (pijn)klachten past? Slaapwinkel Contour Bedden biedt je alle expertise én het juiste bedsysteem voor optimale nachtrust. Zo geven we vorm aan jouw slaapgeluk!

De onafhankelijke slaapstrateeg!
Contour Bedden is een 100% onafhankelijke slaapstrateeg, gevestigd in het Overijsselse Genemuiden. Met meer dan 20 jaar vakervaring kent eigenaar Jacob Bakker de geheimen van een effectieve nachtrust. In samenwerking met ergo- & fysiotherapeuten werd een unieke slaapmethode ontwikkeld.

In 4 stappen naar slaapgeluk!
Contour Bedden is géén verkoper van de bekende beddenmerken. We bieden een uniek slaapsysteem aan, dat jou als vanzelf in de juiste houding laat liggen. In combinatie met onze op onderzoek gestaafde slaapfilosofie geven we in 4 stappen vorm aan jouw slaapgeluk.

-	Analyse van je slaapgedrag
-	Ervaren van slaapgeluk
-	Samenstellen van je unieke slaapsysteem
-	Blijvende nazorg voor slaapgeluk

De juiste slaaphouding!
Onze slaapmethode richt zich op de juiste houding van je schouders, heupen en taille. Essentiële onderdelen zijn onze speciaal ontworpen boxsprings, matrassen en hoofdkussens, die jouw lichaamscontour de best mogelijke drukverdeling bieden. Voor nachtrust waarvan je alleen maar kunt dromen!

Name: MAYOTTE BUREAU
Description:
Mayotte Bureau a vu le jour en 2013. Créée par M. Farid ELLOUZ, désireux de se lancer dans une nouvelle aventure professionnelle, l’entreprise se place en spécialiste de l’ameublement professionnel et domestique grâce à l’expérience de son créateur dans le milieu.

Au cours de cette aventure Mayotte Bureau, les succès s’enchaînent : un chiffre d’affaires de 1.2 millions d’euros en 2016, une équipe en expansion, plusieurs salons internationaux par an et l’ouverture d’un nouveau magasin.

En termes de champ d’action, Mayotte Bureau satisfait aussi bien les professionnels et collectivités territoriales que des établissements scolaires. Parmi les réalisations de l’entreprise, comptez des espaces de bureau, des aéroports, des mairies, des universités, bibliothèques, écoles, réfectoires… Bien que l’activité de Mayotte Bureau se trouve principalement sur l’île de Mayotte, des projets en Métropole ont aussi vu le jour, comme l’aménagement des locaux du Conseil Départemental de Mayotte à Paris, ou encore une école à Avignon.

Ultimement, le projet de l’entreprise est de s’étendre en Afrique pour y apporter son expertise et ses solutions globales et qualitatives d’ameublement.

Name: HORSEPRINTS
Description:
Dein Pferd - Ein Kunstwerk:

Wir zaubern aus deinem Pferd ein einzigartiges Kunstwerk. Jede Zeichnung wird anhand der Kopf- und Ohrenform deines Pferdes sowie der unverwechselbaren Blesse mit Hand gezeichnet. Auch perfekt geeignet als Geschenksidee für pferdebegeisterte Menschen. 

Es funktioniert ganz einfach:

1.  Produkt auswählen: Von Handyhüllen bis über Boxenschilder und Poster bieten wir viele weitere Produkte an.

2. Produkt personalisieren: Man kann wirklich jede Kleinigkeit bei uns im Shop anpassen und für Sonderwünsche sind wir stets zu haben. Anschließend muss noch ein Bild vom Pferd hochgeladen werden.

3. Wir zeichnen das jeweilige Pferd per Hand und schicken dem Kunden den vorläufigen Entwurf zu und ändern diesen gerne ab. Erst wenn dieser wirklich zufrieden ist, wird die Zeichnung bzw. das Produkt gedruckt. 


Zu unseren Kunden gehören bereits Janne Meyer-Zimmermann, Simone Blum, Diana Porsche, Dorothee Schneider, Nicola Baur, Moritz Treffinger und zahlreiche weitere bekannte Gesichter.

Name: Maison Robert • Minneapolis
Description:
Welcome to the world of Maison Robert Minneapolis, where craftsmanship meets a passion for preservation.

We work hard to take a step beyond nostalgia by fostering a sanctuary for artifacts, collectibles and design elements that we believe are deeply infused with utility, purpose, soul, and function.

Our mission is simple: to counter balance throw-away culture that needlessly populates landfills and drains our precious natural resources through our effort to design, repair, restore, repurpose and ultimately preserve just about anything. We celebrate the stories behind every artifact and work tirelessly to rescue and resuscitate them for all generations to enjoy. Past, present and future.

We are deeply rooted in our local community, and do our best to honor the history that has shaped our surroundings. We recognize the exceptional talents of our local craftspeople, artisans and small businesses and lend our full support to their endeavors in any way we can. We feel that contributing to our community is our small part in preserving the invaluable artistic and craft heritage that defines our region.

Description:
Al meer dan 100 jaar vakmanschap in keukens, badkamers en vloeren. Bij de Struker Keukenspecialist in Winterswijk werken monteurs met jarenlange ervaring. De keukenadviseurs luisteren naar de wensen van de klant. Bij ons kun je terecht voor goed advies en inspiratie. Welk soort keuken, badkamer of vloer je ook zoekt, wij bieden alles aan onder 1 dak in Winterswijk. We hebben een eigen zagerij voor maatwerk keukens. We maken het plaatje compleet met bijvoorbeeld verlaagde plafonds, verlichting, koven en ombouw. Of wat dacht je van keukenrenovatie?
Als je graag volledige ontzorging wenst, dan zit je bij ons goed. 
Geen gedoe, maar overzicht. 
En als je op zoek bent naar losse onderdelen voor keuken of badkamer, dan ben je bij ons ook aan het goede adres. 

En dat adres is: De Struker Keukenspecialist en baderie Winterswijk (onder 1 dak), Technopark 18.

Je bent altijd van harte welkom om langs te komen in onze gloednieuwe showroom voor advies en inspiratie. Schuif aan bij één van onze adviseurs en laat je verrassen door de mogelijkheden. 

Tot snel!

Name: KC Mattress City
Description:
We are your Family, Veteran, Locally owned and operated mattress store, proudly serving the entire Kansas City metropolitan area since 1988.

At KC Mattress City, we believe in the power of restful sleep and the importance of a personal touch in your mattress-buying journey. We offer all of the best name brand products the market has to offer, plus plenty of other value brands. We truly have something for each and every budget. Whether you need a mattress, an adjustable base, foundations, frames, pillows, sheets, protectors, or sleep masks. We have your sleep needs covered!

As a proud second-generation, family-owned, and veteran-operated business, we are deeply rooted in the Kansas City community. Our mission is to provide a serene and pressure-free shopping experience, where your comfort and satisfaction matter most. We bring our family values and lessons from our time in the Army to create the best customer experience possible. We offer a diverse range of quality mattresses to suit every budget, ensuring that our customers find the perfect match without any sales pressure. Our commitment extends beyond offering competitive prices; we are devoted to enriching the Kansas City community.

We believe in keeping your hard-earned dollars IN the community and only offering USA made mattresses. Our store is nestled in the heart of Olathe, KS and we proudly serve the entire Kansas City metro area. We have been the region's trusted sleep haven since 1988, helping our customers, not selling them. When you choose KC Mattress City, you're not just buying a mattress; you're investing in a local legacy that values your sleep as much as you do.

We look forward to serving you; Welcome to the Family!

Thenap blev grundlagt med ambitionen om at gøre søvn enkelt ved at tilbyde få, gennemtænkte produkter med tydelige forskelle, så kunderne nemt kan vælge den rette løsning til deres behov.

Nous sommes une enseigne spécialisée dans la vente de meubles de cuisine depuis 2011, avec comme objectif premier : rendre accessible au plus grand nombre la cuisine sur mesure made in France en pratiquant les prix les plus abordables du marché.

Cumulant deux activités (b2b & b2c), Stock Cuisines fournis de nombreux magasins en France grâce à sa plateforme logistique basée à Saint-Priest.

Name: Zaffos
Description:
A Zaffos não é só uma marca de sofás, é uma experiência - uma revolução no setor moveleiro. Nosso produto oferece mais do que simplesmente um sofá, é uma experiência única, rápida e conveniente, projetada para democratizar o acesso a móveis de qualidade.

Imagine um sofá desmontado e compacto, embalado em uma única caixa, fácil de movimentar e montar sem a necessidade de ferramentas. Esta é a essência do Sofá Zaffos FIT. Nosso propósito é simples: tornar a escolha de um sofá confortável, durável e acessível uma realidade para todos.

Com o Sofá Zaffos FIT, estamos redefinindo o mercado moveleiro, oferecendo uma solução que atende às necessidades dos consumidores modernos. Nossa equipe está comprometida em proporcionar uma experiência excepcional, desde o momento da compra até a montagem do sofá em sua casa.

Name: LOVACO
Description: LOVACO is an essential destination for furnishing your living space. Prioritizing a selection that promotes ecological manufacturing techniques, LOVACO strikes on the balance between sustainable materials, products sourced locally and worldwide, as well as creations that everyone will remember. Many of these FSC* certified pieces are made from hardwood, sourced from responsibly managed forests. PET* certified, several pieces are also designed with the use of fiber from plastic bottles recycled from the oceans, which can be found in certain upholstery, rugs and superior quality sofas fabrics. Located in Montreal, the showroom includes a selection of sofas, sectionals, armchairs, accent tables, dining tables, chairs, stools, rugs, lighting, office furniture, decorative objects and gift ideas.

Our expert team specializes in curating tailored staging and furnishing packages that not only enhance the aesthetic appeal of your home but also elevate its functionality. With a keen eye for design and a commitment to customer satisfaction, we'll help you set the stage for a stunning and inviting living environment that perfectly suits your needs.

Description: Our handpicked collection of home decor is designed to elevate your living space to new heights of style and comfort. From statement pieces that add character and personality to understated accents that enhance the ambiance of any room, we curate every item with care and attention to detail. Whether you're looking to create a cozy retreat or a stunning entertaining space, our selection of high-quality home decor will inspire you to transform your home into a reflection of your unique taste and style. Experience the difference of premium craftsmanship and unparalleled design – elevate your space with our collection of home decor today.

Name: CentrArredo
Description: Dal 1976 ci occupiamo di arredamenti e servizi per l'arredamento della casa. Con la consueta cortesia e disponibilità offriamo servizi di consulenza, progettazione grafica e preventivazione. Proponiamo soluzioni uniche e personalizzate per ogni singolo cliente. Arrediamo secondo criteri di semplicità, essenzialità e funzionalità. Offriamo arredamenti dei più noti marchi del settore per garantire design, proporzione e qualità che dura nel tempo. Proponiamo tutti gli stili e le tendenze dell' arredamento, dal design minimalista fino al mobile classico in legno massello .  Realizziamo arredamenti "su misura" per soddisfare tute le esigenze, consegniamo l'arredamento "chiavi in mano" facendoci carico di ogni incombenza relativa all'installazione. L' assistenza post-vendita è continua e va oltre le normali garanzie offerte dai nostri concorrenti, dura per l'intera vita del mobile acquistato.

Name: A Good Life
Description:
At A Good Life, we believe your home should do more than shelter you—it should inspire you. Every space is an opportunity to blend beauty with purpose, and that’s exactly what we set out to do.

Rooted in timeless Indian wisdom and shaped by today’s pursuit of minimal, meaningful living, our brand brings you thoughtfully designed wooden pieces that elevate your interiors while serving a functional need. Whether it’s a wall shelf that doubles as art or a tray that turns into a centerpiece, our creations invite you to live with intention.

Founded by Ashish—a designer driven by soul and simplicity—A Good Life is built on a love for detail, form, and feeling. His vision is clear: to craft objects that balance utility and elegance, and to create products that don’t just occupy space—but transform it.

Every product is a quiet ritual. A modern kriya. A moment of beauty that supports your everyday rhythm.

Name: Hubor & Hubor
Description: Ein Einrichtungshaus für exklusive Möbelideen, hochwertiges Einrichtungsdesign und maßgeschneiderte Schreinerarbeiten. Bei uns finden sich neben individuellen Massivholzmöbeln aus der eigenen Schreinerei auch exklusive Polstermöbel, Sideboards, Garderoben, Kleiderschränke, Tische und Stühle, Betten, Wohnzimmermöbel, Heimtextilien und Dekoration, alles rund um Küche und Esszimmer, eine große Auswahl an Leuchten, Vitrinen und vieles mehr. Mit unseren umfassenden Planungsleistungen rund ums Einrichten und dem exzellenten Service sind wir in der gesamten Großregion Trier-Luxembourg bekannt. Mit unseren Events bieten wir das ganze Jahr über zahlreiche Gelegenheiten, unser Einrichtungshaus kennenzulernen.

Name: Möbel Schnetzer AG
Description:
Seit 1970 steht der Name Schnetzer für Möbel, die in Design, Material, Verarbeitung und Funktionalität höchsten Ansprüchen gerecht werden. Das Möbelhaus mit einer angenehmen und familiären Atmosphäre.
Ein breites Sortiment an Schlafzimmermöbeln, Wohnzimmermöbeln, Esszimmermöbeln, Gartenmöbeln und vieles mehr.

Das Fachgeschäft zeichnet sich durch folgende Dienstleistungen aus:

•kompetente Beratung
•faire Preisgestaltung
•vielseitiges Sortiment, von rustikal bis modern
•grosse Ausstellung auf drei Etagen mit 5’000 m2
•professioneller Liefer- und Montageservice, der sich auch um die Entsorgung Ihrer alten Möbel kümmert
•Grosses Lagerangebot
•Kulanter Kundendienst, der allfällige Probleme schnell und unkompliziert löst
•Abholservice, auch am Samstag bis 12.00 Uhr
•Familiäre und freundliche Atmosphäre

 
„Gute Produkte zu fairen Preisen“ steht an oberster Stelle!
