Our commitment—before, during, and after the sale—has positioned us as the premier provider of window coverings and exterior shading solutions across the region.

Name: OOCCA
Description:
OOCCA aim is to redefine how luxury hospitality and co-living spaces are furnished—sustainably, flexibly, and beautifully.

We offer a tailored subscription-based furniture rental model that reduces upfront investment while giving clients the freedom to refresh their spaces over time. We focus on European-made, high-quality pieces sourced from suppliers meeting at least four of our sustainability criteria. Our commitment to the circular economy ensures that all furniture is designed for longevity, refurbishment, and reuse—minimizing waste and maximizing value.

Our full-service approach includes design support, procurement, delivery, setup, repairs, and refurbishment at the end of each subscription cycle. We work hand-in-hand with your chosen interior architecture studio, allowing them to fully customize the space—curating furniture, finishes, and equipment aligned with your brand’s vision. Once approved, we handle the rest with precision and care.
Location: Milan, Via Santa Maria Alla Porta 11, S1

Name: Lethal Black
Description:
At Lethal Black, gaming runs through our veins. Our brand is born from a shared passion for gaming and a deep understanding of the gamer's mindset. 

As true gamers, we know the frustrations, aspirations, and desires of the gaming community. We understand that comfort and style are essential for unlocking your gaming potential. 

That's why our chairs blend ergonomic design, premium materials, and sleek aesthetics, providing a perfect balance between comfort, functionality and visual appeal.
With Lethal Black, you're not just purchasing a gaming chair; you're joining a community of passionate gamers who are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of gaming comfort and style. 

Together, we'll elevate your gaming sessions to new heights and black out the competition.

Name: Muslin Comfort
Description:
Founded in 2019 by attorney Shyla Smith and considered a true e-commerce “unicorn” as one of America’s fastest growing small businesses 3 years in a row, with sales going from $162K (2019) – over $14.5 million (2022). Muslin Comfort is a Central California-based, family owned & operated B2C company focused on authentically and permanently revolutionizing sleep.
At Muslin Comfort, you are part of the family. We forgive mistakes, empower team members, and provide the tools to solve problems and make decisions. We are a small, family company with a big impact on the world of sleep. We're looking for team players who want to learn, grow, and work hard. The sky is the limit in terms of growth with MC!
Our Core Values are:
•	The Golden Rule 
•	Love of Learning: We embrace all obstacles as learning experiences and rise to the challenge.
•	Humble: Own your mistake so we can all learn from it. Always be open to improvement.
•	Thoughtfully Decisive: In a tough situation? Don't be afraid to make decisions. Make the best decision for the customer and the company, and then make it happen.

Our philosophy is a focal point in the composition of wardrobes, walk-in closet, doors system and design solutions completely made and customized in Italy. 

The strengths of the company are the enhancement of the spaces and the meticulous attention to the individual customer’s request, offering useful suggestions to create the best working approach with the clientele and the mother production.
 
In fact, the entire service develops from the preliminary phase with on-site measurements and graphic presentations up to following all the individual processes until the final installation phase, guaranteeing the greatest customer satisfaction.

Name: Furniture hypermarket Mebelok.ua
Description: MebelOk is leading furniture hypermarket in Ukraine according to E-awards, TOP-9 rating agency, Favorite of Success. The site contains more than 100,000 products from manufacturers of furniture and household goods from Ukraine, Europe and Asia. MebelOk is a leader in its industry, thanks to improving the quality of customer service, a convenient website, a wide range of furniture for any budget, as well as comprehensive services for the delivery, assembly and installation of furniture. The Mebelok online shop is a store where you can buy furniture for your home, office, hotel or restaurant. The store delivers furniture throughout Ukraine using its own delivery service, as well as leading forwarding companies in Ukraine. Buyers of MebelOk can purchase both factory-made and custom-made furniture. The network is also represented by MebelOk retail stores in Kyiv, Dnipro, Odessa, Kharkiv and Lviv.

Description: Bienvenue chez Bois et Déco 82 ! Nous sommes une entreprise passionnée par la création et la transformation de bois en pièces uniques et élégantes. De la conception à la réalisation, notre équipe experte s'engage à offrir des solutions de décoration intérieure et extérieure exceptionnelles. Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir l'harmonie entre le bois et la créativité dans chaque projet que nous entreprenons.

Name: Velle Milano
Description:
Vèlle è un marchio italiano specializzato in bauli e accessori di lusso, pensati come oggetti unici capaci di fondere artigianalità e design contemporaneo. Ogni creazione nasce dall’incontro tra materiali pregiati, lavorazioni meticolose e un’estetica raffinata che reinterpreta l’eleganza del viaggio.
I bauli Vèlle non sono semplici contenitori, ma vere e proprie opere di stile: personalizzabili, versatili e destinati a diventare compagni di vita e di avventure. Il brand celebra il saper fare italiano e la ricerca del bello, offrendo un prodotto che unisce funzionalità, esclusività e un forte carattere distintivo.
Un oggetto firmato Vèlle Trunk racconta di passione, identità e di un lusso autentico, fatto per durare nel tempo.

Name: The IQ Home Collection
Description:
The IQ Home Collection busca transmitir la idea de un proyecto de decoración manteniendo una plena conexión con la identidad que tan claramente se ha generado en IQ Collection.

IQ HOME es una marca de decoración que une sostenibilidad y artesanía, y representa una fusión innovadora y consciente en el mundo del diseño.

Este enfoque fusiona tres visiones diferentes, la de Inés, Virginia y Mercedes, creando un estilo decorativo único que mezcla la tradición y el estilo clásico con un toque más contemporáneo y dinámico.

La intención es transmitir no solo un estilo de vida, sino también una gama de sensaciones y vivencias que reflejen sus preferencias y valores personales.

Name: Carnevale Mobili

Punto di riferimento per le cucine componibili, i salotti, le camere da letto e camerette, la Carnevale Mobili si occupa anche di arredo bagno, di divani e complementi di arredo di ogni genere. Dotata di personale altamente specializzato e di una lunga esperienza nel settore di ben 70 anni. L'azienda si è distinta nel tempo per la capacità di assicurare alla clientela prodotti e servizi su misura, nonché efficienti servizi di assistenza post vendita.

Tel: 0775300483

Name: Woodkings GmbH
Description:
Wir glauben daran, dass Möbel einen Raum verwandeln können und wir glauben daran, dass Nachhause kommen Wohlfühlen bedeutet. 

Und genau aus diesem Grund gestalten wir Echtholzmöbel und Lieblingsplätze. 

Wir fertigen Tische, Stühle, Betten, Sessel, Sofas, Schränke, Regale und einige andere individuelle Naturstücke – und können so jeden Wohnbereich verwandeln.

Unsere Leidenschaft für Vielfalt, Naturmaterialien und für kreatives Experimentieren spornt uns jeden Tag aufs Neue an und lässt uns immer wieder nach der einen besonderen Idee suchen. 

Wir schaffen mit unseren Holzmöbeln und Unikaten ein warmes und individuelles Zuhause. Für alle Wohnbereiche gestalten wir Möbelstücke, die das Raumklima verbessern und das Wohlbefinden fördern.

Das macht Lieblingsbett besonders:
 Individuelle Konfiguration: Größe, Stoff, Farbe, Kopfteil, Matratze und Topper – jedes Bett ist ein Unikat.
 Handarbeit aus Europa: Unsere Betten werden in unserer europäischen Manufaktur mit viel Liebe zum Detail gefertigt.

 Hervorragender Kundenservice: Persönlich, ehrlich & 7 Tage die Woche erreichbar – per Telefon, Chat oder E-Mail.

 Lieferung & Aufbau inklusive: Unser Team liefert dein Lieblingsbett direkt ins Schlafzimmer – fix & fertig aufgebaut.
 Showrooms & Rückgaberecht: Vor Ort probeliegen und 30 Tage testen – ohne Risiko.

Unser Versprechen:
Ein Lieblingsbett ist kein Standardmöbel. Es ist dein persönlicher Rückzugsort, dein Ruhepol – gemacht für erholsamen Schlaf und lange Freude.

Name: Eurokancom
Description:
Sami počeci naše živopisne priče zahtevaju putovanje kroz vreme i generacije, ali ne i kroz prostor. Lokacija je Nova Pazova, ali godina je čak davna 1966. tokom koje naš porodični posao pravi svoje prve korake u radionici gde samo jedan par vrednih ruku vrši stolarske usluge. 

Na prelazu iz osamdesetih u devedesete godine 20. veka, sa radom počinje naša prva firma za preradu drveta u Novoj Pazovi, na mestu koje je od tada, kada smo mi postavili temelje, pa do danas preraslo u industrijsku zonu - trenutno najveću u čitavoj Srbiji. Godine 1996. širimo svoju delatnost i ulazimo u polje trgovine mašinama za preradu drveta i zastupništva brendova - nih ukupno 26. Bliska saradnja i detaliniji uvid u proizvodnju motivisali su nas da se i sami oprobamo u ovim vodama, pa tako 2002. godine malim koracima počinjemo sa sopstvenom proizodnjom određenih elemenata stolica. Uskoro, sitni koraci postaju krupni, te mi svoju proizvodnju širimo na celokupne stolice, a potom i na trpezarijske stolove i garniture. Krupni koraci prerastaju u sigurne kojima prelazimo granice domaćeg tržišta te ubrzo izlazimo na italijansko, gde za njihove brendove i prema njihovim standardima prodajemo i izvozimo proizvode. Prekretnicu doživljavamo 2017. godine kada donosimo stratešku odluku da obustavimo proizvodnju i preorijentišemo se na investicije. 

Ipak, stolice su nam evidentno u genima, pa tako treća generacija porodice s početka ove priče svoje akademsko obrazovanje usmerava upravo u domenu industrijskog dizajna i to baš u Italiji - zemlji visoke estetike i razvijenosti dizajna. Praktičan rad koji je usledio u svetskim firmama iz Italije samo je logičan rezultat velike Ijubavi i strasti koja je proizašla iz godina porodičnog bavljenja ovim poslom, a nakon godina edukacije i stručnog usavršavanja u inostranstvu, usledio je povratak tamo gde sve i počelo - povratak kući. Danas se naš rad bazira na distribuciji nameštaja iz Italije, kao i ekskluzivnom zastupništvu pažljivo odabranih brendova.

2 etages woongenot en de mooiste kado's

Ons aanbod in accessoires, cadeautjes en hebbedingetjes is ook enorm gegroeid.

 

Naast de meubels hebben we ook de leukste cadeautjes op mooie cadeautafels. Producten van WoodWick, Lampe Berger, Bunzlau, 100 % leuk, Tapparfum, voor elke gelegenheid vanaf vijf euro. Dus voor gericht advies of juist gewoon even lekker snuffelen ben je meer dan welkom!’

Description:

Od lat wspieramy producentów mebli, projektantów wnętrz oraz architektów, dostarczając najwyższej jakości materiały od renomowanych światowych marek — Wilsonart i Polyrey.

Jako największy dystrybutor laminatów HPL tych marek w Polsce, oferujemy bogaty wybór dekorów, szeroką kolekcję magazynową oraz kompleksowe wsparcie na każdym etapie realizacji projektu. Nasze portfolio obejmuje:

- laminaty HPL,
- płyty meblowe,
- blaty kompaktowe,
- blaty robocze,
- blaty ogrodowe,
- panele ścienne,
- panele elewacyjne i parapety.

Dzięki terminowym dostawom, komplementarności produktów oraz szerokiej gamie wzorów i struktur jesteśmy solidnym partnerem zarówno dla dużych inwestycji, jak i indywidualnych realizacji.

Oferujemy nie tylko materiały, ale również profesjonalne doradztwo techniczne i marketingowe (katalogi, wzorniki, próbki dekorów), wspierając architektów i producentów mebli w tworzeniu trwałych i nowoczesnych przestrzeni.

HPL Service – Twój sprawdzony partner w świecie mebli, wnętrz i architektury.

Description:
𝗗𝗔𝗡𝗚𝗛𝗬𝗥𝗔 𝗟𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗠: 𝗘𝗺𝗯𝗮𝗷𝗮𝗱𝗼𝗿𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗹𝗮 𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗮 𝗩𝗲𝗻𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗻𝗮

En Danghyra LATAM, nos enorgullece ser los representantes exclusivos en Sudamérica de la exquisita artesanía italiana de Danghyra elaborada a mano en Venecia. 

Como embajadores de la elegancia veneciana en este rincón del mundo, traemos la magia de Venecia y la maestría artística de la connotada artista Dangirute Raceviciute (Danghyra) para los apasionados amantes del lujo y la distinción en Sudamérica. 

Cada pieza, elaborada a mano en el atelier Danghyra en Venecia, llega a través de nuestras manos con el mismo cuidado y devoción que caracterizan cada creación.

Desde Coffee Sets que transforman las mañanas, hasta Tea Sets que añaden un toque de sofisticación a las tardes, nos esforzamos por ofrecer la experiencia completa de la marca Danghyra en Sudamérica. 

Cada producto representa la fusión perfecta entre la tradición veneciana y la moderna innovación, y estamos aquí para compartir esa experiencia.

Descubre la elegancia, la distinción y el lujo en cada detalle con Danghyra LATAM, donde la belleza de Venecia encuentra su hogar en el día a día.

Name: Cane Cult
Description:
Cane Cult is a slow furniture brand and was founded and is curated by Zully and Jalal- A Brother and Sister duo who were born and raised in London.

Originally inspired by traveling around the island of Sri Lanka they came across talented craftsmen and artisans working with locally sourced rattan - once engaging with them, they found a lack of support and exposure to the dying art form of traditional Sri Lankan weaving.

Historically rattan workers were underpaid as talented artisans who wanted to design and create pieces that celebrated their craftsmanship with woven in stories of traditions that date back over four generations. It is ingrained in Cane Cults' values that fair pay is essential to support these communities to thrive.

The story of Cane Cult is intertwining the artisan craftsmanship and immersing in an intersection of cultural designs that have been influential in the style of the brand's signature.

'Japandi' design culture is the intersection of Scandinavian and modern Japanese interior design styles. Both, are rooted in minimalist design principles, with a focus on warmth, natural elements, and muted color palettes. To make things interesting they intertwined this with an Industrial London touch. The London element is translated with ironwork and with the use of industrial, raw exposed elements.

In a world where the process is often overlooked, we believe the journey is what defines it all. At every step of our operation, we highly value exclusivity in terms of valued materials and craftsmanship.

Name: Greenery living by Blumenfisch
Description:
Ob im Büro, im Geschäft oder zu Hause: 
Ein Flaschengarten ist ein immergrüner, stylischer und wartungsarmer Miniaturgarten in einem geschlossenen Glasgefäß. Ein wahrer Hingucker! 

Die echten Pflanzen und zusammengesetzten Materialien erzeugen ein kleines Ökosystem nach dem Vorbild der Natur. Durch den geschlossenen Kreislauf (Photosynthese) muss das Biotop nur alle 6 bis 12 Monate gegossen werden.

Mit unserem Do-it-yourself-Set könnt Ihr Euren Flaschengarten auch selbst gestalten. Jedes Set enthält Material und Pflanzen und ist so ausgestattet, dass Ihr sofort loslegen könnt. 

Jede Box wird liebevoll in Handarbeit in Berlin zusammengestellt. Eine Schritt-für-Schritt-Anleitung liegt selbstverständlich bei. 

Das Flaschengarten-Set richtet sich an stilvolle urbane Menschen, die ihr Zuhause oder ihr Büro grüner und wohnlicher gestalten wollen. Es eignet sich auch super als originelles Geschenk und hält viel länger als Blumen.

Wir beraten Euch gern!

Name: SprintLab
Description:
Established in 2013, SprintLab is a Latvian company focusing on Design & Production aspects of the advertising industry. Since 2016, the company has been developing sustainable production concepts.
Since 2023, Sprintlab Group has become the company's property and has four self-grown brands: ColorwoodLatvia, Retailmaster, Jakeplanet and SprintLab.

Name: Mobileri Gyls Tirana
Description: "Kompania jonë, e themeluar në vitin 1995, është një lider në industrinë e mobilerive në Shqipëri. Me një përvojë të gjatë dhe të suksesshme, ne jemi specializuar në prodhimin, shitjen dhe eksportin e kendeve dhe divanave. Nga viti 2021, ne kemi krijuar pikën e pakicës "Mobileri Gyls Tirana" duke vërtetuar cilësinë dhe reputacionin tonë në tregun vëndas. Ne jemi krenarë që ofrojmë modelet më të veçanta me stilin dhe dizajn Italian të cilat janë të përshtatshme në diemnsione dhe në ngjyra sipas kërkesave të klienteve. Përveç divaneve dhe këndeve ne ofrojmë mobilime të plota për hotele, restorante, bare dhe ambiente të tjera komerciale. Ne jemi këtu për të ndihmuar në realizimin e vizionit tuaj, ju ftojmë të na kontaktoni."

Name: Cuisines Références Soissons
Description:
Cuisines Références, votre magasin de proximité 

Implanté à Soissons, charmante ville située dans le département de L'Aisne, Les Cuisines de Soissons, second magasin Cuisines Références après Les Cuisines du Valois, situé à Crépy-en-Valois, ouvert il y a 3ans par Mme Douet Angélique. 

Nous suivons les projets de nos clients dans leur intégralité et vous savez, tout comme nous, que ce type de projet demande l'intervention de plusieurs corps de métier, c'est donc tous ensemble que nous satisfaisons nos prospects. 

Alors si vous êtes agent immobilier, architecte, artisan ou encore décorateur d'intérieur et que vos clients souhaitent créer un projet, contactez-nous !!
Mme Deharbe, directrice du magasin et son équipe constitué de Lydie et Clémence à la conception ainsi que de Yannick et Jean-Noël à la pose seraient ravis de vous accueillir autour d'un bon café et de collaborer ensemble !

Name: Cuisin'Art
Description: Bienvenue chez Cuisin'Art, l'aboutissement de 10 années d'expérience passionnée dans l'univers de la cuisine. J'ai franchi le cap de l'indépendance pour vous offrir une expérience unique dans l'aménagement de votre espace culinaire. Explorez notre gamme de produits de qualité, alliant esthétique, fonctionnalités et savoir-faire, pour faire de votre cuisine un espace où la créativité culinaire prend vie. Je crois en la beauté de la cuisine sur mesure et je suis impatiente de partager cette aventure avec vous.

Name: Woonwinkel Schijndel
Description:
Woonwinkel Schijndel is meer dan een winkel.

Sinds enkele jaren is Woonwinkel Schijndel zich meer en meer aan het profileren als een interieurplatform waar ieder vraagstuk over interieur beantwoord kan worden.

Een omgeving waar ontwerp en vakmanschap samenkomen en worden samengevoegd tot een fantastisch interieur.

Woonwinkel Schijndel is al meer dan 40 jaar toonaangevend op het gebied van interieur. Ruim 40 jaar ervaring in raambekleding en sinds 2012 specialist in meubels en maatwerk.

Om onszelf constant te ontwikkelen en uit te dagen zijn we voortdurend aan het vernieuwen en verbeteren.

Deze drang tot verbetering heeft in 2020 geleid tot een dochteronderneming in interieurbouw en in 2022 tot The Double U conceptstore.

The Double U conceptstore is een nieuwe winkel waar we een vernieuwende stijl laten zien met dezelfde kernwaarden zoals bij Woonwinkel Schijndel.

Name: Capital Furnishing WLL
Description:
About Capital Furnishing W.L.L.

Established in 1984, Capital Furnishing W.L.L. has been a cornerstone of the furniture industry in the Kingdom of Bahrain, the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia, and the wider Gulf region. We are dedicated to providing our customers with a diverse range of high-quality furniture, adhering to distinguished standards of American quality.

Capital Furnishing is a retail furniture company established by our founder and director, Mr. Ebrahim Hassan Neama, in 1984. Guided by integrity, a focus on quality, and a determination to exceed customer expectations, the company soon became renowned in the Kingdom of Bahrain, the Eastern Province of Saudi, and the Gulf region for its high-quality American home furniture. Capital Furnishing was first established as carpet dealers and soon moved on to selling imported furniture. The company then decided to segregate the company into two and dedicate two different showrooms, Capital Home and Capital Palace under the umbrella of Capital Furnishing, to serve the various market sectors in the Kingdom while still focusing on Capital’s distinguished standards of American quality.

Name: Novakasa Decor
Description:
A Kasadecor é referência no fornecimento de móveis de alta qualidade para residências, escritórios, hotéis e espaços corporativos. 

Desde nossa fundação, buscamos aliar design, conforto e funcionalidade, garantindo soluções que transformam ambientes com sofisticação e preço competitivo.

Nosso compromisso vai além do mobiliário — oferecemos soluções personalizadas e um atendimento ágil, conectando arquitetos, empresas e clientes a produtos que atendem às suas necessidades com excelência.

Atendemos projetos residenciais e corporativos, sempre com foco em rapidez na entrega, qualidade superior e custo-benefício, tornando a experiência de compra mais eficiente e satisfatória.
Nossos diferenciais:

 Design e funcionalidade: Móveis que combinam estética moderna e conforto
 Soluções para todos os ambientes: Residenciais, comerciais e hoteleiros
 Rapidez e eficiência: Atendimento personalizado e entrega ágil
 Preço competitivo: Qualidade acessível para transformar espaços

Na Kasadecor, acreditamos que o ambiente certo faz toda a diferença. Seja para sua casa ou para o seu negócio, temos a solução ideal para você.

 Conheça mais sobre nossos produtos e transforme seu espaço com a Kasadecor!

Description:
With over 20 years of experience, Chateau Furniture Bahrain is synonymous with refined taste, quality, and exceptional service. We specialize in luxury furniture and bespoke interior design, creating spaces defined by craftsmanship, attention to detail, and timeless style.

Our team transforms residential and commercial interiors into personalized reflections of each client’s lifestyle. In partnership with Maison Interiors and Bahrain Alarabi International Decoration, we continue to redefine luxury living in Bahrain through a sophisticated and contemporary design approach.

Name: Luxalon Plafonds
Description:
Uitstekende plafondsystemen die de kroon zijn van iedere woonruimte. Daar staat Luxalon voor. Onze plafonds vind je in tal van verkooppunten door het hele land. Ons doel? Een mooi afgewerkt en onderhoudsvrij plafond dat altijd perfect bij iedere ruimte en je wens past.

Met Luxalon kies je voor de lange termijn. Onze plafonds gaan lang mee, en da’s wel zo fijn voor jou én ons milieu. Onze plafonds zijn voor meer dan 90% gemaakt van gerecycled aluminium, wat enorm veel energie in grondstofwinning scheelt.

Luxalon Plafondsystemen is onderdeel van Hunter Douglas, een Nederlands bedrijf dat ook het bekende merk Luxaflex bedacht. Hunter Douglas is marktleider in raambekleding en fabrikant van architectuurproducten. Overal ter wereld kom je hun producten tegen.

Name: Lühm N Cove
Description:
Pronounced: LOOM en Kove

Lühm N Cove is a modern home décor brand that specializes in sculptural, nature-inspired lighting. Rooted in a philosophy of quiet luxury and intentional design, Lühm N Cove blends soft materials like linen, cotton, and paper with timeless techniques such as hand-pleating and origami. Each piece is designed to bring warmth, texture, and a sense of calm to modern living spaces — lighting that feels as good as it looks.

Name: Nobell studio kuhinja
Description: Od dnevnog boravka i blagovaonice do kuhinje i kupaonice: naš fleksibilan modularni sistem s najširom ponudom elemenata, materijala, obrada i boja – za postizanje istog stila koji se prostire cjelom Vašim domom. Prostor koji privlači poglede, za ugodan život u suvremenom dizajnu, okrunjen visokom kvalitetom provjerenog njemačkog proizvoda – za konačan wow efekt!

Name: The Knotty Rope
Description:
The Knotty Rope stands as a splendid tribute to skilled artisans around the world. We embrace slow fashion in a world rapidly moving towards instant gratification.  We believe in the beauty of patience, in the charm of meticulously handcrafted products, and in the value of timeless designs that outlive fleeting trends.

In our journey of celebrating craftsmanship, we also tread the path of sustainability. Each product is crafted using indigenous materials, and with a keen eye on impeccable quality and finish.

The Knotty Rope is beyond luxury home décor. It's about a promise - a
promise to uphold traditions, to foster sustainability, and to create products
that not only decorate spaces but also narrate tales. It invites you to be a part
of a journey where each product is a chapter, each design a story, and every
purchase a step towards a sustainable, harmonious future.

Name: FurnishStack: Smart, Proven Technology for Home Furnishings
Description:
FurnishStack is an independent consulting firm dedicated to helping home furnishings retailers navigate the often confusing and overwhelming process of upgrading their store technology. Many retailers struggle with digital transformation due to limited knowledge, fear of making costly mistakes, or a lack of trusted guidance. FurnishStack bridges that gap by serving as a trusted advisor to store owners and decision-makers.

We work directly with ownership to assess and define specific needs in areas such as digital presence, online reputation management, 3D modeling and product configuration (particularly for custom furniture), Point of Sale (POS) systems, artificial intelligence applications, and short-form video content creation for websites and social media. 

Our approach is rooted in understanding each retailer’s goals and crafting a tailored technology roadmap that ensures long-term success.

FurnishStack has formed strategic partnerships with best-in-class, non-competing solution providers. These partnerships allow us to provide an integrated and streamlined experience for our clients.

We manage every step of the process—from discovery and solution identification to onboarding and ongoing customer success—ensuring that every retailer we work with is supported, informed, and set up for measurable growth.

Name: DreamDorm

DreamDorm.in is a One-Stop Shop for Stunning, Budget-Friendly Hostel Room Decor

Indian hostel rooms deserve more than just the ordinary – they deserve the extraordinary. We're on a mission to shatter the stereotype of plain, lackluster dorms. No more feeble LED strips or uninspired posters.

At DreamDorm, we're fueled by our passion to turn every Indian hostel room into a canvas of creativity and aesthetic wonder, rivaling the Pinterest sensations. 

Our commitment extends beyond aesthetics; it's about affordability too. We're devoted to making your dream dorm a reality without breaking the bank, all while ensuring top-notch quality.

Description: Hoogwaardige kwaliteit is ons kenmerk. We gebruiken enkel de beste materialen en zorgen ervoor dat onze kussens met vakmanschap worden vervaardigd. Ontdek het comfort en de elegantie van Claudi kussens, die uw interieur een luxueuze en persoonlijke touch geven.

Name: PiLuLiTo
Description:
Decoração completa para quartos de bebês e crianças.

"As primeiras lembranças de nossas vidas são insubstituíveis. Pensamos com todo carinho em cada pedacinho de conforto que fará parte desses momentos: a leitura de histórias antes de dormir, a primeira guerra de travesseiros, a festinha do pijama. Criar momentos mágicos é tudo em que acreditamos!" Kátia Dreyer.

Name: Casa Lusso
Description:
They say home is where the heart is.

Taking this further, we say the heart is home wherein all your furniture is made to cherish.

We; at Casa Lusso, have been at the forefront of the industry creating beautiful spaces for you within your homes and offices since 2020.
With a successful start by out sourcing our furniture we came up with our own factories that manufactures beds, Sofas, Beds and Chairs etc. We are humbled to have touched the lives of millions of people with our range of world class home and office furniture.

Casa Lusso is a fully integrated manufacturer concentrating on two key segments of the contract market—Residential and Corporate.
Established in 2021 out of a desire to bring a unique customer-oriented approach to the contract marketplace, we design durable, elegant furniture that excels at meeting all core requirements. Combined with a huge array of options, choices, price points, and scales, our customers can specify the best possible solution.

We are recognized as a market leader in the quality, design, and engineering of furniture products, focusing on a wide range of markets and designs.

Name: Premier Design Cabinets & Furniture
Description: Welcome to Premier Design Cabinets & Furniture — a family-owned business dedicated to quality, craftsmanship, and service. Located just 2 miles south and 2 miles east of Arthur, IL, we specialize in premium hardwood Amish handcrafted furniture, custom made cabinets, and durable outdoor patio furniture. Our team includes Rhoda in Accounting, Traci in Customer Service, and owners Joseph and John Yoder, a father-son team leading Sales & Delivery. We take pride in offering exceptional products with a personal touch, and we look forward to helping you design your next dream kitchen or help you furnish your home with furniture that fits your style and needs.

Name: SBI Ltd
Description:
SBI Ltd (Sun Blind Installations) is a well-established company that was founded in 1998. We cover all aspects of Awning Veranda Carport Shutter Garage Door, supplies, installation servicing, and repair work.

We are a family-run business and have teams of professional advisors and installers all over the country.

The company supplies and installs a wide range of made-to-measure awnings from both Markilux & Weinor.

SBI supplies and installs quality products for both homeowners and businesses alike.

We are one of only a few companies in the UK that has a dedicated awning servicing and repair division of our business.

SBI offers a full contract installation service to private and trade customers who are not equipped or do not have sufficient time to carry out installations.

Our contracts division deals with schools, colleges, universities, government buildings, hospitals, hotels, pubs, clubs, and restaurants.

We can supply branding to any of our products from vinyl graphics to traditional hand-painted signwriting.

SBI Products
SBI supply and install awnings, patio roofs, glass verandas, terrace covers, retractable all-weather pergolas, giant umbrellas, canopies, vertical screens, heating, lighting, and conservatory sail blinds.

We also supply and install top-quality carports both lean-to, freestanding, and cantilever carports.

To compliment our range of carports you can add a solar-powered garage door and side infill panels to enclose your structure.

Call our freephone number on 0800 0742 721 at any time as the lines are covered 24 hours a day to register your interest.

Alternatively, click the images below or scroll down to find out more about the products and services we offer.

Name: Maizzoni
Description: Maizzoni est un magasin de meubles et d'accessoires d'intérieur situé à Strasbourg. Nous nous spécialisons dans la vente de canapés, fauteuils, lits coffres et matelas de haute qualité, offrant une gamme variée de styles et de designs pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients. Notre mission est de fournir un excellent service client et une expérience d'achat personnalisée, tout en proposant des produits de qualité et durables pour embellir et personnaliser les espaces de vie de nos clients.

Name: Solano Wonen
Description:
Van huis naar thuis? Creëer wooncomfort met maatwerk raamdecoratie, zonneschermen, horren en vloeren. Solano Wonen levert hoge kwaliteit tegen lage prijzen. Tot wel 50% goedkoper! Van houten jaloezieën, hordeuren en knikarmschermen tot rolluiken, screens en PVC vloeren. Eén aanspreekpunt voor het hele project. Wel zo handig!

Solano Wonen is niet zomaar een aanbieder van vloer- en raambekleding! Dankzij onze jarenlange expertise zijn wij een échte specialist. Dag in dag uit werken onze deskundige medewerkers vol enthousiasme aan onze shop. Online en offline! Van adviseren en monteren tot het uitbreiden en updaten van ons assortiment. Heb je vragen? Bel of mail gerust! Onze vakkundige service afdeling staat je graag te woord.

Onze missie? Voordelige raam- en vloerbekleding voor iedereen! Kies voor goedkope zonwering van A-merken (Luxaflex, Verano en VELUX). Of ga voor ons extra budgetvriendelijke huislabel. Bij Solano Wonen ben je verzekerd van scherpe prijzen. Altijd! Wij kopen grootschalig in en verzenden rechtstreeks vanuit de fabriek. Bovendien hanteren wij lage marges. Daardoor bieden wij onze producten opvallend goedkoop aan. Tot wel 50% goedkoper dan elders! Ontdek het zelf en bereken je prijs eenvoudig online. Eerst zien, dan beslissen? Bestel eenvoudig online gratis kleurstalen! In de meeste gevallen heb je ze al binnen 2 werkdagen in huis! Natuurlijk ben je ook van harte welkom in onze grote showroom in Leeuwarden. Parkeer gratis voor de deur!

Name: Central Living
Description:
Central Living opened its showroom in the heart of Oxford in 1997, founded by Geoff and Rosie Taylor. Now under the leadership of their daughter, Rebecca Jones, Central Living enters a new era. Having established ourselves as the go to shop for design-led interiors we bring you the very best in iconic, design-led furniture, lighting and home accessories. From design classics and future proof furniture, to of the moment trends and innovative designs. As an independent family business, we prioritise beautiful design and craftsmanship with exceptional customer service. Which is reflected in our hands-on, personable customer care, at every stage of the buying process.

We have curated a selection of furniture, lighting and accessories from some of Europes top designers and brands, including Knoll, Ligne Roset, SCP, String, Foscarini, Flos, Original BTC, Case, USM, Ethnicraft, Audo Copenhagen to name just a few. As official stockists, we only sell authentic originals - no replicas. Sourcing furniture is one of our favourite things, can’t see what you’re looking for online? Contact the showroom as we are always happy to help.

At our Oxford showroom we also offer an interior design service, as well as an established contracts service. Over the years, our diverse clientele have benefited from our expertise in residential, hospitality, and office projects. Let us bring our experience to your next interior design project. Whether you’re a residential customer, architect, specifier or project manager, our dedicated, professional specialists are on hand, Monday to Friday, 9.30am to 5.30pm, to help with any product advice, service questions or queries.

We love what we do and as a small independent, Central Livings aim has been the same from the start, to provide high quality, contemporary designs with a personal and friendly service with every purchase.

Name: HFS Specialities Ltd
Description:
HFS Specialities Ltd are a specialist sub-contract manufacturer to the decorative lighting industry. We produce high quality pendant sets, cord sets, wall and table light assemblies for the commercial, designer and bespoke lighting market.

We build strong relationships through trust and reliability, we're easy to work with and we've got the knowledge and connections to ease the development of your product.

We're a B2B lighting component wholesale supplier for those who manufacture their own product and we also operate the B2C retail lighting websites enamelshades.co.uk and lightspares.co.uk

We are the production partner and UK distributor for the Vintlux brand of lighting and furniture, vintlux.co.uk.

We've recently expanded our offering to the commercial, retail and hospitality sectors with the website display-sign.co.uk.

We also

Name: Móveis Reinheimer
Description:
Desde 1943
 Hoje, administrada pela terceira geração da família, que aliou as últimas tendências de design ao ofício do avô, a Reinheimer se orgulha em ter seus móveis decorando casas, hotéis, concessionárias e empreendimentos por todo o país.

Name: Pleat
Description:
Say cheerio to boring windows and hello to Pleat. We combine expertly-crafted curtains and blinds with Instagrammable fabrics and fool proof measuring to take away all of the guesswork in achieving that "ooo where did you get those?" look. 

Looking around at the industry, it seemed that blinds and curtains could be procured one of two ways: online mass-produced cheap products, or a better quality bespoke offering only really available if there was a clever local lady who knew her way around a Singer sewing machine.  We felt there had to be a third route, one that blended very, very good quality, sexy fabric choices and super easy ordering. That route is Pleat.

We make window wear the old fashioned way: with care and a level of attention to detail that would make your Grandma proud.  We only use fabrics that we’d kill to have in our own homes and we remove the fear that comes with online ordering. Put simply, we aim to make your life easier and your home more beautiful, one window at a time.

Our business is a family, headed up by Harriet and her mum Sarah, alongside our two doggie mascots, Merlin and Vera. Having grown up playing in piles and piles of fabric, there’s very little Harriet didn’t learn from her talented seamstress mum about the wonderful world of curtains and blinds.

Coming from a family of makers has taught us exactly what it takes to make beautiful window wear that hangs just right. We lead our team of expert makers, based in the heart of Berkshire, to lovingly hand make every order from scratch. We never cut corners, or scrimp on the details, taking pride in every piece.

Welcome to the fold!

Thanks to high-quality materials and precise craftsmanship, they remain in excellent condition even after prolonged use. Choose sustainable elegance without compromising on ergonomic advantages and long-lasting quality—and save up to 90%!

Plan your customized office layout with us: With nearly 20 years of experience and 17 motivated employees, we will assist you in realizing your vision. The office tailored to your individual needs will be planned and implemented together, focusing on ergonomics, efficient space allocation, and feasibility. Our showroom, covering over 1,000 m², along with a storage area of 15,000 m², provides plenty of inspiration for you to experience the outstanding quality of our vast product range firsthand.

Thanks to our extensive experience in both acquisition and logistics, customers need not worry about a thing. Sustainable actions are easier than you might think. There are many parameters surrounding the product that influence its footprint. Increased use of recycled products or the incorporation of "bio-plastic" is beneficial. However, the greatest impact comes from purchasing a second-hand product, which can result in a significant CO2 savings of 90% compared to buying new.

Be a pioneer and see for yourself the proven quality of reputable manufacturers while taking responsibility for both our environment and your wallet. MC Office Shop... For the environment, for the future...

Name: BumbleBee Kids
Description:
Welcome to BumbleBee Kids, your premier destination for top-tier, stylish children's furniture. We understand that your child's room is more than just a place for rest, it's a vibrant hub for play, learning, & personal development. We are proud to offer an extensive array of furniture that seamlessly blends functionality with an aesthetic allure, all crafted to ignite creativity in your young ones.

Creating Enchanting Spaces

From snug beds cocooning dreams to ingenious storage solutions and study-friendly desks, our collection is designed to transform ordinary rooms into extraordinary realms. Each piece is meticulously crafted with a keen eye for detail, utilizing only premium materials and manufacturing techniques. This ensures that our furniture not only withstands the rigors of daily use but also retains its charm and durability.

Personalized Styles, Unwavering Quality

Just as every child possesses a unique identity, our collection spans a spectrum of styles, from timeless classics to contemporary designs, catering to diverse tastes. While we celebrate aesthetic diversity, safety remains a paramount concern. Our products undergo rigorous testing to surpass industry safety standards, promising a worry-free environment for exploration and play.

Fostering Imagination through Design

At BumbleBee Kids, we believe that furniture serves as both functional tools and artistic expressions. Collaborating with accomplished designers and artists, we craft pieces that not only serve practical purposes but also inspire young minds. Our collection is an invitation for your child's imagination to soar, much like the carefree flight of bees amid blooming flowers.

Impact Beyond Borders

Our mission extends beyond crafting furniture; we're committed to making a positive impact globally. We emphasize sustainability by utilizing eco-friendly materials, while a significant portion of our profits goes towards supporting organizations dedicated to enhancing the lives of children.

Description:

Dit doen wij vanuit onze passie voor sfeer en gezelligheid. Een gashaard of houtkachel in je woning creëert een centraal punt van warmte en design waar je heerlijk tot rust kunt komen.

LANDELIJK ACTIEF
Haarden Centrum Nederland werkt in de regio Nederland. Wij zijn veel onderweg om situaties op te nemen en u te adviseren in de perfecte opstelling. Wij kunnen in onze showroom in Elspeet een zeer ruim aanbod van meer dan 100 haarden en kachels laten zien. Neem contact met ons op om een afspraak te maken zodat wij u kunnen voorzien in een goed advies voor uw houtkachel of gashaard.

VAKKUNDIGE INSTALLATIE
Haarden Centrum Nederland heeft een landelijk dekkend team van haarden installateurs. Je bent dus verzekerd van een correcte en veilige installatie van jouw haard of kachel. Jouw haard of kachel zal met zorgvuldigheid geïnstalleerd worden, zodat je onbezorgd kunt genieten van de sfeer en warmte van de door jou samengestelde haardopstelling.

VAN UW HUIS EEN THUIS MAKEN
Wij van Haarden Centrum Nederland denken graag met je mee en kijken naar een passende en mooie opstelling om van jouw huis een thuis te maken. Sfeer, warmte, gezelligheid zijn hierbij onze uitgangspunten. Zo ben je verzekerd van een sfeervol en warm huis. Wij houden rekening met jouw interieurstijl, zodat je altijd een persoonlijk voorstel op maat krijgt, die aansluit op jouw wensen. Wij maken van je huis een thuis.

JAREN ERVARING
Binnen Haarden Centrum Nederland hebben wij jaren ervaring in de haardenbranche. Wij zijn op de hoogte van de laatste ontwikkelingen en trends op zowel het gebied van design, maar ook op technisch vlak. Zo krijg je een advies wat sfeervol is, maar technisch ook compleet klopt.

Tot ziens in een van onze showrooms!

Name: Peace of Rock
Description:
Positive Vibes = Happy Life!

Welkom bij Peace of Rock, uw bestemming voor prachtige edelstenen en mineralen. Onze winkel is ontstaan uit een diepe passie voor deze betoverende natuurlijke creaties en de wens om anderen te laten delen in de magie en schoonheid die ze te bieden hebben.

Bij Peace of Rock geloven we dat edelstenen en mineralen meer zijn dan alleen stenen; het zijn kunstwerken van Moeder Natuur die ons betoveren met hun unieke kleuren, patronen en energie. Vanaf het moment dat we voor het eerst in aanraking kwamen met edelstenen, werden we overweldigd door een gevoel van verwondering en ontzag voor de schatten die in de aarde verborgen liggen.

Onze passie voor edelstenen heeft ons geïnspireerd om een winkel te starten die een uitgebreide selectie van hoogwaardige en zorgvuldig geselecteerde edelstenen en mineralen biedt. 

Bij Peace of Rock streven we ernaar om een uitnodigende en inspirerende omgeving te creëren waar klanten kunnen rondkijken, zich laten betoveren door de prachtige kleuren en vormen, en hun perfecte edelsteen kunnen vinden. We zijn toegewijd aan het bieden van uitstekende klantenservice en staan altijd klaar om vragen te beantwoorden, advies te geven en te helpen bij het vinden van de perfecte steen die past bij de individuele behoeften en voorkeuren.

We heten u van harte welkom bij Peace of Rock te hartje Rotterdam !

Name: Mebelteka Ltd. / Мебелтека ООД
Description:
Мебелтека ООД е водещ доставчик на висококачествени офис мебели за всякакъв мащаб бизнес. Нашата широка гама от продукти включва всичко - от офис столове и бюра до решения за съхранение и др. Ние разбираме значението на удобното и функционално работно пространство, поради което предлагаме разнообразие от опции, които да отговарят на всяка нужда и бюджет.

Ние в Мебелтека се гордеем с нашия ангажимент към качеството. Нашите офис мебели са изработени от издръжливи материали, които са създадени да издържат, така че можете да се доверите, че вашата инвестиция ще издържи изпитанието на времето. Ние също така предлагаме опции за персонализиране, така че можете да създадете идеалното решение за мебели за вашия офис.

Ние знаем, че всеки бизнес е уникален, поради което работим в тясно сътрудничество с нашите клиенти, за да разберем специфичните им нужди. Нашият специален екип от експерти е на разположение, за да ви помогне на всяка стъпка от пътя, от избора на правилните продукти до доставката и монтажа.

Нашата цел е да предоставим на нашите клиенти най-добрите решения за офис обзавеждане на достъпна цена. Ние се стремим да направим процеса на закупуване на офис мебели възможно най-лесен и без стрес.

В обобщение Мебелтека ООД предлага широка гама от висококачествени офис мебели, включително офис столове, бюра и складови решения. Нашият ангажимент за качество, възможност за персонализиране и изключително обслужване на клиентите ни прави най-добър избор за фирми, които искат да подобрят своето офис пространство.

Name: CUCINA MIA
Description:
Η CUCINA MIA μετράει ήδη 25 χρόνια επιτυχημένης δραστηριότητας στην εισαγωγή & εμπορία επίπλων κουζίνας, και διατηρεί συνεργασίες με κορυφαία Ιταλικά & Ελληνικά πιστοποιημένα και αυτοματοποιημένα εργοστάσια, που εγγυώνται κορυφαία ποιότητα παραγωγής, αξιοπιστία χρόνων παράδοσης, και τεχνολογία & αισθητική στην αιχμή των σύγχρονων εξελίξεων στον χώρο του επίπλου. Επίσης καλύπτουμε πλήρως με ευρεία γκάμα όλες τις ανάγκες μιας σύγχρονης κουζίνας για ηλεκτρικές συσκευές (Franke, Falmec, Bora, Smeg, Liebherr) και κορυφαία τεχνολογικά υλικά πάγκου κουζίνας (Dekton, Silestone, Χαλαζίας).

Ταυτόχρονα η CUCINA MIA προσφέρει όλη την γκάμα προϊόντων Ντουλάπας, Βεστιαρίου και Εσωτερικής Πόρτας, καλύπτοντας κάθε αρχιτεκτονική απαίτηση και ανάγκη για την σύγχρονη κατοικία, πάντα συνεργαζόμενη με κορυφαία πιστοποιημένα εργοστάσια παραγωγής.

Το όραμα μας είναι να προσφέρουμε κορυφαία και συνολική εξυπηρέτηση στον πελάτη, τόσο στην σχεδιαστική πρόταση (φωτορεαλιστικό σχέδιο) για την κατοικία του, όσο και after sales (5 ετής εργοστασιακή εγγύηση επίπλων κουζίνας), πάντα στις πιο ανταγωνιστικές τιμές της αγοράς.

Το ταξίδι αυτό συνεχίζεται εδώ και 25 δημιουργικά χρόνια χάρη στην εμπιστοσύνη των πελατών μας!


Αντιπρόσωποι για την Ελλάδα των Ιταλικών εργοστασίων Επίπλων Κουζίνας: Arredo3 Cucine, Ciesse Cucine, Framasil
Αποκλειστικοί Εισαγωγείς Ιταλικών Ντουλαπών BAZZONI ARMADI 
Διαθέτουμε: 
- Ιταλικά Έπιπλα Κουζίνας κορυφαίων εργοστασίων

Custom designing wardrobes, home offices, kitchens and home theatres, Flexi strive to exceed our client’s expectations at every stage, with quality products built to withstand the test of time.

Our journey began in 2001, with a husband and wife team working out of their back shed. Today, we have 2 showroom locations and a team of around 25 employees. Since opening our doors nearly 20 years ago, Flexi have always aimed to be industry leaders in not only product, but also in the service we provide.

From the very beginning, Flexi’s goal has been to offer the best customer service possible. Flexi pioneered wardrobe production with state-of-the-art CNC technology, and our designers have been using a screen to machine (S2M) CAD drawing package since 2006, which allows them to provide customers with a detailed 3D drawing of their design all from the comfort of their homes.

At Flexi we take a lot of pride in what we do. We ensure that what we deliver doesn’t just look beautiful but is also designed to function perfectly to fit your lifestyle. That means everything we do, from the first in-house consultation through to final inspection, is beautifully functional. Flexi were awarded the 2019 HIA WA Laminex Kitchen & Bathroom Awards 'Excellence in Service' award, and are the highest rated home improvement & kitchen renovation company in W.A. on Australia's top consumer opinion site, Product Review.

The Furniture Times stands as a long-established, globally trusted B2B digital publication with a solid reputation for delivering practical business insights, market intelligence, and powerful promotional platforms for advertisers and sponsors within the furniture industry.
Recognized as the principal trade news platform for the global furniture market, The Furniture Times is the only media brand exclusively dedicated to covering the worldwide furniture ecosystem. We connect manufacturers, retailers, designers, distributors, event organizers, and innovators—creating an ecosystem where ideas flourish, collaborations thrive, and businesses expand their global footprint.
Through insightful editorials, trend analyses, interviews, and event coverage, The Furniture Times sheds light on everything from sustainability and craftsmanship to technology and design innovation. Working closely with leading associations and international trade events, we bring the most relevant stories, brand highlights, and market opportunities directly to our professional audience.
Our mission extends beyond news—we serve as the voice of the global furniture community, fostering a network where creativity meets commerce, and information fuels inspiration.

Mission
To empower and connect the global furniture industry by delivering accurate, actionable, and inspiring content that fosters innovation, supports sustainable growth, and bridges the gap between businesses, creators, and consumers across continents.

Vision
To be the world’s most trusted and influential digital platform that champions the furniture industry by promoting authentic stories, global collaborations, and impactful visibility for every brand — from heritage workshops to emerging creators — bringing them all into the global spotlight.

Name: Art and Forge
Description:
The mission of Art and Forge is clear: to craft luxury hardware that not only stood as a testament to our unwavering commitment to quality but also paid homage to the unique Indian tradition of exceptional craftsmanship. Along with our valued and discerning customers, we share a profound respect for the traditional techniques of sand casting and hand finishing. In a world where technology often replaces skilled artisans, we chose a different path to create unique and carefully curated products.

We recognized the value of these age-old techniques, preserving the heritage of crafting fine metal objects. Every piece we design carries the soulful touch of handwork and the legacy of a rich tradition, ensuring that each item becomes a work of art in its own right! The elegant metal finishes on Art and Forge pieces only get better with continued use and the passage of time.

We recognize that while forging metal is a crucial process, it is equally important to forge strong communities. We are deeply committed to supporting the skilled artisans who are the lifeblood of this craft. A portion of the profits goes directly towards helping these artisans continue to practice and perfect their art.

In Art and Forge, you'll find more than just beautifully crafted cabinet hardware; you'll discover a company with a heart and a mission. We honor the traditions of the past, embrace the possibilities of the future, and invest in the betterment of communities.

Where the #$&% do I buy a couch?

Name: HOUZE
Description:
The HOUZE Story

Life is about creating new beginnings and taking a leap of faith where the opportunity presents itself. As a company, we dreamed of being the answer to a need or lack, and have found our niche in modern living solutions.

For years, we delved on the pursuit of our passion. Today, HOUZE stands as a sought-after brand in homecare, storage and lifestyle products in Singapore and Southeast Asia.

How We Started

HOUZE Founder Brien Chua was at the helm of Citylife Singapore for five prosperous years when he made the great leap to supplant the company with his new home and lifestyle brand—HOUZE.

Mr Chua faced the market head-on with his vast experience in e-commerce and retail. He also knew the ins and outs of operation and a knack for quality lifestyle and homewares. With his and the team’s commitment, HOUZE has catapulted to the SEA market and beyond.

Innovation is an essential part of growth and success. When Mr Chua presented Citylife to the Singaporean home improvement industry back in 2012, he has personalized the business strategy to suit the taste of the locale, which deviated from the branding of the main company. His wise leadership led to a 100% year-on-year increment in sales from 2013 to 2016, making the local subsidiary Citylife a fast-growing household items supplier in just six years in Singapore.

Mr Chua and the team applied the same businesses principles and infused them with fresh, exciting storage and lifestyle products to build HOUZE, and it has definitely paid off. Clients old and new have noticed the upward shift in value and quality, which are two things HOUZE wants for its customer base.

The Workforce

HOUZE, led by Mr Brien Chua, is currently composed of 25 of the most hardworking, exceptional and passionate staff; each of whom plays a specific role, from managing the local office to organizing our 14,000-ft2 warehouse. We are a well-oiled machine that handles over 100,000 products and thousands of visitors daily.

Name: DVIE SOLUÇÕES CORPORATIVAS (MÓVEIS)
Description:
Na Dvie, nosso compromisso é entender o DNA do seu negócio:  
 Análise Personalizada:
   - Estudamos a rotina, a cultura e os desafios da sua empresa para desenvolver móveis que se integrem à essência do seu time.  
   - Consideramos orçamento, espaço e necessidades práticas, priorizando soluções que agreguem valor real.  

Nossos Diferenciais: 
 Manutenção Ágil: 
   - Serviços rápidos e transparentes, sem prolongamentos desnecessários. Custo justo e qualidade são prioridades.
 Projetos Sustentáveis com Design:  
   - Combinamos materiais eco-friendly (madeira certificada, tintas não tóxicas) com um visual moderno, alinhado às expectativas do mercado.  
 Planos de Assinatura Flexíveis:
   - Opções de móveis por assinatura que se adaptam ao seu fluxo de caixa e evitam ambientes ultrapassados. Praticidade e estilo em equilíbrio.  

- Design Intencional: Desde linhas modernas até o estilo industrial, cada detalhe reflete a identidade da sua empresa.  
- Funcionalidade Estratégica: Soluções como armários moduláveis e mesas multifuncionais maximizam espaço e eficiência.  
- Investimento Consciente: Propostas transparentes, sem excessos ou comprometimento da durabilidade.  
Resultado? Ambientes corporativos que harmonizam profissionalismo e personalidade, elevando a experiência de trabalho e a imagem da sua marca.  

Vamos criar algo extraordinário?
 Entre em contato ou visite nossa loja em Suzano/SP. Converse comigo sobre sua visão enquanto tomamos um café, e juntos desenvolveremos um projeto que traduz seu DNA em cada detalhe.  

*#MóveisSobMedida #DesignFuncional #SustentabilidadeDvie*

Name: Ethan Allen Fort Wayne
Description: Ethan Allen embodied the American pioneer spirit, and his spirit is in our DNA. We were the first furniture retailer to offer furniture gallery showrooms and complimentary interior design service. Our inventive spirit is most evident in the extraordinary range of styles we offer. We have endless fabric, finish, and customization options—because every detail matters when you're expressing who you are and what you value. Products that aren't made in North America are made by some of the finest local artisans around the globe. If this sounds like you, you'll feel right at home at Ethan Allen.

Name: Soluzione Mipa | Pavimenti, Rivestimenti e Arredo Bagno
Description:
Da oltre 30 anni, Soluzione Mipa è il partner di fiducia nella selezione di materiali di alta qualità, trasformando spazi di vita e lavoro in ambienti unici e personalizzati. La nostra missione è offrire un’esperienza completa, guidandoti tra soluzioni che coniugano stile, funzionalità e praticità, creando progetti su misura per le tue esigenze.

Offriamo una vasta gamma di prodotti: rivestimenti per bagni, cucine e pareti, pavimenti per interni ed esterni, arredamento per il bagno, mobili e sanitari. Il nostro team di esperti ti supporta nella scelta dei materiali più adatti, garantendo risultati che combinano qualità, estetica e durabilità.

Ogni prodotto è selezionato con cura per assicurare stile, resistenza e facilità di manutenzione, riflettendo il nostro impegno per la soddisfazione del cliente. Il nostro showroom di Padova offre l’opportunità di toccare con mano le soluzioni proposte e trovare ispirazioni per i tuoi progetti.

Siamo pronti a condividere la nostra esperienza, fornire consigli personalizzati e accompagnarti in ogni fase del tuo progetto. Affidati a Soluzione Mipa e trasforma i tuoi spazi in ambienti accoglienti, unici e all’avanguardia.

Name: Ambient Lounge Singapore & SEA
Description:
Used in Shangri-La, Kempinski, COMO, Noku and Four Seasons Hotels, Ambient Lounge is the leading global brand for designer bean bag sofas.

Featured in TIME Magazine in 2006, Ambient Lounge has been recognised for its design-forward approach to soft furniture: "Ditching the 'dodgy, shapeless' look, this British company combines old-style comfort with sleek new contours."

Established in the UK in 2005, Ambient Lounge is groundbreaking innovation in evolving shapeless bean bags into contemporary designer sofas with modern clean lines. These are meticulously crafted with proprietary soft structure for beautiful form and filled with DuraLuxe beads for lasting comfort.

In 2018, England’s national football team selected Ambient Lounge to furnish their World Cup team hotel - a trusted choice for relaxation and team bonding at the highest level.

Preferred by architects and interior designers worldwide, Ambient Lounge furniture has been used in hospitality, commercial, residential, civic and cultural, community and educational spaces.

Chill out with the best in visual inspiration and exceptional comfort. Get in touch today. We would love to furnish your next project.

Name: Nuvera Concept
Description:
In the past

Throughout history, human beings have been deeply connected with space and objects. Ever since we have tried to grasp the truth of things and to name them, the dimensions of our relationship with things have changed. The story of objects has constantly transformed with the evolution of cultures and technological advances. People have shaped their spaces with the desire to create not only a functional but also an aesthetic and emotional space. At the last point in the story of furniture, an experience integrated into the user's lifestyle has emerged with creative usage areas, modular designs and sustainable materials. We decided to embark on a journey to retell the story of the object and inspire the visible. On this path, we founded Nuvera 'to realise what we dream of'. We know the importance of space and objects in human life. 

And now
As Nuvera, we are more than
We bring this rich history and evolution together in contemporary furniture design. We design modern living spaces based on the ideas, experience and inspiration that transform spaces into homes. We know that each house has a unique spirit and rhythm. By prioritising the relationship between man and his 'home', we create interiors that maximise personal satisfaction with quality materials and workmanship. Each of our pieces is not just an object, but also a story.

Future

We will continue to offer our customers quality, style and comfort. Our top priority is to ensure that every Nuvera piece enriches lives and is cherished for generations.
- To bring Nuvera comfort to the elite and to spread our unique style around the world.
- To be a 'favourite brand' with our employees who have adopted the Nuvera corporate culture, our quality products and unconditional customer satisfaction beyond expectations.
- We want to increase the satisfaction of our customers before and after sales.

We are here to write your story with our personalised designs, quality products and services above world standards.

Description:
At Miix Interiors, we specialize in transforming spaces into stylish havens that exude modern elegance. As a local home staging and retail furniture company based in Vancouver, Canada, we curate a carefully selected collection of furniture and decor inspired by modern, mid-century modern, and contemporary styles.

Whether you're looking to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your home, stage a property for a quick and successful sale, or create a stunning commercial space, our expert team is here to assist you every step of the way. With Miix Interiors, you'll benefit from our exceptional customer service, attention to detail, and a commitment to delivering top-quality products. Experience the transformational power of our modern furniture and design expertise, and let us help you create a space that reflects your style and leaves a lasting impression. Name: LONDON AERONS LIMITED
Description:
At London Aerons, we specialise in professionally refurbishing, repairing, and reselling premium second-life Herman Miller Aeron chairs across the UK.

With over a decade of experience, our team restores Aerons to near-new condition using genuine parts, expert craftsmanship, and strict quality checks. Every chair is fully serviced, rebuilt, and tested to ensure the highest standards of comfort, ergonomics, and durability.

Why businesses and home offices choose us
	•	Premium refurbished Herman Miller Aeron chairs
	•	Save 50–70% compared to buying new
	•	Professionally cleaned, rebuilt & quality-checked
	•	Fast UK delivery
	•	Warranty included for peace of mind
	•	Sustainable choice, extending the life of iconic design

Who we support

We supply individuals, home workers, startups, creative teams, co-working spaces, and businesses upgrading office seating without compromising on quality.

Our mission

To provide world-class ergonomic seating at an accessible price, while supporting sustainability through expert refurbishment and the reuse of iconic furniture.

Browse current stock or learn more at: www.londonaerons.co.uk

Name: Kin Suki
Description:
About Us
Founded in 2024 by two best friends, Kin Suki is a celebration of individuality and the joy of rare beauty. We believe in the power of rarity, which is why each collection is produced in limited quantities—just 100 sets. Every piece is one of a select few in the world, offering you the thrill of owning a treasure that sets you apart. Our plates are more than functional items; they are thoughtfully crafted works of art, designed to bring joy to your home and elevate the everyday. At Kin Suki, we create pieces that invite you to savor life’s special moments and embrace the art of living beautifully, one rare find at a time.

We are so lucky to have been able to carry on 3 generations of doing things the right way; putting our customers first and focusing on quality. From your first store visit, to delivery, and everything in between, we look forward to offering you a world-class experience.

Name: Havemøbelland ApS
Description:
Velkommen til Havemøbelland ApS.

Havemøbelland har Danmarks største udvalg af havemøbler. Vi lever og ånder for havemøbler og arbejder hårdt året rundt for at levere de bedste kvalitetsmøbler til konkurrencedygtige priser. Vores møbler er nøje udvalgt til at dække de behov alle vores kundesegmenter har, om det er til privatkunder eller til erhverv.

Hos os får du:
·  Et imponerende udvalg af kvalitetsmøbler fra hele verden, som er sammensat ud fra mere end 20 års erfaring i branchen.
·  Fantastisk kundeservice med professionel og kyndig vejledning fra start til slut i købsprocessen.
·  Levering i hele Danmark og Europa med egne chauffører eller samarbejdspartnere.

Navnet Havemøbelland er synonym for den bedste kvalitet og service i branchen, kendetegnet ved passion og engagerede medarbejdere arbejder vi for konstant at udvikle vores kundeservice, sortiment og markedssegmenter.

Havemøbellands vækstmål er ikke kun en fortsat vækst i det private kundesegment, men også at skabe vækst gennem professionel, bæredygtig og målrettet salg til virksomheder, hvor vores sortiment vil være med til at skabe stemning, højne kvaliteten og sikre vores kunder den absolut bedste kundeservice på markedet.

Hvis du som erhvervskunde står og mangler netop de rigtige møbler til din virksomhed og ansatte, så tilbyder Havemøbelland:

· Et uforpligtende personligt møde.
· En privat gennemgang i en af vores flotte butikker før eller efter åbningstid.
· Professionel og kyndig vejledning i hele købsprocessen.
· Fleksible leveringsmuligheder.

Vi ser frem til at hjælpe jer med at skabe nye rum til jeres ansatte og virksomhed.

Kontakt:

Tlf. 50 60 03 88

Onze collectie bestaat uit:

– Bijpassende, stijlvolle lampenvoeten

 Contact

Vi är stolta över att erbjuda produkter av högsta kvalitet, tillverkade av skickliga hantverkare från hela världen. Vårt mål är att skapa unika och tidlösa möbler som passar in i alla hem och rum.

Som kund hos Englesson & Company kan du förvänta dig en hög servicenivå och personlig rådgivning från våra erfarna inredningsexperter. Vi arbetar ständigt för att överträffa våra kunders förväntningar och skapa en unik och minnesvärd köpupplevelse.

Besök vår butik eller hemsida för att se vårt sortiment och få inspiration till ditt nästa inredningsprojekt.

Name: Set The Stage Broward County
Description:
Set The Stage is a family-run home staging and furniture solutions company serving clients across South Florida, from Miami to Palm Beach. 
We create elevated, move-in-ready spaces that showcase each property’s full potential — blending interior design expertise, luxury furnishings, and white-glove service.

Whether you’re preparing to sell your home, designing a model residence, furnishing a vacation rental, needing furniture packages for an assisted living facility, or refreshing your own space, our team delivers custom staging and furniture packages that enhance both style and function.

Every project features mostly brand-new, high-quality furniture from premium brands such as Dovetail, Four Hands, and Classic Home, often available at significantly below retail prices through our national vendor network. 
This allows us to offer our clients exceptional value without compromising quality or design.

With David Goubert’s background at Louis Vuitton and Neiman Marcus, we bring a luxury retail standard and meticulous attention to detail to every project. From high-end home staging and vacation rental design to turnkey furnishing solutions, Set The Stage helps properties stand out — attracting buyers, delighting residents, and elevating every environment we touch.

Founded during the lockdown of 2020 by multidisciplinary Swiss designer Sabine Baz, SABBA Designs continues to innovate its luxurious range of products through the use of sustainable manufacturing techniques within Europe while offering an aesthetic experience like no other.

Nei nostri showroom di oltre 6000 mq, aperti 7 giorni su 7,  troverete modelli da personalizzare scegliendo dimensioni, composizioni e rivestimenti di ogni tipo e ogni colore.

I nostri laboratori sono in grado di offrirvi inoltre, grazie al lavoro artigianale, un servizio su misura per realizzare il vostro divano e usufruire al meglio di tutto lo spazio abitativo a vostra disposizione.

Name: Küchenhaus Gebr. Jansen
Description:
Angefangen hat alles im Jahr 1836!
Hermann Jansen gründet mit seinem Bruder die kleine aber feine
Stellmacherei Gebr. Jansen und fertigt Kutschen, Räder, Wagen und andere landwirtschaftliche Geräte aus Holz. 
Im Lauf der Jahre und Jahrzehnte wuchs, veränderte und entwickelte sich das Unternehmen Gebr. Jansen weiter und erfand sich immer wieder neu.
Bald darauf wurde aus der kleinen Stellmacherei eine erfolgreiche Tischlerei mit zeitweise über 40 Schreinergesellen, die viele Jahre Innenausbauten u.a. von Restaurants, Diskotheken und Gaststätten geplant, gefertigt und montiert hat.
Nach Ende des ersten Weltkriegs kam der Möbel und Küchenbau dazu und im Laufe der folgenden Jahre der Handel mit hochwertigen industriegefertigten Systembauteilen. (moderne Einbauküchen von z.B. Rational, Leicht, etc.)
Seit mittlerweile knapp 100 Jahren behauptet sich das traditionelle Unternehmen Gebr. Jansen als spezialisiertes Küchenhaus erfolgreich am lokalen Markt in näherer Umgebung bis Düsseldorf, Neuss und Köln.

Und auch wenn das Unternehmen Gebr. Jansen seit dem 1. Januar 2019 – mit Nikolas Hilbig, der erste „nicht-Jansen“ in der Firmengeschichte - mittlerweile in der sechsten Generation geführt wird, profitieren Sie von der Gebr. Jansen Tradition noch heute: Denn noch immer gehören zu unserem Stammpersonal gelernte Tischler und noch immer legen wir den Fokus auf eine ganzheitliche Betreuung und Beratung unserer Kunden.
Von der ersten groben Skizze bis zur letzten kleinen Schraube.

Wir freuen uns auf Sie und sind für Sie da… seit fast 200 Jahren!

Name: Cobogó Gallery
Description:
Cobogó Gallery stands as a testament to the richness of Brazilian art, culture, and architecture, drawing inspiration from the iconic Cobogó.
This architectural element is more than just a functional component; it is a symbol of Brazil’s ability to blend tradition with modernity.

The Cobogó, created in the 1920s by engineers Amadeu Oliveira COimbra, Ernesto August BOeckmann, and Antônio de GÓis, is a unique façade element used for ventilation, shading, and regulating light, transforming spaces into dynamic environments that evolve throughout the day.

At Cobogó Gallery, we carry forward this tradition, curating collections that blend the visionary spirit of Brazilian modernism with the innovations of contemporary design. Just as Cobogó’s delicate play of light and shadow interacts with the surrounding environment, we bring life to furniture pieces that breathe history, culture, and craftsmanship.

Through partnerships with contemporary designers and the heirs of modernist pioneers, we re-create and re-edit original works, preserving their cultural essence while infusing them with new meanings for today.

The Cobogó serves as a metaphor for our gallery’s mission. Like the building block that builds this complex tapestry of Brazilian history and culture, our work helps restore and preserve Brazil’s design heritage.

Our collections are selected with care, a process rooted in deep research and passion for uncovering antique treasures. By doing so, we not only safeguard the legacy of modern Brazilian design but also ensure that its pioneering vision continues to thrive in contemporary forms.

Name: Deventer Behanghuis
Description:
Het Deventer Behanghuis is onderdeel van schildersbedrijf Driessen. Daar waar Niels al 25 jaar in het schildersvak zit, heeft hij nu besloten zijn diensten uit te breiden met exclusief behang. Dit om onze klanten een totaalplaatje te kunnen bieden. Dus of je nu behang of verf op de muren wilt, wij komen het graag voor je doen.

Onze exclusieve collectie kun je op afspraak komen bekijken in onze showroom. Vervolgens kunnen onze ervaren plakkers ervoor zorgen dat het behang van jouw keuze keurig strak op je muren komt.  Het behangen van de muren in jouw woning laat je waarschijnlijk niet door de eerste de beste doen. Je wilt graag dat iemand goed vakwerk aflevert, betrouwbaar is, echt begrijpt wat de bedoeling is en het liefst voor een eerlijke prijs, nietwaar? Laat dat nou precies datgene zijn waar wij voor staan. Bij het Deventer Behanghuis houden we van een persoonlijke en transparante aanpak.

We hebben een enthousiast team van ervaren plakkers. Schildersbedrijf Driessen bestaat al 25 jaar en al die jaren leveren we kwaliteit in Schalkhaar en omgeving. Door onze uitbreiding met het Deventer Behanghuis willen we nog meer mensen een complete en goede service bieden.  Neem gerust contact met ons op. Leuk als je ons volgt op onze socials!

Description:
Od 23 lat pomagamy w aranżacji i wyposażeniu biur oraz innych przestrzeni użyteczności publicznej. Jesteśmy dystrybutorem mebli wysokiej jakości od polskich i zagranicznych dostawców, takich jak MDFD, Mebelux, Bejot, Profim, Vank, Nowy Styl, LAS Mobili i innych. 

Specjalizujemy się w tworzeniu ergonomicznych stanowisk pracy. Nasze produkty są dostępne w szerokiej gamie wykończeń, więc możemy się dopasować stylistycznie do każdego wnętrza. Na miejscu mamy wzorniki wykończeń.

Wykonujemy zabudowy meblowe na zamówienie, np. kuchnie, szafy, lady recepcyjne, blaty umywalkowe. 

Od kilku lat rozwijamy się w dziedzinie akustycznej adaptacji wnętrz. Wykonujemy pomiary akustyczne i proponujemy rozwiązania, które wyciszą przestrzeń.

Tworzymy niewielki ale zgrany zespół, skoncentrowany na jak najlepszej obsłudze Klienta :)

Our promise: Genuine product, honest advice, and real support—so you can relax, entertain, and enjoy the best of the WA lifestyle, all from your own backyard.

Interested in partnering, becoming a distributor, or just want to learn more?
Connect with us or visit terratanks.com.au to get started.

Description:

Od ponad 7 lat specjalizujemy się w dostarczaniu jakościowych i atrakcyjnych cenowo mebli, które przekształcą każde pomieszczenie w komfortową i elegancką przestrzeń.

Nasza Misja: Tworzenie Domowych Przestrzeni z Pasją
W Bromarkt.pl wierzymy, że kluczem do sukcesu jest pasja i zaangażowanie. Nasz zespół to grupa entuzjastów designu, którzy kochają swoją pracę i są zaangażowani w ciągły rozwój naszej marki. Pracujemy z misją kreowania przestrzeni, które nie tylko wyglądają świetnie, ale też są wyjątkowo komfortowe i funkcjonalne.

7 Lat Doświadczenia w Branży: Nasza Droga do Perfekcji
Przez ponad 7 lat obecności na rynku, zdobyliśmy cenne doświadczenie, które pozwala nam lepiej zrozumieć potrzeby naszych klientów. 

Dołącz do Naszej Społeczności
Chcemy, aby Bromarkt.pl był więcej niż tylko sklepem – pragniemy stworzyć społeczność osób, które podzielają naszą pasję do pięknych wnętrz. Rozwijaj razem z nami naszą markę i odkrywaj nowe możliwości współpracy. Zapraszamy do dyskusji i dzielenia się opiniami, które pomogą nam sprostać Twoim oczekiwaniom.

Description:
Founded in Perth, Adore Home Living has grown to be a recognized leader in the furniture industry in Perth. With a successful footprint of 7 stores across the city, we have consistently delivered on our promise of offering fashionable furniture that marries the best of quality and price.

We invite you to explore our collection and experience firsthand the blend of style, affordability, and excellence that is at Adore Home Living.

Since 2018, we have been serving both B2B and retail clients with a wide range of custom and ready-made products, including kitchens, bedrooms, dressing rooms, living furniture, mirrors, desks, and sofas.

With over 8 years of industry and managerial experience, we have built strong collaborations with leading retailers such as Amazon, Jumia, Homzmart, ChicHomz, LaCasa, Manzzeli, and many more. Our mission is to provide smart furniture and décor solutions that balance quality, affordability, and creativity for homes and businesses.

Beyond furniture design, we also offer B2B wholesale stock solutions, including furniture accessories, decorative panels, wall and floor coverings, mechanisms, and ready wooden products, enabling businesses to access reliable, affordable, and stylish options to grow their markets.

With our fully updated e-commerce platform and active presence across social media channels, we aim to make shopping and collaboration simple, transparent, and inspiring. At Cre-Cra, we believe that every product tells a story — one of craftsmanship, innovation, and trust.

Description:
Welcome to Trig Modern Interiors!  We offer a unique shopping experience for mid-century modern furnishings and more, conveniently located near Downtown Raleigh off Atlantic Ave and Whitaker Mill Rd at DOCK 1053.

Trig Modern specializes in mid-century modern furnishings for all areas of your home, featuring custom made upholstered goods, dining, lighting, outdoor patio, local art, and home decor. 

Whether you're looking for assistance with furniture placement, color choices, home renovations, or products for corporate environments, our expertise spans the spectrum of interior design services.

Come explore how Trig Modern can bring individualized furniture and pieces to your space. Enjoy a truly unique furniture shopping experience. 

Explore our curated selection of mid-century modern pieces and our impressive range of furnishings. Let us assist you in creating the perfect home environment or corporate space with our premium offerings.

Contact us today and discover how Trig Modern can elevate your space with sophistication, quality, and a truly unique shopping experience.

Description:
Amsterdam Modern specializes in vintage Dutch and European design, with a focus on Mid-Century Modern furniture, lighting, and household objects, all sourced directly from the Netherlands. Each piece is hand-selected for its craftsmanship, character, and lasting appeal.

Our 10,000-square-foot warehouse and showroom, located in the Hi-Fi district near Echo Park in Los Angeles, is open to everyone—welcoming designers, architects, set decorators, collectors, and design enthusiasts of all kinds.

While we frequently work with members of the trade, including film productions and retail brands, we also sell directly to the public and ship worldwide. Our inventory spans a wide range of styles—Mid-Century, Brutalist, Modern, Deco, Postmodern, Industrial, Space Age, and Traditional—celebrating both classic design and bold individuality. 

Most items are offered in original, as-found condition to preserve the authentic charm and history that make each piece unique.

成立於2002年，致力於以現代生活的視角及精緻的工藝打造當代風格的傢俱。品牌不僅追求簡約、兼具功能性及藝術性的產品，更強調搭配更具親和力的家具，持續努力實現這一使命。

HAY與全球最具天賦及創造力的設計師合作，經過穩定的建築結構和時尚動力的啟發，將兩個行業的價值融合於耐用、優質的產品中，為用戶提供增值體驗。品牌的願景是與世界上有才華、好奇心和勇氣的設計師攜手合作，發掘新銳設計師，創作出實用和美觀的設計。HAY的產品種類眾多，包括北歐椅、餐桌、高腳椅等，以簡約北歐風格設計深受全球朋友喜愛。透過對家具、照明和配件的設計及生產，HAY致力於讓更多受眾都能擁有良好的簡約居家設計，成就國際吸引力的家居生活。
