Description:
We specialize in importing the finest Italian kitchens, ceramic tiles, furniture, and art & decoration, bringing the rich heritage of Italian design to clients in the USA. 

Discover the elegance and exceptional craftsmanship of Italy with DARA Italia.
We service various types of clients such as architects, designers, real estate developers, construction companies, distributors, and direct sales to end users.

We focus on multifamily condos, townhomes and apartment buildings, single family homes, retail, hospitality, office space and restaurants. 

Best Service: Our clients in the USA can expect unparalleled service. We pride ourselves with being highly responsive and attentive to your needs.

Experience: Existing track record of successfully completed projects.

Quality Assurance: We carefully select only the best and most reliable suppliers in Italy, ensuring excellent quality in every product we offer.

Competitive Pricing: Thanks to our direct factory prices, we transfer first-hand cost benefits to our clients, providing exceptional value.

Strategic locations: With our purchasing office in Trieste, Italy, and our corporate office in Denver, Colorado, we efficiently manage the entire import process.

At DARA Italia, we take pride in the meticulous selection of our suppliers and factories. We partner with well-established businesses, many of which are in their third or fourth generation. This heritage of craftsmanship gives us the confidence that their products are of the highest quality and their operations are stable and reliable.
We are dedicated to bringing the finest Italian craftsmanship to our clients, and our careful selection of suppliers reflects this commitment to quality and tradition.

Name: Arte LUMIS
Description:
At Arte LUMIS, we believe light should do more than illuminate — it should inspire, ground, and connect.
Rooted in the natural beauty of Central Texas, our vision is to transform locally sourced wood into sculptural lighting that lives and breathes with its surroundings. Every piece we create is handcrafted — not manufactured — honoring the individuality of the wood and the intention behind the craft.

We’re driven by a deep respect for material, form, and time. Each lamp begins as a tree with history, shaped by hand into an object of quiet beauty — not just functional lighting, but a presence in the room. Our work bridges nature and design, offering warmth, texture, and meaning through light.

Our vision is simple:

To bring natural materials back into modern spaces.

To create light that feels alive.

And to craft pieces that resonate — visually, emotionally, and ethically.

Name: Kollund Møbler
Description:
I en tid hvor alt bevæger sig med 1000 km i timen har du mere end nogensinde brug for en hjemmebase og en oase, hvor du kan komme ned i gear. Et skønt sted at slappe af, hvad enten det betyder stramme linjer og styr på sagerne, eller bløde kurver med masser af plads til hyggerod.

Hos Kollund Møbler tror vi ikke på trofæhylder med design klassikere på stribe, dikteret af tidens hurtigt skiftende trend,s alene kan opfylde dette behov.

Vi tror på, at der i et hjem skal være plads til alle finurligheder i en skøn blanding af nyt, gammelt og sandsynligvis også et arvestykke fra mormor. For det er netop dette vidunderlige miks, der udgør dit personlige hjem – DIT fristed.

Det handler om dig og gode værdier
Skønt  sortimentet er i evig forandring, men noget vi ikke ændrer på, er vores kerneværdier. Originalitet, troværdighed, ærlighed og personlighed rangerer højt her i huset og vi bestræber os dagligt på at lade disse skinne i gennem ved  god "gammeldags" rådgivning, information og inspiration.

Alt sammen for, at du i sidste ende kan føle dig tryg når du handler hos os – og forhåbentligt kommer igen. Mange af vores kunder har handlet her gennem årtier.

Hvad du ønsker skal du få
Der lægges stor vægt på at skabe en inspirerende helhedsoplevelse for dig, både når vi indretter butikken i Kollund og når vi laver indhold her på siden. Vi bestræber os på, at gøre det så nemt for dig som muligt. For at DU kan få ideerne omsat i dit eget hjem.

Vi tilbyder et miks af danske designklassikere indenfor både møbler, senge, belysning og boligtilbehør fordelt på over 100 brands. Der er noget til enhver smag, både online og i vores 5000 m2 store forretning i Kollund.

Description:

We saw woven cain as the raw material that epitomised all four of these principles and so it was a natural starting point for our aspiring brand.

We started small with a single item the humble, #Malawai Chair, which takes 12 days to expertly weave, a skill passed down from generations. 

And the rest is history....

8 Months on and we have continued to improve and grow our product offering that now includes a range of sustainably sourced products, available online and in  retail stores across the UAE and GCC. 

Each Karoo piece is handcrafted across Africa, in small batches, using only locally sourced sustainable materials.

At One Day Doors and Closets, craftsmanship and efficiency go hand in hand. Name: Desert Rose
Description:
In 2019 werd Desert Rose Interior Design opgericht als interieurontwerpstudio, vanuit een diepe passie voor het creëren van tijdloze, sfeervolle interieurs waarin natuurlijke materialen centraal staan. De zoektocht naar Europese antieke stukken en unieke woonaccessoires werd al snel een drijvende kracht achter de interieurprojecten. Wat aanvankelijk begon als gerichte zoektochten voor projecten, leidde in 2023 tot de transformatie naar Desert Rose – Authentic Living, een online woonplatform voor interieurliefhebbers wereldwijd. Met klanten van de VS tot Australië, heeft Desert Rose in korte tijd een internationale plaats verworven in het hart van liefhebbers die imperfecte schoonheid omarmen.

Elk stuk wordt met oog voor detail en kwaliteit gekozen. Het resultaat is een zorgvuldig samengestelde collectie van antiek, vintage en handgemaakte woonaccessoires met een natuurlijke, doorleefde uitstraling. Een eerbetoon aan eerlijke materialen, vakmanschap en de verhalen die in deze schatten verweven zijn.

De collectie is geïnspireerd door wereldwijde invloeden en de wisselende seizoenen. Hoewel niet alles in de collectie antiek is, delen alle items een doorleefde uitstraling – tijdloze woonaccessoires met een ziel en natuurlijke imperfecties. Door te kiezen voor handgemaakte producten haal je niet alleen iets bijzonders en unieks in huis, maar draag je ook bij aan het behoud van traditionele ambacht en vakmanschap.

Name: Furniture Solutions Lab LLC

We customized Quotes for your Projects
  At FSL, we offer more than just furniture; we provide comprehensive support and services designed to help our clients succeed in their projects.

Name: Woosa Sleep Pte Ltd
Description:
Since its inception in 2017, Woosa has been dedicated to perfecting the sleep experience with a combination of innovation, craftsmanship, and the finest materials. Founded in Singapore, Woosa brings over a decade of thorough research and testing to redefine comfort and what it truly means to rest well.

Guided by a philosophy that blends precision and quality, Woosa approaches mattress design with an uncompromising emphasis on the highest quality materials sourced from around the world. Achieving a nuanced and highly-personalised balance of softness, support, and durability.

With at least one third of the whole human experience spent in slumber, each element of the sleep experience is consciously engineered for the unconscious hours of rest and recovery. By focusing on the highest quality materials and expert craftsmanship, Woosa continues to elevate sleep experiences, one mattress at a time, making rejuvenating rest and luxurious comfort accessible to all.

Name: BARONE ARREDAMENTI
Description:
Barone arredamenti nasce da oltre trent’anni col desiderio di portare in tutte le case “…il meglio del buon design a Ragusa”.

La passione per la ricerca del bello e della qualità,  ha portato barone arredamenti a selezionare i migliori prodotti dei migliori brands italiani.
Ogni progetto,  è ponderato attentamente per ottenere un arredamento funzionale, di alto valore estetico e qualitativo “
Post-vendita
E’ il primo dei nostri pensieri: il cliente, naturalmente. Dal progetto, all’acquisto al post-vendita, noi siamo sempre accanto a lui,  nelle importanti scelte che daranno forma al luogo più importante della sua vita: la casa.

Sopralluogo e Progettazione
Ogni persona è differente, ogni casa è differente e ognuno ha esigenze diverse. Per ogni casa e per ogni persona dedichiamo tutta l’accuratezza necessaria per progettare l’ambiente giusto. Per questo offriamo un servizio di progettazione personalizzato preceduto da un sopralluogo al fine di avere più informazioni dettagliate sulla casa e sui desideri delle persone e formulare il giusto preventivo.

Consegna e Montaggio
La consegna e il montaggio dei prodotti vengono eseguite direttamente dal nostro personale specializzato

Living
Salotti, pareti, madie... riempiono uno degli spazi della casa dedicato al relax e all’incontro...

Cucine
La cucina è il luogo e lo spazio intorno al quale ruota la nostra vita. Mangi, condividi, racconti e raccogli tracce di quella tua quotidianità più intima e vera. 

Notte
Silenzio si sogna e si deve sognare. Dal letto ai comodini, dall’armadio ai cassettoni, le forme del sogno… per voi.

Spazio giovani
Il luogo perfetto dove giocare, disegnare, crescere e coltivare sogni… le camerette…

Complementi
Piccoli o grandi che siano, i complementi d’arredo completano lo stile della casa sottolineandone il carattere.

Luce
Illuminiamoci… La magia della luce non solo cambia aspetto alle cose, ma le fa diventare uniche.

Dion brand has been created for people who value best design with changing trends. They tend to experience various cultures whilst traveling, but they value harmony and peacefulness extremly which is building their inner calmness and sooth the senses.

Description:
With an eye for detail and a dedication to customer satisfaction, HOUSE OF SILK FLOWERS is a leader in the Faux Botanical Marketplace!

Our company was founded by a man who left a country rife with civil war in the 1980's.  He brought his young family to America, and worked many jobs to support them. One of his jobs included delivering products to major retailers, and he noticed the large number of faux botanicals that were in demand... his American Dream was born!

The early beginnings of this family-owned business included: designing arrangements, importing containers of product, and selling his items to other silk flower wholesale suppliers. Today, HOUSE OF SILK FLOWERS operates in a 110,000 square-foot facility in Eastern North Carolina, and employs approximately 50 full-time workers. Our company HANDCRAFTS our unique arrangements and botanical plants, for major retailers and designers throughout the country!

We pride ourselves on our attention to creating QUALITY PRODUCTS and to providing OUTSTANDING CUSTOMER SERVICE, and hope to be able to work with YOU to meet your business needs! A hands-on approach to running his business, guarantees your satisfaction!!

Name: Proarchs Progettazione e Arredamenti
Description:
Proarchs nasce nel 2004.
Inizialmente si occupa di progettazione di spazi e fornitura arredo per uffici, poi, venendo incontro alle richieste dei clienti, le attivitá includono il design e l'arredamento di interni.
Negli anni, Proarchs ha modo di verificare sul campo come la clientela migliore sia divenuta più sofisticata e consapevole, non chiedendo soluzioni pronte all’uso, ma servizi sempre più modellati sulle esigenze e sul proprio stile di vita.
Nel 2013, quindi, apre lo show-room di Roma Eur, nel quale gli spazi espositivi sono ripensati per coinvolgere il cliente in un’esperienza di design ove il protagonista è il cliente stesso.
Nel nuovo show-room, Proarchs lavora in sinergia con il cliente, ascoltandolo e consigliandolo nella fase di progettazione, affinchè le soluzioni individuate per la casa e gli spazi di lavoro riflettano l’unicità delle persone che li vivono quotidianamente.
Soprattutto, in fase di realizzazione, Proarchs è in grado di seguire e coordinare lo svolgimento dei lavori in tutti i passaggi, dalla fornitura dei materiali architettonici fino alla completa esecuzione delle opere.
L’eleganza e la qualità, la ricerca accurata dei materiali insieme all’attenta e studiata scelta dei brand portano ad un risultato unico e armonioso dello spazio.

Name: Retrofabrikken
Description: We are a small family-run company, where everyone works as a team and is driven by the passion for retro and design. This means that the people you meet when you visit us are also the ones who buy furniture, set it up and maintain it. That's why we know a lot about the furniture we sell. Green interior design with retro furniture At Retrofabrikken, we are very fond of craftsmanship, design and recycling. Buying, renovating and reselling old retro and designer furniture is our great passion. And exactly recycling is the essence of what we do. Whether we call it recycling or upcycling is in principle irrelevant. Giving old furniture new life is a step on the way to a more sustainable interior design. Regardless of whether you are purposefully hunting for the great design classics or just want to sniff around among wonderful vintage finds, you are welcome at Retrofabrikken. You can shop for all the cool news in our webshop or visit us at our large warehouse in Ringsted, where we have even more furniture than we have on the webshop. With us, your visit must be an experience and we are ready with a smile and personal guidance and will do our best to bring home your dream furniture. We buy estates, movable estates and furniture from private sellers or through auctions and the like all over the country. We collect them at our large warehouse in Ringsted where, if necessary, they are refurbished with lots of love and expertise so that they can come out and have a new life. If you have a piece of furniture you want to sell, please contact us.

Nel 1982 a quella sede storica, in via Mario Leggio, se n’è aggiunta un’altra, figlia della generazione successiva:  è il nostro show room di oltre 500 mq in Viale Europa, diventato nel 2016 il primo LUBE Store nella provincia di Ragusa.

Name: The Keepers Ltd.
Description:
The Keepers is a new European e-commerce and content platform dedicated to helping people create homes that feel grounded, meaningful, and designed to last.
We curate heirloom-quality furniture and homeware from Europe’s best craftsmen and small manufacturers - makers with deep roots in place, mastery of materials, and a commitment to longevity over trends.

Our mission is simple: bring back the era when the things we owned were made with care, chosen with intention, and kept for a lifetime. 

Imagine a world with us where we Make and Keep only things that truly matter.


What We Offer

1. Furniture That’s Made to Last
We handpick pieces from small European workshops and verify every item through a rigorous two-round quality assessment using The Keepers’ selection process. Only furniture and homeware built to last in materials, construction, and design make it into our collection.

2. Spaces That Support a Good Life
We translate the emotional, cultural, and sensory value of European craftsmanship into modern homes. Through practical guides like How to Spot a Keeper and curated room collections, we help people choose what truly fits their home vision, daily rituals, and long-term needs not what’s trending.

3. A More Conscious Way to Buy & Keep
We help people choose intentionally and care for what they own. This includes:
– Thoughtful UX, giving users the right information at the right moment so they feel confident and proud of their purchase
– Mini design consultations (coming soon)
– Maintenance, care, and later repair/resale services, helping every piece live a long and meaningful life

Our Brand Values
	1.	Longevity over disposability
	2.	Intention over impulse
	3.	Local over global
	4.	Care over speed
	5.	Heritage over hype

Name: Rugandco
Description:
At Rugandco, we craft luxury rugs that redefine elegance and style. With a decade dedicated to the highest standards in design and craftsmanship, we blend tradition and modernity, using premium materials to craft timeless pieces. Our rugs reflect the utmost taste in design, meticulously designed and handcrafted with care. They're more than accessories; they're statements of sophistication and opulence, transforming spaces into havens of luxury.

We offer a diverse range of choices, from traditional to contemporary, with a wide selection of designs, patterns, and colors. Our rugs can add warmth to homes or make bold statements in commercial spaces.

Our ability to transform spaces into luxurious havens sets us apart. Whether in a living room, bedroom, dining area, office, bar, car, yacht or private jet, a Rugandco rugs becomes the centerpiece.

Owning a Rugandco rugs is an experience. We guide you through design, materials, and colors with transparent pricing and payment options. Then our artisans embark on creation, ensuring uncompromising quality and exceeding expectations.

Our rugs is more than a floor covering; it's an investment in luxury, comfort, and style, making a statement about your commitment to quality and aesthetics.

Explore Rugandco and discover how our rugs can transform your space. Join us in the world of opulence and artistry, and create a space that reflects your unique style. Welcome to Rugandco!

Description:
Softday is a modern Irish brand creating high-quality, luxury products with a strong respect for heritage, craftsmanship, and the environment. Based in Ireland, we draw inspiration from the richness of our culture and landscapes to design timeless pieces that embody elegance, integrity, and care.

Our mission is to build a brand that stands for quality and sustainability offering products that are not only beautiful but also responsibly made. At softday, we are passionate about creating goods that last, combining traditional values with a contemporary vision for luxury.

Name: Furniture Plus Bahamas
Description: For three and a half decades, Furniture Plus has transformed communities, provided  economic access to beautiful home furnishings, explored business innovation, encouraged national development, innovated charitable giving, and helped to rebuild lives after disasters. We’re emerging stronger, a contemporary brand bringing delight and beauty to homes and spaces throughout The Bahamas.

Name: Vitruvium
Description:
Vitruvium partners with luxury brands to responsibly source no longer needed bespoke props and furniture to give them new life in the homes of the discerning interiors consumer.

We help brands enhance their sustainability agenda. Vitruvium removes display props and unwanted store furniture and and sells each item through vitruvium.uk as unique, limited-edition design pieces with the brand provenance identified.

We are committed to a long-term approach to sustainability and responsibility and transparently donate a percentage of every sale to our chosen charity partners.

Name: TROKAN
Description:
TROKAN delivers customized furniture and interior fit-out solutions, managing the entire process from concept to implementation with genuine attention to detail and a flexible approach. Every project is handled with authentic dedication, active listening, and a constant focus on quality and long-lasting results.
In a continuously changing world, TROKAN aims to remain a reliable, adaptable, and present partner, contributing through each project to the creation of spaces that bring value, comfort, and stability.
Our mission is to create furniture that seamlessly combines functionality, aesthetics, and comfort, perfectly tailored to the real needs of each client and harmoniously integrated into the fit-out projects we deliver. We are committed to professionally managing every stage of the project—from concept, production, and procurement to delivery and installation—while building relationships based on trust and collaboration.
As a result, every completed space becomes a unique story, adding value and comfort to the lives of those who use it.
We are guided by clear principles:
Authentic dedication – we truly listen, ask the right questions, and invest time to understand context, challenges, and real objectives.
Tailored solutions – no templates; each solution is adapted to the space, budget, and style of every client.
Trust & respect – open communication and commitments that are honored.
Functionality with aesthetics – solutions that look good and perform over time.
Collaboration and communication – working as one team, from the first discussion to post-installation.
Responsible execution – attention to detail, respected deadlines, and consistent quality.
For us, quality is a standard, and results matter just as much to us as they do to those who choose to work with us.

Name: Lull

LULL.HR je web trgovina premium namještaja koja spaja bezvremenski dizajn, vrhunsku kvalitetu i funkcionalnost. Naša pažljivo odabrana kolekcija uključuje renomirane brendove poput WOOOD, Nardi, Pedrali, SCAB Design i mnoge druge, pružajući sofisticirane komade za interijere i eksterijere.

Naša misija je nadahnuti vas pri uređenju prostora, nudeći elegantne, izdržljive i estetski privlačne proizvode koji unose toplinu i karakter u svaki dom.

Otkrijte više na LULL.HR i oblikujte prostor po svojoj viziji.

With 10+ years of experience, we understand the importance of finding the perfect pieces to suit your style and needs. Whether you're furnishing a new home or giving your current space a refresh, our wide selection of furniture options has something for everyone.

Name: Arredo Design Esterni
Description:
E-commerce di Arredo Moderno da Esterno al Prezzo Migliore e in Pronta Consegna!

Siamo un'azienda specializzata in soluzioni di arredo moderno outdoor che unisce estetica, funzionalità e design. 

Il nostro catalogo offre una vasta gamma di prodotti per arredare gli spazi esterni con stile, dalle sedute ai tavoli, dalle poltrone ai divani, dalle piantane alle fioriere.

Siamo costantemente alla ricerca delle ultime tendenze del settore dell'arredamento outdoor, proponendo soluzioni innovative e di alta qualità per rendere i vostri spazi esterni un luogo di relax e di condivisione con familiari e amici.

Garantiamo la massima attenzione alla qualità dei prodotti che sono selezionati con cura tra i migliori marchi del settore. 

La nostra filosofia si basa sulla convinzione che la scelta dei prodotti migliori sia la chiave per garantire la massima soddisfazione dei nostri clienti.

Ci teniamo a offrire un servizio post-vendita di alto livello, in grado di assistere i nostri clienti in ogni fase dell'acquisto e della scelta del prodotto. Inoltre, offriamo spedizioni veloci e sicure, garantendo una consegna puntuale e un servizio di assistenza personalizzato.

In sintesi, se state cercando un negozio online specializzato in arredamento design moderno da esterno, il nostro è la scelta giusta per voi! 

Siamo pronti ad accompagnare i nostri clienti nella scelta dei prodotti migliori, garantendo un servizio di alta qualità e massima soddisfazione.

Name: De Smid Lifestyle
Description:
Kom shoppen bij de Smid in Haren. Het pand aan de Lietingstraat geldt als dé bakermat van De Harense Smid die tot de jaren zestig bekend stond als smederij/reparatiewerkplaats van landbouwwerktuigen en later uitgroeide tot landelijke formule in consumentenelektronica. De winkelketen kreeg in 2003 het koninklijk predicaat Hofleverancier, in 2007 gevolgd door de Elsevier Retail Jaarprijs voor winkelketen met de beste service. Sinds er weer onder de vertrouwde naam De Smid gehandeld wordt is het voor klanten een groot thuiskomen.

De Smid Lifestyle is een moderne lifestyle winkel met een groot assortiment trendy en luxe tuinmeubelen, verlichting, fietsen en BBQ's van bekende merken. Met ons ruime assortiment en klantvriendelijkheid zorgen wij ervoor dat u klant blijft.

Description:
Welcome to SixtyAve, your premier destination for all things lifestyle in the UK. At SixtyAve, we're dedicated to elevating your living spaces with our extensive collection of furniture, home goods, garden products, office supplies, sporting goods, and more.

Our mission is simple: to provide our customers with high-quality products that enhance their daily lives. Whether you're looking to revamp your living room with a stylish sofa, create an oasis in your garden with our outdoor furniture, or upgrade your home office with ergonomic supplies, we've got you covered.

One of the many perks of shopping with SixtyAve is our commitment to customer satisfaction. We offer free delivery on all orders across the UK, ensuring that your shopping experience is not only convenient but also cost-effective.

Join us on a journey to transform your spaces into havens of style and functionality. Explore our diverse range of products and discover the endless possibilities for your home and lifestyle with SixtyAve.

Name: Moss Furniture
Description:
Self-expression with a helping hand. Think of Moss as your personal interior design coach. Whether you're a seasoned style guru in search of a that statement piece, or taking your first steps to cultivate your own style, we're here for it! With our suite of lifestyle furniture, from ottomans to occasional chairs, coffee tables to side tables, you can tell you your story, your way.

To quote Big Magic author, Elizabeth Gilbert, "A creative life is an amplified life. It's bigger, happier, expanded, and a hell of a lot more interesting". But creativity and self-expression can be daunting. Moss is all about providing a safe space for designers of any level. Be it updating your forever home, an office makeover, or share house revamp, all these places that we pride ourselves on, they're windows to the soul. So we understand you want to get the vibe just right. 

Environmentally speaking, Moss aims to do all of the above with a light touch. Lisa prioritizes suppliers of raw materials, and business partners of all kinds who have a strong Corporate Social Governance (CSG). "Ethical choices are at the heart of everything we do, from materials to work life balance. We value collaboration, respect, empathy, support, equality, wellness, and personal growth. Innovation drives our design, materials, and trendsetting initiatives, while honesty and trust underpin all our interactions." In a nutshell, Moss Furniture's mission is to make good design accessible for those who appreciate it, and those who care for the environment.

Name: Le Shoppe Modern
Description:
Under the Le Shoppe Modern umbrella we are home to three exciting businesses that work together to create a unique experience for our clients and consignors. The Le Shoppe Too showroom is Metro Detroit’s largest upscale mid-century modern store. Our 25,000 square foot store features the finest collection of unique, iconic 20th century furniture, fine art, home decor, lighting and glass. We accept pieces on consignment, and hand pick unique items, creating appealing in-store vignettes making each visit to our store a new experience.

With our partner Terri Stearn of Detroit Fine Art Appraisals, Le Shoppe Auction House hosts quarterly international auctions with bidders from over 30 countries. Our team of experts has the knowledge and experience to assist you in achieving optimal results from the auction sale of your cherished items.

Our sister business Le Shoppe Estate Sales organizes, advertises, and hosts exciting estate sales nearly every weekend. Whether you're moving, downsizing, or inheriting; if you need to liquidate a house-full of belongings, look no further.

Whether you consign an item to the store, to an auction, or hire us to host an estate sale; we have associate experts in-house in virtually every area. Our experts research current market trends for accurate pricing, and with our global audience we are able to obtain premium prices for exceptional pieces.

Name: Tobi GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Seit mehr als einem Jahrzehnt begeistert das geniale babybay weit über eine halbe Million Eltern auf der ganzen Welt. Ausgedacht, erfunden und entwickelt wurde das Beistellbett vom vierfachen Familienvater und Firmengründer für seine Frau und die Sehnsucht der Familie nach ruhigen, entspannten Nächten mit ihrem Neugeborenen. Bald brachte er seine Idee zur Serienreife, um die große Nachfrage im Freundeskreis zu befriedigen – das original babybay war geboren.

Seitdem haben wir unsere Erfindung konsequent weiterentwickelt, erweitert und für verschiedenste Ansprüche perfektioniert – zum Beispiel die patentierte, stufenlose Höhenverstellung oder die genial einfache Befestigung an jedem Elternbett.

Geborgen in der Begrenztheit des eigenen Bettchens kann auch Ihr Baby bald direkt neben Ihnen schlafen und spürt Ihre Nähe – Sie haben stets Körperkontakt ohne es jedoch durch Ihre Schlafgewohnheiten zu stören. Nie mehr wieder nachts Aufstehen fürs Stillen, Trösten oder Kuscheln. Endlich erholsame Nächte für die ganze Familie!

Stellen Sie sich jetzt Ihr ganz individuelles babybay zusammen mit der passenden Matratze, einem weichem Nestchen und vielem weiteren sinnvollen Zubehör – damit sich Ihr kleiner Liebling rundum wohlfühlt.

Ihr babybay Team

Description:

With a rich collection of natural stones, woods, and metals, TEYO’s designs cater to clients who appreciate the beauty of nature, transforming them into functional and artistic elements for the home.

Each piece in our collection, from marble countertops to custom furniture, is meticulously crafted to meet the highest standards of design excellence. TEYO collaborates with top artisans and designers to ensure that every item in their portfolio not only meets but exceeds the expectations of a discerning clientele.

The culture of North-East is wrapped in sheer vibrancy and energy that serves as a source of inspiration to many. In recent times, people have been adopting diverse and multifaceted, ethnic interior styles. But, what is attractive about an interior with ethnic character? North-East India has over 220 ethnic groups, each one having their own individuality, unique features and cultural development. 

KA Bespoke makes sure that your style has a specific palette and a wide color range of ethnicity.

Modern day furniture and contemporary products have been paired with patterned decor for a vintage-style charm. Playful prints, dramatic motifs and whimsical artwork shouts throughout that the space is a clear reflection of its owner.

Name: Foxwood & Bramble
Description:
Foxwood & Bramble is a sustainable home fragrance brand redefining the candle experience through handcrafted design, emotional storytelling, and conscious living. We create refillable wooden bowl candles and scented wax sachets, inspired by nature and made with 100% soy wax and essential oil-based fragrances. Our aesthetic is rooted in warmth, slowness, and beauty—making every product not just a scent, but a sensory keepsake.

We launched in 2024 and have since built a loyal customer base through our online store, with strong organic traction across Instagram and boutique markets. Our products are regularly used for gifting, weddings, and events, with B2B and white-label partnerships now expanding our footprint.

Our goal is to become a category-defining brand in luxury, sustainable gifting and home fragrance—designed in the UK, rooted in craftsmanship, and built for conscious consumers across the UK and Europe. In the next 12 months, we aim to scale through direct-to-consumer growth, corporate gifting partnerships, and curated retail collaborations.

Foxwood & Bramble isn’t just about candles. It’s about creating moments of meaning—through scent, story, and beautiful objects designed to be treasured, not trashed.

Name: Hast
Description:
Kitchen Tools That Inspire You

From small snacks to full family feasts, we believe cooking more is always better — better for your health, wallet, creativity, and a fantastic way to bring people together. 

Hast was founded with one mission: to create modern kitchen products that make cooking more fun, creative, and adventurous.
After a 3-year development journey and a successful Kickstarter in 2019, our mission hasn’t changed since we made our first knife line — we’re still designing and developing meaningful products to turn cooking into a creative outlet for everyone, no matter their skill level.

Name: Vinaayak Homes
Description:
Welcome to Vinaayak Homes, a leading provider of custom-made home furnishing products. We specialize in creating exquisite bed linen, cushions, runners, and more, catering to the discerning tastes of our esteemed clientele.

With a passion for unique design and a commitment to excellence, we pride ourselves on offering exceptional products that reflect our distinctive design language. Each piece is meticulously crafted to showcase the perfect blend of style, comfort, and quality.

One of our key strengths is our expertise in customizing products to meet the specific needs and preferences of our customers. We understand that every individual has a unique vision for their living spaces, and we go above and beyond to bring those visions to life. Whether it's a personalized gift or a tailor-made creation for your home, our team is dedicated to delivering exceptional results.

At Vinaayak Homes, we take pride in supporting Indian handicrafts and promoting the rich heritage of traditional craftsmanship. By collaborating with skilled artisans, we ensure that our products not only exude elegance but also carry the essence of Indian artistry and culture.

Gifting is a major segment of our business, and we take joy in helping our customers create memorable moments through thoughtfully curated gift sets. Whether it's for a special occasion like wedding or a corporate event, our bespoke products make for meaningful and cherished presents.

Join us on our journey as we continue to excel in the world of home furnishing. Let us help you transform your living spaces into havens of comfort and style.

To explore our exquisite range of custom-made home furnishing products, please visit our website. We look forward to connecting with you and being a part of your beautiful living experiences.

I vari reparti di cui si compone l’azienda riguardano la lavorazione dell’acciaio, del legno e del marmo.
Il ciclo produttivo va dalla materia prima alla prodotto finito, il tutto realizzato con l’ausilio di validi collaboratori e macchinari di ultima generazione.
Particolare attenzione è dedicata ai rivestimenti di linea classica, rustica e moderna.
Il vasto assortimento di marmi, il buon gusto del titolare e la passione dei suoi collaboratori per le innovazioni permette ai clienti di progettare, disegnare, personalizzare e realizzare il camino dei loro sogni.

Established for over 25 years, we go the extra mile for every customer and offer a five year fitting guarantee on top of the manufacturer’s guarantee for extra
peace of mind.

Description:
Em 1994, foi fundada, em São Mateus do Sul/PR, a Raron Móveis, empresa varejista especializada na venda de móveis, projetados, eletrodomésticos e artigos para decoração. 

Buscando inovar e oferecer mais opções de produtos, em 2018 ingressamos na Rede TokLar, uma rede com mais de 130 empresas associadas, todas no ramo moveleiro. A partir de então, passamos a assumir o nome de TokLar - São Mateus do Sul. Atualmente, trabalhamos com fornecedores líderes no mercado, entre eles Ecoflex, Henn, Lanza, Línea Brasil, Mor, Mueller, Nicioli, Tradição, Tramontina, e muito mais.

Nestes 30 anos de história, a TokLar - São Mateus do Sul tornou-se referência regional em atendimento e produtos de alta qualidade. Nossa missão é gerar satisfação em nossos clientes, proporcionando a realização do sonho de uma casa com móveis exclusivos, através de conforto e bem-estar.

Every item in our collection represents this passion for creating spaces that not only look beautiful but feel restorative and safe – spaces that truly feel like home.

Name: Sit and Sleep Medical
Description:
At Sit and Sleep Medical, we enhance the quality of life for senior living communities, individuals in recovery, and those requiring specialized medical equipment. Founded in 2022, we’re becoming a leading provider of high-quality lift chairs, hospital beds, and a growing range of medical products tailored to meet our clients' diverse needs.

Our Mission and Vision

Our mission is to improve lives through exceptional products and services, ensuring comfort, safety, and dignity. We envision a world where everyone has access to the best home medical equipment and furnishings to support their well-being and recovery.

Our Products and Services

We sell and rent a range of medical equipment and home furnishings, including:

Lift Chairs: Ergonomically designed for maximum comfort.
Hospital Beds: Adjustable beds offering superior support.
Home Medical Products: Enhancing daily living, from mobility aids to blood pressure monitors.
Our catalog is constantly expanding to meet our clients' evolving needs.

Who We Serve

We serve:

Senior Living Communities: Durable furnishings and equipment enhancing seniors' living environments.
Individuals in Recovery: Products supporting safe and comfortable recovery at home.
Healthcare Facilities: Essential medical equipment for patient care.
We understand our clients' unique needs and provide customized solutions to improve their quality of life.

Our Values

Integrity: Conducting business with the highest ethical standards.
Innovation: Constantly improving our product offerings.
Customer Focus: Striving to exceed our customers' expectations.
Collaboration: Working with clients, suppliers, and partners for outstanding results.
Our inclusive culture fosters creativity and innovation, ensuring our team delivers the best outcomes for our clients.

What Sets Us Apart

Sit and Sleep Medical stands out for its dedication to quality and customer service. We consistently deliver superior products and services that enhance our clients' lives.

Name: Gruppo TREDI
Description:
Fondata nel 1969 a Magliano Alpi, l’azienda vanta oltre cinquant'anni di esperienza e successi nel settore dell’arredamento, consolidandosi come leader grazie alla sua capacità di adattarsi e anticipare i cambiamenti tecnologici, sociali e commerciali.
Dopo aver affermato la propria presenza in Italia, il Gruppo ha ampliato il proprio raggio d'azione in Francia con l'apertura di "Agencement Cuisine 1" a Nizza, un successo confermato dai suoi 40 anni di attività e dall'espansione con nuovi punti vendita. Dopo Nizza il gruppo ha aperto punti vendita a Parigi, Cannes e nel Principato di Monaco.

Oggi, il Gruppo guarda oltre l'Europa con ambiziosi progetti verso Stati Uniti e Canada, mercati ricchi di opportunità per prodotti italiani di alta qualità. Ad oggi, abbiamo due punti vendita in California.
Tra le diverse attività, il Gruppo TREDI si è specializzato nell’arredamento rivolto al settore immobiliare delle grandi costruzioni.  
Nel 2016 la decisione di avviare la produzione diretta di porte interne, al fine di espandere il proprio mercato e soddisfare le richieste dei clienti.

Il core business del Gruppo si fonda sull'eccellenza dei servizi e sull'efficienza organizzativa, supportato da un team di professionisti competenti e motivati, vera forza trainante del nostro continuo successo.

Description:
Il nostro staff offre studi e progettazioni di ambienti, personalizzando ogni singolo arredamento in base alle esigenze del cliente, cercando assieme di arrivare ad una soluzione funzionale e di piacevole gusto estetico.
Personale qualificato vi proporrà varie idee per progettare al meglio l'ambiente della vostra abitazione, con rilevamento delle metrature a domicilio e preventivi gratuiti.
Possibilità di effettuare pagamenti tramite finanziamenti fino a 60 mesi a tasso zero.
Il servizio di progettazione e arredamento degli interni di Michieletto si sviluppa in un determinato percorso: nasce, cresce, si sviluppa.
La nostra proposta di un arredamento si sviluppa avendo ben chiara l’esigenza e obbiettivo specifico che volete raggiungere, questo grazie ad un minimo di conoscenza e descrizione di quello che voi siete, della vostra personalità, modo d’essere, stili di vita, abitudini, gusti, ecc, studiando con calma e precisione ogni zona della casa.
Questo perché l’ambiente abitativo deve essere l’espressione del proprio stile individuale dove ogni particolarità di un arredo o di un semplice oggetto crea l’emozione di una casa ben arredata con gli spazi ben organizzati, con prodotti di design, dalle linee pulite, funzionali ed essenziali.
In questo modo noi vi creiamo l’arredo.

Name: NUMI
Description:
NUMI se establece como un referente en el diseño y creación de mobiliario único en Perú, fusionando la tradición artesanal con las tendencias contemporáneas. Localizados en el corazón de San Isidro, Lima, somos un destino para quienes buscan transformar sus espacios con piezas que combinan elegancia, funcionalidad y respeto por el entorno.

Desde nuestros inicios, nos hemos comprometido con la creación de mobiliario de alta gama, elaborados con materiales naturales y orgánicos, seleccionados cuidadosamente para asegurar calidad, durabilidad y sostenibilidad. Cada una de nuestras piezas es el resultado de una colaboración con diseñadores, arquitectos y artesanos que comparten nuestra visión: crear ambientes que trasciendan lo estético y conecten con los valores de quienes los habitan.

En NUMI, nos inspira la riqueza de los materiales nobles y el proceso de transformación que convierte cada mueble y objeto decorativo en una pieza singular, diseñada para durar y mejorar la vida de nuestros clientes. La artesanía es el alma de nuestro trabajo, reflejada en cada detalle, en cada textura, y en cada línea que compone nuestras colecciones.

Con una presencia sólida en el mercado de diseño interior, NUMI continúa expandiéndose, llevando nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la sostenibilidad a nuevos horizontes. Nuestra promesa es crear experiencias únicas y memorables para cada cliente, transformando espacios en reflejos auténticos de su identidad, con una elegancia que perdura en el tiempo.

Welcome to Reflection Lifestyle – Your Premier Destination for Timeless Furniture Elegance!

Customer-Centric Approach: Your satisfaction is our priority. Our dedicated team is committed to providing exceptional service and assistance throughout your shopping journey.

Name: Azez'ta
Description:
Spécialisés dans l’achat et la revente d'authentiques chaises et fauteuils vintage et tables d’occasion des années 50 à aujourd'hui, nous accompagnons les professionnels et les particuliers dans l’aménagement de leurs espaces.
Basés en Bretagne à Lorient, nous avons ouvert en mai 2022, un concept de boutique-showroom présentant plus de 300 modèles de chaises et fauteuils d’occasion, de tous styles et pour tous les budgets.

Nos points forts : 
* Le choix et la variété (anciennes chaises de bistrot ou de collectivités, chaises design, industrielles ou en bois, pour l’intérieur et l’extérieur) nous permettant de répondre à toute demande et tout type d’activités (CHR, entreprises, professions médicales, associations,…)
* La qualité et les quantités disponibles pour chaque modèle (de 1 à plus de 500 exemplaires) 
* Le conseil en aménagement et notre expertise dans le design de la seconde moitié du XXème siècle
* La vente en lot ou à l’unité & des prix compétitifs 
* La livraison partout en France 

Nous sommes particulièrement heureux et fiers de participer à notre petite échelle à une économie plus environnementale, en privilégiant le seconde main et une autre manière de consommer et de penser ses espaces de vie, d'accueil, de restauration ou de travail.

Pour la plupart, ancien mobilier professionnel des années 50 à 80, nos chaises ont été alors pensées et fabriquées "solides et durables" en Europe ou aux Etats-Unis.

Choisir le seconde main n'est pas seulement un playdoyer, c'est une façon utile et économique de personnaliser ses espaces, de les rendre uniques, d'y mettre du charme, du design et de la qualité, tout en préservant l'environnement.

Name: Enso Homes
Description:
Enso Homes is derived from the Japanese term "enso," which symbolizes the 'circle of togetherness.' Our brand embraces this philosophy, embodying our commitment to fostering a harmonious connection between people and their living spaces. At Enso Homes, we believe that design should go beyond functionality; it should inspire creativity and innovation.

We are deeply dedicated to sustainable living. Our commitment to the environment is reflected in our production practices. By crafting our interior design furniture in limited quantities, we prioritize quality over quantity. Additionally, we actively repurpose leftover raw materials, ensuring minimal waste throughout our manufacturing process. Our eco-conscious approach enables us to create beautiful pieces that are as gentle on the planet as they are on the eye.

Supporting local artisans and labor is another core value at Enso Homes. We recognize the immense talent and craftsmanship present in our communities. By promoting their art on our website and collaborating with them, we aim to uplift and showcase their exceptional skills. Each piece we offer tells a story, a testament to the rich cultural heritage and the skilled hands that brought it to life.

Experience the enchantment of Enso Homes. Immerse yourself in our innovative, sustainable, and culturally significant designs, carefully curated to transform your home into a sanctuary. Discover the perfect balance between functionality, creativity, and elegance, and join us on a journey to create living spaces that nurture the soul.

Name: Sustino Pte Ltd
Description:
Sustino Pte Ltd is a young and diverse business startup, aimed at bringing in Smart and Sustainable Innovations to enable a more robust and carefree environment to your home and workplace. 
 
With the vision of creating a Sustainable Living environment in Singapore, we are focusing our services to include Smart Homes, ElderCare, Safety & Security, and Green Living. 
 
We provide and install products ranging from Smart Technology for CCTV cameras, Sensors, Locks, to unique Sustainable Innovations such as self-powered wireless wall switches to Green Solutions such as Green Walls, Hydroponic Set-ups and Garden Planning, just to name a few. 
 
Most of our products run on an integrated system for easy control over the home and/or workplace. 
 
With the vision of creating Singapore’s adaptation of a Sustainable Home, we aim to one day create an independent home with the capabilities of generating its own electricity, harvest its own water, produce its own food and cycle its own oxygen, amongst the lifestyle attributes of an automated home to cater for the elderly and young generation of inhabitants here.

Welcome to Palm Beach Regency, our little slice of vintage lovers’ paradise. We’re the dot on the map where Hollywood Regency flair meets Old Florida charm. At Palm Beach Regency, we sell vintage furniture and décor with a passion for bringing new life to one-of-a-kind pieces from the past. Our items consistently reflect the best of yesterday and today. For over ten years, Palm Beach Regency has operated an online shop with active sales and shipping across the country and internationally.

We also have a 5,000 sf warehouse showroom and a new 1,200 sf design showroom studio near Palm Beach, Florida. Vintage lovers flock to Palm Beach Regency when on the hunt for faux bamboo, Chinese Chippendale, rattan, wicker, lucite, pagoda, ginger jars, shells, and every detail in between that reflect that carefree andl chic coastal lifestyle. It’s all about the thrill of the hunt… You never know what you’ll find! We get almost 100 new pieces in a week. Come visit us to say hello, ideally once a week. Name: Maestrelli Arredi
Description:
Maestrelli rappresenta un nome emblematico di eccellenza nel panorama delle soluzioni abitative personalizzate, con una storia che affonda le sue radici nel lontano 1960. La nostra missione principale è quella di concepire ambienti che non siano semplicemente luoghi in cui vivere, ma vere e proprie estensioni del tuo stile di vita, calibrate perfettamente sulle tue aspettative e budget disponibili.

Il concetto di "vivere bene" per noi riveste un'importanza fondamentale. Ciò si traduce non solo nella creazione di spazi esteticamente piacevoli e accoglienti, ma anche nell'assicurare che essi siano funzionali e pensati per essere vissuti nella quotidianità. La nostra convinzione è che ogni spazio debba essere progettato con un'attenzione particolare verso le abitudini e le necessità di chi lo abiterà, garantendo una perfetta fusione tra bellezza e praticità.

Il nostro approccio va oltre la mera fornitura di soluzioni abitative personalizzate; ci poniamo come compagni di viaggio in un percorso consultivo, pronto a fornire risposte ai tuoi dubbi e supporto nelle tue preoccupazioni, con l'obiettivo finale di realizzare i tuoi sogni abitativi. La nostra promessa è quella di trasformare le tue visioni in realtà tangibili, operando con una passione incrollabile, dedizione senza pari e una profonda esperienza accumulata in oltre sessant'anni di attività.

Description:
Jaraguá Colchões e Estofados foi fundada em 2020 pelo empresário Marcos Oliveira.
Inicialmente, Marcos começou sua trajetória na carga e descarga em uma empresa do ramo de móveis 
e varejo, ascendendo para vendedor, gerente de vendas e, finalmente, empreendedor. Em dezembro de
2019, Marcos mudou-se para Santa Catarina, onde inaugurou sua primeira empresa.

Em 18 de março de 2020, Marcos realizou seu sonho ao inaugurar a Jaraguá Colchões e Estofados
assumindo todas as funções desde vendas até administração. Seis meses após sua fundação, 
estabeleceu uma parceria crucial com Manoel, o primeiro prestador de serviços da empresa, que hoje
atua como gerente de transporte. A empresa alcançou mais de 3.000 famílias em seu primeiro ano e
superou as expectativas nos anos seguintes, impactando mais de 14.000 famílias de 2021 a 2023. 
Para 2024, a meta é beneficiar 10.000 famílias até 31 de dezembro.

Em 2024, a expansão para o estado de São Paulo adicionou mais de 20 colaboradores diretos e mais de
40 parceiros terceirizados, totalizando mais de 60 pessoas dedicadas ao crescimento da empresa.
Reconhecida como referência no setor de colchões e estofados e agora também inicia seu novo compromisso em ter como missão melhorar vidas, entregar mais do que recebe.

Name: MADRE Linen
Description:
MADRE is a movement. Whether it’s gathering for a meal with cherished friends or tucking yourself into bed, MADRE honors the simple, necessary, and universal delights of food and rest. MADRE is focused on becoming the first “seed to napkin” domestic linen company, by reshoring the domestic flax economy here in Oregon. As a feminist brand, we are committed to celebrating the feminine and disrupting the patriarchy, using our business and the linen products we create to educate and question capitalism, choosing collaboration over competition and regenerative over extractive practices. Please find us at www.madrelinen.com!

May we all eat. 
May we all rest.

MADRE began with the simple premise: to create linen home essentials that are as close to 100% domestic as possible, meaning: grown, processed, woven, and sewn here in the United States. We envision this as “seed to table.” We soon learned that the long-dormant American linen industry is being rebuilt as we speak, and we are eager for its return and honored to be a part of welcoming flax back to Oregon and the PNW, where the majority of it will be grown. 

In this interim period, before Oregon linen is available (target goal is by 2032), MADRE is committed to a transparent supply chain, offering Oeko-Tex certified, Belgian-grown linen that is woven in a Lithuanian mill that runs on green energy. All of our products are sewn domestically. Until Oregon linen is rolling off the looms, each and every MADRE purchase will serve to signal to the farmers, state, and myriad other linen industry stakeholders that the demand for Oregon linen is steadily growing. 

Linen napkins are the foundation of MADRE, and we are proud to be slowly growing a deeper offering of tabletop and kitchen goods, bedding, some apparel, and other select home essentials.

Kesempurnaan hadir ketika keindahan dipadukan dengan efisiensi, begitu juga dengan Kertasive & Monostar yang selalu mengutamakan efisiensi.

Sehingga produk-produk dari PT Tri Kerta Interindo sudah dapat ditemukan di berbagai kota besar, seperti ; Jakarta, Semarang, Bandung, Surabaya, Medan, Bali, Makassar, Balikpapan, Samarinda, Marauke, Pontianak, Lampung dan kota besar lainnya di Indonesia maupun mancanegara seperti Bahrain.

Description:

An atelier of 34 artisans in the Kütahya region of Turkey, 87% of whom are women, carefully handcraft Selin’s innovative designs at each stage of production, resulting in heirloom quality ceramics of old-world perfection. 

Our U.S. operation is located in Houston, TX:  home to our gallery and warehouse. Our gallery is a friendly space to emerging artists and community organizations who help us fill our gallery with conversation, collaboration, and connection. Our team consists of multi-talented individuals who contribute their own set of skills in operations, sales, marketing, event planning and client development; bringing to the table their unique personalities, life experiences, and perspectives to bring SaleenArt to the American market.

Welcome to the world of SaleenArt USA.

Name: Arduini Arredamenti - Verona
Description:
Arduini: Arredamenti“TAILOR MADE”
Mani esperte che confezionano una cucina sartoriale di alta qualità, mani guidate dalla passione, competenti e sapienti del proprio mestiere.
Artigianalità, cura, attenzione e tecnologia sono i valori che hanno reso importante il marchio Arduini da più di 50 anni in un mercato che si è fatto sempre più esigente.
Forte di questa esperienza Arduini è giunto in questi ultimi anni a coinvolgere tutto il suo knowhow e la sua creatività nella realizzazione di un progetto unico nel suo genere.
La cucina su misura, fatta a mano, una ad una, confezionata su misura per voi, un progetto che si arricchisce di elementi distintivi ed unici che sartorialmente lo vestono.

“TAILOR MADE” Arduini consente di interpretare la cucina con diverse tipologie di strutture (dall’agglomerato di particelle lignee al multistrato, passando al legno fino alla cassa in alluminio) scegliendo tutte le ante possibili in tutte le finiture (dal laminato, acrilico lucido ed opaco, laccato opaco o lucido, poro aperto, parapah, vetro, poliestere, legno, acciaio etc).

Voi pensate come volete la vostra cucina e noi pensiamo a realizzarla.

L’ampia componentistica ci permette di superare il concetto che propongono tutti i brand ed i nostri competitor, ossia di dover eseguire per filo e per segno rigorosamente i modelli ed i dettami imposti dai listini stampati. Le nostre cucine sono espressione di grande artigianalità, qualità e tecnica dal ricercato dettaglio e meccanico.
L’offerta Arduini si arricchisce quindi di un esclusivo concetto e di un servizio personalizzato dove il cliente diventa protagonista assoluto delle sue scelte.

Description:
Meubles 2.0 est un magasin de meubles personnalisables à Colmar proposant du mobilier modulable, composable, personnalisable contemporain à prix direct usine.

Les Séjours que nous proposons sont également personnalisables, vous pourrez choisir la teinte ainsi que des tables avec le choix de dimensions, du style des pieds, et du style de bordure pour le plateau.

Les Chambres quant à elles sont déclinées dans de nombreux styles, chambre enfant, chambre adulte, chambre bébé. Des sommiers : tapissiers, cadres à lattes, sommiers électriques TPR. Personnalisable également sur certains modèles avec du sur-mesure ou des choix de coloris pour les sommiers déco.

Et enfin de la décoration, que ce soit des lampadaires, lampes de sol, lampes à poser, lampes de chevets ou, des tableaux, des structures métal design, des miroirs, ou encore, des coussins déco personnalisables avec un choix de coloris, dimensions, motifs et matières.

Quant au prix, étant données que nous travaillons en direct avec les usines, que notre magasin de meubles à Colmar a une surface de 500m2  et que nous n’avons pas d’intermédiaires, Nous pouvons baisser nos marges et faire bénéficier à nos clients, des prix réduits et avantageux toute l’année.

Provvediamo all’emissione di tutti i documenti richiesti specificatamente per ogni destinazione: certificati di origine, certificati di conformità, ecc. Seguiamo tutte le procedure di esportazione, assicurandoci che vengano completate correttamente e nei tempi prescritti. Forniamo un adeguato servizio post-vendita. Name: MEUBLE HOUSE CHR
Description:
Tout a commencé dans un magasin chaleureux à Calais. Deux passionnés du meuble, Ludovic et Marina, accueillaient leurs clients avec une seule idée en tête : trouver ensemble le meuble parfait, celui qui a du style, une histoire, une vraie place dans un intérieur.

Au fil des années, Meuble House a grandi, mais sans jamais perdre son âme. Aujourd’hui, nous sommes une entreprise familiale, indépendante, bien ancrée dans le monde du digital, mais toujours portée par des valeurs humaines : la confiance, la qualité, l’écoute et l’accompagnement.

Nos clients sont bien plus que de simples acheteurs. Ils nous partagent leurs envies, leurs projets, leurs intérieurs. Nous les conseillons avec attention, et co-construisons des ambiances qui leur ressemblent. Chaque commande est une histoire partagée.

Nous créons nos propres collections, livrons partout en France, développons des emballages éco-friendly et offrons une seconde vie aux meubles abîmés. Et surtout, nous formons, soutenons, et faisons grandir nos équipes dans un esprit de respect, de transmission et de passion partagée.

Meuble House, c’est une aventure collective. Avec nos équipes, nos partenaires... et surtout nos clients. Et on a encore de très belles pages à écrire.

Name: Wood Vibes
Description:
At Wood Vibes, we specialize in supplying stylish and durable solid wood furniture to Canadian retailers. Our collection features mid-century modern and rustic designer pieces, including live edge dining tables, console and coffee tables, and statement bar furniture, all designed to make a statement in homes or workspaces with distinct styles and unparalleled quality. We establish strong sourcing partnerships with manufacturers to ensure top-notch craftsmanship and maintain rigorous quality checks at every stage. With our emphasis on artisanal craftsmanship, unique designs, and premium quality materials, we offer a diverse range that meets varied retailer needs.

Our mission is to make designer solid wood furniture accessible to Canadian homes and businesses. We offer highly competitive pricing and the ability to develop tailored products to meet unique requirements, catering to retailers of every scale from boutique to bulk orders without requiring large minimum order quantities. We pride ourselves on swift order processing and streamlined logistics for timely delivery, ensuring quick turnaround times for our retail partners.

Retailers benefit from enhanced product offerings that stand out, leading to increased sales and repeat business. Our unique, handcrafted pieces help build a reputation for quality and sustainability, fostering customer loyalty. 
Whether you're furnishing interiors for design projects, staging homes, or setting up restaurants and cafes, we also provide tailored furniture solutions to help other industry partners bring their vision to life. 

Contact us at LetsTalk@woodvibesstore.ca. We look forward to helping you elevate your retail space with our exceptional solid wood furniture.

Name: HandiFurn
Description:
HANDIFURN is a leading sourcing agency specializing in all types of furniture-related sourcing from India. We understand the challenges faced by businesses in finding the right furniture suppliers that meet their quality, price, and timeline requirements. With our extensive network of trusted manufacturers and suppliers in India, we aim to simplify the sourcing process and help our clients streamline their procurement activities.

Our agency offers comprehensive sourcing solutions tailored to the unique needs of each client. Whether you require commercial furniture for offices, hospitality establishments, or residential projects, we have the expertise to fulfill your requirements. Our vast product range encompasses everything from office chairs, desks, and storage solutions to hotel furniture, outdoor seating, and custom-made designs.

Here are some key services we provide:

1. Supplier Identification and Qualification: We diligently assess suppliers based on their manufacturing capabilities, quality standards, certifications, and track record to ensure they meet your expectations.

2. Product Sourcing and Procurement: Leveraging our extensive network, we locate the most suitable manufacturers and negotiate favorable terms to source furniture products that align with your specifications.

3. Quality Assurance: Our team conducts thorough quality inspections at various stages of production to guarantee that the finished products meet the highest standards of craftsmanship and durability.

4. Logistics and Shipping: We handle the logistics of your furniture shipments, including packaging, labeling, and coordination with freight forwarders, ensuring prompt and hassle-free delivery to your desired location.

5. Project Management: For large-scale projects, we provide dedicated project management support, overseeing the sourcing process from start to finish, and ensuring timely delivery and compliance with your project requirements.

Name: Sleep and Bed  España
Description:
Parte del Grupo Mitsan, Sleep&Bed se ha convertido en una marca de descanso reconocida a nivel mundial, alcanzando 4 continentes y más de 25 países a través de cientos de puntos de venta y tiendas insignia.

Con una impresionante superficie total de producción de 117.000 m² en todas las empresas del grupo, integramos automatización de vanguardia, tecnología roll-pack y principios de producción sostenible, generando incluso nuestra propia energía en nuestra planta dedicada de 25.000 m² para colchones.

Nuestra fortaleza radica en la capacidad de controlar todo el ciclo de producción: desde la fabricación de nuestras propias espumas y fieltros hasta la integración fluida de múltiples instalaciones en la misma zona industrial. Esto nos permite ofrecer productos de descanso de alta calidad con rapidez, eficiencia y una profunda comprensión de las culturas del sueño a nivel mundial.

Para ampliar nuestra presencia internacional, operamos un Centro de Distribución y Operaciones en Alemania, garantizando un servicio rápido y eficiente en todo el continente.

Como pioneros en la industria, Sleep&Bed combina I+D avanzado, colecciones innovadoras y un firme compromiso con la sostenibilidad para dar forma al futuro del descanso en todo el mundo.

 Presencia Global | Excelencia Europea | Soluciones de Sueño Sostenibles

Name: uno form Gent
Description:
In 2021 opende het iconische Deense keuken merk uno form een eerste mono brand keukenstudio in België. Wij werken zowel voor de particuliere markt als voor B2B klanten op project basis. Naast keukens, richten wij ook badkamers en dressings in. In onze showroom in Nazareth kan je de vier uno form collecties komen ontdekken: de Classic, de Copenhagen, de Avantgarde en de Shaker. 

Al sinds 1968, toen Deens designer Arne Munch de Classic keuken tekende, ontwerpt uno form keukens op maat. Munch droomde ervan een keukenklassieker te ontwerpen die - in lijn met de iconische Deense meubelontwerpen van de jaren vijftig - vele generaties zou overleven. Zowel wat betreft vakmanschap, materialen als designidioom. Zonder compromis.

Through the Sónua app, you can personalise your experience — adjusting flame and candle body brightness, scent and scheduling. Scented, Sustainable, Safe, and endlessly soothing, Sónua brings the beauty of real candlelight into the modern world.

Sónua isn’t just a candle — it’s an experience that transforms any space with light, scent, and style.

Name: Modulnova Hong Kong
Description:
Modulnova is a family company that produces kitchen, living, bath and was founded in Prata di Pordenone in 1988 by the initiative of 3 brothers, Dario, Giuseppe and Carlo Presotto.

Modulnova factory is extended over a production area of 15.000 square meters. 130 employees divided into 2 production areas, with a supply chain of specialized workers and suppliers who often work exclusively. 

There is no distinction between functionality and sensory involvement: our mission is improve the quality of life within the space in which we live. 

High customization and Integrated design. We innovate and study new finishes, declining new materials and technologies”.  The furniture becomes an integral part of the architectural project and fits perfectly into the living space. Traditional volumes disappear in favor of stylistic continuity of great harmony.

“Entering a Modulnova kitchen therefore means having access to an alienating yet enveloping dimension like that of a space of the future, squared but not aseptic, rational but accessible, warm, functional and at the same time extremely flexible. Pull-out doors, tactile walls that move silently along invisible tracks, secret pantries to open with a simple touch, hidden sinks magically opened and then disappear under an aluminum roof. Everywhere an obsessive attention to detail, an attention to finishing and to the surprise of the effect, which however never goes to the detriment of functionality”.

Cit. Marina Valensise from the book “Culture is like jam”

Name: Calont Rugs
Description:
Calont provides comprehensive guidance on moving to Canada, and career planning, using channels such as articles, and consultation appointments, to anyone interested to relocate and build a career in Canada.

COVID-19 pandemic is playing a crucial role in shaping career plans, and there is even higher uncertainty of how the future would look like in times to come. In this uncertain time, and also the post-pandemic period, it is unclear what factors would shape career plans. If you are planning to relocate to Canada, it is prudent to gain insights on how you can successfully relocate and build a career in Canada, while mitigating the risks from the pandemic, and executing on best strategies to build a successful career. The need of the hour is to understand and address the effect of COVID-19 on short, mid, and long-term career plans and what does it mean for building a career in Canada. Connected Career Planning will empower you to make better-informed decisions and guide you throughout the journey to build a brighter career.

At the heart of this Connected Career Planning is a belief that your location, your work and passion, health, career, and your life desires are interconnected, and we need to address all these dimensions to build a meaningful and attainable Connected Career Plan.

There are several questions to be addressed when an individual, couple or family considers moving countries. Calont provides relevant information and equips you with tools and enablers, that will help you in the transition, all while answering questions starting from which province in Canada, to how to make it all happen!

Description:
At Key Home Goods, we create functional works of art designed to elevate the daily rituals of cooking and gathering. Founded on a legacy of craftsmanship, inspired by generations of hands-on makers, and rooted in a Texas heritage of integrity and ingenuity, our cutting and charcuterie boards are heirloom pieces built for those who value beauty, purpose, and quality.

Our proprietary houndstooth-patterned end grain cutting boards are a signature of our brand. Engineered with book-matched precision, layered depth, and timeless design sensibility. Every piece is handcrafted in small batches from premium hardwoods. Chosen for their durability, richness, and visual character. 

Whether it’s for a Michelin-minded chef, a high-end gifting client, or the homeowner who believes the kitchen is sacred space, Key Home Goods offers an new breed of kitchen essential.

We serve:
• Discerning Online Shoppers
• Wedding & Corporate Gifting
• Boutique Home & Kitchen Retailers
• Interior Designers & Home Stylists
• Culinary Professionals & Private Chefs
• Hospitality & Bespoke Culinary Spaces

We can’t promise that your meals will taste better, but we can promise that your time in the kitchen will feel richer, more inspired, and more connected. 
And that’s a promise worth keeping.

Let’s connect. We’re always open to collaborating with thoughtful partners who believe that everyday objects should be anything but ordinary.

Name: Kaatz.nl
Description:
Wij zijn Kaatz, dé webshop voor exclusieve vloerkleden en karpetten. Kaatz is een webshop die met zorg voor jou een mooie, stoere maar ook hippe collectie karpetten en vloerkleden samenstelt. Hoge kwaliteit en persoonlijke begeleiding hebben wij hoog in het vaandel. De meeste van onze kleden zijn van Scandinavisch design, maar we hebben ze ook van Hollandse en Spaanse bodem. 
Onze Op onze website is een gevarieerde collectie vloerkleden te zien in verschillende stijlen, maten en materialen. Onze vloerkleden variëren van wol en hoogpolig tot luxe, hippe/kleurrijke, vintage en design vloerkleden. We hebben een uitgebreide collectie voor de woonkamer, slaapkamer andere ruimtes binnen je interieur en zelfs voor de tuin. Ook hebben we vloerkleden geschikt voor kantoren en bedrijven. Een vloerkleed bestellen kan dus privé, maar ook voor je bedrijf hebben we een uitgebreide collectie. Ook als stylist of interieurarchitect ben je bij ons van harte welkom.
Via onze website kun je van onze vloerkleden vrijblijvend een staal bestellen. Tegen 10 euro borg sturen we een staal naar je op, welke je op je gemakje thuis kan bekijken. Na retourneren storten we de borg direct weer terug op je rekening. Ook kijkt onze interieurstyliste Katja graag even met je mee bij het samenstellen van een stalenpakket. Door een mailtje te sturen naar hallo@kaatz.nl of te bellen/appen naar 085-3031145, kan Katja in overleg nog een aantal leuke suggesties aan je stalenpakket toevoegen.
Kom je liever snuffelen tussen alle karpetstalen?! Dat kan natuurlijk ook! Je bent van harte welkom in onze stalenkamer. Hier is ieder karpet in klein formaat (staal) te zien. We hebben een aantal kleden ook op groot formaat liggen. Dus mocht je in de buurt zijn van onze sfeervolle boerderij in Herpt, kom gerust eens langs. Om teleurstellingen te voorkomen, is het wel fijn als je vooraf even belt of mailt, om een afspraak te maken. Dan zorgen wij dat de koffie klaar staat!

Name: ÍNCLITA
Description: Con ínclita se crea una marca de diseño autoproducido tomando como inspiración el patrimonio arquitectónico de las ciudades, actualmente de València. De esta forma poner en valor dicho patrimonio, transmitiendo valores de protección, conservación o educación en patrimonio. Alejándose del concepto de souvenir, de lo kitsch, sin amor por el diseño y sin implicaciones sociales se trabaja en el desarrollo de cada pieza, para crear objetos para regalar o auto-regalarse, para apasionados por el diseño, arte o arquitectura, personas que buscan un recuerdo de calidad de allá donde van o incluso, de su propia ciudad. Con el desarrollo de marca y de significado no se crean únicamente los objetos, también se tiene en cuenta la comunicación y filosofía para lograr un proyecto coherente, joven, tradicional pero contemporáneo con el que ir creciendo día a día.

Name: Casa Cruda
Description:
CASA CRUDA es un estudio de decoración fundado en el 2020 en Montevideo, capital de Uruguay.

En nuestro estudio, cada pieza es pensada, diseñada y creada por artesanos locales o internacionales. Conocemos el origen de nuestros productos y quienes los fabrican. Este es uno de los pilares mas importantes de la empresa.  

Nos basamos en la mezcla de materiales y elementos para lograr colecciones que trasmitan una sensación y poder ir mas allá de ser solo "productos bonitos".

Somos promovedores del slowmade y de la concientización en el consumo.  

En nuestros puntos de venta van a encontrar productos de fibras naturales, hierro, madera, textiles, cerámica y piedras naturales.

Description:
GRUHAM Decor is a handcrafted home and lifestyle brand born from the belief that the spaces we live in should reflect warmth, mindfulness, and the artistry of human hands. Founded by Rajayshvari Jagtap after 18 years in the technical industry, GRUHAM is a heartfelt journey that blends the precision of modern design with the soul of Indian craftsmanship.

The name GRUHAM comes from the Sanskrit word for “home.” It embodies more than a physical space — it represents belonging, care, and harmony. Every GRUHAM creation is a tribute to the values that make a house a home — love, togetherness, and purpose.

At GRUHAM, we design and curate sustainable wooden kitchenware and home décor that bring natural elegance to everyday living. Each product is handcrafted by skilled Indian artisans using responsibly sourced wood, ensuring every piece carries a unique story — one of patience, skill, and soulful artistry.

Description:
Mauj Living was born in 2021 when we were looking to bring in meaningful quality home accents into our home in Ottawa, Canada. We looked for quality embroidered cushion covers that had unique designs with no luck.

Today, we can proudly say that our cushion covers are professionally designed and embroidered with over 30,000 stitches. Using Arabic calligraphy as a form of art and poetry, we look to bring thoughtful art pieces to your home.

Name: Now To Bed
Description:
The ...now to Bed partnership is a visionary and successful way of doing business, boldly putting the happiness of customers at the centre of everything it does. It's the embodiment of an ideal, the outcome of over 40 years of retail experience and endeavours to create a different sort of company, owned by Partners dedicated to serving customers with flair and fairness.

After much thought and deliberation we made a decision to open a Bed Specialist store ourselves, having been in the furniture trade for many years it seemed to make sense.  ‘Now To Bed’ was born in the High Street of Prestatyn, North Wales.  We found premises that gave us some 3000 square feet and we were able to show over 50 beds and 30 mattresses from many High Street brands ie Hypnos, Sealy, Relyon, Healthbeds, Salus, Highgrove, Serene and many more.

We are very much a family run business, with Paul along with his wife Susan, and their youngest son Thomas make up the partners in the business and our daughter Emma is also involved within the store.  We have Welsh speaking staff within our team if you wish to conduct your business in Welsh.

Now to Bed are a bed specialist located across North Wales with stores in Rhyl and Prestatyn. All of our stores are staffed by expert specialists who aim to find the right bed to suit you and your budget.

Our business is growing, thanks to the much appreciated local support within North Wales and the word is spreading that we give exceptional service and have a very friendly and approachable attitude towards all our customers.  You will get the same great service from us whether you are spending £89 on a headboard or over £5000 on a divan set.

With over 40 years experience of selling beds, we have enough knowledge of the trade that we can advise and help our customers make the right choice, it’s so easy to make the wrong decision when buying a bed.

Name: Maison Tergus
Description:
Maison Tergus est née en 1995, au cœur des Volcans d’Auvergne, à Billom (63). Année après année, elle s’est imposée comme une référence dans le domaine du cuir de décoration, portée par une vision forte : celle d’un artisanat de qualité, au service du beau et du durable.

En 2021, un tournant s’est opéré. La fondatrice part à la retraite, et ce sont ceux qui faisaient battre le cœur de l’atelier depuis des années qui décident de reprendre le flambeau.
Marie-Laure et Rodolphe, salariés depuis respectivement 10 et 15 ans, choisissent de racheter l’entreprise, avec une idée claire : re-localiser la fabrication en Auvergne, dans notre région qu’on aime tant, et repenser chaque étape dans une logique artisanale, responsable et engagée.

Depuis, nous réalisons du fait maison, à la main, et avec le cœur.
Nous utilisons des matières naturelles issues du recyclage — principalement des cuirs provenant des déchets de l’agroalimentaire — pour leur offrir une seconde vie pleine de sens. Chaque pièce est pensée pour durer, pour vous accompagner, et pour s’inscrire dans une démarche éthique, respectueuse de l’environnement comme des savoir-faire.

Chez Maison Tergus, nous ne suivons pas une tendance : nous suivons nos convictions.

Name: Natuzzi Italia KSA
Description:
Founded in 1959 by Pasquale Natuzzi, Natuzzi is one of the world’s leading players in the production and distribution of design and luxury furniture. Natuzzi products are the embodiment of Italian design and craftmanship, expressing the “Made in Italy” tradition at its best.
With a global retail network of 678 mono-brand stores and 456 galleries, Natuzzi distributes its collections worldwide. Natuzzi represents a unique production reality with its supply chain covering the entire process. Production takes place in the Italian hub and in the Natuzzi factories in China, Brazil and Romania.
The Natuzzi company DNA flows into two brands that embody Natuzzi's core values: Natuzzi Italia and Natuzzi Editions. Natuzzi Italia is rooted in the Mediterranean lifestyle to design harmonious spaces through a collection of made in Italy luxury furniture. Natuzzi Editions comprises collections that satisfy any need of versatility thanks to high-quality options and comfort. Alongside Natuzzi Editions is Divani&Divani by Natuzzi, the Italian chain of franchising stores specialized in sofas, armchairs and accessories created in 1990.

Each element of the kitchens we design receives the same level of attention to detail and personal care. We’re not just a kitchen company, everything we do is inspired by a full understanding of your needs and we look forward to the end result as much as you do!

Ao longo dos anos, desenvolveu projetos digitais, conteúdos e produtos voltados a alta performance, saúde, mindset e tecnologia, sempre com foco em aplicação real no dia a dia.
