Willkommen bei Marquardt Küchen in Mannheim und Karlsruhe. 

Als Franchisepartner mit den beiden Standorten in Mannheim und Karlsruhe setzt die Familie Wörner das bewährte Marquardt Erfolgskonzept seit Jahren erfolgreich um. Die „Wörner Küchenstudios“ in Mannheim und Karlsruhe – Ihre persönlichen Adressen für Traumküchen in der Region. An nahezu 40 Standorten in ganz Deutschland und das eigene Granitwerk stehen für hochwertige Küchenplanung, perfekte Verbindung von Ästhetik, Funktionalität und Preisvorteilen. In der Südweststadt von Karlsruhe, an der Kriegsstraße 296, erwartet Sie unser modernes Küchenstudio auf über 400 qm² Ausstellungsfläche. Oder besuchen Sie das  Küchenstudio in Mannheim mit über 500m² unweit der SAP Arena in der Casterfeldstraße 86.

Wir präsentieren  Ihnen eine beeindruckende Auswahl an Fronten, Küchentechnik deutscher Markenhersteller, sowie über 75 verschiedene Granitsorten, die Ihnen helfen, Ihre persönliche Traumküche zu verwirklichen. Wir nehmen uns gerne Zeit für Sie um Ihre Vorstellungen zu erfahren und umzusetzen.

Ganz neu und exklusiv nur bei Wörner Küchenstudios in Mannheim und Karlsruhe:  Entdecken Sie unsere innovativen Lösungen für Ihr Zuhause oder die Geschäftsräume – individuell angefertigten Holztische, Naturewalls, stilvolle Wohnwände.

Für mehr Informationen und Inspiration folgt uns auch auf Instagram oder Facebook. @woernerkuechenstudios

Besuchen Sie uns in Karlsruhe oder Mannheim und erleben Sie die perfekte
Symbiose aus traditionellem Familienunternehmen und der innovativen Welt von

Name: In Casa by Paboy
Description:
A small homeware social enterprise based in Naples, Italy, founded by craftsman and designer Paboy Bojang during the pandemic lockdown in Spring 2020.

Bojang, originally from the Gambia and currently seeking asylum in Italy, hand-sews bright sweet wrapper coloured cushion covers by hand from 100% cotton, which he sources from local suppliers in his neighbourhood in the historic centre of Naples.

The beautiful designs and brand story quickly garnered international attention from publications such as House and Garden, Elle, Forbes etc. after an exclusive first interview with British Vogue.

We werken samen met hoogsegment leveranciers om vloeren op maat te creëren die hun unieke stijl weerspiegelen, van traditionele tegels tot moderne parketvloeren. Elke vloer wordt met zorg en aandacht voor detail gemaakt, zodat uw vloeren met vakmanschap worden geïnstalleerd.

Ons bedrijf voorziet huiseigenaren al sinds 2013 van de hoogste kwaliteit vloeren in Nederland. Met meer dan 10 jaar ervaring in deze branche hebben we een diepgaand begrip ontwikkeld van hoe we onze klanten de best mogelijke ervaring kunnen bieden als het gaat om kiezen voor nieuwe vloeropties. We weten hoe we een gepersonaliseerde winkelervaring kunnen creëren die is afgestemd op uw behoeften, zodat u precies kunt vinden wat het beste bij uw huis past, zonder dat u zich zorgen hoeft te maken over iets anders!

Name: BuyDo
Description:
BuyDo is a next generation e-commerce platform for luxury home textiles, making high quality everyday essentials more accessible, transparent, and fairly priced. We connect trusted mills and manufacturers with private customers worldwide through a streamlined, tech driven supply chain.

Our collections focus on textiles for every room at home:
• Bedroom: sheets, duvet covers, pillowcases, protectors
• Bathroom: towels, bath sheets, bathrobes, bath mats
• Kitchen and dining: tablecloths, runners, napkins, kitchen and tea towels

Beyond selling products, we specialize in sourcing, aggregating, and moving textile inventory efficiently from multiple suppliers to a single, reliable destination. This allows us to offer consistent quality, modern designs, and clear information about what you buy and where it comes from. As we grow, we are building partnerships with mills, logistics providers, and brands that share our vision of smarter, more efficient global home textile supply.

Description:
A Realizart Design é uma loja de móveis planejados e decoração com mais de 15 anos de existência, na cidade de Campos dos Goytacazes/RJ. 

São mais de 5.000 projetos executados de forma personalizada. 

Nós construímos também imóveis, através da Realizart Construtora, e entregamos prontos para morar com todos os móveis, adornos, papel de parede, colchões, box, persianas, cortinas de tecido sob medida, tapetes, quadros etc.

Entendemos que tudo é sobre Pessoas e as conexões genuínas que criamos e cultivamos com elas. Por isso, nossa empresa tem alta taxa de fidelização de clientes.

Nossa missão é transformar sonhos em realidade por meio de móveis planejados e decoração personalizada, unindo design, funcionalidade, estilo e inovação à identidade de cada cliente.

Temos como visão ser referência nacional em ambientes personalizados, reconhecida pela excelência em design, inovação e atendimento, inspirando lares e estilos de vida únicos.

Os valores que acreditamos e praticamos são: personalização, excelência, inovação, comprometimento, empatia, sustentabilidade e estilo com propósito.

Central to the MINOTTI identity is the full expression of the “Made in Italy” concept, which today permanently melds tradition and innovation: the skills of talented artisan are employed to finish a product created by modern technologies, while the intelligence of the hands balances industrial precision with sensitivity and emotion. This high degree of know-how is constantly improved by the intensive research on materials and technological solutions thus enhancing the value of impeccable details. Name: Home Living AS
Description:
LivingOutlet.no er en Norsk nettbutikk bestående av en stolt gjeng som har over 24 års bransjeerfaring. 

Vi har lidenskap for design, møbler, senger og god søvn. Vi ønsker å tilby kundene våre de beste produktene til de råeste prisene direkte fra fabrikk uten fordyrende mellomledd.
Lagrene våre er lokalisert på Vøyenenga i Bærum og Lillestrøm like utenfor Oslo. Vi har et stort utvalg av møbler og senger.

Av erfaring så ser vi at jo større du er jo mer kostbart blir det å drifte. Vi har ikke store hovedkontor med en topptung kjedeledelse, med mange store dyre varehus som skal betales på, som igjen gjør at de må ha høyere pris møblene sine. Noe vi i LivingOutlet.no ikke trenger. Lave kostnader hos oss betyr lavest pris til deg som kunde.
Vi jobber hardt for å sikre at kundene våre får den beste kundeopplevelsen når de handler hos oss. Vi tilbyr rask og pålitelig frakt, og har brukervennlig nettbutikk som gjør det enkelt å finne de produktene du leter etter.

Name: Alber's Fireplaces
Description:
Whether you are planning a new home or addition or just need to remodel an existing fireplace, we can help you every step of the way. Visit our clean & modern showroom to see over 100 burning displays and full fireplace vignettes to get your design ideas flowing. We offer in-home visits and design assistance as well as a wealth of partner companies that can bring your project to completion.

We update & upgrade existing fireplaces. Refacing old brick walls and adding mantels & glass doors is a specialty. Looking for unusual materials and ideas, contact us and we will work with all your ideas.

Planning to add a fire feature to your deck or patio? We have all sizes, different styles and all the popular finishes to choose from. Use our experienced and licensed installation partners to finish the project and enjoy years of ambiance & fun. 

Not sure where to start your outdoor kitchen project? We will work thru the clutter, come up with a layout and budget plan that fit's you cooking style and property size. We offer everything from a standard 5' island to a fully custom entertainment oasis depending on your needs and desires. 

Building a new home or addition? We will work with your architect, builder and designer to plan ahead and include the best solutions into your plans. We have custom solutions for modular masonry fireplaces or bathroom sized specialty units for any area of your home.

Concerned about your carbon footprint? We have alternative biofuel solutions, good old wood burning (CO2 neutral) and a plethora of electric solutions that will give your the ambiance of a fireplace without the hassle and no fossil fuels. 

We specialize in commercial and hospitality projects. Our staff has been working on amenity areas in apartment buildings, hotels, stadiums and health care settings and we can offer custom solutions and experience for your project.

Wie zijn wij

Whether you love the charm of rustic style, the clean lines of contemporary design, or the timeless elegance of modern interiors, our team of experienced designers will help you create the perfect space for you.

Over 20 years of experience

For more than two decades, Jean Jacques Soenen has been at the helm of Marcotte Style. He has earned a reputation for his attention to detail and his passion for creating beautiful interiors. Whether it's a complete or partial renovation, from villas and apartments to restaurants, hotels, and embassies, our team is up for any challenge.

Custom-made at the highest level

Thanks to our close collaboration with a high-tech joinery and furniture factory, we can offer you high-quality custom-made furniture at competitive prices. We work with the best materials and use the latest techniques to create furniture and interior elements that perfectly match your wishes and needs.

Your dream interior, anywhere in the world

We proudly provide our services throughout Belgium, the Netherlands, France, and Germany. For larger, exclusive projects, we are happy to travel the world to realize your dream interior, wherever you are.

Discover the Marcotte Style difference

Contact us today for a free consultation. We will be happy to discuss your wishes and the possibilities of making your dream interior a reality.

We exist to create spectacular luxury spaces in the subcontinent, we lead with ETERNAL AND INNOGSTIVE DESIGN, AESTHETIC SENSE, CRAFTSMANSHIP AND QUALITY.

Interior Architecture as Service.

SUITE offers Interior Architecture Consulting and Space planning solutions, which are always individually tailored to meet each client’s individual brief, unique style and budget. This includes encompassing the design conceptualization from the basic structural anatomy of the building to defining and detailing the space, from crafting ceilings and floorings to architectural and decorative lighting solutions, from design of walls to selecting the colour symphony of entire rooms; thus creating articulate interiors for opulent homes. Our creative and dynamic design team works with obsessive attention to detail in every aspect of design.

Design & Build

SUITE applies itself to create bespoke interiors for their clients, from bare walls down to the last accessory with intricate detailing. This rare ability to design luxury interior spaces meticulously and build the same with complete precision is our forte at SUITE.

Name: ComfortableatHome
Description:
Ben je op zoek naar een échte sfeermaker voor je woonkamer, keuken, balkon of terras? Bij Comfortable at Home vinden we dat elke woning een sfeervolle haard verdiend. Want een haard zorgt niet alleen voor een prachtige sfeer maar ook voor extra comfort.

Elektrische haarden zijn er in allerlei afmetingen, stijlen en prijzen. Wij maken onze eigen designs, integreren de nieuwste technieken en begeleiden de productie van A-Z. De elektrische haarden van Comfortable at Home zijn te koop via deze webshop, via gespecialiseerde haardencentra en via bol.com.

Er zijn verschillende soorten Elektrische haarden. Hoe je een keuze maakt is vooral kiezen wat je mooi vindt en kiezen welke afmeting je kwijt kunt. Wil je een panoramahaard waar het vuur ook vanaf de zijkant te zien is? Of liever een fronthaard met alleen aan de voorzijde vlammen? 

Al onze haarden zijn voorzien van een realistisch vuurbeeld. Dit vergt een complexe techniek. Wij hebben ons in deze techniek verdiept en houden de ontwikkelingen op de voet bij. Daarom zijn wij er ook trots op om te kunnen melden dat wij regelmatig een nieuwe sfeerhaard introduceren.

Ook voor een buitenhaard kan je bij ons terecht. De tuin is een geliefde plek om tijd door te brengen. In de zomer maar ook steeds vaker in het voor-en najaar en zelfs in de winter. Om een perfecte tijd door te brengen komt er vaak een overkapping of veranda in de tuin met daarin comfortabele meubels en een buitenkeuken. Daar hoort natuurlijk een sfeerhaard voor buiten bij. Want niets is zo sfeerverhogend als een gezellig vuurtje. En de elektrische buitenhaarden van Comfortable at Home geven gegarandeerd deze verhoogde sfeer onder je overkapping. 

Ben je nieuwsgierig geworden naar de elektrische haarden van Comfortable at Home? Bekijk via de website ons voorraad assortiment of bezoek een van onze verkooppunten. Heb je speciale wensen of afmeting voor ogen? Stuur ons een mail met je droomhaard en wij nemen contact met je op.

Name: MegaSklep365.pl
Description:
MegaSklep365 – Meble i AGD do nieruchomości na wynajem, hosteli, pensjonatów, kwater pracowniczych.

MegaSklep365 to sklep internetowy oferujący meble i wyposażenie do nieruchomości na wynajem. Znajdziesz u nas łóżka, materace, szafy, aneksy kuchenne, biurka i regały, które idealnie sprawdzą się w hostelach, pensjonatach, kwaterach pracowniczych i mieszkaniach na wynajem.

Nasza oferta obejmuje:
 Łóżka z materacami – dostępne w różnych rozmiarach, solidne i wygodne, idealne do intensywnego użytkowania.
 Szafy, regały, biurka – funkcjonalne meble, które ułatwiają organizację przestrzeni w wynajmowanych nieruchomościach.
 Aneksy kuchenne – praktyczne zestawy kuchenne do mieszkań na wynajem i apartamentów.
 Szafki nocne, półki i dodatki – elementy uzupełniające, które podnoszą komfort najemców.

Dlaczego warto wybrać MegaSklep365?
 Szybka dostawa – wiemy, jak ważny jest czas, dlatego zapewniamy sprawną realizację zamówień.
 Trwałe i funkcjonalne meble – odporne na intensywne użytkowanie w wynajmowanych nieruchomościach.
 Atrakcyjne ceny – korzystne rozwiązania dla właścicieli obiektów na wynajem.
 Personalizacja – możliwość dopasowania mebli do indywidualnych potrzeb.

Dla kogo?
 Właścicieli mieszkań na wynajem – gotowe wyposażenie do wynajmu krótko- i długoterminowego.
 Hosteli i pensjonatów – wytrzymałe meble do intensywnie użytkowanych przestrzeni.
 Kwater pracowniczych – solidne i praktyczne rozwiązania w atrakcyjnych cenach.

Zadbaj o komfort swoich najemców i wyposaż swoje nieruchomości w trwałe meble!

Description:
Metalore is a registered furniture store that started in 2019, based in the bustling city of Karachi. Since its inception, Metalore has been dedicated to providing high-quality home and office furnishing products to its customers at affordable prices. The store has quickly become a household name, known for its reliable services and excellent customer support.
One of Metalore's unique features is its ability to take customized orders through its online store. Customers can choose from a range of designs, materials, and finishes to create bespoke pieces that match their unique preferences. This has made Metalore a favorite among customers who are looking for furniture that is both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
Apart from providing customized orders, Metalore has also worked on government and private projects for the mass production of furniture. This has allowed the store to showcase its capabilities and expertise in the field of furniture manufacturing. As a result, Metalore has become a trusted name in the industry, known for its precision and attention to detail.
In 2021, Metalore expanded its reach by starting nationwide delivery of its ready-to-assemble furniture in flat-packed form. This has made it easier for customers outside of Karachi to access Metalore's products and has increased the store's popularity across the country.
All of Metalore's furniture pieces are manufactured in-house, using high-quality materials and state-of-the-art equipment. This ensures that each product is of the highest quality and meets the store's strict quality standards.

La storia del gruppo mobiltre comincia a metà degli anni ’60, quando la famiglia Isacchini riuscì a interpretare correttamente l’esigenza del pubblico di avere uno showroom di prodotti di design per la casa. Da allora sono stati fatti grandi passi avanti, con l’apertura di un secondo showroom e un team di quasi 30 persone. 

La nostra filosofia si basa sul concetto di design democratico: in un periodo in cui tutto risulta frenetico e il tempo per se stessi è una rarità, mobiltre propone ai propri clienti soluzioni ideali per trascorrere il tempo libero nella propria casa con il massimo comfort e ad un prezzo accessibile a tutte le tasche. Nel tempo l' azienda ha saputo diversificare la propria offerta ampliandola poi alla vendita dei materiali edili, utensili, ferramenta e finiture, rivolgendosi a privati, professionisti ed imprese garantendo un servizio a 360°, dalla fornitura dei materiali edili all’arredamento indoor e outdoor.

Vibroedil vanta uno Showroom di arredamento indoor e outdoor di 2000 mq e un ampio magazzino edile presso Castelbellino (AN), una filiale commerciale a Roma, punti vendita di "ferramenta e materiali edili" a Senigallia e a Roma.

Name: La-Z-Boy ME
Description:
La-Z-Boy was founded in 1927 by American cousins, Edward M Knabusch and Edwin J Shoemaker, who invented the first recliner in 1928. A comfortable concept, the folding wood-slat porch chair followed the contour of a person's body, both sitting and leaning back. Using orange crates to mock-up and refine their idea, the partners invented the reclining mechanism that would sweep the world off its feet. 

The chairs were an instant hit - but needed a name. Combining promotion with necessity, the partners held a contest and turned down suggestions including Sit-n-Snooze, Slack-Back and Comfort Carrier before choosing La-Z-Boy as the clear winner. 

Over the subsequent decades, La-Z-Boy's product line has grown to include a myriad of pieces and styles, making it the world's best-selling recliner, while maintaining our commitment to preserving our environment and enhancing the lives of our people. 

Being a great employer isn’t limited to our sustainability or record-breaking safety performance; it also means being a good corporate citizen. We’re proud of our 13,000+ passionate, valued team members, who are core to transforming the power of comfort around the world every day.

Name: pro-wino.pl
Description:
Wino to "poezja w butelce", dlatego powinno być pite z przyjemnością i przechowywane z należytą starannością. Z tego powodu ze szczególną przyjemnością prezentujemy starannie wyselekcjonowane produkty do piwniczek winnych i związane z winem, które Cię zachwycą. Przywiązujemy dużą wagę do wyjątkowej jakości produktów w połączeniu z doskonałą obsługą.

Zgodnie z naszą maksymą " Dla wina to, co najlepsze", nieustannie poszukujemy nowych i innowacyjnych rozwiązań, aby oferować naszym klientom w Niemczech i innych krajach europejskich wysokiej jakości stojaki na wino i stylowe akcesoria do wina.

Fascynujący świat przechowywania wina... można odkryć w naszym sklepie internetowym www.pro-wino.pl

Szeroki wybór regałów na wino: Tutaj można znaleźć różne regały na wino wykonane z różnych tworzyw, takich jak drewno, metal, tworzywo sztuczne lub kamień - w zależności od tego, co jest najlepsze dla danej piwniczki. Spektrum sięga od standardowych systemów z prostymi podstawowymi półkami po oryginalne elementy projektu i indywidualne, wysokiej jakości produkty na zamówienie.

Wszystko dla idealnej temperatury wina: Nie zaniedbujemy również ważnej kwestii klimatyzacji: w zależności od wymagań możemy dostarczyć chłodziarki do wina i szafy do regulacji temperatury oraz oczywiście klimatyzatory do wina. Z przyjemnością pomożemy w instalacji.

Wszechstronne i praktyczne akcesoria do wina: Czym byłaby piwniczka na wino bez odpowiednich akcesoriów? Korkociągi, karafki, chłodziarki do butelek, meble do wina lub kieliszki - na pewno znajdzie się coś pięknego lub przydatnego!

Spełniamy marzenia o indywidualnej piwniczce na wino lub przeszklonej, chłodzonej szafie na wino w domu lub firmie - dostosowanej dokładnie do potrzeb klienta. Oprócz wysokiej jakości prywatnych pomieszczeń na wino, projektujemy również atrakcyjne rozwiązania dla winiarni, winotek, sklepów z winami, restauracji i hoteli.

inredning, drapering och gardiner, montage uppdrag av alla de slag går under vår stege, med vana certifierade montörer där inget är omöjligt. Transport av produkter bokar även du genom oss.

-Projektledning
Vi erbjuder även återbrukstjänst och kringtjänster i olika kategorier tex. i samband med flytt, projekt med rensning av företags lokaler.
- Inventeringstjänst: för ditt företag med tjänsten som sparar dig tid och energi och ni får en samlad bild över inventarierna. Mycket uppskattad tjänst hos våra större kundföretag.

EXIN hållbara sedan 1980 och 
ditt företags helhetslösning!
Välkommen till oss!

Description:
The Lazy Stylist was founded by Courtney Freeman, an interior stylist and product designer based in Sydney Australia. With a vision to offer exclusive and design-driven furniture that embodies the essence of modern living, Courtney established TLS to cater to the discerning tastes of design enthusiasts. Drawing inspiration from a combination of mindfulness, innovative design, and minimalist interiors, Courtney's design language is a perfect blend of sophistication and fun.

Our name, The Lazy Stylist, is a nod to the benefits of slowing down and taking time to appreciate the beauty of simplicity. We believe that there is immense value in taking a break from the fast-paced world we live in, and our furniture is designed to help you do just that. 

We manufacture our furniture in small quantities, ensuring that every item receives the utmost care and attention. By focusing on small-scale production, we prioritise the art of craftsmanship and maintain a level of exclusivity that allows us to create truly exceptional pieces.

Our commitment to slow interiors means that we take the time to create furniture that is made to age gracefully. We believe that furniture should be an investment, both in terms of quality and longevity. By using premium materials and employing skilled artisans, we ensure that each piece is built to withstand the test of time, becoming a cherished part of your home for years to come.

Nepriklausomai nuo Jūsų stiliaus ir turimos sąmatos, paverskite savo namus vieta, atspindinčia Jūsų asmenybę!

Mūsų asortimentas yra nuolat atnaujinamas. Sekame naujausias baldų mados tendencijas bei skubame jas pasiūlyti savo klientams.

Mūsų ekspozicijų plotai tiek Vilniuje, tiek Kauno LEZ yra po 5000 m². Čia eksponuojama plati modelių ir spalvų įvairovė. Turite galimybę gyvai apžiūrėti ir įvertinti Jus dominančius baldus bei sulaukti profesionalios konsultacijos. Maloniai nustebins žemos baldų kainos!

Didžioji dalis baldų yra sandėliuojami Vilniaus ir Kauno sandėliuose, todėl pirkinį galite atsiimti tą pačią darbo dieną arba pasirinkti greitą kurjerių paslaugą. Kam laukti ilgai, jei galite savo pirkiniu namuose džiaugtis jau šiandien?!

Consequently, if you don’t fall in love with your custom furniture we continue working until you do.  

We Also Offer Imported Furniture

Our production partners overseas provide us with discounted high-end furniture for every room and style.  We’re excited to offer farmhouse, modern, contemporary, industrial, traditional, mid-century, Scandinavian, and rustic furniture styles.  We also carry the most popular bedroom, dining, kitchen, office, outdoor, entryway, garage, and family room furniture!

Your purchase helps support families of tradeswomen and men in every region throughout the United States.  The Hawkins Woodshop team of American carpenters are passionate about creating handcrafted, made-to-order, real, solid-hardwood furniture for homes and businesses throughout every region in the continental US.  Your needs are unique.  Don’t settle for poor quality furniture or corporate customer service.   Something as important as home and office furniture which you’ll see and use every day should be safe, sustainably and locally made, and exactly the dimensions, style, design, and color scheme you need.

Name: Stressless Store Paris
Description:
50 ans de … Savoir faire
Stressless met l’expérience et les connaissances de ses ingénieurs au service du confort depuis 1971.
L’histoire de Stressless débute sur la côte ouest de la Norvège, dans un petit village de Sykkylven.
C’est ici que le fauteuil probablement le plus confortable au monde a été conçu il y des générations et c’est encore le cas aujourd’hui
Stressless connaît un développement rapide. Cinquante ans plus tard le plus grand exportateur de mobilier du pays est encore au bord du même fjord.
NOTRE VISION DU CONFORT
L’étude de la posture du corps humain combinée à de nombreuses innovations technologiques brevetées ont permis de concevoir des fauteuils au confort exceptionnel. Chaque modèle est fabriqué par des artisans qualifiés pendant que des robots de pointe gèrent les tâches répétitives et Complexes avec une grande précision.
Chez Stressless, nous fabriquons des produits de qualité conçus pour durer. Les matières premières utilisés sont sélectionnées avec le plus grand soin pour créer du mobiliers résistant et durable tout en réduisant l’impact environnemental, nous concentrant sur du mobilier intemporel iconiques au design indémodable.
Nous nous assurons d’être au niveau des normes les plus élevées. Tout ce qui permet d’optimiser la qualité et réduire en même temps l’énergie, le temps et le gaspillage est un pas de plus vers la création de produits durables.
L’ACCOMPAGNEMENT STRESSLESS :
Vous avez des demandes particulières ou atypiques ? Nous sommes là pour y répondre, chez Stressless nous avons fait du sur-mesure une norme au quotidien. Alors n’attendez plus, commencez à créer le projet de vos rêves ! Nos équipes se mobilisent pour accompagner les architectes, décorateurs, space-planners, agenceurs, prescripteurs et entreprises dans leur projet d’aménagement de bureaux, espaces de coworking, salles de réunion, espaces d’accueil, hôtels, restaurants…
Pour vos différents projets d’aménagements quelle que soit leurs importances.

Description:
Multicocinas nace en 1968 bajo la dirección de Ángel Santos, con la idea de poner a disposición del público salmantino de un concepto de cocina funcional y adaptable tanto a las necesidades de la cocinas de entonces como de las posibilidades económicas de sus clientes.

Con el pasar de los años, la idea de las cocinas ha ido evolucionando a crear espacios más habitables, más acogedores, siempre sin perder la idea de la funcionalidad. Para ello, Multicocinas, ahora bajo la dirección de Norberto Santos (hijo del fundador de la empresa), creó su propio Departamento de Diseño de Cocinas. Con la creación de este Departamento, Multicocinas quiere poner a disposición de los clientes un equipo humano que analice las necesidades del cliente y las posibilidades potenciales de su cocina para que a un precio muy competitivo podamos ofrecerle la cocina que mejor se adapte y que optimice espacios y recursos.
Creamos cocinas acogedoras y funcionales. Una estancia más de la casa en la que te va a apetecer hacer vida.

Name: DINKIDS
Description:
DINKIDS makes kids rooms and provides best kids furniture of high quality for the clients. We make rooms which can grow with kids! 
DINKIDS is the exclusive distributor of kids furniture brands made in Europe, such as PAIDI.
 
PAIDI, kids furniture brand from Germany, recognized as a "brand of the century" for its high quality, now is available in Dubai: transformable kids beds and bunk beds, play beds with sport and play elements, adjustable kids desk and ergonomic chairs, comfortable wardrobes and chests, play tables - we provide any furniture for kids from toddlers to teenagers. 

The secret of PAIDI furniture is that it can be used for 10 or more years "growing" together with your kids because it is easy to adopt it to needs and interests of kids at any stage of growth. For example, a low kids bed for a 3 year kid can easily become a high bed after some years, or even a bunk bed when the next kid is coming. This bunk bed further can be split into two low sofas for teenagers. It means that the parents can save by buying kids furniture "once in childhood" or use it for younger kids as well. Even for their grandkids) PAIDI furniture can live a long life!  

PAIDI makes high quality kids furniture, which can be assembled and disassembled many times. It has 5 years guarantee.    

The PAIDI kids furniture is made of solid wood and composite with low or 0 emission. It has a lot of European certificates of quality which confirm that it is absolutely safe for kids.

PAIDI kids furniture can be ordered at DINKIDS Instagram page. Follow us in social media to get best offers! Join DINKIDS club and enjoy best quality furniture!

Name: Atlas Showroom
Description:
Established in 2014 by the visionary entrepreneur, Wafah Jehou, Atlas Showroom stands as a beacon of excellence in the realm of hand-crafted, vintage, and antique treasures, proudly nestled in the vibrant heart of New York, USA.
Our curated collection is a testament to the artistry of bygone eras, spanning diverse periods and artisanal traditions. We hold a particular reverence for contemporary, mid-century modern, art deco, and Moroccan design, while also cherishing century-old European and American gems. Within our hallowed halls, you'll discover an opulent array of fine furniture, opulent lighting fixtures, meticulously crafted period accessories, and original works of fine art - all readily available for your discerning eye.
At Atlas Showroom, we are staunch advocates of the unique and the bespoke. Our custom furniture and lighting creations are crafted with unrivaled precision, tailored to your individual preferences.
With a global clientele that spans the far reaches of the world, Atlas Showroom has become the trusted design resource for illustrious architecture firms, renowned interior designers, and even celebrated personalities. Our pieces transcend mere furnishings; they transform spaces into captivating narratives, gracing both luxurious residences and upscale commercial establishments, from high-end retail spaces to lavish hospitality venues.
We pride ourselves on our multilingual capabilities, offering services in English, French, Arabic and Spanish.

Name: HQ Workspaces
Description:
At HQ Workspaces, formerly Modular Office Environments, we redefine productivity and workplace aesthetics by crafting innovative and flexible office solutions that inspire creativity and collaboration. With nearly 30 years of industry experience, we are a leading provider of modern office furniture and interior design services.

Our mission is to transform traditional workspaces into dynamic environments that promote employee well-being and elevate organizational performance. We believe that a well-designed office can influence employee morale, productivity, and overall company success.

Why Choose Us?

Tailored Solutions: We understand that every business is unique. Our team of skilled designers collaborates closely with clients to create bespoke office layouts that align with their brand identity and functional requirements.

High-Quality Products: Our extensive range of office furniture features top-notch materials, ergonomic designs, and cutting-edge technology. From sleek desks and ergonomic chairs to modular storage solutions, we offer products that prioritize both style and comfort.

Space Optimization: Whether it's a compact startup or a sprawling enterprise, we excel in optimizing office space utilization. Our space-saving solutions help you make the most of your available square footage, enhancing workflow efficiency.

Timely Delivery & Support: We pride ourselves on meeting deadlines and providing exceptional customer support. Our dedicated team ensures a seamless experience from initial consultation to installation.

Industries We Serve:

Corporate Offices: Boost your team's productivity and foster a culture of innovation with our contemporary office solutions.

Co-working Spaces: Create a dynamic and inspiring co-working environment that attracts freelancers, startups, and remote workers.

Healthcare Facilities: Craft ergonomic and comforting spaces for medical professionals and patients to improve overall well-being.

Education and Government

Da Calosso il classico e il moderno trovano un punto d’incontro e il tempo sposa il gusto. Calosso propone da sempre nuove ed interessanti idee per arredare o rinnovare la vostra casa. Nello spazio espositivo di Saluzzo troverete la soluzione che risponde alla vostra esigenza.

Lo staff Calosso si compone di architetti, progettisti e montatori professionali, competenti e preparati che rispondono a tutti i vostri dubbi e che risolvono tutti i vostri problemi.

Non solo durante la fase della scelta, ma anche e soprattutto dopo. La grande attenzione che Calosso dedica ai particolari, unita alla qualità, contraddistinguono l’attività di famiglia da oltre 100 anni: la scelta ideale per la vostra abitazione.

Name: Maison Tropez
Description:
MAISON TROPEZ - Dutch company of home accessories. 

Founded in 2023, Maison Tropez is committed to a timeless mission: to create a home away from home where you can revel in vacation luxury with the elegant and inviting flair of the Rivièra. We welcome you into a setting where comfort, authenticity and flair converge so you can experience the carefree elegance of a Rivièra holiday, down to the smallest decorative details. Whether its our home fragrances inspired by the Mediterranean sea or artistic ornaments exuding Rivièra charm, Maison Tropez offers you a lifestyle where your home becomes an extension of the timeless allure of the Rivièra. Welcome to our eternal Rivièra retreat, where flair resides not only in our spaces, but also in your own home accessories.

Name: Homy Casa
Description:
Homy Casa is a global home furnishing brand committed to offering stylish, functional, and affordable furniture for modern living. Our designs combine minimalist aesthetics with vibrant colors, creating accessible luxury for every lifestyle.

We serve customers through a seamless online and offline model, operating our own warehouses in California, Michigan, South Carolina, and Texas, and supporting operations across Canada, Mexico, Germany, France, and the UK. With homycasa.com and growing retail locations, starting with Rancho Cucamonga, we deliver a convenient and engaging shopping experience.

At Homy Casa, we believe in empowering people to live boldly and stylishly through accessible, high-quality furniture. We continue expanding globally, staying committed to innovation, design excellence, and exceptional customer service.

Name: PLACARD +
Description:
La Société PLACARD+, située dans le Bas-Rhin à Pfaffenhoffen, est présente sur tout le secteur de Strasbourg, Haguenau, Saverne et environs 

Nous avons su devenir une référence dans le domaine du rangement sur mesure : Cuisines, placards, dressing, chambres, salles de bains, et bien  encore ! 

Fort de notre solide expérience acquise depuis de nombreuses années dans l’étude et la réalisation de divers projets sur-mesure, du particulier au professionnel, nous avons construit notre image sur la confiance et la qualité des services. 
Chaque élément est fabriqué sur mesure au millimètre près en France et dans le respect de l’environnement.

Le rangement n’a plus de secrets pour nous : chaque projet est un nouveau défi que nous relevons. La créativité et le confort s’installent à votre idée.

Rendez-vous dans notre show-room afin de découvrir nos divers aménagements 

Nos engagements :

Un accueil de qualité
La découverte de vos envies
Un seul interlocuteur qui vous accompagne à chaque étape de votre projet
Le respect des délais de livraison
Une pose effectuée par un professionnel
Un chantier impeccable

Name: Master Moveis Soluções Corporativas
Description:
Nós, da Master Móveis, sabemos que o ambiente faz toda a diferença para evolução dos negócios, tanto para consolidar a imagem de uma empresa, quanto para criar uma atmosfera capaz de proporcionar a integração entre o homem e o trabalho. Essa consciência nutre os objetivos e a atuação do nosso empreendimento, que vem se consolidando no mercado da comercialização de mobiliário para escritório.

Nossas ambições expandem: percebemos que a nossa experiência na venda e revenda de mobília para escritórios, associada à qualificação e sensibilidade dos nossos profissionais nessa área, poderia nos levar além, e começamos a nos especializar, também, em soluções para o espaço corporativo. Consideramos que disposição espacial e sua estética precisam se associar ao conforto, aproveitamento do espaço e beleza na performance do ambiente institucional. Tudo isso favorece uma relação mais amistosa com o meio.

O ambiente, em sua composição, também precisa levar em conta a mensagem que deseja transmitir, qual imagem deseja construir, qual é o clima de trabalho ideal e quais são os recursos disponíveis para compor esse clima. Quanto mais personalizado um ambiente, maior o seu impacto na percepção das pessoas e o seu potencial de motivação e afeto com aqueles em que nele realizam suas atividades laborais.

Pensando nisso, criamos o serviço de elaboração de projetos personalizados em SkatchUp e Promob. Nossos profissionais realizam visitação no local para identificar e considerar fatores como as dimensões espaciais, a forma, a estética, as finalidades e gostos do cliente, de modo a estarem aptos ao planejamento e elaboração do espaço ideal. Para compor esse cenário, trabalhamos com mobílias de grandes marcas, alto estilo e qualidade, o que promete uma melhor performance.

Nosso objetivo da Master Móveis é entender, viabilizar, solucionar e facilitar o processo de evolução do seu empreendimento, atuando como facilitadores na aproximação entre você e o seu espaço..

Name: Projetlux
Description:
Based in Paris, Projetlux (formerly Pachyderme) has been representing lighting manufacturers in France since 1993.

Most of our suppliers are located outside France and rely on our knowledge of the local market and our extensive network of contacts to promote their collections here. 

Our Paris showroom offers a permanent showcase of their work, and we exhibit at Maison & Objet and Equip’ Hotel on a regular basis.

Each manufacturer we represent has its own distinctive style and know-how, and all are capable of producing bespoke monumental pieces.

Our client base is composed of :

RETAIL MARKET : our catalogue products are mainly aimed at specialised lighting shops, general lifestyle outlets and department stores.

CONTRACT MARKET : we can produce bespoke pieces for interior designers, architects, hotels and restaurants working on projects no matter how big or small. 

Most of our our partners produce their pieces almost entirely on site, which enables them to manage both cost and lead time. We also offer installation upon request.

B2C : with 5 successive shops in Paris (including a corner at Lafayette Maison) and an on-line store, Projetlux also offers a selection of articles on sale directly to the public.

Slimkeukens. Slim in ontwerp, slim in prijs, slim geregeld.

Nos concepteurs aménageurs ne sont pas de simples vendeurs. Experts intuitifs et enthousiastes, ils sont à l'écoute des aspirations de nos clients pour créer des agencements originaux et innovants. Ce sont des professionnels passionnés, dotés d'une véritable vision créative offrant l'équilibre parfait entre design, fonctionnalité et ergonomie.

Nous souhaitons offrir à nos clients une expérience différenciante : avec davantage de transparence, en les intégrant à part entière dans leur conception et en travaillant sur l’accessoirisation de leurs pièces de vie.

Name: FURNBALTIC
Description:
About Us

Discover the best of Baltic furniture and accessories, all in one place.

Get to know the craftsmanship and beauty of designer furniture created in the Baltic States! FURNBALTIC is a design store and salon that offers a specially selected range of designer goods made in the Baltics. With us, you will find everything you need to create the design of your space, from sofas, dining tables and beds, to room decor.

Our selected designer furniture is known for its elegant design and high quality, which is ensured by the experience and craftsmanship of local designers and craftsmen. Each product is created with great care so that it becomes an integral part of your space.

The range of products we offer is wide and diverse, so if you need help, you can contact us and get a consultation on the design of the room or visit the design salon at Skolas street 21 in Riga.

Choose a local design and bring a part of the Baltics into your space with FURNBALTIC!

 

 

Why Choose Furnbaltic?

Authentic Baltic Design: Experience the rich heritage and craftsmanship of the Baltic region. Our products are inspired by nature, history, and local traditions.
Exceptional Quality: Every piece is meticulously crafted using premium materials and traditional techniques, ensuring durability and long-lasting beauty.
Sustainable Practices: We are committed to ethical and sustainable sourcing, supporting local artisans and minimizing our environmental impact.
Diverse Collection: Explore a wide range of styles and designs, from modern minimalism to rustic charm.
Personalized Service: Our team of experts is dedicated to helping you find the perfect pieces to complement your home.

Name: Dreamer Design Lab

Name: CoTheory
Description:
CoTheory is a home and officeware brand known for quality pieces that stand the test of time.

Established in 2022, CoTheory is passionate about how an environment impacts the way you feel and your productivity - endeavoring to transcend simple function and create elevated spaces that thrive. 

CoTheory has grown from a small 'Desk Essentials' collection with a handful of products and two stone colours, to over 15 product offerings, available in 8 incredible stone colours, stocked in over 40 independent stores Australia-wide. 

Grateful to have built such a supportive community around the brand, their pieces are embraced by interior designers and stylists, architects, photographers, creators, and more. CoTheory pieces have also featured on both the 2023 and 2024 seasons of Channel Nine’s ‘The Block’.

The journey is only just beginning, as CoTheory works behind the scenes to break into international markets, expand product offerings and build even stronger relationships with existing and future communities in Australia into 2025.

CoTheory enjoys building and connecting with their community - whether with their direct customers or wholesale and trade partners.

If you have a question about their products or wholesale and trade program, please don't hesitate to message, or email larissa@cotheory.com.au - they would love to hear from you. 

CoTheory was founded by Larissa Haddad. 

All products within the collection are designed in Melbourne, and available worldwide. 

Follow our Instagram page: @cotheory_

Name: Furniture Direct Online
Description:
Founded in 2014, Furniture Direct Online is a family-run business with over 40 years of expertise in the furniture industry. From the very beginning, our focus has been on supplying high-quality furniture at the most affordable prices while ensuring an outstanding customer experience.

In 2015, we expanded into an 80,000 sq. ft. warehouse in Wakefield, West Yorkshire, allowing us to stock over 20,000 sofas and provide fast, reliable nationwide deliveries. During the global pandemic in 2019, we adapted quickly, stepping up to become a household name by delivering over 100 sofas per day across the UK.

Now, in 2024, with a fresh new look and thousands of happy customers, our mission remains the same: to bring incredible quality furniture at unbeatable prices, backed by exceptional service.

Products & Services:
We offer an extensive range of furniture designed to enhance comfort and style in every home, including:

Sofas & Recliners – From modern corner sofas to luxurious recliner suites, we provide stylish and comfortable seating options.
Beds & Mattresses – A wide selection of high-quality beds and mattresses, including memory foam, pocket spring, and orthopaedic options.
Wardrobes & Storage Solutions – Contemporary and space-efficient wardrobes to suit various interior styles.

With 98% of our deliveries completed within 2-4 working days, we take pride in offering a seamless shopping experience. We also provide flexible finance options, making it easier for our customers to purchase their dream furniture.

At Furniture Direct Online, we are committed to delivering comfort, quality, and value straight to your home.

Name: Collected Home Style
Description:
Evocative. Elegant. Bold. Vintage decor that tells a story.

--

It took me years to discover the deep, striking style that felt right to me.

I’d meander through the mid-century modern homes of my fashionable friends or scroll through endless Pinterest pages of Bohemian chic, yearning to find a fit. Rustic, industrial, minimalist — you name it, I tried it. But I couldn’t feel deeply into any of these styles. 

Each told a story, but none of them told my story.

That’s when I discovered modern traditionalism, balancing timeless classics with evocative, elegant, and bold accents. It’s a style that not only tells the story of who I am, but who I am becoming.

I created Collected Home Style to help people like me tell their stories—curating special, vintage pieces that invite connection and contrast. You can shop Collected Home Style online or at pop-up shop events throughout Northeast Ohio.

Name: UNİX FURNİX
Description:
Online Retailer of Furniture and Home Accessories
Blend of Modern & Luxury Design with Affordable Pricing
Regional Craftsmanship Meets Modern Technology

At UNİX FURNİX, we've blended the age-old tradition of craftsmanship with today’s tech-savvy world. We're an online retailer with a bit of a twist: besides our general retail, we also have a Direct-to-Customer (DTC) approach with some of our products, bringing them straight from the workshop to your doorstep without the middleman.

Our online platform is more than just a store. It’s where we showcase how AR and VR technologies can make shopping for home decor a more engaging experience. It's also where we get to share our love for blending modern designs with a touch of regional craftsmanship, all while keeping prices friendly.

We keep a professional yet laid-back approach in what we do. Not every product we offer follows the DTC model, but those that do help us ensure that what you see is what you get: quality, authenticity, and a reasonable price tag.

Our journey is about exploring the sweet spot between tradition and modernity in the home decor sector. We enjoy playing with this balance in a digital space, and we believe it brings a fresh take to the industry.

So, welcome to UNİX FURNİX. Here, we're all about making your home a comfy, stylish space without breaking the bank, and having a bit of fun along the way as we dive into the future of online retail.

Name: COLAMUSSI DESIGN | Progettazione e vendita di arredi e complementi
Description:
ARREDAMENTI DAL 1978...

La nostra clientela , in tutti questi anni di qualificata esperienza nell'arredamento, sempre più soddisfatta e fedele, ci riconosce ormai come punto di riferimento per le migliori soluzioni del design del mobile italiano.

Scegliere le migliori firme del design italiano non è che solo l'inizio della progettazione di un ambiente. Bisogna, pertanto, personalizzare e rendere unici i propri spazi con il giusto compromesso tra stile e necessità.

COLAMUSSI DESIGN, propone una marcata esperienza e una perfetta unione tra l'altissima qualità ed un raffinato design, frutto di tanta professionalità al servizio della propria clientela.

IL FONDATORE

Antonio Colamussi con la sua insaziabile imprenditorialità ha investito sin da subito in una delle sue più importanti passioni, il DESIGN.

Il suo obiettivo è stato, in primis, quello di scegliere le migliori firme dell'arredamento italiano per rendere ogni ambiente unico e appagante e far si che lo stesso emozionasse la vita di ognuno dei nostri clienti con classe e buon gusto.

COLAMUSSI DESIGN, in tutti questi anni, ha dimostrato di essere tra le aziende più competitive di questo settore in quanto riesce a proporre una perfetta unione tra un'altissima qualità ed estetica dei mobili esposti, insieme ad un'eccezionale convenienza, professionalità e servizio.

LE NUOVE IDEE

Siamo alla seconda generazione e con Maddalena Colamussi unigenita di Antonio e sua moglie Santina Ottomano, che prende sempre più piega la necessità di personalizzare ogni ambiente, adattarlo alle diverse esigenze di spazio, stile, vita e necessità... in altre parole renderlo architettonicamente funzionale e dal design accattivante.

Nasza oferta produktowa obejmuje szeroki zakres rozwiązań zarówno do wnętrz, jak i na zewnątrz, które łączą w sobie funkcjonalność, nowoczesny design oraz najwyższą jakość wykonania. Oferujemy rolety wewnętrzne dostosowane do różnych potrzeb i stylów wnętrz, żaluzje wewnętrzne, które pozwalają na precyzyjne kontrolowanie światła oraz rolety zewnętrzne, zapewniające doskonałą ochronę przed słońcem i warunkami atmosferycznymi.

Specjalizujemy się również w żaluzjach fasadowych, które są idealnym rozwiązaniem dla nowoczesnych budynków biurowych i komercyjnych, dostarczając nie tylko ochronę, ale także element architektoniczny podnoszący estetykę budynku. Dla specyficznych, niestandardowych kształtów okien, takich jak okna trójkątne czy trapezowe, oferujemy żaluzje dostosowane do każdego kształtu i rozmiaru.

W naszym portfolio znajdują się także innowacyjne rolety screen i ZIPscreen, które charakteryzują się wyjątkową trwałością i są doskonałe do zastosowań zewnętrznych w ekstremalnych warunkach pogodowych. Pergole i markizy z naszej oferty to idealne rozwiązania dla tych, którzy cenią sobie relaks na świeżym powietrzu, chroniąc się przed słońcem i deszczem.

Nie zapominamy także o moskitierach, które są niezbędnym elementem każdego domu w sezonie letnim, chroniąc wnętrza przed owadami, przy jednoczesnym zachowaniu cyrkulacji powietrza.

Jesteśmy dumni, że jako autoryzowany dystrybutor takich marek jak Anwis, Isotra, Somfy Expert, Tarasola, Lewens i wielu innych, możemy zaoferować naszym klientom produkty, które są synonimem najwyższej klasy i innowacyjności.

Zapraszamy do kontaktu z naszymi biurami w Puszczykowie i Poznaniu, gdzie nasi eksperci chętnie pomogą w doborze odpowiednich rozwiązań

Name: 1000 Tische & Stühle
Description:
Designermöbel für Sie gefertigt
Seit Jahrzehnten sind wir Spezialisten für qualitativ hochwertige, bewegliche Möbel. Die nahezu unbegrenzte Auswahl an Formen, Farben und Materialien bei Tischen und Stühlen ist unser Markenzeichen. In unserem Sortiment finden Sie eine eindrucksvolle Produktpalette internationaler und betriebsinterner Möbeldesigner. Darüber hinaus bieten wir die Möglichkeit, bei den meisten Stuhlmodellen Rahmen und Bezug nach individuellen Wünschen zu variieren.

Made in Austria
Ein Großteil der Endfertigung unserer Möbel findet in unserer hauseigenen Polsterei, sowie in enger Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Vertragstischlern in ganz Österreich statt. Ganz getreu nach unserem Motto „Geht nicht, gibt‘s nicht!“ bleiben somit keine Wünsche offen. Wir sind stolz darauf auch unsere internationalen Kunden in Europa und Übersee mit Qualität, Design, ergonomischen Sitzkomfort und nicht zuletzt, mit viel Liebe zum Detail zu verwöhnen.

There‘s no business, like family business
Unser Unternehmen wurde 1968 von Arthur Krausz gegründet und wird als Familienbetrieb geführt. Drei Generationen bringen sowohl Wissen und jahrelange Erfahrung, als auch innovative Ideen in die Produktion mit ein. In unserem Betrieb arbeiten Großeltern, Sohn und wir als seine Kinder (Bruder und Schwester) in perfekter Symbiose und Wertschätzung miteinander. Wir nehmen uns Zeit für Ihre Wünsche und unterstützen Sie durch beste Beratung Ihren Wohn- und Gastronomietraum wahr werden zu lassen.

Name: DIRECT CANAP
Description:
À propos de Direct Canap’
Bienvenue chez Direct Canap’, votre partenaire dans la recherche de meubles de qualité à prix réduits. Spécialisés dans le déstockage, la revente de retours clients, et les fins de série, nous donnons une seconde vie à des meubles soigneusement sélectionnés, pour les rendre accessibles à tous.

Notre Histoire
L’aventure Direct Canap’ a débuté avec une idée simple : rendre le mobilier de qualité accessible tout en réduisant notre impact sur l’environnement. Fondée par deux amis d’enfance de Vaulx-en-Velin, notre entreprise est ancrée dans des valeurs de proximité, de durabilité, et d’engagement. Forts de notre expérience dans la logistique et le e-commerce, nous avons créé Direct Canap’ pour proposer une alternative économique et responsable dans le secteur de l’ameublement.

Notre Mission
Réduire les déchets et favoriser l’économie circulaire sont au cœur de notre mission. Chaque meuble que nous proposons passe par une inspection rigoureuse, et, si nécessaire, nous le réparons ou le remettons en état. Nos clients bénéficient ainsi de produits en excellent état, avec des réductions allant jusqu’à -90% du prix d’origine. Nous sommes fiers d’offrir une alternative qui répond aux attentes des consommateurs modernes : des produits de qualité, économiques et respectueux de l’environnement.

Pourquoi Choisir Direct Canap’ ?
Un choix responsable : En achetant chez nous, vous participez à une démarche d’économie circulaire.
Des prix attractifs : Nos meubles déstockés et reconditionnés sont proposés à des tarifs imbattables.
Engagement local : Nous recrutons localement, en priorité les jeunes de Vaulx-en-Velin, pour les sensibiliser aux métiers du commerce et de la logistique durable.
Service client personnalisé : Nous mettons un point d’honneur à répondre à toutes vos questions pour vous aider à trouver le meuble idéal.
Rejoignez-nous !
Chez Direct Canap’, nous croyons qu’il est possible d’allier accessibilité, qualité,

Name: WERNER & LARSEN
Description:
WERNER & LARSEN er Bornholms førende designforretning med hovedvægt på dansk og skandinavisk design. Her finder du to etager fyldt med et inspirerende og varieret udvalg af nye og klassiske varer inden for møbler, belysning og brugskunst. Alt dette er selv håndplukket af Martin Larsen og Kristine Werner, der elsker godt design, og hele tiden sørger for at finde nye og spændende varer, som du kan få glæde af i dit hjem.

Bag WERNER & LARSEN står Martin Larsen og Kristine Werner. De er kollegaer, sparringspartnere og så er de mand og kone. 

WERNERLARSEN DESIGN åbnede i maj 2008 i Gågaden i Rønne. Dengang var butikken blot 85m2 stor, men selvfølgelig fyldt med masser af design. Forretningen fik dog ret hurtigt succes og allerede året efter voksede den til det tredobbelte. Forretningen flyttede lokale til større og mere lyse lokaler i Snellemark, fortsat beliggende i Rønne. Det gav Martin og Kristine muligheden for at vise endnu flere skønne ting. 

I 2015 er forretningens navn blevet ændret til WERNER & LARSEN, og i forlængelse af forretningen, har Martin og Kristine også besluttet at udvide med deres første webshop.

Description: Bienvenue chez Diene Ameublement & Déco, votre partenaire privilégié pour sublimer votre espace de vie avec élégance et raffinement. Nous sommes une entreprise spécialisée dans l'ameublement, la décoration en marbre, la vente de matériaux de finition, et les articles de décoration.

Name: Rollmatik.com

Name: The Wood Project
Description:
Με την πολυετή εμπειρία μας στον χώρο των ξύλινων κατασκευών/επίπλων, προσφέρουμε ολοκληρωμένες λύσεις στις σύγχρονες ανάγκες των πελατών μας συνδυάζοντας την εργονομία, την λειτουργικότητα και την αισθητική σε κάθε είδους κατασκευή.
Πιο συγκεκριμένα, αναλαμβάνουμε την σχεδίαση, τη κατασκευή και την τοποθέτηση σε κατοικίες για
● έπιπλα κουζίνας,
● ντουλάπες υπνοδωματίου,
● εσωτερικές πόρτες,
● ξύλινα κουφώματα γερμανικού τύπου,
● ειδικές ξύλινες κατασκευές καθιστικού ή γραφείου,
● ξύλινα διαχωριστικά χώρου
Επιπλέον, κατασκευάζουμε με συνέπεια, υπευθυνότητα και αξιοπιστία όλα τα ξύλινα έπιπλα για τη διαμόρφωση ξενοδοχείων και τουριστικών δωματίων, όπως:
● κεφαλάρια/ μπουαζερί κρεβατιών
● Κρεβάτια
● Κομοδίνα
● Έπιπλο τουαλέτας/γραφείου με καθρέφτη
● Ντουλάπες υπνοδωματίου με θέση mini bar
● Βαλιτσοθήκη
● Πόρτες εισόδου ηχομονωτικές & πυράντοχες,
● Έπιπλο μπάνιου
● Ξύλινα κουφώματα γερμανικού τύπου
● Ειδικές κατασκευές σε χώρους υποδοχής & reception.
Σε κάθε project, είτε πρόκειται για κατοικία , επαγγελματικό χώρο είτε για ξενοδοχείο ή δωμάτιο τουριστικών καταλυμάτων, εμείς προτείνουμε μια λύση αποκλειστικά φτιαγμένη πάνω στα μέτρα σας. Πιστεύουμε πως οι ανάγκες μας στον χώρο που ζούμε είναι πολυσύνδετες και διαφορετικές, μοναδικές στον κάθε ένα από εμάς και εμείς οφείλουμε να τις υπηρετούμε. Συνδυάζοντας λειτουργικό σχεδιασμό με υψηλής ποιότητας προϊόντα από καινοτόμα υλικά, κρατώντας πάντα κατα νου το επιτρεπόμενο budget, σας παραδίδουμε την ιδανική λύση μόνο για εσάς.

Name: Hiperlocalidad
Description:
Una cooperativa de la comunidad creativa para la comunidad creativa: parte galería de diseño, parte gabinete de curiosidades, parte vinculadora industrial y parte laboratorio de colaboración creativa. 

Concebido e impulsado por Martín Diego Salido-Orcillo y Antonio Mendoza de ACOOCOORO, Hiperlocalidad es un espacio gestionado por su misma comunidad de más de 25 marcas, estudios e industrias: mobiliario, luminarias, textil, accesorios, cerámica, diseño de interiores y mucho más. En un solo lugar, un universo diverso para soluciones de diseño, para profesionales del diseño, como arquitectos, interioristas, curadores, retailers, desarrolladores, hoteles y compradores.

"Los objetos son partículas de un lenguaje social: idiosincrasias, descripciones explícitas de su mundo y su tiempo. Colectivos, pero localizados. No son únicos, sino hiperespecíficos: hiperlocales."

Name: Grand Renovations UK
Description: Grand Renovations is not just a contractor; we are curators of fine living. Specializing in high-end refurbishments across the UK, we blend structural integrity with interior artistry.

Name: ENVIA CUISINES ORLEANS
Description:
Bienvenue dans votre magasin Envia Cuisines Orléans ! Un nouveau projet de cuisine ? Une envie de changement ? Nos concepteur-vendeurs sont là pour vous conseiller et vous accompagner de la conception jusqu’à l’installation de votre cuisine.
Quelles que soient la configuration et la taille de la cuisine, les meubles sont sur mesure, fonctionnels, de qualité et facile à poser. Cuisines traditionnelles, design ou naturelles, nous vous proposons également une offre globale allant du mobilier aux rangements, en passant par l’électroménager et l’installation.
Chez Envia Cuisines, professionnalisme et convivialité se conjuguent pour vous permettre de choisir sereinement votre cuisine et ainsi profiter de votre nouvel espace de vie. Notre but ? Offrir à chacun le plaisir de se sentir bien dans sa cuisine.
Les cuisinistes Envia Cuisines du Loiret seront ravis de vous recevoir. Vous pouvez prendre rendez-vous sur notre site internet avant votre visite. À bientôt !

Name: MAIZEN
Description:
Concept Store & Matcha Bar

MAIZEN is a premium lifestyle brand based in Tbilisi, offering a unique blend of sophisticated home decor and authentic Japanese matcha culture — the first concept of its kind in the region.

Our carefully curated collections feature exclusive décor objects, tableware, and design pieces sourced directly from Japan, Europe, and the United States. Our concept store showcases brands such as DAaZ, GUNIA project, NOOM, Klong, Tree Nest, Tenderflame, Le Feu, Paul Smith, Missoni, Hanataba Original, and more.

We serve both private customers and professional partners — including interior designers, architects, hotels, and corporate clients seeking distinctive international pieces for residential and hospitality spaces.

Alongside our interior collections, MAIZEN operates an authentic matcha bar, inspired by traditional Japanese tea culture. Our ceremonial-grade matcha drinks, minimalist design, and wellness-oriented atmosphere provide a refined alternative to conventional coffee culture — while offering scalable franchise opportunities in new markets.

At MAIZEN, we believe that true luxury lies in simplicity, authenticity, and mindful living. Every object and every experience we create reflects timeless design, global craftsmanship, and intentional lifestyle.

Name: Le Concept Français
Description:
Chez Concept Français, nous mettons à votre service nos années d’expériences en termes de création, de formation des Compagnons, de transmission des compétences humaines et techniques, et d’innovation autour de l’architecture culinaire et de l’agencement.
Nous avons une passion pour la cuisine et l'agencement. Les meubles sur mesure sont notre ADN et nous poursuivons tous les atouts qui font notre renommée sur le marché de la cuisine haut de gamme

Name: Matarello Interiores
Description:
Bem-vindos à Matarello Interiores

Somos uma empresa familiar, enraizada na tradição do ramo moveleiro. Nossa história remonta a três décadas, onde construímos nossa reputação com base na qualidade impecável e no atendimento excepcional que oferecemos a nossos clientes.

Tradicionais e autênticos
Inspirados por nossa origem italiana, trazemos um toque especial ao nome Matarello, fazendo uma homenagem ao encantador vilarejo na região de Trento, na Itália. Assim como a pequena localidade que nos inspira, buscamos preservar a essência da autenticidade em cada peça que criamos.

Perfeição em todos os ambientes
Nossa missão é proporcionar excelência em atendimento, entendendo as necessidades e desejos de cada cliente de maneira personalizada. Sabemos que o mobiliário planejado não é apenas uma questão de estética, mas também de funcionalidade e conforto. 
É por isso que nossa equipe dedicada de designers e artesãos trabalha em estreita colaboração com você para transformar seus sonhos em realidade.

Modernidade em todos os níveis
Utilizamos apenas os materiais mais nobres e duráveis, combinados com técnicas de fabricação meticulosas, para criar móveis que resistem ao tempo e exalam sofisticação.
Além disso, estamos sempre atualizados com as últimas tendências e inovações do setor moveleiro, para oferecer a você soluções contemporâneas e funcionais. Seja para um ambiente residencial ou corporativo, temos a expertise necessária para tornar cada projeto único e memorável.

Name: Insight Services and Solutions
Description: Insight’s Mission Is To Deliver Exceptional Workmanship With Unparalleled Speed And Precision, Ensuring Every Project Is Completed Without Compromising Quality. Conveniently Located Within An Hour Of New York City, We Proudly Serve Clients Across The Tri-State Area As A Trusted One-Stop Shop. From Concept To Completion, We Manage Every Stage Of Your Project, Culminating In A Flawless Final Installation Backed By Our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.

Name: CASAFIKA - Scandinavian Vintage Design
Description:
Casafika è una galleria online di mobili vintage scandinavi da collezione. 

Selezioniamo pezzi originali anni ’50–’70 da Svezia, Danimarca, Finlandia e Norvegia, li importiamo in Italia e li restauriamo in modo conservativo per preservarne valore, autenticità e patina. 

Collezioni curate e limitate, provenienza tracciabile, consulenza su misura per interni di alto profilo. 

Casafika: l’eccellenza del design nordico d’epoca.

Com atenção cuidadosa aos detalhes, oferecemos soluções para móveis residenciais, comerciais e corporativos, sempre buscando a satisfação e as melhores condições para os nossos clientes.

Name: KZADOR
Description:
Un cazador se nutre cuando abre sus sentidos para escuchar y probar cosas nuevas.Es el momento donde crece, evoluciona, aprendiendo de otros y, al mismo tiempo, enseñando lo que sabe a los entusiastas que comienzan a despertar su espíritu aventurero.

En torno al fuego hará gala de los accesorios que hay en su caja de herramientas.Todo con el fin de sorprender a sus comensales, contándoles sus estrategias y el cómo consiguió lo que tiene para ofrecer.Puede que el común de las personas en un inicio no lo entienda, pero eso queda atrás una vez que logran saborear el resultado.Es ahí donde comienza una página con la historia de un nuevo cazador

Name: Ekaara
Description:
Ekaara is a premier luxury stone studio, where tradition meets contemporary artistry. Inspired by the philosophy “From Earth to Art,” we transform timeless materials like marble, granite, sandstone, and limestone into exquisite furniture, wall panels, bespoke home décor, and spiritual backdrops. Every piece is handcrafted by skilled artisans, blending heritage craftsmanship with modern aesthetics infusing spaces with elegance, function, and cultural resonance.

We source only the finest quarried stones. Our meticulous approach spans from design to finish, ensuring each creation is a statement of luxury, longevity, and artistic expression. Whether adorning residences, commercial spaces, or places of worship, Ekaara’s bespoke stoneware elevates interiors with enduring beauty and soul.

Driven by quality, innovation, and long-term value, we serve discerning clients across domestic and international markets. At Ekaara, artistry is our promise and stone is our canvas—crafted for those who appreciate excellence, authenticity, and natural design.

“Art is born where stone meets soul" _ Shrsthi Jain, founder @Ekaara.
Discover our story and creations at www.ekaara.co.in
#EarthToArt #Ekaara #LuxuryStoneware #ArtisanMade

Description:
KALA is a home fragrance brand from Indonesia, inspired by the philosophy of time and meaning. Each diffuser is more than just a scent — it is a story, carefully crafted to bring balance, emotion, and beauty into everyday spaces.

Our collection translates symbolic meanings into fragrance, blending fine perfumery with minimalist design. We collaborate with global fragrance houses and trusted local partners to ensure uncompromising quality in every detail — from scent formulation, bottle design, to packaging.

At KALA, we believe fragrance is not only something you smell, but something you feel, remember, and carry with you.

Name: CENTRO HOGAR ARMAS SL
Description:
CENTRO HOGAR ARMAS SL , conocida comercialmente como Centrogar, es una empresa especializada en la venta de muebles, electrodomésticos, decoración, textil hogar, jardín y artículos para el hogar en general. Con más de 50 años de experiencia, nos dedicamos a ofrecer productos de alta calidad que combinan diseño, funcionalidad y precio, ayudando a nuestros clientes a crear hogares únicos y confortables.

Nuestro objetivo es ser la tienda de referencia en Fuerteventura y las Islas Canarias para cualquier necesidad del hogar, tanto para particulares como para profesionales del sector de la construcción. Nos comprometemos a brindar un excelente servicio, desde la asesoría en la tienda hasta el montaje y la entrega en el hogar del cliente.

A través de nuestra estrategia de digitalización y presencia en línea, también facilitamos una experiencia de compra cómoda y accesible, permitiendo a nuestros clientes explorar nuestras colecciones desde cualquier lugar.

Name: MyCurioHome
Description: We are a family owned and operated home decor shop featuring a unique collection of curated items. We pride ourselves on excellent service and upcycling to help the environment. A Fechacom é líder no fornecimento de soluções abrangentes para os segmentos de acessórios, ferragens para móveis e marcenaria, proporcionando produtos de qualidade para profissionais e consumidores finais.

Name: Wood's House
Description: Na Wood's House, criamos placas e luminosos decorativos em madeira MDF com design exclusivo e acabamento 3D. Personalizamos cada peça para transformar ambientes com estilo e qualidade.

Name: mindstudio-india
Description:
Founded by Aadesh Runwal, Mind Studio specializes in importing and curating an exquisite selection of Italian luxury furniture to enrich Indian living spaces. With a portfolio of over 100 renowned Italian brands, we are dedicated to enhancing lifestyles.

At Mind Studio, we don’t just furnish homes; we redefine living spaces. Our comprehensive approach involves understanding clients' visions, facilitating direct engagements with Italian artisans, overseeing the meticulous installation of every piece providing end-to-end solutions. Aadesh’s vision of bringing European artistry closer to Indian shores is reflected in every project we undertake, ensuring our clients enjoy a seamless blend of luxury, comfort, and style.

Name: Ambiance Cuisine Versailles
Description:
Bienvenue chez Ambiance Cuisine, votre cuisiniste de confiance basé à Versailles, dans la magnifique région des Yvelines. Avec 25 ans d'expérience et une équipe d’experts, nous sommes fiers de notre engagement à créer des cuisines sur mesure montées d’usine. 

Notre entreprise familiale de proximité a pour mission de vous offrir bien plus qu'une simple cuisine. Nous vous offrons une expérience exceptionnelle, centrée sur vos besoins et vos goûts. Que vous soyez propriétaire d'une maison, d'un appartement ou un investisseur, nous sommes là pour transformer votre projet en une magnifique réalisation.
Nous proposons également un accompagnement personnalisé pour les agences immobilières, les architectes, les décorateurs, les promoteurs immobiliers ou encore les entreprises de rénovation. 
Nous avons développé une expertise dans la création de cuisines sur mesure adaptées à vos besoins spécifiques. Nous travaillons avec des fabricants de renom tels que Cucinesse, Fidelem, Franke, Luisina ou encore Flipdesign. 
Chez Ambiance Cuisine, nous croyons en un suivi personnalisé tout au long de votre projet. Vous bénéficierez de l'expertise d’Eric et de Laura, et d'un interlocuteur unique pour répondre à toutes vos questions et préoccupations. Notre réactivité, notre efficacité et notre sérieux sont des valeurs clés que nous apportons à chaque projet.
Nous savons à quel point la convivialité et la proximité comptent, et c'est pourquoi nous nous déplaçons à domicile pour vous servir au mieux. Votre satisfaction est notre priorité, et c'est ce qui fait d'Ambiance Cuisine le choix incontournable pour toutes vos besoins en matière de cuisine sur mesure.
Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour discuter de votre projet de cuisine équipée à Versailles et dans les Yvelines. Chez Ambiance Cuisine, votre cuisine de rêve est à portée de main, sans que vous ayez à vous déplacer. Laissez-nous vous aider à concrétiser vos idées et à créer l'espace cuisine dont vous avez toujours rêvé.

Name: Febal Casa Imola
Description: Vendita, progettazione, montaggio e ritiro con valutazione dell'usato di arredamento per la casa. Le nostre ragazze sono a vostra disposizione su appuntamento per regalarvi emozioni e progettare un'ambiente confortevole e adatto alle vostre esigenze

Name: Vodskov Bolighus
Description:
Vodskov Bolighus har Nordjyllands flotteste udvalg af såvel danske som udenlandske designmøbler, lamper, tæpper og interiør. Her finder du alle de største danske designikoner.

Vodskov Bolighus har desuden over 60 års erfaring i at indrette med designmøbler - både i private hjem og hos virksomheder. 

Tøv ikke med at kontakte os, hvis du vil vide mere.

Name: Pillovely.com
Description:
Pillovely to marka, która łączy design, komfort i jakość, tworząc meble oraz dodatki, które nadają wnętrzom wyjątkowego charakteru. W naszej ofercie znajdziesz zarówno sofy, fotele, łóżka i stoły, jak i poduszki  – wszystko projektowane z dbałością o detale i świadomy wybór materiałów.
Jednym z naszych flagowych projektów jest autorska kolekcja Flora Lunaris – inspirowana subtelnością natury i harmonią księżycowego światła. To połączenie organicznych kształtów, delikatnych faktur i wyciszonej palety barw, które wprowadzają do wnętrza spokój, ciepło i ponadczasową elegancję.
W Pillovely wierzymy, że wnętrza to coś więcej niż przestrzeń – to historie, emocje i codzienne rytuały, które warto pielęgnować.

Name: Christian Community Action (CCA)
Description:
Christian Community Action (CCA) is a charity that seeks to demonstrate God’s love by providing practical support to alleviate furniture poverty in Reading as we support our diverse community while also promoting sustainability. 

CCA has helped numerous people across Reading since 1992. Our most urgent cases are those people in crisis who come to us with temporary accommodation containing no furniture and may be fleeing domestic violence, refugees and those in crisis  

CCA reuses donated items as much as possible and since starting our mission we have saved roughly 2000 Tons of furniture from going into landfill. However, that need is growing and we don't get enough donated items to meet everyone's need so sometimes we need to buy beds, and even though items of essential furniture may have been donated there is a cost to us to collect, store and redeploy these items.

Name: Story - Strasbourg
Description: Bénéficiez du savoir faire Story et de conseils d’experts pour aménager vos espaces professionnels. Hôtels, restaurants, bureaux ou magasins, nous vous accompagnons sur l’ensemble de votre projets pour réaliser avec vous des espaces design et fonctionnels qui correspondent à vos besoins.

Description:
Millie & Jones is a UK-based children's and teenage furniture brand dedicated to creating beautifully designed, space-efficient beds and furniture tailored to the needs of real families. Name: Lederland Nederland
Description:
De Lederland collectie bestaat uit ruim 100 exclusieve leren banken, leren fauteuils en leren stoelen in een groot aantal stijlen van strak modern tot eigentijds romantisch. Elke Lederland bank, fauteuil of hoekcombinatie is met de grootste zorg op ambachtelijke wijze geproduceerd. Zo ontstaan al 35 jaar kwaliteitsproducten waar u jarenlang van geniet. En langdurig genieten, daar draait het om. Daarom geeft Lederland op al haar zitelementen 5 jaar garantie.

Missie
Het is de missie van Lederland om de enige echte leerspecialist te zijn die daardoor als geen ander in staat is om een optimale bijdrage te leveren aan het leef- en woonplezier van haar (potentiële) klanten die de betere- en exclusievere leerkwaliteiten en zitmeubelen weten te waarderen. Lederland streeft naar 100% tevreden klanten.

Strategie
Lederland verkoopt producten uitsluitend onder eigen merk. Lederland concentreert zich op het behalen van superieure prestaties op de voor de consument belangrijke aspecten: service, stijl, comfort en kwaliteit. Lederland differentieert zich ten opzichte van haar concurrenten als enige echte leerspecialist. Lederland wil toonaangevend zijn op het gebied van leer.

Name: Voyager Displays
Description:
Voyager Displays started in 2011, initially focusing on designing furniture and display fixtures. With over a decade of experience in displays design, we have expanded our scope to include a wide variety of other products. Our years of design and development expertise have allowed us to master the characteristics of various materials—whether metal, wood, or plastic—we can seamlessly incorporate them into our designs.
In 2016, we launched our own wood production factory. Over the subsequent six years, we gradually invested in acrylic, metal, and injection molding factories. Today, we are a comprehensive company capable of designing, developing, and manufacturing products made from metal, wood, acrylic, and other plastics.
With over ten years of experience in display fixture design, we can engage in projects from the conceptual design phase all the way to the final renderings. To date, we have contributed to more than 500 design projects, including display stands, furniture, home décor items, tools, electronics, and more. We believe that participating in a project from the design phase, leveraging our expertise in materials and production processes, is key to delivering the best product within your budget. Our engineers continuously optimize designs during the prototyping stage to ensure the final product is as flawless as possible. If any issues or potential improvements are identified during the design and prototyping process, we will promptly communicate with you, ensuring a seamless collaboration throughout the development cycle.
Our production facility spans approximately 10,000 square meters and is staffed by over 150 workers, most of whom have been with us for more than five years. They are highly skilled, responsible, and fully aware of our stringent quality standards. We are fully equipped with essential production machinery, including Steel Laser Cutting machines, CNC, Numerical Bending machines, Edge banding machines, etc.

Description:

With years of expertise and a passion for excellence, we specialize in a comprehensive range of high-quality blinds, curtains, shutters, and awnings designed to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

Our commitment to quality is evident in every product we offer. From the initial design consultation to the final installation, our team of experienced professionals works closely with you to bring your vision to life. Whether you are looking to create a modern and minimalistic look or a warm and traditional ambiance, we have the expertise and the product range to cater to your unique style and preferences.

Our product lineup includes:

Custom Blinds: Crafted to perfection, our range of blinds offers functionality and style. Choose from roller blinds, venetian blinds, roman blinds, and more, available in a variety of materials and finishes.
Elegant Curtains: Our curtains add a touch of sophistication to any room. With an extensive selection of fabrics and designs, we can help you find the perfect match for your decor.
Stylish Shutters: Durable and timeless, our shutters provide privacy, light control, and aesthetic appeal, making them a great investment for any home or office.
Versatile Awnings: Extend your living spaces outdoors with our range of awnings. Perfect for patios, decks, and windows, they offer protection from the elements while enhancing your outdoor decor.
At Parker Blinds & Curtains, we believe in providing not just products, but complete solutions that enhance the comfort and aesthetics of your spaces. Our dedication to customer satisfaction drives us to ensure that every project we undertake exceeds expectations.

Stay connected with us on LinkedIn for updates on our latest projects, design tips, and special offers. Let us help you transform your space into a place you love.
