Name: Sotran Dekorativ
Description:
A BRIEF HISTORY
Sotran Dekorativ really started some time in 1986, evolving from a small Johannesburg Market Theatre Stall, 3m x 3m in size.

It sold bric-a-brac mostly acquired from old, run-down General Dealers around Gauteng.

As it grew, a permanent location was acquired in Benoni under the name of Once Upon A Time Antiques where it traded for 15 years.

In 2002, it moved next to the new Wetherlys Furniture Store in Boksburg, corner Atlas & North Rand rd. A new name was needed to incorporate the wonderful decor & furniture being sourced in Bali, India, China and South-East Asia… and thus the Sotran Brand began.

Sotran Design Quarter opened in Fourways 10 years later whilst the Main Sotran Atlas Rd branch moved 10km further west to East Rand Retail Park in November 2018.

Here, it expanded to 2152m2 Retail/Warehouse set-up where a huge upgrade took place.

Owners, David Lotter & Alison McKay hand-picked new and re-trained existing staff into an efficient Customer Service and Furniture Sourcing team.

 20 years Later

Today, we pride ourselves in achieving an excellent quality of goods, notwithstanding our Imported decor is mostly hand-crafted and imperfect as such.

Our regular Clients come back again and again, looking for that unique, very different style that is associated with tropical islands, exotic locations and crafted solid wood.

Sotran managed to pivot into a competitive on-line sales retailer during the COVID out break, offering free deliveries throughout South Africa. Suppliers in Asia have stayed in contact since 2019 and an even larger selection than before has been attained.

Name: Ombrukslageret
Description:
Intequ er en digital plattform for salg av det aller meste av kommersiell innredning og utstyr til bruk i butikk, industri, lager, verksted, håndverk, overnatting, servering, kontorer og offentlige miljøer. Standard produkter fra ledende europeiske produsenter sammen med brukte kvalitetsprodukter vi setter i stand for nytt liv. Vi hjelper kunder å kartlegge hva de har og forsøker å få til en økt grad av ombruk av innredning og møbler. Vårt mål er 55% innen 2030 i tråd med FN`s bærekraftsmål. 

Intequ er etablert for å tilby våre produkter og tjenester til alle. Vi bygger et stort sortiment av varer på vår nettbutikk. Ta kontakt om det er noe du savner også for det meste kan skaffes og nesten alt er allerede laget. 

Vår kompetanse er solid. 30 års erfaring levering til merkevareleverandører, det offentlige og kjeder av innredning og utstyr gir oss både erfaring og nettverk. Spør oss, det kan lønne seg.

Name: Two Old Souls, Inc. Online Auctions Northeast Ohio
Description:
We're Ed and Kim, and our journey as "two old souls" started almost 35 years ago when we met in high school. We have been treasure-hunting together ever since! We have been involved in the reselling industry on various online platforms since 2002. We enjoy helping people, so transitioning into an online auction firm felt like a natural step for us.

We help property owners throughout Northeast Ohio downsize or liquidate their possessions through online estate sales and downsizing auctions. We aim to provide online buyers a fair, enjoyable auction experience, offering accurate listings and convenient pickups. Our mission is to "rehome" treasured items through online downsizing or estate sale auctions, preventing them from ending up in landfills and finding new owners who will appreciate them!

We're an independently owned, incorporated business. We're proud to be affiliated with the J&K Estate Sales online auction platform, and we're a licensed, bonded auction firm with the Ohio Department of Agriculture.

Oltre 70 anni di esperienza nella realizzazione di Salotti, Letti e arredi per la casa.

È questa la genesi del più affidabile Made in Italy: nucleo famigliare, dedizione al lavoro, rigore esecutivo, collaborazioni educate, artigianalità, sensibilità alla qualità, umiltà nel servizio, manufatti che sorprendono, riscuotono consenso, camminano sulle strade del mondo, decorano le case degli uomini.

Chateau d'Ax si sviluppa, per oltre 60 anni, ad anelli concentrici, tappa dopo tappa, con prodotti e servizi, qualificando in progressione la distribuzione e costruendo il senso della marca.

Chateau d'Ax è il brand della modernità abitativa declinabile nelle più attuali dimensioni del gusto personale dal design al romantico al nuovo lusso e offre, dopo decenni di esperienza e di ricerca, una lunghissima linea di prodotti, tutti di altissima qualità, ma sempre a portata per chi ama il Made in Italy.

Name: Ferruré

Ferrure es una tienda ubicada en la ciudad de Guatemala que se especializa en la venta de una amplia variedad de productos de ferretería, incluyendo herrajes, cerrojos, chapas, grifería y accesorios. Fundada hace 18 años, Ferrure ha sido un destino popular para aquellos que buscan productos de alta calidad y durabilidad.

Ferrure cuenta con un show room en la colonia Oakland, en la zona 10 de la ciudad de Guatemala, donde los clientes pueden ver y comprar productos en persona. Además, recientemente han lanzado su tienda en línea, "Ferrure.shop", para brindar una experiencia de compra más cómoda y accesible para sus clientes.

Con una amplia selección de productos de calidad y un compromiso de ofrecer un excelente servicio al cliente, Ferrure se ha ganado la confianza y el respeto de la comunidad de la ciudad de Guatemala y más allá.

Name: Howdens Kitchens Online Trade Prices Direct To Public
Description:
Here at Howdens kitchen Online Trade Prices Direct to Public, our aim is to provide everyday people who don’t have a builder to utilize our trade account at Howdens to get quoted new kitchen or even a bespoke kitchen of your dreams. As you will be dealing directly with Howdens you can negotiate the best price and work out the details without feeling rushed.

Howdens trade-only model
As Howdens is a trade only they will only sell to the trade, so, you can rest assured all of their products are of the highest possible standard and as they have a dedicated supply chain with extensive product design and innovation.

The framework for success
Howdens trade-only model is supported by an in-stock product framework, where builders and now you can expect to get the products they need to complete the job from stock at their local depot. This is achieved by having a dedicated supply chain, efficient warehouse structure, and UK-based manufacturing sites at Howden, East Yorkshire and Runcorn, Cheshire.

Entrepreneurial culture 
We don’t just offer trade prices to everyday people also the chance for you become self employed by joining us to make money with a sticker and sign that will be sent to you and depending on what you do for a job, you can also Tshirt, Hi Vis vest with signage and a email created by you for potential customers to contact you and once a kitchen has been sold and your customer has paid for the kitchen you will get your commission, you don’t have to measure, design, or even sell the kitchen. All you have to do is talk to people this could be friends, family, even coworkers and anyone that is interested in buying a kitchen is just send them our way!

Name: Spazio Porte
Description:
Spazio Porte S.r.l., fondata nel 1997, è un punto di riferimento in Sardegna per la vendita e l’installazione di serramenti di alta qualità. Con sede legale a Cagliari e showroom a Selargius e in via Sant’Alenixedda, l’azienda si distingue per un’offerta completa che include porte interne, portoncini blindati, finestre, vetrate, parquet, scale e rivestimenti, selezionati tra i migliori marchi del settore .

Dal 2003, Spazio Porte è partner ufficiale di Finstral, azienda leader europea nella produzione di serramenti innovativi. Questa collaborazione consente di offrire ai clienti un’ampia gamma di soluzioni personalizzabili, con materiali, colori e finiture su misura, garantendo al contempo una posa certificata secondo gli standard dell’istituto ift Rosenheim .

L’azienda si avvale di personale altamente qualificato, in grado di fornire consulenze tecniche dettagliate, preventivi personalizzati e assistenza post-vendita efficiente. Tra i servizi offerti, spiccano la posa in opera certificata, l’assistenza per le pratiche di detrazione fiscale e la disponibilità di finanziamenti agevolati, rendendo ogni progetto accessibile e conforme alle normative vigenti .

Con oltre 25 anni di esperienza, Spazio Porte continua a distinguersi per l’attenzione al dettaglio, la qualità dei prodotti e la capacità di trasformare ogni ambiente in uno spazio funzionale, sicuro ed esteticamente raffinato. Per ulteriori informazioni, è possibile visitare il sito ufficiale 
Spazio Porte

Name: Mylle
Description:
The most beautiful inflatable pools in the world.  
Mylle created the first inflatable pool that catered to chic adults instead of splashing kids. We re-worked the classic design, simplifying the shape to just two inflatable rings, using restrained patterns that spoke to people who were interested in interior design. It caught on quickly, and Mylle is the only inflatable pool brand to be carried at luxury retailers across the globe, like Holt Renfrew, The Conran Shop, Selfridges, Globus, Nordstrom, MoMA, and more. This small idea has now bred an entire knock-off industry, but Mylle remains the leader with the most sophisticated design, high end materials, and unparalleled customer service.

Description:
Biscottini International Art Trading è un’azienda italiana specializzata nella progettazione, produzione e distribuzione di mobili, complementi d’arredo e oggetti d’arte di alta qualità.

Fondata in Toscana, rappresenta da oltre trent’anni l’eccellenza dell’artigianato Made in Italy nel mondo dell’arredamento, con un catalogo che unisce tradizione e design contemporaneo.

Grazie a una filiera integrata e a un network globale di distribuzione, Biscottini offre soluzioni d’arredo complete per ambienti residenziali, commerciali e contract, ponendo al centro estetica, funzionalità e sostenibilità.

L’azienda opera sia online che attraverso partnership internazionali, raggiungendo clienti in oltre 30 Paesi.

Mission: valorizzare l’arte del vivere attraverso arredi che raccontano stile, storia e identità italiana.

Da oltre 25 anni, Il Borgo Arredamenti è il punto di riferimento per chi cerca soluzioni d’arredo moderne, funzionali e su misura. Nei nostri showroom – situati a Lucca, Porcari, Firenze, Lido di Camaiore e Bientina – progettiamo spazi che parlano di te, affiancandoti in ogni fase: dall’idea iniziale alla realizzazione finale.

Siamo rivenditori ufficiali dei migliori marchi del design italiano, tra cui Veneta Cucine, Calligaris, Tomasella, Rigosalotti, Connubia e FerriMobili. La nostra linea “Smart” propone arredi pratici e accessibili, pensati per i giovani e per chi cerca soluzioni salvaspazio con stile.

𝐂𝐨𝐬𝐚 𝐜𝐢 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐞?
 Un team di arredatori esperti sempre al tuo fianco
 Progetti d’interni personalizzati e render 3D
 Ampia gamma di soluzioni d’arredo per ogni ambiente
 Servizi di consulenza, rilievo misure, trasporto e montaggio inclusi
 Un’esperienza d’acquisto trasparente, flessibile e centrata sul cliente

Crediamo che arredare significhi ascoltare. Per questo ogni progetto nasce da una consulenza attenta, pensata per interpretare gusti, esigenze e sogni.

 Segui la nostra pagina per restare aggiornato su novità, progetti, eventi e tendenze del mondo dell’arredamento.

Creating Legacies Across Generations.

Step into the rich narrative of Marka Modern Luxury Living, where design excellence is more than a philosophy - it's a family legacy woven into the fabric of every meticulously crafted piece. Through generations, our journey has been a tapestry of passion, innovation and an unwavering commitment to the art of furniture design.

A long-established family business,
Marka Modern Luxury Living is a testament to values passed down through time. Blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary flair, we shape our identity as industry pioneers. Our commitment to excellence is not just a work ethic; it is a living tradition engraved into the essence of each creation.
As custodians of a design heritage, we pride ourselves on seamlessly blending family values with a global vision. The intricate details of our furniture tell stories of heritage and innovation, timeless elegance and modern sophistication.
With each of our pieces, we aim not just to furnish spaces, but to create living experiences that transcend trends and last for generations.
Discover the chapters of our story where passion for design meets craftsmanship precision. Join us in celebrating the harmonious fusion of family traditions with a contemporary perspective as we continue to create legacies that resonate in homes around the world.

Description:
Welcome to Athalya in Kirti Nagar, Delhi, where we specialize in exquisite furniture and home furnishings. At Athalya, we believe that your home is your sanctuary, and it deserves nothing but the best.

Our showroom is a treasure trove of inspiration, offering a diverse range of furniture that seamlessly blends classic charm with contemporary allure. Whether you're looking for the perfect sofa to unwind on, a dining table to gather around, or a luxurious bedroom set for a good night's rest, we have you covered.

Quality is our hallmark. We work with trusted manufacturers and artisans to ensure that every piece we offer is built to last. You can trust Athalya to be your partner in enhancing your home's aesthetic and comfort.

Our knowledgeable and friendly staff are ready to assist you in making informed choices. Whether you need help selecting the perfect color scheme or are looking for expert interior design advice, we're here to ensure your shopping experience is both enjoyable and productive.

We understand that your home should reflect your individual style. That's why we offer customization options, allowing you to choose from a variety of finishes, fabrics, and sizes to create furniture that aligns perfectly with your vision.

Visit Athalya today and embark on a journey to transform your house into a dream home, filled with timeless beauty, comfort, and functionality. Your sanctuary awaits.

Name: One Nine Eight Five
Description:

Founded in 2016 by Eleanor Nadimi after working in the fast fashion industry, the studio focuses on creating ethical textiles, soft furnishings, artwork and commissions.
With sustainability at its core, One Nine Eight Five is a celebration of colour, comfort and the joy of home. 
The pieces are designed in our studio and manufactured by British craftsman in the UK, produced with a no-waste ethos, with an aim to close the loop on waste without compromising on design.
The collection is inspired by architectural and textural references, with the intention to make your home stand out, everyday.

Whether you're seeking the perfect centerpiece for your home or an entire ensemble to elevate your interior, our expert team is dedicated to helping you realize your vision. At our store, we believe that luxury extends beyond aesthetics—it's about creating an experience. Imbibe the ambiance of our showroom, where classic meets contemporary, and indulge in the pleasure of selecting furnishings that resonate with your unique style. From plush sofas to bespoke dining sets, our range caters to diverse tastes, ensuring that your home reflects your personality and preferences. Conveniently located in Denton, we invite you to embrace a world of unparalleled elegance and sophistication. Elevate your home with the finest in furniture design, where every piece tells a story of timeless beauty. Step into a realm where luxury becomes a part of your everyday life. Visit us today and let your home be a testament to the extraordinary. Welcome to the pinnacle of high-end furniture in Denton, where your dream home becomes a reality.

Name: 2C arredamenti
Description:
Scegli 2C arredamenti è il meglio per arredare la tua casa, ad Avellino e in Campania. Arreda solo con il meglio del design made in italy e internazionale.

 Questi primi 40 anni di attività raccontano l’avventura di una famiglia e di un’azienda che si sono affermate tra gli arredatori e progettisti d’interni, questo perché siamo da sempre votati alla promozione e alla valorizzazione del design made in Italy ed internazionale.

Non a caso i marchi che proponiamo nel nostro showroom di Mercogliano, ad Avellino, sono il top in termini di qualità, design e R&S e la loro scelta è dettata dalla nostra idea di casa: “il luogo che più di altri debba essere curato e accogliente, perché ogni giorno meritiamo un bel divano avvolgente o una comoda cucina attorno alla quale radunare la famiglia.”

I punti di forza del nostro marchio, 2C arredamenti, sono la capacità di creare una relazione duratura con i clienti, l’efficienza mostrata ad ogni sollecitazione sia tecnica che amministrativa, l’approccio customer oriented volto ad offrire soluzioni d’arredo personalizzate.

Questo è possibile anche grazie ai tanti architetti ed esperti del settore che hanno incrociato la propria storia professionale con la nostra, generando una sinergia tale da consegnare sempre un progetto unico e a misura dei propri spazi.

Non ci resta che invitarvi qui, nel nostro showroom. Dove abita il design.

Produtos de alta qualidade;

É assim que construímos nossos valores.

Name: Blooming Buds
Description:
We at Blooming Buds, believe that childhood is a celebration, and the colorful prints and cute characters we design are inspired by the joy and love children bring into our lives. 

Launched in 2013, Blooming Buds was created by a mommy of two, Samreen  Arora Malhotra who realised just how much work went into designing kids' bedrooms.
Our mission is to bring the utmost in quality, comfort, safety and style into every kid’s room.

We are proud to offer our exclusive range of children’s soft furnishings, theme-based room décor products and accessories. From nursery to playroom, our furnishings make it easy to design fun, functional spaces your child will love. Our products, also child friendly and durable, boast an array of collections, crafted from various materials and techniques; appliqué being one of our crown jewels.

We offer a wide range of products that include:
1. Newborn Bedding: Mattress sets, Fitted cot sheets, Cot sets, Cot bumpers and Baby Quilt
2. Toddler Bedding – Single/ Double Bed sheets, Toddler and Single quilts
3. Accessories: Diaper Stackers, Toiletry kits, Cot tidy

Each of our collections, draws upon our comfortable, well –designed aesthetic, and is expertly crafted from the finest materials with a careful regard for child safety standards.

Our products also make a great gifting option be it for welcoming a new bundle of joy or as a return gift for your child’s birthday. We also provide turnkey bedroom solutions where we provide you a theme-based décor so that your little one has his/her dream room.

Name: Palefire Studio Limited
Description:
Palefire works to blur some of the historically distinct lines between domestic design and ‘fine art’, bringing an artistic sensibility to design for the home. 

We make homeware which challenges, and offers an antidote to, the minimalist aesthetic still dominating the market. Our flamboyant approach, drawing on the spirit and romance of historical art and design moments like Art Nouveau, the Omega Workshops, Abstract Expressionism, and mid-century Murano glass-making, is always underpinned by a commitment to responsible design practices.

U/V, our debut collection, comprises eight decorative light designs based on a modular system using five moulded, recycled paper-pulp shapes. Each structure – lightweight, robust, and uniquely textured – is manufactured in small batches at a family-run workshop in Barcelona, then assembled and hand-painted at our studio in vibrant patterns and bold block-colour combinations using non-toxic, natural paint and varnishes. Each design is paired and painted to order, reducing stock waste. Bespoke finishes are available upon request.

Name: OdunDesignHub
Description:
Welcome to Odun Design Hub

At Odun Design Hub, we are more than a furniture brand - we are architects of comfort and creators of refined living spaces.

 Elevating Comfort and Elegance:

Backed by years of expertise, our team of artisans and designers infuse every creation with precision and passion. Each piece bears the hallmark of superior craftsmanship, delivering quality that surpasses expectations.

 Inspiring Spaces, Personalized Service:
Beyond providing exceptional furniture, we specialize in creating personalized experiences. Our dedicated consultations ensure that every piece harmonizes seamlessly with our client's visions, transforming houses into homes that reflect individuality and style.

 Redefining Luxury Worldwide:
From local residences to international spaces, we cater to a global clientele seeking the epitome of luxury and comfort. Our commitment to excellence transcends boundaries, bringing the essence of Odun Design Hub to homes around the world.

 Join Us on a Journey of Luxury Living:
We invite you to connect with us and embark on a journey where comfort meets sophistication, and each piece of furniture narrates a story of timeless elegance. Let Odun Design Hub redefine luxury living for you.

Welcome to a world where comfort is an art form, and elegance knows no bounds. Welcome to Odun Design Hub.

Name: Stuart David Furniture
Description:
Welcome to Stuart David, where craftsmanship meets sustainability. Proudly handcrafted in California, our furniture stands as a testament to superior quality and timeless design. With a legacy spanning over four decades, we are dedicated to creating pieces that are beautiful and built to last.

We believe that furniture should reflect the individuality of your home. Our extensive collection includes bedroom sets, dining room tables, office furniture, and entertainment centers, all available in a variety of styles, wood types, and finishes. Each piece is meticulously crafted from solid hardwood, sourced from sustainably managed forests, ensuring that your furniture is eco-friendly and durable.

Our commitment to customization sets us apart. We offer a range of options to tailor each piece to your specific needs, including custom sizes, finishes, and configurations. Whether you’re looking for a classic design or a modern statement piece, Stuart David has the perfect solution to complement your home décor.

Our mission extends beyond creating exquisite furniture. We are dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and building lasting relationships with our clients. From the initial design consultation to the final delivery, our team is here to assist you every step of the way, ensuring that your experience with Stuart David is seamless and enjoyable.

As a family-owned business, we understand the importance of community and sustainability. We take pride in our environmentally conscious manufacturing processes.

Explore our collections and discover the difference that genuine craftsmanship can make. Join the Stuart David community and bring home furniture that tells a story of quality, sustainability, and style.

Visit us at www.stuartdavid.com to learn more about our products and customization options. Follow our LinkedIn page for the latest updates, design inspiration, and exclusive promotions.

Stuart David – Crafting Tomorrow's Heirlooms, Today.

Whether you’re furnishing a new home or giving your space a fresh look, we’re here to make it easy and enjoyable. At Home Furniture, we’re quickly becoming one of New Zealand’s favourite affordable furniture brands. Our range features everything from luxurious sofas and lounge suites, including corner designs, armchairs, recliners, and sofa beds, to beautifully crafted living room pieces like coffee tables, consoles, lamp tables, and TV units.

We also offer a complete selection of dining room furniture, from elegant dining suites and buffets to dining tables, chairs, and bar stools, plus a dreamy collection of bedroom sets, beds, and mattresses designed for comfort and style.

With flexible payment options available both in-store and online, creating your dream home has never been more accessible. Visit us and discover how affordable, beautiful furniture can transform your living space.

As true Lloyd Loom enthusiasts, we also specialise in restoration services. Whether it’s a treasured armchair passed down through generations or a vintage sofa in need of a little TLC, we can restore any piece of Loom furniture to its former glory.

Timeless design, authentic craftsmanship, and a century of tradition — that’s Maycroft Lloyd Loom.

Name: Exotique Romania
Description:
Exotique was founded in 2004 by Pusa Hack and Andrew Hack with a vision to bring unique, high-quality furniture and decor to Romania. Their journey is one of passion, exploration, and business success—turning a love for travel and craftsmanship into a brand that has redefined interior spaces for over 20 years.

Today, their daughter, Jennifer Hack, is honored to carry this legacy forward—curating distinctive collections, expanding the brand’s reach, and ensuring that Exotique remains a bridge between Asian craftsmanship and Romanian elegance. Her mission is to celebrate heritage while evolving with modern tastes, offering furniture that tells a story and transforms spaces.

From the start, Exotique was designed as an Inspirational Boutique, offering carefully curated pieces for those who appreciate beauty and originality. Rather than focusing on a single style or region, Exotique has always embraced diversity, introducing new designs and influences from across the world.

As Her Royal Highness Crown Princess Margareta of Romania described it, Exotique represents "a paradise of good taste, courage, and Romania’s openness to the world."

Over the years, Exotique has brought handcrafted furniture and decor into Romanian homes—featuring fine materials, intricate carvings, and hand-painted details from Thailand, India, Morocco, Indonesia, Vietnam, and more. Alongside these global pieces, the brand also curates select European collections, blending cultural heritage with timeless design.

Name: Loxo
Description:
Promouvoir le commerce de proximité de mobilier et objets de seconde main à l’aide d’une plateforme mettant en avant le réseau local des brocanteurs expérimentés.

Conception d'une plateforme "clé en main" permettant d’élargir la visibilité et la performance des commerçants locaux tout en leur permettant de conserver une totale indépendance.

Inclure un engagement solidaire au cœur de la stratégie en reversant l'intégralité des bénéfices à des associations caritatives mais également grâce à un modèle de rentabilité militant et raisonné.

L’essence du projet est la transparence, car nous considérons qu’elle seule peut garantir la sincérité de la démarche et instaurer la confiance.

Il s’agira de la déployer à chaque étape du système de valeur avec de la transparence concernant l’impact écologique, l'exercice financier, les salaires plafonnés, mais aussi la redistribution aux associations.

Name: BOINER - Arredi su misura
Description:
BOINER è il brand della Gaspare Mirrione S.p.A. dedicato all'arredo indoor personalizzato e su misura. BOINER è la risposta puntuale all’esigenza della clientela di avere arredi creati su misura, unici, progettati e realizzati per assicurare la massima soddisfazione all’acquirente. E’ un brand dinamico, elegante, contemporaneo. La scelta del design e dei materiali è un inno alla bellezza e alla funzionalità. 
I Plus:
- Accompagniamo il cliente nelle fasi di progettazione, nella scelta dei materiali e delle finiture, fino alla completa realizzazione del progetto.
- Competenza e professionalità: studiamo ogni singolo elemento per essere sempre pronti a capire la soluzione migliore da prospettare al cliente.
- Disponibilità e gentilezza: il nostro team è empatico, capisce cosa desidera il cliente e fornisce la risposta ad ogni sua necessità.
- Forniamo progetti su misura personalizzati.
- Realizziamo arredi all’avanguardia ed ecosostenibili.
Ogni arredo ed accessorio fornito nasce dalla combinazione del desiderio del cliente e delle nostre competenze.
- Semplifichiamo la vita ai nostri clienti con soluzioni chiavi in mano complete e basate sulla conoscenza del legno e dei materiali affini. 
Gaspare Mirrione S.p.A. è un’azienda storica specializzata nella vendita di legnami e nella realizzazione di costruzioni in legno. Nata ad Alcamo da generazioni di bottai che dalla fine dell’800 lavoravano artigianalmente il legno, è oggi una solida realtà̀ imprenditoriale con sede nel polo industriale di Castelvetrano. Grazie ad una costante specializzazione nel settore e alla ricerca di innovazione tecnologica, l’azienda è riuscita ad espandere il proprio core business dalla vendita di legnami al comparto arredo-legno, con un ampio Showroom dedicato all’arredo indoor e outdoor (sia per privati che per clienti business).

Ne dorim să fim sursa de inspirație care îți transformă casa într-un spațiu care să te reprezinte și la care să te întorci în fiecare zi cu plăcere. Soluțiile pentru faceri sau birouri sunt menite să ofere un spațiu de lucru cât mai plăcut echipei tale și să genereze cele mai productive întâlniri alături de partenerii tăi.
La noi vei găsi o selecție vastă de mobilier de la spațiu de lucru, corpuri de bucătărie, amenajare baie, soluții depozitare, living, corpuri de iluminat, accesorii pentru casă și alte articole din care poți alege combinațiile cele mai potrivite pentru tine pentru care oferim și designer interior.
Printre beneficiile pe care ți le oferim este acela că tot ceea ce îți dorești poate ajunge direct la tine, cu livrare din fabrică sau din stocurile interne în câteva zile.

Name: Olaria
Description:
Olaria is a new retail concept that celebrates imperfection, sustainability, and accessible design. We source artisan-quality ceramic tableware with slight flaws — factory seconds, overstock, and discontinued pieces — from independent potteries in Europe and South America and offer them in-store, sold by the pound.

Our mission is to reduce waste in the home goods supply chain, democratize beautiful design, and create a shopping experience rooted in tactile discovery and intentional curation. Each piece we offer has a story: a glaze that ran, a pattern that was discontinued, a form that was handmade but not mass-perfect. We believe these pieces are not just “good enough” — they’re what make a table personal, layered, and real.

Designed for diggers, hosts, stylists, and value-savvy creatives, Olaria invites customers to mix and match their own collection — with new shipments arriving regularly and no two bins alike. Our flagship location opens soon in Atlanta in a 5,200 square foot space just steps from Restaurant Depot, where we’ll serve both everyday shoppers and small businesses like caterers and restaurateurs.

At Olaria, you’ll find handcrafted, microwave-safe, dishwasher-safe ceramics priced affordably and presented beautifully. No pretense. No perfection. Just pieces you’ll love to hold, display, and use.

Follow us on Instagram @olariausa for sourcing stories, behind-the-scenes previews, and a front-row seat to building something strikingly imperfect.

 #wabi-sabi #ByThePound #OlariaUSA #SustainableDesign

Description:

The various objects we find have had a long life already behind them ; we have them repaired when necessary, in some cases we have them modified to make them more practical. We often choose to keep their marks of time as witnesses of their age.

As our research progresses, we develop our knowledge of local traditional objects, their uses and their craftsmanship. We are committed to sharing with our community the story behind each object on our blog, our e-shop and our networks.

We are at the service of the end customer, but also of decoration professionals: interior designers, designers, hotels, restaurants... So, if you are looking for furniture with a story for your project, do not hesitate to contact us.

Name: WASTE NOT WANT NOT
Description:
Waste Not Want Not (WNWN) is a registered charity established in 2002 to collect surplus furniture and household goods still in good condition, to pass on at affordable prices to people on low income, using a workforce of predominantly volunteers.
WNWN’s aims are to:
-	Reduce the effect of poverty by offering a source of good quality furniture and household items at low cost. Replicate the customer experience given by a High Street retailer by ensuring the showroom stock is set out attractively. 

-	Offer volunteering and work expereince to the local community enabling them to build confidence, life skills and for those that wish gain help with CV writing and interview preparation to move on to paid employment.

-	Help the environment by collecting free of charge surplus household items fit for reuse to divert usable goods away from the waste stream. For every sofa that is reused instead of being replaced by new it’s the equivalent of 4,479 trees taking in CO2

Name: Ooshky
Description:
Ooshky is a play on the word Uisge - gaelic for water and part of the phrase Uisge Beatha meaning water of life which gave rise to the name whisky.

For wholesale, find us on Faire: ooshky.faire.com


A drop of water can open out the flavours of your whisky, truly enhancing the experience but it can be easy to add too much and spoil the drink. Ooshky lets you add just a drop of water to your whisky and with full control over the flow, you will never drown your dram again.

 

To use, simply fill, cover & pour. The larger hole is covered with your thumb and flow is then controlled by partially releasing your thumb allowing air to flow in, and water to flow out.

A perfect gift for yourself or a fellow whisky lover.

Designed in Scotland

Name: Artiana
Description:
ARTIANA PROPAGIERT IHREN EIGENEN STIL

Individuell wohnen ist immer eine Frage des guten Geschmacks, aber auch das Resultat einer ganzheitlichen Planung. 

Artiana ist auf Gesamtwohnberatungen spezialisiert und bietet alles aus einer Hand. Auch das Verändern bestehender Einrichtungen oder das Planen individueller Möbel-, Textil- und Einrichtungsbedürfnisse gehört zu den Kernkompetenzen. 

Ein fachkundiges Team nimmt sich den individuellen Wünschen an. Dabei gilt es mit unkonventionellen und überraschenden Lösungen zu überzeugen, die über dem Erwarteten liegen und auf die spezifischen Lebensgewohnheiten sowie die räumliche Atmosphäre abgestimmt sind. 

Artiana propagiert ihren eigenen, unverkennbaren Stil – der sich im Laden und Showroom sichtbar entfaltet. Die Bemusterung bei Ihnen zu Hause erleichtert die Wahl des passenden Objektes in Ihrer eigenen Umgebung.

Though it has been difficult to visit the house, we have made as many trips as possible. It was during one of these trips, that we came across the Cactus Silk cushions and thought these would look great in our house....so we bought a few. 

Essaouira has a plethora of individual artisan shops, throughout the ancient Medina and it is from these shops that we source our cushions, Thuya wood, pottery, Tamegroute and rugs.

We love the area and are delighted to be able to share some of our enjoyment with you

Das erste Projekt, das im September 2023 während der Vienna Design Week gestartet wurde, ist eine Zusammenarbeit zwischen der Lampendesignerin BADE EROL und der Designerin und Gründerin des Studios, LENI PIËCH. Die zwei Lampenkollektionen, PYTHIA und CALLIOPE (insgesamt 6 Pendelleuchten), sind sehr besondere handgefertigte, limitierte Stücke aus Glas und Keramik.

About
SPHAER is a young collaboration design studio based in Vienna – it conceptualises and develops lamps, furniture designs, and interior accessories that come to life through collaborations between designers, artists, and craftsmen. Currently, sales are conducted exclusively online at https://www.studiosphaer.com/.

The first project, launched in September 2023 during the Vienna Design Week, is a collaboration between lamp designer BADE EROL and the studio's designer and founder LENI PIËCH. The two lamp collections, PYTHIA and CALLIOPE (a total of 6 pendant lights), are very special handmade, limited pieces made of glass and ceramic.

Name: Lauridsens Møbler
Description:
Lauridsens Møbler er en familieejet virksomhed, som har eksisteret i mere end 62 år, hvor vi har levet af salg af møbler og senge til sommerhuse og private hjem. 

Vi er ikke kun en butik som holder til på nettet. Butikken ligger i handelsbyen Nørre Nebel meget nær den jyske vestkyst.

Hos os lægger vi stor vægt på kvalitet, godt håndværk og så at give dig som kunde, den bedste service vi kan yde.

I butikken har du mulighed for at se og prøve de fleste af produkterne inden du køber dem.
Vi er altid klar til at svare på dine spørgsmål og vejlede og rådgive dig, hvis du er i tvivl om hvad der passer bedst til dig.

Vi har alt i boligtilbehør, møbler og senge til sommerhuset og privat boligen.
Location: Nørre Nebel, Region of Southern Denmark

Name: Mattressville
Description:
Mattressville specializes in sourcing a large selection of quality brand-name bedding products and mattresses while offering competitive pricing. We love creating a unique shopping experience by providing our customers with help from our knowledgeable staff, ensuring they go home with a product that complements their needs.
 
Our products include the best eco-friendly, orthopedic, natural latex, memory foam, euro top, and pillow top mattresses. We offer great deals on Stearns and Foster, Sealy Posturpedic, Sealy Euro Top, Marshall, Tempur-Pedic, Kingsdown products with discounts from 30% to 80% off.
 
Luxury memory foam, pocket coil, gel memory and more, are available in store in different firmness and comfort levels. We understand the growing demand for natural, eco-friendly mattresses, therefore we've expended our non-innerspring product collection with Natural Latex.
 
When it comes to your sleep, it's important to pick a mattress that enables the best rest possible. We can help.

Name: Loft24.nl
Description:
Welkom bij Loft24! Wij zijn uw toonaangevende bron voor hoogwaardige meubelen, zowel online als in onze conceptstore. Onze passie ligt in het leveren van stijlvolle en functionele meubelstukken die uw interieur naar een hoger niveau tillen.

Met onze uitgebreide collectie kunt u kiezen uit een scala aan eigentijdse en klassieke ontwerpen die perfect aansluiten bij uw persoonlijke smaak en levensstijl. Of u nu op zoek bent naar een comfortabele bank, een elegante eettafel, praktische opbergoplossingen of trendy accessoires, Loft24 heeft het allemaal om uw huis compleet te maken.

Onze online winkel biedt u het gemak van winkelen vanuit het comfort van uw eigen huis. Met een gebruiksvriendelijke interface kunt u moeiteloos door ons diverse assortiment bladeren, gedetailleerde productinformatie raadplegen en uw favoriete meubelen bestellen. Ons toegewijde team staat klaar om uw vragen te beantwoorden en u te helpen bij het maken van de juiste keuzes. Uw tevredenheid is onze topprioriteit en we streven ernaar om een naadloze en gepersonaliseerde winkelervaring te bieden.

Voor een meer persoonlijke aanpak nodigen wij u graag uit om onze conceptstore te bezoeken. Hier kunt u de meubelen in levenden lijve ervaren, voelen en bewonderen. Ons team van ervaren interieurontwerpers staat klaar om u te begeleiden en te adviseren bij het vinden van de perfecte meubelstukken die aansluiten bij uw individuele behoeften en stijlvoorkeuren.

Bij Loft24 hechten we niet alleen waarde aan stijl en kwaliteit, maar ook aan duurzaamheid. We werken samen met leveranciers en merken die zich inzetten voor milieuvriendelijke productieprocessen en materialen. Zo kunt u met een gerust hart winkelen en bijdragen aan een betere toekomst voor onze planeet.

Volg onze LinkedIn-pagina om op de hoogte te blijven van de nieuwste trends, inspiratie op te doen en updates te ontvangen over onze collecties en speciale aanbiedingen.

Name: CHIMERA FURNITURES
Description:
We are an innovative and value driven company in the business of Manufacturer of retail fixtures, Household & Office furniture and industrial solutions in India. We are currently based on G1-596 Khushkheda Ind. Area, Bhiwadi , Rajasthan 301707 India.
We have since our inception been working with Retails Stores of MP,  Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Haryana Punjab, UP, Delhi and other locations of India  for retail, Domestic and office and industrial applications, alike.

The value we add to for our clients:

Modern know-how & technology, capable of delivering high precision manufacturing, involving scale and scope. We are extremely adept with sheet metal, wood and wire products.

We give shape to your product concepts, customised to your needs, therefore delivering unique experiences to your clients.

Systems and processes in place to apprise you of the status of your projects and a single communication window

We are responsible for quality at each stage in the value chain, from concept design to manufacturing to installation. A one stop shop for all your needs.

Segments – Supermarkets, hypermarkets, pharmacies, general stores, speciality stores, consumer electronics, cosmetics, and many others.

We have developed and supplied a wide range of Domestic, office, industrial & institutional Furniture.

Name: HEIRLOOM AMISH FURNITURE
Description:
At Heirloom Amish Furniture we're dedicated to preserving the artistry of Amish craftsmanship.  Specializing in customizable solid wood indoor furniture and durable poly outdoor patio furniture, we bring a touch of tradition and quality to every home.
  Our commitment extends beyond furniture;  we're proud to offer a unique assortment of Amish cheeses, pickled vegetables and fruits, artisanal jams and jellies, all natural and sourced with care.  Immerse yourself in the warmth of Amish culture as you explore our curated selection.
  But we don't stop there.  Our shelves and walls also feature local artwork that reflects the beauty of our community, candles to add ambiance, and decor pieces that resonate with the simplicity and elegance of Amish heritage.
   Discover a blend of craftsmanship, quality, and culture at Heirloom Amish Furniture Market and More.  Your home, our tradition.

Selections range from classic to modern and everything in between. Let our rugs be the centerpiece of your room or the final touch that brings it all together. We can make your home amazing!
We will exceed our customers’ expectations in quality, service, and value, while continually increasing our value to our future clients; and provide growth opportunities for our people. We will accomplish this in an environment that values and respects the varied backgrounds of all people.

Name: Marc & Main
Description:
Marc & Main is where discerning Perth shoppers find stylish, unique and functional dining furniture.

We offer Perth’s largest range of dining chairs, tables, and kitchen stools so you can mix, match, and create a space that feels truly yours. Whether you’re after a complete new dining setting, adding chairs to a table you already love, or choosing kitchen stools to tie it all together, you’ll find pieces that suit your style, your home, and the way you live.

Much of our collection is held in stock and ready to go from our Osborne Park location. With our showroom and warehouse both on-site, you can experience it in person and collect the same day (some items require a lead time).

Finding the right furniture for your space isn’t always easy. That’s why we offer a 30-day risk-free trial on all orders. If you’re not completely in love, simply return your items for a full refund (excluding delivery). We never want you to feel stuck with something that doesn’t suit your home. You’re also welcome to take a few different chairs or stools to see how the options look in your space. If none feel right, simply return them for a full refund. No pressure, no risk, just peace of mind.

Name: Mila Home Netherlands
Description:
Mila Home is a luxury and sustainable home textile brand based in the Netherlands, built on years of behind-the-scenes craftsmanship.

For over a decade, we have crafted private label collections for renowned European home and fashion brands — always with an uncompromising commitment to quality, sustainability and quiet luxury.

Today, Mila Home is our own story: one of softness, science and soulful design.

With flagship stores and a curated webshop, we offer premium bedding and table linens that combine timeless aesthetics with tactile elegance. Our collections are designed in the Netherlands and made to last — ethically, beautifully, and consciously.

Every product is created with purpose: OEKO-TEX certified materials, low-impact production and minimalist packaging. For each purchase, we plant a tree in the Netherlands to give back to the land we call home.
